Key Features: Election data and turnout insights Breakdown of vote-splitting and outcomes Mobile-friendly analysis of RCV impacts Access from any phone or computer Understand what really happened—and why it matters. | This Memorial Day, while we honor the service and sacrifice of those who gave everything for our freedoms, we also reflect on what those freedoms are meant to protect—honest government, fair opportunity, and a voice for the people. But in Juneau, the people are being forgotten. The Legislature just closed its latest session—not with discipline, not with restraint, but with a stampede of giveaways. Millions of dollars in taxpayer funds handed over to the National Education Association and entrenched union bureaucracies—while schools close their doors, and more Alaskan families than ever turn to charter schools and homeschooling. What was the dividend meant to do? The Permanent Fund Dividend was designed as a promise—that all Alaskans would share in the wealth of our natural resources. It was never meant to become a slush fund for lobbyists, consultants, and political machines controlled by out-of-state interests. This is not just bad budgeting. It’s a betrayal of the people—and the purpose—of Alaska. Our upcoming film, The Permanent Short: Alaska’s Billion Dollar Betrayal , will expose this corruption. We’ll follow the money and show how generations of Alaskans are being denied their share, their voice, and their future. And the movement is already growing. Our Angel tickets were the first to sell out for “Frozen Odds” —a powerful signal that Alaskans are ready to fight back. Angel supporters receive exclusive access to both The Permanent Short and Frozen Odds , the film that lit the fuse. This is just the beginning. The fight for Alaska’s future isn’t over. It’s just getting started. In 2001, Enron collapsed under the weight of one of the largest corporate frauds in American history—over $25 billion evaporated overnight, leaving pensions gutted and lives destroyed. It was called the smartest disaster money could buy. But what if the next Enron wasn’t a corporation? What if it was your own government? This film asks the billion-dollar question: What happens when a state quietly reallocates tens of billions of dollars meant for its citizens—without a vote, without consent, and without accountability? We follow the money—through shadowy nonprofits, bloated bureaucracies, and politically connected networks like Arabella Advisors , Alaska Venture Fund , and the 1630 Fund. It’s a financial betrayal not buried in spreadsheets—but broadcast in silence. $25 billion gone —not from shareholders this time, but from the people of Alaska. This is The Permanent Short. More announcements coming soon. Thank you for being part of this journey. | Now we have 108 supporters for “Frozen Odds” Frozen Odds How do you take on $15 million with nothing but determination, grassroots organizing, and a clipboard? Frozen Odds is a gripping documentary that uncovers the raw power of citizen-led initiatives in Alaska. Following the journey of a small but determined movement, this film reveals how everyday people—outspent 100 to 1 by out-of-state interests—rallied together to challenge the system. Led by an Alaskans for Alaskans who helped write the law and push it to the ballot, this battle wasn’t just about policy—it was about democracy in its purest form. With 400+ volunteers braving the cold, gathering 42,000 signatures when only 26,000 were needed, they proved that people—not money—should shape the laws that govern them. Through intimate interviews, on-the-ground footage, and stunning Alaskan landscapes, Frozen Odds captures the high-stakes struggle against political elites (aka Lisa Murkowski and George Soros, etc.) and the enduring spirit of grassroots activism. Though the campaign fell just 700 votes short out of 320,000, it laid the groundwork for a new wave of initiatives—this time, with three fresh petitions ready to take the fight forward. In a world where billionaires and lobbyists try to control the political process. Frozen Odds asks a bold question: What happens when ordinary citizens refuse to back down? | | | | Follow Me On X @907Honest | | Phil Izon 12110 Business Blvd Ste A06 Box #113 Eagle River 99577 United States

name: Michael Finch
subject: Radical Son
body:
If you’ve ever read or heard David Horowitz’s work, then you already know: He wasn’t afraid to tell the truth.

| | |
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1o4l9dlgmgschpk6nps4hcrf4sqfjctb08b3558_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob5cjh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,By now you may have heard that David Horowitz passed away recently. **If you’ve ever read or heard David Horowitz’s work, then you already know: He wasn’t afraid to tell the truth.** **[And today, I want to tell you how you can arm yourself with the truth—in David’s own words—and help us keep his legacy alive for generations to come.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdq2gsemreg0t0m2ns7m1h11na2pp2edfbj5qd1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob5cjh2bs)** You see, David changed the trajectory of the conservative movement. As Charlie Kirk of Turning Point USA put it: **“David didn’t just write. He debated. He showed up. He walked into hostile auditoriums and faced down Marxist professors, Islamist apologists, and race hustlers – armed only with truth, moral clarity, and a sharp tongue.”** Now that David is gone, it’s up to all of us to carry on his fight. And _his_ Freedom Center is doing exactly that. To supercharge our efforts, to arm you with the truth, and most especially to honor his legacy, today [**I want to send you a copy of the book that changed everything:** **Radical Son: A Generational Odyssey.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh0pff3b0smt0nkvf1tpce0mvnnpil97tjabg6v0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob5cjh2bs)
---
| | This is David’s story — from his Marxist upbringing...To his friendship with Huey Newton of the Black Panthers...To the brutal murder that shattered his illusions and opened his eyes to the radical Left’s true nature. Many conservatives call this book _monumental,_ _formative,_ and _one of the most important books a conservative American could ever read._ [**That’s why I want to give you a copy.****All I ask is that you help us keep David’s mission alive by making a tax-deductible donation of $60 or more.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqc847ho5jtbtc75gmsjee8hlso444ik97r26u38_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob5cjh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3s0ittu255o0u5ge471rc9g45bkdtcfab52rpt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob5cjh2bs)
---
| | [ **CLAIM YOUR COPY** ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb2are8vlgffvmvbnrqhgj34q719eva8cqpivtq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob5cjh2bs)
---
If you can give $100 or more, I’ll send you two copies — one for you, and one to give as a gift to someone who needs to hear David’s warning. Friend, my name is Daniel Greenfield and I am the new CEO of the David Horowitz Freedom Center.It was the honor of my life to work so closely with David for years, fighting for his most critical legacy, the David Horowitz Freedom Center. David used to say that his Freedom Center “isn’t a think tank; it’s a battle tank.” And with the help of patriots like you, over the decades this battle tank has become powerful weapon against the left.**But my friend, your support today is critical if we’re going to keep fighting David’s battle—because the radical Left isn’t backing down.** In fact, mere days after David’s passing, the liberal media took to disrespectful smears of his life’s work.A columnist at the _New York Times_ sneered that David “executed a dizzying transit from the extreme left to the extreme right.” And the _Los Angeles Times_ mocked him as a “raspy-voiced provocateur” who relied on “straw man arguments so much that I’m sure the Scarecrow from _The Wizard of Oz_ is wondering where his royalties are.”**Attacks like these are why the Freedom Center’s battle is far from over.** We must take up the torch of David Horowitz’s legacy and continue his fight because the radical Left is only growing more emboldened and more powerful.They encourage college students to violently protest on behalf of murderous Hamas terrorists...They defend criminals who have no respect for our nation’s laws and blame their illegal behavior on “racism”... They scream from the rooftops that we all must accept “transgender” predators and rapists for the sake of “inclusion”...**David saw it all coming. Decades ago.** **[You’ll get an insider look into his realization as you read _Radical Son._](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfph7v7buo2p2kugeld1rmnvc9e4en69l5t0hugg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob5cjh2bs)** As David understood, the radical Left is following the same march to Communism that the former Soviet Union did. And I truly believe it’s only because of David’s work that the modern-day conservative movement is finally fighting the right battle.This isn’t a misunderstanding. This isn’t a disagreement.**This is about stopping the radical Left from DESTROYING AMERICA.** Most conservatives are too scared or too weak to say it. But the Freedom Center isn’t:**Leftists are the extremists. They’re the traitors. They’re the insurrectionists.** The Freedom Center has been at the forefront of this battle — long before the rest of the conservative movement caught on to what the radical Left is doing to our country.And because of how effective we’ve been, we’ve paid the price:
---
* Vimeo and YouTube censored and blocked us from uploading our videos to their websites.
* Left-wing extremists at the Southern Poverty Law Center convinced MasterCard to shut off our credit card processing (thank goodness it’s back on now)...
* Long-time business partners and venues cut our contracts out of the blue.

---
**But we’ve survived because of brave patriotic Americans who stood with us.** People who _know_ what David stood for.
People who _believe_ in the mission.
People who are ready to keep fighting — even now. **[And if I’m describing YOU, then I hope you’ll stand with us today by making a tax-deductible donation of $60 or more.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaumbind4dn7eft9hmd8481l1tk1546ktsp4kb80_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob5cjh2bs)** And if you can send back an extra-generous renewal donation of $100 or more, I will send you _two_ copies of this book – one for you, and one for you to give as a gift.This book has changed the face of our conservative movement. So perhaps you have a child, grandchild, friend, or neighbor you could give your second copy to. I truly believe that David’s story is going to continue to change lives – and fuel the fire of our conservative movement for decades to come.That’s exactly what we’re focusing on at the Freedom Center.We have never been more determined to expose the radical Left...Untangle their dark web of money... Upend their propaganda and lies...**And smash their plot to destroy our country.** David’s legacy must be fought for. The Freedom Center is taking up his torch. **[But I need your help to keep his fight going.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zli5mhq7d7ka0koi9icbdoq8bost5g6t6rvi543g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob5cjh2bs)** Thank you in advance for standing with us.
---
For freedom,
---
**Daniel Greenfield** CEO, David Horowitz Freedom Center
---
P.S. David’s fight is far from over. Everything he predicted over the past 40 years has come true – from the Left encouraging college students to protest on behalf of terrorists... to defending criminals who have no respect for our nation’s laws... to screaming that we must accept “transgender” predators for the sake of “inclusion”... _Radical Son_ explains how we got here... and what comes next. **[Please make a generous donation of $60 or more to support the Freedom Center — and I’ll send you a copy of this landmark book.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1c6ed973onnrfo80v604sa3l8629p1prhsrtoqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob5cjh2bs)**
---
[ **CLAIM YOUR COPY** ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcesd2vo6lcl1hbeou80vdbu65scrr321dbq2a30_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob5cjh2bs)
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zakgui1ct48uk0o3i7c4c891ub4ltbtnt2nm8t1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zoh1fad2pof9q27d1a26htliv3d8049398733ac0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr67v54anf76iq0ca48db3ljgjtolsdaa7pie5d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8tjqp1skm9qufcqksvlvh34hkp97ei96l32bsv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh7mi9ch8a0i1j7rhbm4nduun557tq2j916mo9u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zoaoenje0rrsrkoah9iimrk8tj8uta6pbufaglv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze3pfbrvpnifn3clrhb28i2r39526mk7kmv5lln0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---

clean_body: take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | | | | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Millions of families are already watching Season One of Iggy and Mr. Kirk on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on Iggy and Mr. Kirk and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. ** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your , I’ll send you Season One of Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your , I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing Iggy and Mr. Kirk to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Will I see you there?
body:
Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn7t13dvoki94ihuegt1fptbgec7v4mnu75q6ab8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to **[sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhph3klvkj55ojdohls0hvin94lncp5djjg2l3ng_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)** If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze6hehtbrkk5070g0ncp4aig3gr6qqm59fot7648_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z98c1iblkd25rjosl65vdvta48ge833pfokqnrf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze6stflvnic1mg2p2hhm3241b72t4punk9r6ihh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5ej88opl6igtd4d9db822ard31ld3797trjbq7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdjsfu0phok11agul07rl3n13kqmqhr4ao9fqdtg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmugvu9e4dlqqpi4dc3vkd3no0be2bpkaelqgt38_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values!**[**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhuvlosl0f5f7kefn47p0cijq9jotcopim8hnqbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **Brave Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **Brave Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **Brave Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.**I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...**...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That’s why I hope you’ll give a sponsorship gift of $175, $350, $525 or more today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9q90ih6blldraovbf7r9m548ig68i7448gl01d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.**Brave Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[**please consider a sponsorship gift of $175.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1nck5hk11f48gm85u5rskbmg1hrra3clps41f40_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower please get your sponsorship gift in within the next 48 hours so we know how many libraries we can get into this August!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd6gemr281qbr76fatep33bat7atbu6qgm6mjrag_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq4ks912nbnse3dsg18r76tqn543i23o6pd5uen8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfpr9cnv7ustl6rhrohl4se78t0c1mslkrpeqouo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbb17nko5k5uc0bdnspfutr21uj3rkk91mg5kc60_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)
---
**Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zok81au7jeu523fkev4k7lh15suvfj8ngtcutu2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z56m9vadfbgqogovumdpsi800d7bno9mrf9qgle8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9tqep17lrkcngu091q0l0p2pjse1j2gmgod1pio_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5h66ob6cjh2bs)
---|---|---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential

name: Goldco
subject: [Shocking New Report] U.S. Dollar To Crash?
body:
Stability. Wealth Protection. Long Term Financial Growth.

| | |
# **Buy And Store _Your Own_ Gold & Silver!**
---
|
---
| | Stability. Wealth Protection. Long Term Financial Growth. This is what many Americans are searching for when they purchase precious metals like gold and silver. But what’s the best way to buy these precious metals? Do you buy an ETF (Exchange Traded Fund), or do you get your hands on the real thing? Here’s the thing about ETFs...
---
| |
---
| You don’t actually own the gold or silver.
---
| |
---
| You can’t take physical delivery of the metal.
---
| |
---
| Taxes and fees can eat away at your gains.
---
| |
---
| Shares may or may not have sufficient gold or silver backing.
---
| | But with physical gold or silver, you are the one in the driver’s seat. You have the control you’re looking for with your hard earned money. Here are the top 5 reasons why you should own physical gold and silver...
---
1. **Immediate Access**
Being able to open your safe and put your hands on the physical gold and silver coins you own brings reassurance to many gold and silver owners.
2. **Complete control**
You can stick it under your mattress, hide it in a wall, store it in a safe, bury it in your backyard or put it in a bank safe deposit box.
3. **Easy Portability**
If you think there’s ever a potential situation in which you may have to leave your house at short notice, you’ll want personal possession of your metals.
4. **Convenient Flexibility**
Taking physical possession of gold and silver is just one more tool in the toolbox, one more way to diversify your retirement savings.
5. **No Pricey Fees**
With ETFs and other forms of owning precious metals, you are forced to deal with fund managers, exchanges, custodial storage, and even sales of fund assets that can carry pesky fees that add up over time.

---

This is what many Americans are searching for when they purchase precious metals like gold and silver. But what’s the best way to buy these precious metals? Do you buy an ETF (Exchange Traded Fund), or do you get your hands on the real thing? Here’s the thing about ETFs... | | | You don’t actually own the gold or silver. | | | You can’t take physical delivery of the metal. | | | Taxes and fees can eat away at your gains. | | | Shares may or may not have sufficient gold or silver backing. | | But with physical gold or silver, you are the one in the driver’s seat. You have the control you’re looking for with your hard earned money. Here are the top 5 reasons why you should own physical gold and silver... 1. Immediate Access Being able to open your safe and put your hands on the physical gold and silver coins you own brings reassurance to many gold and silver owners. 2. Complete control You can stick it under your mattress, hide it in a wall, store it in a safe, bury it in your backyard or put it in a bank safe deposit box. 3. Easy Portability If you think there’s ever a potential situation in which you may have to leave your house at short notice, you’ll want personal possession of your metals. 4. Convenient Flexibility Taking physical possession of gold and silver is just one more tool in the toolbox, one more way to diversify your retirement savings. 5. No Pricey Fees With ETFs and other forms of owning precious metals, you are forced to deal with fund managers, exchanges, custodial storage, and even sales of fund assets that can carry pesky fees that add up over time. | | If you want to learn more about buying and controlling your own physical gold and silver, get your free copy of... | | | In this free guide, you’ll learn... body:

Dr. Oz and his team are exposing how deep the **FRAUD** in Medicaid is.

Dr. Oz and RFK discovered that **MILLIONS** are being spent for illegal immigrants to be on Medicaid in California, and then they push the bill onto the federal government.

**This is insane.**

For far too long, Americans on Medicaid have been promised they will be protected and treated better.

President Trump promised to **YOU** that he would do everything to make programs like Medicaid better, and he is.

Yet, Democrats are doing everything they can to destroy President Trump, and **YOUR** benefits.

**If the Democrats succeed, their anti-American plans will only get worse, and their tyrannical rule will only get stronger.**

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: The Flyover
subject: New COVID Shot Rules, Consumer Confidence Jumps, and a $33,000 Cocktail
body:
The Trump administration announced Tuesday that the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention will [no longer recommend COVID-19 vaccines for healthy children](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAQhU9jOq_ssVmgcJGGbtOmRF57ACf-QbZhxe0jtsgF0oxmNNKn972vx_TQzru4fOqAqs5pivgqHmvFfK0mHc6WNdW8eywmxbIHzBMwaClrKfST1c6fk2ysmhEBRYOKd7KX0HEhm1U97098orGDGGBoWWctH8D27QDANeNd49RFYy30nHHgcBPCCMm7Vks536UURDK0rqZ8-04u1hVnf6YD882k0Hi11roVIj4IjATGeG6p1OtFYLzABEZ2DegIjHuhlx-BseY9bFTb4CKNifoUF8w0o0khYLQuLvTtTg9tjItI55TpitrX9aQ_zpa_Y8u4RB0rfaWAkcDYZGW3l_PelXtHJFuCdv4dtv6r4UPBbwAAAP__pl6Q6A) and pregnant women.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkT8PnDAMxT9N2HLKP-AYGCqd2K5rR2QSA2nzhybhEP30FdeTOlfd7GfrPevnb8_xCdbZsHwFj32Z4xjwyA5LwXSVOr6syWssaXeYdQx595hGwURNWU3FfTRg3TmqyvQzokBZYc9bdVei5VJVaw-mQ4m6kXMnp67uuvbezWyuG85MN_G2sv3lxmpx54wLLm5Saql4W4NSc6OUJIqhsSWm2_doQ1lxdmd8Ybrp6CvXr6VsmcgvRAxEDMdx3KYEJhsEl68VIobJxYWIgTMKHn7FQLdkPdIJA862ZHrGnXo4aYiF_gjxoDDFvRA57MWPOe5JI5GPv8nUFCCiuaYejd09kQ9j8-bg_Mga_AZ2CUQ-_jH1D1Z6MSGi0aM1b4_u3YL-OfpowF3npB0_0grJLFDwo1apN9thnbO5aYliiwfr3rTKf7341YvfAQAA___4Br2h) | |
# Wednesday, May 28, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1923, U.S. Attorney General Harry Daugherty declared that it was [legal for women to wear trousers anywhere](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFu7CAQRb_G7mzhAYxfQfGa7TZtSouYsSECzwpmF-3fR84vpLq3Okc6n_f17mKK5_HhMlreaT2x1YTMWK670Sv6GojLM2Hd6KzPjGUFAXoQeoBl9S6m96p6b3dEQNmjnYxaFJhJqj7YxQgUBt0_vYFYdjB-8fvmnfZKzrPQfbQXTWhYJjHBBKOUm1ST0U6pfVZKdkqgj0xl_KZ4csA9vemFZdwo98kG5kft5P8Obh3cWmuj8y7XHDmMVI4Obl-JrmmBhubq0NCVeB4DBxy40LNiqX2x_tFiSrHOplPiyC6mXwH_qcrLwk8AAAD__wP8d5E). This was a significant landmark, although some states continued to ban the practice for decades more. The U.S. Marines say there's [one lesson that can help anyone](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O2zAQhJ9G6tbgz-rkFCrSuLu0KQUeuTQZU1yDXFnQ2wcOkCe4boD5MBh8vz_XT5dLrvdfbqNFIq-Vjl5IhNo7en7l0BNL2wt1z7XvG7XVKDOBmsBc1-ByOVccwxKJDNmRFj3jFc2sLY5pcUo5FyPZSc8RPX5FNZOJNliL84RxzMt7TU3mqpU22lys9Rb1PDnE-IFoB1QUsnC7_OFcJVEsJ7-oXTxvY1mSyLMP9udgboO5Hcdxia6L5-3p6vlmBnP7oa2dUM9vIJ1w8g498V4CSMr1ASU_CBxsruVKQC-qkCtIIvhi10Jj3v6XntuzQyffSDoIg-ytQpe23--FIFdh6Lv31PvYlvA8cim5f8wDqvvmcvn3Wr6l-rWYvwEAAP__3V6Wvw) build grit and mental toughness. In today's _Wisdom Wednesday_ , one former officer says you can use everyday civilian challenges, like tough conversations or stretch assignments, to gain real growth. ## Feds Move to Cut All Harvard Contracts
The Trump administration has ordered federal agencies to [cancel roughly $100 million in contracts with Harvard](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O3DAMhU8jdxrYFD12ChVp3G3alAZXotZK9GNI8gx8-0C5wjYEgQe8j_x-f-wf5INPX78osm4u74nfNXBrXPpq8svbeuRWrsDV5FSvyGWHEWY5zhLW3ZIP946D1Y4ZWA2spwVXhGVSOBz6ibxOFhHUbBYa109LhhCm9cmf6H7Q4HVvG2dYp3GCCR5KGYXTMhOieyIqgSNb33J5_Mk-tYNduPOLy8PkOAR9tHZWoX4K2ARs6T5zbT0SsPViAdvYBywCtqvK_p-ArZUrnrJleVP6KykE6dhyoSDdlWztyUHlRcXKzpLVHDmHKqOvByXblcnspKF4XlVSar5y9M3Xzh2Ktufbh-DrcxE4fkXy4f-57VuOXxr-BQAA__8eWZIL) University and is considering shifting $3 billion in grant funding to trade schools. [Officials cite](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL8GOiOwl4MULtLQXdqUaM9ewybGRrYPcn8fkV9IN9KMRjPv8z7fkT2H5QM30sXFOdCZPZVC6ZImHmzzGkt6esomhvzcKM2ylb1oeyHH2SL71wy11Y5IkqpJdwOMIIdOQb1qUA8gh7dxpPExwCjR9mCMNBbdm3n0Neurre3l2LWd7GSjlFHQDT0CuBuAqqAlyyWm5ityKCs5_4oHpcbErfZ6LWXPlXqv5FTJ6TzPxsWf68XlV3Lao-fCJldyKum57QLtxkFg_uawCEeWEnqBCwXDlIXBYMiLRBtyuBIrpgOTFSaGktCUXCdt95O953wbKmiXDdn_jSn_Inho-RsAAP__Vk-JbA) racial bias in admissions, insufficient action against antisemitism, and noncompliance with federal requests on foreign student records. A judge has temporarily blocked the administration’s attempt to bar Harvard from enrolling international students, while lawsuits over the funding freeze continue. The administration says agencies must identify [alternative vendors to Harvard by June 6](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ_GdCC8XgIpXPwNXf72SuR4l-CTwZG9gPL2J-4VrvukGc1o5usxPVyIYXv9dytbmdO08Vkii3C-0KcjUFmS5D1y8Wkr-8p5gha6uu1qGCZyIX4mrMjOzMCmYqt7HBB6bbBarMO5ozsRASEbfe9oMNzr583fezO4ZxXsldZ2MOhWg4bGGG9Q951DnG-IRmHLFCTl5juFTRae4ycdnBuf1iraReRdlPmnYFQwnufZ-Ge5Vly6gvFCBePi8uEy1fsWDs4lyKeWvK_vembi7GLt0ybZebnMVbb0PkOModx6he1rdSH-9smfTjos_AQAAP__yVB9uA) for the government contracts.
## No More COVID Shots for Healthy Kids, Pregnant Women
The Trump administration announced Tuesday that the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention will [no longer recommend COVID-19 vaccines for healthy children](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAQhU9jOq_ssVmgcJGGbtOmRF57ACf-QbZhxe0jtsgF0oxmNNKn972vx_TQzru4fOqAqs5pivgqHmvFfK0mHc6WNdW8eywmxbIHzBMwaClrKfST1c6fk2ysmhEBRYOKd7KX0HEhm1U97098orGDGGBoWWctH8D27QDANeNd49RFYy30nHHgcBPCCMm7Vks536UURDK0rqZ8-04u1hVnf6YD882k0Hi11roVIj4IjATGeG6p1OtFYLzABEZ2DegIjHuhlx-BseY9bFTb4CKNifoUF8w0o0khYLQuLvTtTg9tjItI55TpitrX9aQ_zpa_Y8u4RB0rfaWAkcDYZGW3l_PelXtHJFuCdv4dtv6r4UPBbwAAAP__pl6Q6A) and pregnant women. Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and Food and Drug Administration Commissioner Dr. Marty Makary cited a lack of evidence supporting boosters for those low-risk groups, aligning the U.S. with countries like Canada and Germany that limit COVID shots to older or high-risk populations. Vaccines [remain available for seniors 65 and older](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAURL8Gd1hwwcavoHiNu2y7pUXgOiaLwQJilL9fOb-w3ZFGmtGZ79tyMz74-PgyO-q6piViKwFrxXyhTad3ZUs1vwIWm2J57ZgXYDBQNlCYFmd8eC-yc3pFBBQdaq7kJEFxIbtNDwZBcKfUAKMxE7OK8VE682-04x2c6by-2tgAE2ccOPRCWCG5GoyU6yilIJKh8zXl_pl8rBuu4Z1OzL1Nexf0VutRiPhPYCYwt9Z6ey-XxZUTmC8kMOf1hz4z_QjR01jrIxZqnaV288FljPTI-IgmVtrSjpHA3GXtjuZD8GVURLLHbnz4zNY_fXVq-A0AAP__Yf1_Fw) and others at elevated risk, while broader use now requires stricter review. Officials framed the move as a shift toward “common sense” public health policy.
## Popemania Fuels Booming U.S. Market
Pope Leo XIV, the first American pope and a native of Chicago, has sparked a [fast-growing cottage industry of merchandise and tourism](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAURb9GOxx4PBe3oEhjt2lTOiw8VzIgDrAa_z5jfiHdLe7cO-d8PaaH8cGvr08TSdc5TSsdJVCtlK9o0-5dWVLN70DFprW8I-UJOPSM9wyGyRkfzglbp2ciINmSFgoHBCUktovGp5XqaQmgH6R8opKE0t6Uc3fD3Xxvvb7WeA-D4AIEdFJaiUL1BnG-IcoGOTlfU-6-k1_rQnM40065sym2QS-1bqWRHw2MDYzHcXSzKdWmuJn1vDoNjHchpRIcGhhNpOytWQszmdj8poueGRZNKX4ntqWNGNm0pniyQIn9-L3N2m2HD8GXm2qQv6Lx4e--_svZruE3AAD__yDqgW8) centered on his historic election. Chicago is the epicenter of this frenzy, with local businesses rolling out themed food and memorabilia, while Rome sees a spike in U.S. tourism. name: Right Street Journal
subject: RSJ: Mike Johnson versus Rand Paul, Trump Attacks Putin
body:
---
# Right Street Journal: Top Ten Stories
Each week, _Right Street Journal_ delivers ten handpicked stories shaping America's future.
1. **Fox News: Speaker Johnson Clashes with Rand Paul Over 'Wimpy' Spending Cuts in Trump's Bill**
House Speaker Mike Johnson and Senator Rand Paul debate the adequacy of spending cuts in President Trump's proposed budget bill, highlighting divisions within the GOP.
URL: [https://www.foxnews.com/politics/speaker-johnson-clashes-rand-paul-over-wimpy-spending-cuts-trumps-bill](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/GyF7eHHPia8jd892o7NdY4nw/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA)
2. **Daily Wire: Mike Johnson Rebuts Rand Paul 's Debt Warning on 'Big, Beautiful Bill'**
Speaker Mike Johnson defends the House-passed version of President Trump's budget bill against Senator Rand Paul's concerns about increasing national debt.
URL: [https://www.dailywire.com/news/speaker-johnson-rebuts-rand-pauls-debt-warning-on-big-beautiful-bill](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/3cQKzyCtn544x52evn763sHQ/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA)
3. **Breitbart: 'Nuclear Renaissance': President Trump Signs Executive Orders to Make America Energy Dominant**
President Trump signs executive orders aimed at revitalizing the U.S. nuclear energy sector, marking a significant step toward energy independence.
URL: [https://www.breitbart.com/politics/2025/05/24/nuclear-renaissance-president-trump-signs-executive-orders-make-u-s-energy-dominant/](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/HZi892Sh3mLOfoPmaySUPjHg/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA)
4. **Washington Examiner: Trump Furious Over Putin 's Deadly Strikes on Kyiv, Will 'Absolutely' Consider Sanctions**
President Trump expresses strong disapproval of Russia's recent large-scale strikes on Ukraine and indicates potential sanctions against Russia.
URL: [https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/white-house/3421948/trump-furious-putin-deadly-strikes-kyiv-will-consider-sanctions/](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/JImXbNQZN23VkoFbSZhnLA/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA)
5. **Fox News: Trump Says Harvard 's Foreign Students Are from Countries Paying 'Nothing'**
President Trump criticizes the lack of financial contributions from other countries for their students attending U.S. institutions like Harvard.
URL: [https://www.foxnews.com/politics/trump-says-harvards-foreign-students-from-countries-paying-nothing-education](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/LAbBmV442OPsOo8KtPuw3Q/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA)
6. **Daily Wire: AOC Shredded for Past Comments After Antisemitic Terror Attack**
Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez faces backlash over previous statements following a recent antisemitic terror attack.
URL: [https://www.dailywire.com/news/match-lighter-condemns-blaze-aoc-shredded-for-past-comments-after-antisemitic-terror-attack](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/X89210LIoBM8jBL5xI892O8Vtw/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA)
7. **Breitbart: Trump Responds to Joe Biden 's Prostate Cancer Diagnosis: Wish Him a 'Fast and Successful Recovery'**
President Trump offers well wishes to former President Joe Biden following his recent prostate cancer diagnosis.
URL: [https://www.breitbart.com/politics/2025/05/18/trump-responds-joe-bidens-prostate-cancer-diagnosis-wish-fast-successful-recovery/](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/XbOLU5i7s763Ct892hiANnuTGw/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA)
8. **Washington Examiner: That These Dead Shall Not Have Died in Vain**
An editorial reflecting on the significance of Memorial Day and honoring the sacrifices of American soldiers.
URL: [https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/editorials/3420568/memorial-day-trump-honor-soldiers-united-states/](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/AaH37yqTddCJ892PMEjqYAmQ/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA)
9. **Reuters: Trump Questions Putin 's Mindset After Deadly Ukraine Assault: 'What the Hell'**
President Trump expresses frustration over Russian President Putin's actions following a deadly assault in Ukraine.
URL: [https://www.yahoo.com/news/trump-asks-hell-happened-putin-015214125.html](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/b8HJ2qy0FAXAeN1M892E763YHQ/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA).
10. **Daily Wire: Trump Delays 50% Tariffs on EU After Its Leader Blinks**
President Trump agrees to delay additional tariffs on the European Union after receiving a request from EU leadership to negotiate a trade deal.
URL: [https://www.dailywire.com/news/trump-delays-50-tariffs-eu-leader-blinks](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/sGf892ZUUuYZGd5dAOIxFN3Q/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA).

[View web version](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/w/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA) [Unsubscribe here](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/unsubscribe/zwuMrrCbT0qcQZbpAps9UkSIzlemtxdlw5K8MlTk763D4/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA)

## Major Bills Advance
The state legislative session wraps up Monday. Yesterday was the last day for the Texas House to give initial approval to Senate bills. While [dozens of bills died](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLty8yAQhZ8GdXgAoV9yQfE36pw2pWYFK2sTDAqsfHn7jPwKqc9lzvk-L9MFKFK6fsANHT-XPCV81IjMWKZIc4HyKvvh4Lx1ap5_vjKlySjTSdVJM0wBKL4m2wQ3q3DWDTrd28G2SvW2WZ3tBh38cjah1bYzflkWaxFhwNAb22FD7ihTnRm0VlrrU5jDoMG2Z2vVMHsjrMJAnMuJV2R8Ql3iK9-xnHy-NdGtzFsV7X9hRmFGP1fYK1M6VGHG444wY8weojDjOy_XvFeUFRMwyn2TcAVKlaUvuyeIMiCESAmr5JWqfCB-N8WF7UExUv3XC6uuN6D4XsB_43Z35jcAAP__TtuESg) at the midnight deadline, several priority measures advanced. On Monday, the House approved Senate Bill 22, which [dedicates up to $1.5 billion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOiPbLLEpXPwNXf72SmTwEva0YM6YkLz9ibzCdSPN6NPo-7r3d09M6-O_X9Dl1xT7Fc-dMWdMPdOQfHqn41rkuDVyGH6-I629lroRshHa9sETv3sogxtkaFWJThmwUEtpoJwdTKGdvJaAyk6m9VgbC7d2MkbVFlCX5C6YbLRVSiqlqjAEqzzULYC0w6gLkBgox1TlGTO-_D7xOz4xVWNcSnZzztte1P8K3RW6O8-zGucU16stdDcenI-Ehe58yjTylT4QMcdjRzERL4LWEddMTxQDMYvN7zsGoWUNRppbtc1bmVzYTmKm_WYKkI_FE38O5L9pezr9GwAA__-AYYGp) over the next 10 years to the Texas Moving Image Industry Incentive Program. Senate Bill 25, dubbed “Make Texas Healthy Again,” was [modified before passage](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2ypCAQBeCnwayngMFVA4JJzGbTDS0QkN5CcPm5Xt9-y3mFm3VVd33V5_x5L2-FAeP2W-1W1m-XlmjPEmytNi8BdVb5yu2-qOnoqdb__iaMC6e8B9oDHxejMFyL6IzU1Eyss5INYhRPSgfReamc7XtOJ8dXrYyhbrVOM6Ysm1bKBtahvDHa85Exyhh7GG1GpsRzEoKOeuVEUGuwpvyo3lb7rYoLV_qy-bGmvQvS13oU8nwRPhM-n-f52Eu8d4TPNkIrhM93KMLnz_whwKVkCpwYIacWDWAEh5uvcMsQlLZ3aPC4eXC5rTUVC2vKEcqV2wGqQIsOK7iUwbddxdtWGV4vNjef3l2W5jgxBCy_BiLotisMn5frz4r-kvx_AAAA__9e0ZV6) by removing high-fructose corn syrup and aspartame from a list of about 50 ingredients that would require warning labels. Dozens of manufacturers—including Texas-based Frito-Lay and Keurig Dr Pepper—lobbied for the change. The House also passed measures dedicating $1 billion a year to water supply projects and allowing ERCOT to [shut off power to large electricity users](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO3CAQhp8Gd6xgFnvZgiKNu0ub0sIwtifBsIHx7e3bRz5F9wLXTDH69On_9f96m948JcrrT7-j44-lTBmfLSEz1inRXH191eMkuDx6Nc9_fxfKEyjopeol2Cl6Sq_JdNHNKt51h07fjDVXpW6m29wAFgfb67uytjcqLLAEa0K8xrCAXoaO3ClTPVitldb6EudotTfXuzHKzgGEURiJS73whowfvi3pVd6xXkLZu-Q25kcT1x8CRgFjKPt-ZOIX7Q8f-GQEjP5oTFnA2MrBmwyYufokv96fWplwpZY8HxUFjGcsAaM6Dwxf0FaOhrL8aXKmlJr0tGOUnmXjinnlDTPlVa6Vonx6xiopL9U3rkf4b-6qi48npURtuAmj1t1T-mzD39vg3cG_AAAA__9V8p44) with a 24-hour notice.
## Llano County Library Can Remove Books
A federal appeals court ruled Friday that the Llano County Library is [not required to display](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSnDAMhp_GdN6RhQBTUKShu7QpGRnkW-e8mBjvcrx9hp28QSoV-kb6v__Xx_TBIYb18yc_ZCjfPk2rHHuUUiRPMbjM-czPiyhpa8C5P79TWCcEbDQ0Gu20cIjnRNUyOFh6U8lgOrJUA3RU3QeLjXHd3JLQzH0D1nvve0ctsJ2p81UYrmPQoDUGjDG3xS3WMNU9EVg3oyKQJZSUb-UuRb559_FML8m3OT2qONxL2XZV_1A4KhyP47h9vZ5yLRWOnEuYoygcLy-FY0wzx2tGXpOe03Mtp_4nql1KX9rxuuv3H83bJhz3C8tF52eUXYdVe36lrHDEtte2ZiMOvPa2Jk2dA225R20NtQ0KkLNNlYdlO0KMYW87RfD54BDf6cv_df4a8G8AAAD__2GdlJ0) more than a dozen controversial books that its advisory board removed several years ago. The ruling reversed a lower court's decision. In 2021, a group of community members successfully orchestrated the [removal of 17 books](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkTGS2zAMRU9DdfCQFGXJhYo06jZtSg1EQhYyFKmQ8K59-4w2vkEaNHjzBv_j18f8gRw53X_iTqM81zwn-qqRRKjMkZeC5VUeJyH56PSy_PmdOc1W2w50B3aYA3J8za4J46LDzTQ0mt4NrtW6d802ol2ut24N11t31RrdSr61rfah134xvW94PGW6s4Mx2hhzCUsYDLr25pweFm-V0xRYcrnIRkJPrGt85U8qF5_3Jo6byFFV-0PZSdmpHuSlPPaYPcYzy0kpO8nzXOaHbPDtAIpwYM3KTiel7HSeoeykz2FbZSeETjbwXPyDBf61AIESU3073gXBgVJyqrByqQK4Uwo7JYHC900gr4DeU60gGTituewonFNTxnB8cYxcr71y-r4jx-9Q8n-v-Bzt3wAAAP__acugpA) with sexual or racial themes, prompting other residents to file a lawsuit accusing the county of violating their First Amendment right to free speech. In the majority opinion from the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals, Judge Kyle Duncan determined that a library’s curation decisions are a form of government speech and not subject to a First Amendment challenge. "_No one is banning (or burning) books_ ," [he wrote](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAQRb8GM6wG4ekEBC8xm003tEDakVm0XcBx5u-3nNo_2KSjrnPvuZ_X4WpDDOvtwy5oynOiYcUjRywF0xCDSza90n5-FNo0OPd9p7AOEqTmoLnsBm9DfA2q8saBv4gKjWhVpxqAVlWzgQ7AO8BG-6YB3TYap9FehJ4sKomqCuaEgZadECCEqL3znbCquSgFnRslU4A-FEp1mbHg0-YpvuiBqR5pqaKZS9kya_4z2TPZH8dR3_cUcqkp3ZjsTx8m-zOEyR7Os2c-ocdkIx9pT4Xv20zRZ_6m81_tzBMu9LCR08Qd0VfmU6KFjyGNe7Ql0MpkXyXjtyPEGPK_lim4LTbEd7Pytz0fRv4EAAD__53eiyA). The ruling is at [odds with a decision](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFy6yAURVeDOjSAnixcUPxGnX-bUgPiYZNgcNCzJe0-I092kP7MuXPux2W62Jhivv63dzS0hTJlXJeERFinFF21da_Pg6Dy6IVz358l5kkJ1XPRc6Unb2PaJ2i8ccKfZYNGDqChE2KA5mZ6DSGcZjwP4eQ0gPROBrS6Q-2E6rCJ5pCJXmkphZSy9c5raaE7AwjtZsVAoI9Uaks3JNzsEtJeXljbudybZG5Ej4V1_5gamRrXdW1D2Qb7XCjmA2FqPJqYGlOyufC5PDPt_G3iv4nclfLFnc1NNf6xxpTichoYiOvdxvQeor_d8zLqJwAA___ao3sn) by the Eighth Circuit Court of Appeals, which ruled last year in a similar case out of Iowa that such a ban does not amount to government speech. The Supreme Court may be asked to resolve the difference.
## _Texas Monthly_ Names Top 50 BBQ Joints
_Texas Monthly_ released its latest list of the state’s [50 top barbecue joints](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUD2OszAQPY3pBo2NCaRwQUOXr_1KZGMTvGswsSch7OlX5ArbjEZ6T-_v_224aR_8ev-nF6foPcVhdXsOjsilIXiTdDrS82RQ3Go05vEV_ToIFDVgDaIdrPbhGGRhlUF75YVTvJGtrBAbWcxqshZ5M6G92knIsapQylHqRk-XZjQ1Fl6dYliLlnPknJfW2JZrWV2lxNaMgkl01lNMJc2O3FvnKRzx5VI5xqUIaibaMqs6Jnom-n3fyyWvJ8ZE71Z4Zib6sxQT_eefYgJjHuAJMgT_7YBmBzGPOmWICfJzc-ddrT7g4wdLXGkOB2SguEGNEHwm8BlmlxwTvU7Qdbz_Cd1cJGW33Yfg86VhEu-L9uGTlP6270uJ3wAAAP__wrWQWA) yesterday. Seguin’s Burnt Bean Co. took the top spot, and Austin led the way among Texas metros, with eight restaurants making the cut. Co-founded by Ernest Servantes and Dave Kirkland in 2020, Burnt Bean [received high marks](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ypyAUR59Gu-sAQsCCYhu7bLulw5eRXQQD1xjffsf_K6S8d86c-c358768m5hi_vht9qDxey1LDldLATHUJUVbTb3r-RBYDkGs_fxbYl4YYQKIAKYWb2K6F957bYmfaB80lVzxkRDJ-017KZWYzDSO1CmqpJDOSbZKS5j1qxF91I-MCKYoJZTSwVuvqOHjxDlR1rGOk-AjljrgFjB8m7amu3yFOriy90lviEfrxl8dmzs2X9c1NOPOWkPGh-jYvJbiwdeY_3VsbuHzjLmBPWtGsMFkcAWwHA1ecthLxi3dDZLB0BBSbAhlhYbPDfb5WVNtcGeApwY2GKWYqHwb-6r9ccWUYnuTHScfu4nptRN_VvdLs_8BAAD__4ySkUs) for its brisket and Korean beef-back ribs. Two other San Antonio locations—2M Smokehouse and Reese Bros BBQ—also made the list. Austin’s LeRoy and Lewis Barbecue [earned the No. 2 spot](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3SmzAQRZ9GdGL0C1KhIg2d06ZkJLQYJQLZYm3M22fwK3zVFnvmzL33z228-ZTTdv_tV3D4mcu4wbFnQIQ65hSqr2d9XQSWh2YhPP-WtI2CCU2ZpsKM0ad8jqqJLrBoeQOO98ooyVivmsUZ7XUfJ24ksBBFB8Fo2wXNZ-g1MNkkd8mYFoZzxjlvY4iGeyWtUsyESRDFICYstcUFED5-n_NZ3lDbqaxNdgviYyfyFxEDEcNxHO2_9wuuJxGDr5imDEQMOc3XmUuJRAxfD13Lhks-aYAdaQhPepXDnfrXjmmjE2xYfaZfmIhBdJYKrzupo6SaS0mVjYF6FXraW22tnKONEJrq4uNIOae964li99Wn_E2LP9v47cT_AAAA__-exY7F), receiving praise for its popular $10 cheeseburger. Another Austin favorite, Interstellar BBQ, landed the No. 6 ranking. Goldee’s Barbecue in Fort Worth, the No. 1 spot in the 2021 list, [fell to No. 3](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu4yAQQE-DOyzAEENBkcbFStl2SwsMjtlg8MIkjvf0X47-DX45eqPRe_PnNt5MiCHdf5vVa3jPeUx-r9ED-DLGYIspR3meG5A3Qaz99zeHNDLCBCYCMzk6E-Ix8sZpS5yijde055J3hPS8WbQSilFFpZK9FULZC-Xe-8myrrvIjtom6PMYEUxSSiilrbNOUsM7xTmRdmKIE-8C5NLC4sG_TZ3jkV--tFNem6gXgK2i7orYgNiw73u71nQyxAaf8LMiNsw5O5OcKyE9vsezE7GBEmxNsX56enymQcUhYWdiNBXPuQDec4EFF5MeJ_kI4DUnWOKBIW9YEBxDBcQGU_D1Sof_oH41RbttDzGGeukRJ_fVhPgRhp-9-aXZVwAAAP__1X6STw). Nearby Dayne’s Craft Barbecue in Aledo got the No. 7 spot. [In Houston](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCnMR3IXpYAhYtr6HLtlWhtL7FPBnPGCeHtT8kr_PWMvpHmz32-U4hhe_ymlXV5L2ne-Dwil8J5jsFkyld-fhol7Z005t_fFLYZJHS17GoYZkchXjNWThvpRlWxVj0O2ErZY-V1z3ZEh0tPN4KOByK0rCS1DuxiUFZBfzDZwaCUVEo1zrhBEbYjohyMBYGSXSgpN8Vz4TcdS7zSi3Nj01pF7UvZD9H-EjAJmM7zbKzPafukAqYlJSdgolyCjSxg8ul5lLTVjmKko_6C9Zq24uNVG8qG7ZNrkC3exgGb3e9V1m4_Q4zhuPUC5WOlEL_j5WeXvTT8DwAA__9tcIEv), Truth Barbecue came in at No. 9. The highly anticipated list is only released every four years.

clean_body: A morning newsletter focused entirely on news from the state of Texas. If it’s important news inside TX state lines, we cover it. | | | | | | Wednesday, May 28, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1861, Mission Concepción in San Antonio was for adherents of the Marianist order, a Catholic religious order dedicated to cultivating lives of faith, community, and service. Texas Monthly released its of the state's top 50 BBQ spots yesterday. Check out the details in today's Roundup. Today's sponsor is , offering a pre-IPO investment opportunity to The Flyover readers. Abilene 🌩️ 81/65° | Amarillo 🌩️ 79/61° | Austin ⛈️ 82/73° | Brownsville 🌩️ 93/81° | Corpus Christi ⛈️ 89/79° | DFW ⛈️ 79/68° | El Paso ☀️ 94/66° | Houston ⛈️ 85/76° | Laredo ⛈️ 93/76° | Lubbock ⛈️ 82/62° | Midland ⛈️ 85/63° | San Antonio ⛈️ 85/75° | Tyler ⛈️ 82/68° | Waco ⛈️ 79/69° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Major Bills Advance The state legislative session wraps up Monday. Yesterday was the last day for the Texas House to give initial approval to Senate bills. While at the midnight deadline, several priority measures advanced. On Monday, the House approved Senate Bill 22, which over the next 10 years to the Texas Moving Image Industry Incentive Program. Senate Bill 25, dubbed “Make Texas Healthy Again,” was by removing high-fructose corn syrup and aspartame from a list of about 50 ingredients that would require warning labels. Dozens of manufacturers—including Texas-based Frito-Lay and Keurig Dr Pepper—lobbied for the change. The House also passed measures dedicating $1 billion a year to water supply projects and allowing ERCOT to with a 24-hour notice. Llano County Library Can Remove Books A federal appeals court ruled Friday that the Llano County Library is more than a dozen controversial books that its advisory board removed several years ago. The ruling reversed a lower court's decision. In 2021, a group of community members successfully orchestrated the with sexual or racial themes, prompting other residents to file a lawsuit accusing the county of violating their First Amendment right to free speech. In the majority opinion from the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals, Judge Kyle Duncan determined that a library’s curation decisions are a form of government speech and not subject to a First Amendment challenge. "No one is banning (or burning) books ," . The ruling is at by the Eighth Circuit Court of Appeals, which ruled last year in a similar case out of Iowa that such a ban does not amount to government speech. The Supreme Court may be asked to resolve the difference. Texas Monthly Names Top 50 BBQ Joints Texas Monthly released its latest list of the state’s yesterday. Seguin’s Burnt Bean Co. took the top spot, and Austin led the way among Texas metros, with eight restaurants making the cut. Co-founded by Ernest Servantes and Dave Kirkland in 2020, Burnt Bean for its brisket and Korean beef-back ribs. Two other San Antonio locations—2M Smokehouse and Reese Bros BBQ—also made the list. Austin’s LeRoy and Lewis Barbecue , receiving praise for its popular $10 cheeseburger. Another Austin favorite, Interstellar BBQ, landed the No. 6 ranking. Goldee’s Barbecue in Fort Worth, the No. 1 spot in the 2021 list, . Nearby Dayne’s Craft Barbecue in Aledo got the No. 7 spot. , Truth Barbecue came in at No. 9. The highly anticipated list is only released every four years. | Flying together with our sponsor A black turtleneck, a game-changing product, and an industry-shifting vision. But no, it’s not Steve Jobs. Meet Dan Novaes, the visionary behind Mode Mobile – the company redefining smartphones. Mode’s revolutionary EarnPhone transforms phones into income streams, and generating over $60M in revenue from 45M+ users. And Dan has no plans of letting up now, recently reserving the Nasdaq ticker $MODE with the goal of taking the company public. But the real opportunity is now... | ➤ Huntsville: Two escapees from the Orleans Parish Jail were captured in Walker County on Monday. Leo Tate, 31, and Jermaine Donald, 42, were detained after they crashed during a high-speed chase. () ➤ Williamson County and Fort Bend County have joined several other counties in suing Attorney General Ken Paxton over new rules that require counties with more than 400,000 residents to provide his office with regular performance reports and access to certain case files. () ➤ Grapevine Lake: An 18-year-old girl was killed on Sunday when a jet ski ridden by two women struck her kayak. The driver of the jet ski fled the scene with an unidentified man, both of whom were arrested yesterday. () ➤ Houston: Local and federal authorities busted a drug trafficking ring that used a taco truck and the U.S. mail to distribute methamphetamine and other narcotics. Nine people were arrested, and 15 were indicted. () ➤ Southlake: Daniel Floyd and his wife Tammie were introduced as the new senior pastors of Gateway Church on Sunday, nearly a year after former senior pastor Robert Morris resigned amid child sex abuse allegations. The couple founded the five-campus Lifepoint Church in Virginia nearly 20 years ago. () ➤ Memorial Day storms produced heavy rain and large hail across much of the state, knocking out power to thousands of customers. Check out these photos from , , and . body:

name: Chairwoman Elise Stefanik
subject: This could undo everything Joe Biden did
body:
His Autopen Presidency could be revoked!

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awSb/?__vbtrk=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, I’m sounding the alarm on a scandal that threatens the very foundation of our Republic.
Reports have surfaced that Joe Biden’s administration relied heavily on an autopen to sign critical executive orders, pardons, and other legally binding documents - **potentially without his full knowledge or consent.**
This is not just an administrative oversight; it’s a dangerous abuse of power that raises serious questions about who was truly running our country during Biden’s presidency.
**[We must investigate this potential criminal misconduct immediately](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awSb/?__vbtrk=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)!**
The Oversight Project, a branch of the Heritage Foundation, found that **nearly every document bearing Biden’s signature during his term used an identical autopen signature,****except for his 2024 campaign withdrawal letter!**
This suggests unelected bureaucrats may have exploited Biden’s well-documented cognitive decline to push through radical policies and pardons - like those shielding his Far Left political allies, family members, and even the corrupt January 6 Committee - without his direct approval.
**[If true, this could render those actions unconstitutional and void, undermining the rule of law.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awSb/?__vbtrk=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
[DONATE NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awSb/?__vbtrk=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
As a staunch defender of our Constitution and a leader in Congress, I’m joining President Trump in calling for a full-scale investigation to uncover:
* Who controlled the autopen and authorized its use?
* Did Biden personally approve these signatures, or were unelected staffers making decisions behind closed doors?
* Were these actions, including sweeping pardons, executed without the President’s mental capacity or consent, constituting a betrayal of our nation’s trust?

This fight for transparency and accountability requires resources - legal research, public awareness campaigns, and pressure on Washington to act.
**_[I’m asking you to stand with me by donating $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can to fuel this critical fight](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awSb/?__vbtrk=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

[DONATE NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awSb/?__vbtrk=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Your contribution will help us expose the truth and hold the Biden Administration accountable for this potential criminal overreach.
_For our Constitution, our Republic, and our future,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awSb/?__vbtrk=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awSb/?__vbtrk=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
P.S. **The radical left will try to bury this, but we won’t let them.___[Help us get the word out and demand answers NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awSb/?__vbtrk=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyNDA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_ __!** Together, we can change the face of history and make previously unimaginable progress on saving our country.

name: Barack Obama
subject: What this moment demands of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108478147/548082555/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzNTIxNjAxLWI1M2ItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a2VaTHS9TdamNa3f6lJnS0f5cBU52zAky_6I3GCBXPM=&emci=072e2e6f-393b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=43521601-b53b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, It's easy to be a fan of democracy when things go our way. It’s when they don’t that our commitment gets tested. At this moment in history — when core democratic principles seem to be continuously under attack, and too many people around the world have become cynical and disengaged — we need to ask ourselves not just what we believe, but what we're willing to do about it. If we say we’re for equality and fair representation, are we ready to fight for it? Are we willing to risk something for it? Are we prepared to stand up for democratic principles even when it requires sacrifice? **My friends at the National Democratic Redistricting Committee (NDRC) are answering that call every day — pushing to redraw gerrymandered maps, defending voting rights, and working to ensure that every American has an equal say in our democracy. ** [**Today, that work matters more than ever before. Will you join me in helping the NDRC fight for our democracy and continue the work of building a fairer America?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108478148/548082556/-152931879?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ObamaMay_email_20250528-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaMay_var1&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250528-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaMay_var1&utm_campaign=ObamaMay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzNTIxNjAxLWI1M2ItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a2VaTHS9TdamNa3f6lJnS0f5cBU52zAky_6I3GCBXPM=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

For eight years, the NDRC has been doing the difficult and systematic work of undoing gerrymandered maps designed to silence voters. They’re fighting for fair representation in every state.
**They've won important victories. But make no mistake — the opposition isn’t going away. Those who benefit from a system that lets lawmakers choose their voters instead of the other way around see their chance to take us back and strip power from ordinary Americans.**
Look, the threats to our democracy aren't abstract or distant — they're unfolding right before our eyes.
Just recently, every House Republican present on the floor voted to pass the SAVE Act — legislation that, despite its name, would place significant obstacles in the path of millions of eligible Americans trying to register to vote. And in North Carolina, a candidate who lost at the ballot box tried to win in court by discarding thousands of legitimate votes.
**This isn't politics as usual. This is a fundamental challenge to the principle that, here in America, everyone's vote counts the same.**
Throughout our remarkable history, every generation has faced its own test. And time and again, ordinary citizens have answered the call — understanding that democracy isn't something we inherit. It's something we must build and rebuild, day by day.
**That's what this moment demands of us. clean_body: | Peter, It's easy to be a fan of democracy when things go our way. It’s when they don’t that our commitment gets tested. At this moment in history — when core democratic principles seem to be continuously under attack, and too many people around the world have become cynical and disengaged — we need to ask ourselves not just what we believe, but what we're willing to do about it. If we say we’re for equality and fair representation, are we ready to fight for it? Are we willing to risk something for it? Are we prepared to stand up for democratic principles even when it requires sacrifice? My friends at the National Democratic Redistricting Committee (NDRC) are answering that call every day — pushing to redraw gerrymandered maps, defending voting rights, and working to ensure that every American has an equal say in our democracy. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = For eight years, the NDRC has been doing the difficult and systematic work of undoing gerrymandered maps designed to silence voters. This is a fundamental challenge to the principle that, here in America, everyone's vote counts the same. Throughout our remarkable history, every generation has faced its own test. _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere – very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21533/6374453/281437043198ae232874b0a2bd30eb40aa84eeb4/5bbcb559fd64884e734a6c9b08287d83432c78c3) **More Raving Reviews From Customers** **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price. **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable. **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning. **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it. **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip! **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most! **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks! **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product. [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21533/6374453/281437043198ae232874b0a2bd30eb40aa84eeb4/5bbcb559fd64884e734a6c9b08287d83432c78c3)
