name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 5/28/2025
body:
Activism over science? Ballot measure #82 would gut CPW authority, opponents say
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
**_🎟 Don’t miss Colorado’s most anticipated conservative event of the year!**Our Mountain Majesty Gala is just around the corner—and seats are selling fast. With a powerful lineup and a packed house expected, now’s the time to secure your spot before it’s too late. Reserve your seat today and be part of an unforgettable night for faith, freedom, and the future of Colorado.[Get your tickets here!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_**
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Tensions are rising over SB276, which would [fine sheriffs $50,000](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for cooperating with ICE. Teller County Sheriff Jason Mikesell is pushing back, warning it would jeopardize public safety. Meanwhile, critics say [Colorado’s green agenda](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) is driving up housing costs, with proposed energy codes adding up to $35,000 to new homes. And Ballot Initiative 82 is under fire for threatening to strip wildlife management authority from Colorado Parks and Wildlife, shifting decisions from [scientists to political activists](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** The federal government is facing backlash after a DOGE report uncovered over [$370 billion in waste](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), including 12.3 million phantom Social Security accounts for people listed as 120 years old or older. At the same time, former Trump advisor Stephen Miller is pushing back on [media claims about the “Big Beautiful Bill,”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) arguing it doesn’t add to the deficit but instead cuts waste and locks in the 2017 tax cuts—despite critics’ attempts to mislead the public.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Colorado may soon appoint a land board leader who once praised eco-terrorism—raising alarm over [control of 2.8 million public acres](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Meanwhile, a Colorado pastor encourages support for a Bible college in India, an offering of hope [where it’s most needed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, May 28, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Activism over science? Ballot measure #82 would gut CPW authority, opponents say](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Critics across Colorado’s hunting, ranching, and wildlife management communities are sounding the alarm over a 2026 ballot measure they say could upend science-based conservation and rural land rights.
Initiative #82, called the Colorado Wildlife and Biodiversity Protection Act, would create a new regulatory body, the Wildlife and Ecosystem Conservation Commission (WECC). The commission would hold far-reaching powers over endangered species protections, wildlife corridors, land use, and even Colorado Parks and Wildlife itself.
The WECC would have authority to enforce and develop rules on infrastructure projects, land use, private conservation programs, and wildlife protections. AGPROfessionals note that “This group will have enforcement authority with the power to inspect properties, conduct investigations, issue subpoenas, and refer landowners for prosecution by the Attorney General.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[SB276 would fine deputies $50K for helping ICE—Sheriff Mikesell says enough is enough](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [PIKES PEAK COURIER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Teller County Sheriff Jason Mikesell sent a letter to ICE protesting Colorado Senate Bill 276, which would ban law enforcement from sharing information about illegal immigrants who commit crimes.
* Mikesell argues the bill jeopardizes public safety and his 287(g) cooperation agreement with ICE. He warns the $50,000 fine for deputies sharing info with federal agencies threatens officers’ livelihoods.
* Mikesell criticized the governor and attorney general for remaining silent, saying the state is prioritizing criminal illegal immigrants over law-abiding residents and undermining federal law enforcement coordination.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[GET YOUR TICKET HERE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Gabel: State land board pick once cheered eco-terrorism—now she could control 2.8M acres](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Nicole Rosmarino, a past radical environmental activist, is now the sole finalist to lead Colorado’s State Land Board, which oversees 2.8 million acres of land used for agriculture, recreation, and schools. As a student, she marched with groups tied to eco-terrorism and praised the 1998 arson that destroyed Vail ski facilities.
* Rosmarino once called the Vail arson “beautiful economic sabotage,” and publicly supported those who carried it out. Her record includes founding a nonprofit to ban hunting, oil and gas, and farming from prairie land in favor of bison and prairie dogs.
* Critics warn her appointment could threaten access to trust lands for ranchers, hunters, and energy producers, especially given that newly appointed State Land Board members also have ties to anti-hunting activism. The board will vote on her appointment June 11–12.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Hunter: A Colorado pastor plants seeds of truth in faraway soil](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER****| COMMENTARY | MAY 27** _In Northeast India’s Ukhrul region, a small college is doing big work. Wung Theological College was built to make theological education accessible to those who’ve gone without it for too long._
__
**[Montrose Commissioner Pond: The Constitution isn’t a suggestion—it’s a line in the sand](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY SEAN POND | COMMENTARY | MAY 26** _Something is happening in Colorado. You can feel it. Not on the surface, but beneath it. Beneath the silence. Beneath the carefully packaged language of equity, sustainability, and progress. We are being conditioned. Slowly, quietly, and deliberately._ __
**[O’Donnell: Behind the headlines, Colorado’s job growth tells a different story](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY MIKE O'DONNELL | COMMENTARY | MAY 26** _Last week, the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) released April 2025 job creation numbers by state. The national numbers were released earlier in the month and for the nation as a whole 177,000 new jobs were created in April, and this was considered a “solid” number by those who consider themselves experts._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🦬 DID YOU KNOW?** The **American bison** became the U.S. national mammal in 2016. Once nearly extinct, these massive animals—topping 2,000 pounds—now thrive thanks to conservation efforts. Despite their size, they can run up to 35 mph—so admire from a distance!
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "If we are too weak to take charge of our own morality, we shall not be strong enough to take charge of our own liberty." – Calvin Coolidge

name: America First War Room Sponsor
subject: Nature's artery opener
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE1v4yAQhn8N3GLBAAYfOMQb4UO0uWSlbY8UcENjYgd_Kf--SprmOvPMvI9em4YutjeNZI0ATtGPCACxLQK4vq8pz19p32wGKf9uruUhifsW_jzRBV7wxdnzoT4uSxnVuKvOUxre9gt94dNtCC_4GVqEZGN3n8od9pq1nnAcNJVcccYAGD7pVrDWEUeYIq5SVUVbKskH84qyQIjzOGogIIgARamgghdl4FIxVtoQWgK2RJw8cgqbQo7O0nFabc59nwrXJ9zp0zQN40PMIDBr7ovL7Lowjz9nrk8IzFMZgVkQGH90dTOv__43iJlHaWwnmiYZsq0zztoPa-y6OJYScfL5-wYvGr4DAAD__zW_bl4)
dpwillis67@gmail.com,

Heart problems stalk my family.

My grandmother — as she was preparing to come to Florida for my wedding — died from a massive heart attack. That was 24 years ago... but it still haunts me to this day.

Both of her brothers — my great-uncles — died young of heart attacks when I was a baby. And my mother had a stroke when she was 47... I was only 18 at the time. She went on to have bypass surgery at the young age of 60. That was the same year my youngest daughter was born.

They all had one thing in common. They were all taking heart drugs and cholesterol-lowering medication that was _supposed_ to keep that from happening.

Perhaps you have a similar family history, or maybe this sounds like you.

It's probably because about 735,000 people have heart attacks each year in the U.S. alone. And every 40 seconds someone dies from cardiovascular disease. That's nearly 2,150 folks every day!

Heart disease is the No. 1 cause of death in the United States!

But I'm here to tell you, [a stronger, healthier heart is as easy as...](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jrGy4iAYRp-GdGbghwAWFKuOWzhrY7Nb_huI4QYSJBivb38njmN7vjNzPowp-O5piNoRgN7bmQAQ_osA3P49Yr5_xdPvTVLqz-Ymz7FZV9i_1QU-8tjicN5dlkV6PR-2Q4np72lhH708k_vI72jtIvqwUnWorOGdpaJyhimhBecAvOoNtf_brm22nUanraUMFSAyDVraLWO08gYoNLQBzVjDGlFLJ5TmXKJzHQWURNBXp8bosm-RzeWBOU9TrNspVsH0paT5dexI4Jjw6uY6ORxGLPeMYbVW7nBoMVs_pYDFj_cV-tG6701IEuvUJ8KPlz3hhzNljQZBRZWNTQ8fgp-lIoJeXz_W6mLgJwAA__9REXKT)

**•** Keeping blood vessels open for healthy circulation...

**•** Clearing calcium deposits from your arteries to help keep blood vessels and arteries from hardening...

**•** Naturally dissolving blood clots to keep blood thin...

**•** And increasing energy to spark life in to your heart cells... for a healthy, strong, beating heart!

And how exactly do you do this? Well, [click here](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jrGy4iAYRp-GdGbghwAWFKuOWzhrY7Nb_huI4QYSJBivb38njmN7vjNzPowp-O5piNoRgN7bmQAQ_osA3P49Yr5_xdPvTVLqz-Ymz7FZV9i_1QU-8tjicN5dlkV6PR-2Q4np72lhH708k_vI72jtIvqwUnWorOGdpaJyhimhBecAvOoNtf_brm22nUanraUMFSAyDVraLWO08gYoNLQBzVjDGlFLJ5TmXKJzHQWURNBXp8bosm-RzeWBOU9TrNspVsH0paT5dexI4Jjw6uY6ORxGLPeMYbVW7nBoMVs_pYDFj_cV-tG6701IEuvUJ8KPlz3hhzNljQZBRZWNTQ8fgp-lIoJeXz_W6mLgJwAA__9REXKT) and I'll tell you about a natural Nobel Prize-winning solution I like to call...

[Nature's Artery Opener!](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jrGy4iAYRp-GdGbghwAWFKuOWzhrY7Nb_huI4QYSJBivb38njmN7vjNzPowp-O5piNoRgN7bmQAQ_osA3P49Yr5_xdPvTVLqz-Ymz7FZV9i_1QU-8tjicN5dlkV6PR-2Q4np72lhH708k_vI72jtIvqwUnWorOGdpaJyhimhBecAvOoNtf_brm22nUanraUMFSAyDVraLWO08gYoNLQBzVjDGlFLJ5TmXKJzHQWURNBXp8bosm-RzeWBOU9TrNspVsH0paT5dexI4Jjw6uY6ORxGLPeMYbVW7nBoMVs_pYDFj_cV-tG6701IEuvUJ8KPlz3hhzNljQZBRZWNTQ8fgp-lIoJeXz_W6mLgJwAA__9REXKT)

Yours for a heart flowing with energy, love and gratitude,

Virginia Tims-Lawson
Chief Research Officer

body:
I wish I didn’t have to tell you this, but I think you need to hear it all the same.

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9ERUZFTkQtUFJFU0lERU5ULVRSVU1QLVMtTUFKT1JJVFlfMjAyNTA1MjcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ERUZFTkQtUFJFU0lERU5ULVRSVU1QLVMtTUFKT1JJVFkmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NTkmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/SUB3rr5DNuWblZ91V2v3Iw)

| | Fellow Conservative, I've always promised to shoot straight with you. When our Party is winning, I'll be the first to tell you it's well deserved. But when we're _LOSING_ , I'm not going to sugarcoat it. And right now, federal reports just dropped that show the Democrats are badly BEATING us in one specific area. Frankly, this has never happened in recent history... **_The Democrats - the party of out-of-touch Hollywood elites, mega-donors like George Soros, and liberal special interests - are OUTRAISING us among grassroots donors!_** Look, I understand it's easy to feel the fight is over after our resounding victory last November. I wish that were so, Fellow Conservative. But the truth is, this fight is far from over, and the Democrats have only doubled down. _We simply can 't afford to have YOU on the sidelines._ The Left has used lawfare and judicial activism to stall President Trump's agenda at every turn. _And their final plot?**IMPEACH AND CONVICT.**_ Make no mistake, the Democrats will use their newly acquired war chest to FLIP the President's congressional majorities. And at that point, there will be NOTHING left to stop them from their one and only goal: unjustly removing our President from office. But to fend off their attacks and multi-million dollar warchest, we're counting on YOU to join the fight. _Remember, it 's never about the amount you give, but the _sheer number_ of grassroots patriots standing with us._ **Together,[$50, $25, even just $5 at a time,](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9ERUZFTkQtUFJFU0lERU5ULVRSVU1QLVMtTUFKT1JJVFlfMjAyNTA1MjcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ERUZFTkQtUFJFU0lERU5ULVRSVU1QLVMtTUFKT1JJVFkmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NTkmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/xXfakTF4anfNu8-To1IsBA) thousands of grassroots donors like YOU can successfully FIGHT BACK against the Democrats' latest plot.** **[Please make a grassroots contribution of truly any amount to DEFEND President Trump's Senate majority.](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9ERUZFTkQtUFJFU0lERU5ULVRSVU1QLVMtTUFKT1JJVFlfMjAyNTA1MjcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ERUZFTkQtUFJFU0lERU5ULVRSVU1QLVMtTUFKT1JJVFkmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NTkmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/Kp4nIvYJ1UWnP-atraUpxQ) **

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zgco4p7i16hl83he2lkon6qql7hscthh7e0vlce8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5gm1o31c9h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z207101ger91m325p06h91r5ssm665ivusi9vdro_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5gm1o31c9h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z39f3458mj5c55mjq83sip5be9dmtg3vs1itpv4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5gm1o31c9h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z2meidcf5sqmirfj0q05ldddo2j7nigcdho7e9l8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5gm1o31c9h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zbid3sgf0v19mslj7j1mqvogb3p0roah7np0rq3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5gm1o31c9h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zmp3olf7jboerhe10p5culf5kb4pd08dvkp7jnog_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5gm1o31c9h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zcvu7vk3j981ej7jofb2fth59vqmonr7smueiq38_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5gm1o31c9h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zki1bva7psl8loiuk31q3pdd1ns0its3kltpp9i0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5gm1o31c9h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. body:
| | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/k6yziAtORXIbebOMffqjvRzH33PX3vO9R-innbcmL8pfb9PcS9_JLICnlLNhkLSYGIQmFek5tcrUHgp2YtPZMwhL1SGFA1pvVodEaK4-TmtiuggN30UCGrbDtrxiCteyrrslnOS0k3g5dx8JmU_4_P2QNU6oJ7HjwJ8kWZJOZRhhCwSAexUF3oPyPmhMmsr8VBtHC_hbmtJkphvd0xSSZB8zYEikYhPN3tjnidk1mNM5MFNTyIqz-F-eTOkF60WZc9D6cLhEeslj74gvRm88FVCQSZEmfjWxmT19cBnHL-fiFPOZzJVZiGOoh6anbNH7oKz80ZUyTXQnBDtBl34SGn7ZHggFoUHKH6Z8qcz3cPxPez9Wgoo2QNkbFtHDwcLmmhBOFRX_fdjHnrFZ7kx-RJRQpdT1vt2_64-7bMu3dbQiHS4Qu3oQAc6nNHjkG6quidphHims67C4sciT2uD9bTZjAE2aW7HDdZvfW30C8JlPl-t2JAXwhfwMTqU/sEEyzj_vgZBodX_9lftZSdjf59-Y2UdR/9)

** ****I’m pissed, Peter.** ** ** You’re bombarded every single day — texts, emails, pop-ups — all begging you to take a survey, sign a petition, or chip in a few bucks to “stop the Democrats.” ** ** And what actually happens, Peter? **NOTHING.**** ** The same RINO cowards fold like cheap suits. The spending gets worse. The lies keep piling up. And you — the one actually footing the bill — are left betrayed and ignored.** ** They take your hard-earned dollars and then turn around and vote for the same damn policies that wrecked your savings, crushed your community, and left you wondering if _anyone_ in D.C. actually gives a damn about you. ** **_**You want the truth?**_** ** When they scam you out of a donation, they pat themselves on the back, head to some fancy cocktail party, and LAUGH at you behind closed doors. **They don’t respect you. They don’t fear you. And they sure as hell don’t represent you.** I’ve had it. With the lies. The games. The sellouts. I know what you're probably thinking right now: _"Who the hell is this guy?"_ My name is Chip Roy.** ** You may have seen me getting trashed by some spineless RINO on Fox News for not “playing for the team.”** ** Well guess what, Peter? ** ****Damn right I’m not a team player.**** ** Because I don’t work for _them_.** ** **[I work for YOU.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Lk4NcdJ9JiC3whPP-McsoWctF82JtPYBF64zvLi312RrAhpF8az2LZwolgkghATck1wwjYJK8iiKSEe7rehnLiT4QjNGSogv2TMeQpuVC16YuKFq-Wok-IUKGlTLPE5mwTCj5_lhRsvi4oK8-bFAWD7bNsYdhvdHO67ByXjb_0HwqnLWkNGwMrd47gATW2EjhWPWQD5nWGJzHMSbEo9dWVFiE4glB69AhnMc2-ZsgY50wgMmEmNrlKqkJjDDmvPAazeQersoIuktLVdvJr2CEK8UJhMRUDMoUXKHkjIPzojHKe_VDnQpVMNqx7eJVuW8T4IajGZGLIp8fYIYui6GBXA0o4Opzf8Cq6r3Fv2HkIm7Rw53iPF4zvycuz1uVSG865uBzX5PClVPGBjgJYrwsQcFliwGqRI8B0uP8gnmr2L-xPnZFZP4EYrfftGUNTAFd-0ql1dWXo6HfxqFhwWSNqyUfLUZNkp6XT194TYUNq12MdCwK705rb2PvsA/7JLELVzxXj2OoDQc2DJ0jw6EUWfOu5vQ/9)**** ** I see your posts. I hear your calls. I _feel_ the same betrayal that lights a fire in your gut every time you turn on the news and watch our country circling the drain. ** ** President Trump gave us real hope for real change. But these DC swamp rats — **Republicans and Democrats alike** — are trying to feed him the same old garbage from the last 30 years.** ** So here’s what I’m doing, Peter: **I’m fighting like hell to blow up this broken status quo.** I’m helping elect people who will **stand with Trump** and finally put **YOU first**. It’s not easy. I’ve got the entire **Uniparty** gunning for me. But I’m not backing down — not now, not ever.** ** Now let me be straight with you — no gimmicks, no BS. ** ** I won’t lie and say there’s a 2500% match. I won’t trick you into taking a fake survey just to ask you for money. And I’m not going to pretend I’m Trump or Elon or JD Vance. I’m just a man — a father, a patriot — asking you directly: **[Can you chip in $25, or whatever you can afford, to help me fight back?](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/n-MK-dXfCGr122XuS-ZgrMDiHTQrkz8iCAhQvQrU5JyJAwzsaE10SFvn48pcbkqovVRFUZ7IrLftviuLbjl2NgytHg6VuX9O48HJhkHIsLESaZf2p_7TiatiKKVTA5HsVphe8xeHUBd8sjuqHLFZ8NA74DdSswV1_hBsiAZwgS1n664ReWekCeVee1QHKiYHnYLeIzEhI44Vugdd1niAOPqNTUvQ9_f8_0i4r4mcKY2r8T1Vns2gFpSypuiG8_z3owEueuI1XpX9EmhtW_P6jSgB7sy-PKTRw8YksgWjBjTdpUZncHl2dV7K4frE0lUmABVKN86McADoceLjuShA_fyRV75amNHIbr0_F0BncC2RoH6xw6u8oCiYL5h6r4rL8v2_9Vg3f0K-rWFglxh9ghSmsJwlw2V2K8h6RWwCsj_rOgYxGRDQaorjBgHsMTFPM0QmDiwQh8e686YPJKcaWww_njQ6aJG35OOsVZF0mLwWS0wM-Awb-m81Mkk/XmO_KI7BZdXOJa6KShzaungVyIPsWPzS/9)** That’s it. You have my word, Peter:
✔ I will never stop fighting for you.
✔ I will never stop listening to you.
✔ And I will NEVER sell you out — not for a vote, not for a check, not for anything. This is my promise to you. As a man. As a father. As someone who actually gives a damn. **[I would be honored to earn your support today.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/r_G9D09c0hR6M8BOJ_LTxNKzG64k0A9rhKtv6Nni4Iek7MDH4TNK81kDlz-l9Mp0QaY7LN46PDE5_nqvdOSFUEzWld4oQvi79Qpv3iULrivmMFIS2Gml7eAbgat7gqR4XsUJb1BBuPHfULAri-aEANik8myBfETO4iyglhOhExIGWNxX46DMFiEWjCPUODOxC_mxVsLpwxdRPzHbBz-O8FJXcF6451uXUDmZVnxJj3gWxnys5z2pPDnnMsT0odwbDYKoaqJ_vlfBENdxhyIXrM4LHQkYvokyXg9_44X26UdL1qbY9qvrtDwcmHNbicQpozEkWA78i6FpA1VkVVML_AxgeH9okodetetdnio6KIWHkxXknxRVB_7qgG3WRgPEqNa5-DY0ovvJn5Bk9JeJFCCjZc3XKJdQmUhohu5RyvNoO7LUhhQmsSxdu0bhwT4xLO1Xl0oj_SoiK0OkG-kQLVcC5Ahhm3jKNMQSicmrFHWwRst4FvxjQCsngS4/6d2N33fEA_eK4nLGtTiav_ESn_D5WFNN/9)** **Together, we can rip the mask off this corrupt system and start winning again — for YOU!** Thank you and God Bless,

# [Steve Russell (R-OK): Refugees, waste, and forgiveness](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=164559945&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0NTU5OTQ1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDg0MzcwMjMsImV4cCI6MTc1MTAyOTAyMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI0NDAzOTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5AfcqirqRa2RMicUG3qdFvwJa0IfRno7zP2ms3JJFCY)
### Listen to his thoughts on how politics has changed in the Trump era and how we get Americans to care more about the plight and welfare of refugees.

Listen to the latest episode of _[Former Member](https://substack.com/redirect/3108b0eb-c7dd-483d-80dc-3d539c4d62c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , where I talk to former members of Congress--Democrats and Republicans--to get their perspectives on what it was like to serve, and how things are different today vs. when they were around.
Last week, I spoke with [Steve Russell](https://substack.com/redirect/7565dbaf-bae2-40d9-858b-62af582e1b6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a two-term Republican Congressman from Oklahoma who served in the last two years of the Obama presidency and the first two years of the Trump presidency.
He's also the author of _[We Got Him!](https://substack.com/redirect/ac38fbef-0796-4102-a37c-8bbb846c2998?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , which covers his time in the Army and his role in the capture of Saddam Hussein. (The memoir was [just released as an audiobook](https://substack.com/redirect/2e5c3304-4377-4aaf-bbcd-8f1f02f64bec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).)
Give it a listen! Details below.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5zYW11ZWxzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9hY2NvdW50IiwicCI6MTY0NTU5OTQ1LCJzIjoyNDQwMzk4LCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNzQ4NDM3MDIzLCJleHAiOjE3NTEwMjkwMjMsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.myZG0B0D3h3x97VIo2_SwmietcQQVRT2N7QXlT0mopY?)
### **Topics from my conversation with Steve Russell**
* _0:00 - 6:14_: Introduction, including Steve's background, service with the Army, and time in Congress.
* _6:15 - 17:47_: Government waste and inefficiency, and how to actually make government more efficient.1
* _17:48 - 23:11_: How politics changed between 2014 and 2016.
* _23:12 - 29:44_: Comparing Hillary Clinton's [server scandal](https://substack.com/redirect/8f647c2e-3eba-4af2-9449-239b92db7c64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to Pete Hegseth's [Signal scandal](https://substack.com/redirect/281c001a-8441-4727-9e3f-614549d24cd9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* _29:45 - 32:56_: Political forgiveness and admitting that you're wrong.
* _32:57 - 39:52_: Anything that you regret from your time in Congress?
* _39:53 - 52:12_: The politics of refugees in the U.S., and how we get people to care.
* _52:13 - 56:34_: How quickly the pendulum of politics can swing.
* _56:35 - 59:19_: The challenges of a commuter Congress, and conclusion.

_Note: A few people have told me that these emails are sometimes going into spam folders. If you a)**mark the email as "not spam"** and b) **save bensamuels@substack.com to your contacts** , that should address the issue._

We are sounding the alarm. Last week, the primary elections in Pennsylvania took place. Now, all eyes are on the General Elections in November, including the judicial retention seats on the PA Supreme Court.

As a reminder, Democrats hold a five-to-two majority on the PA Supreme Court, but this year’s retention elections could swing the balance of power if the Democratically elected justices do not win their retention elections.

**As NPP CEO Kadida Kenner stated to _The Keystone_ , “This will be a historic election in Pennsylvania, and I’m sure we’re going to come close to Wisconsin’s $110 million when it comes down to it...These Supreme Court justice seats are so important because they’re ensuring our voting rights, our access to abortion and securing democracy in general.” **

This isn’t hyperbole: It is reported that Elon Musk has already spent a million on these races, and PA’s richest billionaire, Jeffrey Yass, is planning to spend even more in his anti-retention campaign against the justices elected as Democrats.

If MAGA is successful with their anti-retention campaign, the PA Supreme Court could have three vacancies until the Governor is able to appoint and confirm their replacements (unlikely as this would require support from Republicans in the PA Senate) or until the next judicial election in 2027. **Their ultimate goal: having a Republican majority on the PA Supreme Court before the 2028 presidential election.**

**[We must act fast: A generous angel donor has agreed to match all donations up to $50,000. clean_body: | | | You need to see this: We are sounding the alarm. Last week, the primary elections in Pennsylvania took place. Now, all eyes are on the General Elections in November, including the judicial retention seats on the PA Supreme Court. As a reminder, Democrats hold a five-to-two majority on the PA Supreme Court, but this year’s retention elections could swing the balance of power if the Democratically elected justices do not win their retention elections. As NPP CEO Kadida Kenner stated to The Keystone , “This will be a historic election in Pennsylvania, and I’m sure we’re going to come close to Wisconsin’s $110 million when it comes down to it...These Supreme Court justice seats are so important because they’re ensuring our voting rights, our access to abortion and securing democracy in general.” This isn’t hyperbole: It is reported that Elon Musk has already spent a million on these races, and PA’s richest billionaire, Jeffrey Yass, is planning to spend even more in his anti-retention campaign against the justices elected as Democrats. If MAGA is successful with their anti-retention campaign, the PA Supreme Court could have three vacancies until the Governor is able to appoint and confirm their replacements (unlikely as this would require support from Republicans in the PA Senate) or until the next judicial election in 2027. Their ultimate goal: having a Republican majority on the PA Supreme Court before the 2028 presidential election. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In this together, Team NPP Source: The Keystone, Will billionaire election spending end the Democratic majority on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court? Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 193814126996771 | | | |

_NOW: Adam Schiff is SLAMMING Trump and his MAGA mob for putting billionaires over the American people! ⬇️_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90423?t=6&akid=19964%2E878179%2EIYjJ1W) [**We need 2,000 supporters reading this to join the fight and THANK Senate Democrats like Sanders, Booker, and Schiff for always having our backs! You’ve been hand-selected »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90424?t=7&akid=19964%2E878179%2EIYjJ1W) | [**THANK SENATE DEMOCRATS: DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90424?t=8&akid=19964%2E878179%2EIYjJ1W)

TO: Senator Cory Booker
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Senate Democrats,

**THANK YOU for leading the charge against Donald Trump and his MAGA minions as they attack our democracy!**

I know that Trump has put a huge target on your backs — so it means the world that you aren’t backing down even a little bit.

**_Our work is far from over:_ Republicans are plotting to END Social Security and Medicaid, DESTROY the federal government, and make Trump an untouchable KING.**

As a proud Democrat, you have my word that I will join your fight and do _everything_ I can to help take back the Senate and stop this dangerous administration.

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90424?t=9&akid=19964%2E878179%2EIYjJ1W) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90424?t=10&akid=19964%2E878179%2EIYjJ1W)

**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19964%2E878179%2EIYjJ1W). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19964%2E878179%2EIYjJ1W).**

name: Dr. Paul Isaacson
subject: I wouldn't be able to do this without the Center
body:
15 years fighting with the Center in Arizona with your help | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108484994/548098245/2141984067?sourceid=1150715&utm_campaign=25emige-0501aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=stories&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDk0NzI1ZS1jNDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feMLQL9Pmb2osGVwbdW-lsiQK6HRIpUGykLj1T8LbFQ=&emci=906e9e46-333b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a094725e-c43b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108484996/548098247/2141984067?sourceid=1150715&utm_campaign=25emige-0501aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=stories&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDk0NzI1ZS1jNDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feMLQL9Pmb2osGVwbdW-lsiQK6HRIpUGykLj1T8LbFQ=&emci=906e9e46-333b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a094725e-c43b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)
---|---
Hi Peter,

Every day, people come to my clinic seeking care they can't get anywhere else. Some travel hundreds of miles. Some are facing life-threatening complications. Others are scared and alone.

My name is Dr. Paul Isaacson, I'm an independent abortion provider and a client of the Center for Reproductive Rights. Since I became an OB/GYN more than 30 years ago, the reproductive rights landscape in the United States has drastically changed.

Abortion care has become harder and harder to provide. Since the late 2000s, Arizona has passed wave after wave of restrictions designed to make abortion care inaccessible. [**But for more than 15 years, the Center has been by my side, providing expert guidance to keep my clinic open and protect the people I care for.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108485000/548098249/1126318745?sourceid=1150715&utm_campaign=25emige-0501aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=stories&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDk0NzI1ZS1jNDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feMLQL9Pmb2osGVwbdW-lsiQK6HRIpUGykLj1T8LbFQ=&emci=906e9e46-333b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a094725e-c43b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

In 2009, we fought and overturned Arizona's harmful 20-week abortion ban. That was just the beginning. In 2022, after _Roe_ fell, we challenged a Civil War-era abortion ban—and won again. Just this year, we worked together to ensure Arizona's laws reflected the will of voters, resulting in a judge permanently blocking the state's 15-week ban, an enormous victory. These wins were the result of tireless legal advocacy, unwavering partnership, and supporters like you who make the Center's work possible.

These aren't just legal victories. [**They mean the difference between receiving care and being forced to go without it—for thousands of people in Arizona and the surrounding region.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108485001/548098257/1126318745?sourceid=1150715&utm_campaign=25emige-0501aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=stories&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDk0NzI1ZS1jNDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feMLQL9Pmb2osGVwbdW-lsiQK6HRIpUGykLj1T8LbFQ=&emci=906e9e46-333b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a094725e-c43b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

But this work is only possible because of people like you.

The Center's expert legal services and strategic guidance are provided free of charge to independent providers like me, and they rely on donations to make that happen. [**Please, make a gift today to protect access to abortion. Your support ensures we can keep fighting and keep caring for the people who need us most.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108485002/548098259/1126318745?sourceid=1150715&utm_campaign=25emige-0501aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=stories&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDk0NzI1ZS1jNDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feMLQL9Pmb2osGVwbdW-lsiQK6HRIpUGykLj1T8LbFQ=&emci=906e9e46-333b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a094725e-c43b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

I couldn't do this alone. [**The Center couldn’t do it without you.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108485003/548098261/1126318745?sourceid=1150715&utm_campaign=25emige-0501aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=stories&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDk0NzI1ZS1jNDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feMLQL9Pmb2osGVwbdW-lsiQK6HRIpUGykLj1T8LbFQ=&emci=906e9e46-333b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a094725e-c43b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) And without this partnership, the patients I serve would have nowhere to turn.

With gratitude,

Dr. Paul Isaacson

clean_body: 15 years fighting with the Center in Arizona with your help | | | ---|--- Hi Peter, Every day, people come to my clinic seeking care they can't get anywhere else. Some travel hundreds of miles. Some are facing life-threatening complications. Others are scared and alone. My name is Dr. Paul Isaacson, I'm an independent abortion provider and a client of the Center for Reproductive Rights. Since I became an OB/GYN more than 30 years ago, the reproductive rights landscape in the United States has drastically changed. Abortion care has become harder and harder to provide. Since the late 2000s, Arizona has passed wave after wave of restrictions designed to make abortion care inaccessible. In 2009, we fought and overturned Arizona's harmful 20-week abortion ban. That was just the beginning. In 2022, after Roe fell, we challenged a Civil War-era abortion ban—and won again. Just this year, we worked together to ensure Arizona's laws reflected the will of voters, resulting in a judge permanently blocking the state's 15-week ban, an enormous victory. These wins were the result of tireless legal advocacy, unwavering partnership, and supporters like you who make the Center's work possible. These aren't just legal victories. But this work is only possible because of people like you. The Center's expert legal services and strategic guidance are provided free of charge to independent providers like me, and they rely on donations to make that happen. I couldn't do this alone. And without this partnership, the patients I serve would have nowhere to turn. With gratitude, Dr. Paul Isaacson Independent Abortion Provider and Center Client | "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: Katie Britt
subject: Hillary Clinton is back (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend, give this a read

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znhh1rqs7t29lq43009h58orp3v37916uhp606uo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5im4pb2clh2bs)
Friend, I'm just going to say it:

_Hillary Clinton is a sore loser._ She ran for President and lost, twice! She used her power to get rich and leave working Americans like you behind.

And she claims she's pro-woman... until she finds out we have an "R" by our name. So do a bunch of other Democrats.

Well, my message to Hillary Clinton and the rest of the Left is this:

I'm a **[conservative mama on a mission,](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhgpr4f36fbsnvlfoajl80prdlkh9j1233e5h4mo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5im4pb2clh2bs)** you **[don't](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8arm4e4l70h5shvntv2dq5dv4hno20q09f5i90o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5im4pb2clh2bs)** speak for me, and **[you don't speak for millions of other women](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbhe21hgfam38ko3f2ocjt8qh7p7mennsjri071o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5im4pb2clh2bs)** either.

Across America, women are _DONE_ being stereotyped by Democrats. We believe in life, freedom, school choice, individual liberty, conservative values, and the Constitution.

And we reject this anti-woman nonsense from liberals like Hillary Clinton.

**[If you agree, can you do me a favor? Make a one-time split donation between the NRSC and me to help conservative women keep up the fight.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z76cddubenvmdl0br89ulvsdnq06tf0fu8sagboo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5im4pb2clh2bs)**

name: Pineapple Total on Behalf of GOP Presidential
subject: Korean Breakthrough Reduced Wrinkles By 48%
body:
That’s right - by almost HALF!

| Hey Friend, A new breakthrough from Korea can reduce crow’s feet, sagging, and crepey skin by 48%. That’s right - by almost HALF! In a groundbreaking study using high-definition 3D skin scans... Women saw their wrinkles literally disappear before their eyes. No expensive creams or painful injections. The reason it works so well is because it activates the key cells in your skin that produce ALL your collagen, elastin and hyaluronic acid. It turns out, while creams can give short-term, surface level results... They never truly fix the root cause of wrinkles, sagging, or crepey skin. No wonder 8 out of 10 women say they are left wanting more from their creams. Ivy League dermatologist, Dr. Mara Weinstein explains how this new Korean breakthrough works: **[Try this Korean “younger skin” method at home in just 30 seconds](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztmvcdc80pmcj7rc9heaubj4c1mk1759u91psmtg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5im4pb2c3h2bs)** If you want skin that looks 10 to 15 years younger, try this today. Tracey Colone from Rainbow City, Alabama said: “Wow, I cannot believe what a difference this has made in reducing the visibility of my wrinkles and firming up the skin on my neck, too... the woman at the grocery store told me I look amazing. That really made my day!”
---

name: Colleen Davis
subject: against birth control?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
Back in 2023, Jessica did not have the...| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108490864/548116068/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250528against_N_CD_90DO_10_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5YTc2M2RlLWM3M2ItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Aj_8-GPWW4MkTMS656BFi47Rk_G0MjSD-_GTmA0NlHc=)
---
Hi Peter,

Millions of women across the entire U.S. South no longer have access to reproductive healthcare. There is only one state left in the region where abortion is still legal and accessible: Virginia.

That’s why, at Her Bold Move, we’re committed to electing pro-choice women to Virginia’s House of Delegates who will work to protect abortion access for the women who live in Virginia – **as well as the women who are living in the neighboring abortion ban states.**

**There is one particularly critical race for this decision-making body happening THIS YEAR: Jessica Anderson for the Virginia House of Delegates, 71st District. We couldn’t be prouder to announce our official endorsement of her candidacy.**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108490865/548116069/683216101?refcode=EM_F_250528against_N_CD_90DO_10_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5YTc2M2RlLWM3M2ItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Aj_8-GPWW4MkTMS656BFi47Rk_G0MjSD-_GTmA0NlHc=)
---
Trump LOST this district last November! That means there is a BIG opportunity to officially flip this important seat from red to blue.

Jessica nearly won this seat in 2023. Although Her Bold Move was proud to stand with her that year, she did not have a lot of other institutional or financial support. Despite being outspent almost 2:1, she was just 667 votes shy of winning.

[**Jessica’s race is rated one of the top 3 most competitive in Virginia this cycle, and even though she has a lot more support than she had the first time around, she will need all the help she can get to close the gap and win in November. body:
We’re not done yet!

|
---
| | | Summer just got a whole lot hotter! We're turning up the heat on the Deep State and firing up our efforts to make America great again. But we can't do it without your input!

**You were one of the thousands of patriots who took our first DOGE survey, and we can't thank you enough.** Your insights were like a cool breeze on a sweltering summer day - _refreshing, revitalizing, and absolutely necessary._ We took your feedback and ran with it, using it to fuel our fight against waste and inefficiency in the federal government.

**But we're not done yet!** We need to hear from you again. _**[Your input was so valuable the first time around that we're coming back for more. Think of this as the summer sequel you've been waiting for - DOGE Survey 2.0!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9ce035tc8935bocmonoito0ndglbaq6vd95cpi0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imcob0cph2bs "Your input was so valuable the first time around that we're coming back for more. Think of this as the summer sequel you've been waiting for - DOGE Survey 2.0!")**_

_What issues are sizzling hot to you? Where do you think we should focus our efforts?_ Your answers will be the sparklers that light the way for our next move.

**_[Take our quick and easy DOGE Summer Survey now and help us!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6sl5esfkmjpucufp5g45935q3qo6htgtsfhupg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imcob0cph2bs "Take our quick and easy DOGE Summer Survey now and help us!")_**

**✂️Expose the Deep State's scams
✂️Cut through the red tape and bureaucratic slowdowns
✂️Fuel the conservative movement with your ideas and energy**

---

Don't let the summer sun beat down on our momentum. Share your thoughts, and we'll make sure to turn up the heat on the issues that matter most.

Stay cool, and stay vigilant. We're counting on you to help us make this a summer to remember!

Best regards,

House Republicans

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: It’s officially official
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
I’m hoping to recruit you to my Alabama Governor team | [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3fc00c0f68a64443819447959c5b52a8&_e=20zdDOyPRKZhUO4hhXrtvSEKzxDQOcjYSBnCM03Jrcd9ZXH0-IRXl4zUZm6i3spqw-Sz1VgXwEqVQ23fGoOk9oRlWrNPtc8Bz76y1dl950VArPfvNyMiqZh3duyyKEW72WC55mwbddnHDom7Fj-uGp46J6mnTeRFv3wOJxC42i_mbVt4kEobb9UKakxNrgNxSXFjB6tfvswroQ5_s7nJzQEKem0df-U7BxdYXJaFGlJO_TvWa0GfFy5VBCp7XLkosylydCT6wCXr49TmJ55aXL9BF3xOc2aUHnL-r_wlPdvwx0yGguTpsRExj_qZCYdqFUGswRueFC3XzzXql4mP_aroUKGdDDnTw2XW4OWTEyc%3D)
---

Peter,

It’s officially official – I’m running for Alabama’s next governor.

| [ **SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3fc00c0f68a64443819447959c5b52a8&_e=20zdDOyPRKZhUO4hhXrtvSEKzxDQOcjYSBnCM03Jrcd9ZXH0-IRXl4zUZm6i3spqw-Sz1VgXwEqVQ23fGoOk9oRlWrNPtc8Bz76y1dl950VArPfvNyMiqZh3duyyKEW72WC55mwbddnHDom7Fj-uGp46J6mnTeRFv3wOJxC42i_mbVt4kEobb9UKakxNrgNxps1a4wpEI-0xuKsy6kmBYknMRIAUcf769XNxRmsTuY8vsO21A5qSYyCRCp1B4BmI32UQxtNUFQMGc0Ubph1k58QpZefT2N-_55GZz44SdRa7SnH0gi_wkjD3nN5akI3I97PqyYCSsSUi6tE3CZtaGKgVfmEOvcWRE-kKuJQYErs%3D)
---

_I’ve even recorded a launch video, which I would love if you could watch and consider donating to my gubernatorial campaign._

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3fc00c0f68a64443819447959c5b52a8&_e=20zdDOyPRKZhUO4hhXrtvSEKzxDQOcjYSBnCM03Jrcd9ZXH0-IRXl4zUZm6i3spqw-Sz1VgXwEqVQ23fGoOk9oRlWrNPtc8Bz76y1dl950VArPfvNyMiqZh3duyyKEW72WC55mwbddnHDom7Fj-uGp46J6mnTeRFv3wOJxC42i_mbVt4kEobb9UKakxNrgNxoTb9IproRU16Eu0NKXvLOFwlAU2fOGhSaz7euw62GH_gn7zrYqBcoDENYhjS0u56xIkdjA_ATlqU_HpNYXljWRBp0iKj_odtqL3MSmk32ZwdQgKaYvqAuYtxedoI8OK85riO5pd5u7Vl0b_X_YSXlApDt7zF3YjPIFw5g4u0L1k%3D)
I’m no stranger to recruiting folks to my team. I had to do it with players while I was a Hall-of-Fame College Football Coach, and I had to do it when I ran for Senate.

[**But this team I’m assembling means a lot more to me, and I’d be honored if you’d join my team.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3fc00c0f68a64443819447959c5b52a8&_e=20zdDOyPRKZhUO4hhXrtvSEKzxDQOcjYSBnCM03Jrcd9ZXH0-IRXl4zUZm6i3spqw-Sz1VgXwEqVQ23fGoOk9oRlWrNPtc8Bz76y1dl950VArPfvNyMiqZh3duyyKEW72WC55mwbddnHDom7Fj-uGp46J6mnTeRFv3wOJxC42i_mbVt4kEobb9UKakxNrgNxLidPZ_nTE9np9VvYrm1DCWpHkQ0yjanDlAaBP95ZFaVnU7fV6EFSQgEpC15kO3gfG7zUbqW5uVgUVIs5KQABRCE63u0ipm2wsrfe6Cc1-5R7NZIa-9E4FrGzZ9HLxZMkE8sqgGyxCWjIgEeRoUwc_56Qag85x7YXqTibR6zBYOk%3D)

We have the opportunity to catalyze Alabama into one of the most productive states in our country while preserving our traditional Alabamian conservative values. I’ve turned multiple college football teams into generational winning teams, and I’d love the opportunity to do the same with Alabama.

**But the only way I can win is with you on my team.** [**Can you chip in $20 before midnight to help?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3fc00c0f68a64443819447959c5b52a8&_e=20zdDOyPRKZhUO4hhXrtvSEKzxDQOcjYSBnCM03Jrcd9ZXH0-IRXl4zUZm6i3spqw-Sz1VgXwEqVQ23fGoOk9oRlWrNPtc8Bz76y1dl950VArPfvNyMiqZh3duyyKEW72WC55mwbddnHDom7Fj-uGp46J6mnTeRFv3wOJxC42i_mbVt4kEobb9UKakxNrgNxxmM7elijChBoDBE4HfJfFGhLZlqvDAOIMIoxo2B2gMzd4sYWuL-xVHSdPzSCZAYJ_JmIahnSNSz6PF-fWm-AlDwGKJsPJsbaLxq7-ue8ZpFMDDuQxKG6Z38ZL7TvuArXlOE_6v1N8-9Ppis35vFc6mH2BH8bSDYXI-s9NmV_RrY%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

name: Left Action
subject: Demand RFK Jr REVERSE the decision to block pregnant women and babies from getting the COVID vaccine
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [This horrible decision will block babies and pregnant women from getting the COVID vaccine. Demand it be reversed!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7af337ac-13b4-4b7a-a86d-17ef84786a89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb3c1b663-6226-4f19-9497-11693561b92b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | HHS secretary RFK Jr. [announced](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td62bd92e-eb26-4158-9144-26b05b1c0961/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that Covid shots will no longer be recommended for pregnant women and babies. This decision will make it far less likely that insurance companies will pay for the shots, effectively cutting off millions unable to pay out of pocket. It will put them and everyone they come into contact with at greater risk of getting sick from Covid. This is what happens when you put a vaccine "skeptic" (science be damned) in charge of the nation's health. It is an idiotic decision, coming from an administration headed by an idiot. [**Add your name now, and demand it be reversed.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5584a985-3049-4baa-a2fb-6d4ef1b73a79/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e1407c8-4084-4e86-bdde-13850c7a173a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

### Good Morning PolitiBrawlers,
Tom Homan puts the media in their place as President Trump continues to push Canada to join the U.S.
We are wondering if the President's 51st state dream for Canada is even something his base supports... See our poll below, do you support it?

# Homan sets reporter straight after undermining question
Trump Border Czar Tom Homan faced a media gaggle outside of the White House, when a reporter asked a question that overstepped, undermining President Trump.
**[Homan set the record straight immediately...](https://substack.com/redirect/9ae0de54-406f-4865-b5fd-f03dbcb54f06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/9ae0de54-406f-4865-b5fd-f03dbcb54f06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9ae0de54-406f-4865-b5fd-f03dbcb54f06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Homan took several questions from the media crowd related to immigration and deportation before starting to walk away.
"The President says he doesn't know what his responsibilities are under Article 5 of the Constitution," one reporter shouted after him. "Who would it be to educate him about that? Would it be you?"
**[Homan paused before answering,](https://substack.com/redirect/9ae0de54-406f-4865-b5fd-f03dbcb54f06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "I think the president is one of if not the most knowledgable president we've ever had!"
"People can beat on President Trump all you want, Trump is a game changer," Homan explained. We handed the Biden administration the most secure border in my lifetime and he purposefully unsecured it,... Look at what President Trump achieved in 8 weeks! He did what Biden couldn't do in 4 years."
"The greatest president in my lifetime, no doubt about it!" he continued.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/9ae0de54-406f-4865-b5fd-f03dbcb54f06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together With Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/d86f3bdc-14b9-4941-be32-b2b9a648df42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Apple 's Loss - Mode Mobile's Gain**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d86f3bdc-14b9-4941-be32-b2b9a648df42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Apple's 2024 iPhone shipments dipped as its AI push fell flat, with Mark Zuckerberg and Elon Musk criticizing the company for lacking innovation.
But while incumbents fail to impress, **[a new player is shaking up the smartphone industry](https://substack.com/redirect/d86f3bdc-14b9-4941-be32-b2b9a648df42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** -- not with AI hype, but with real earnings for users.
Mode Mobile is completely changing smartphones, giving people the ability to earn income from the phones they already own. Their 45M+ users have already pocketed a staggering $325M+, and they were named **the fastest-growing software company in 2023 by Deloitte**.
With their Nasdaq ticker **$MODE** secured, you can still invest in their pre-IPO offering at $0.30/share.
**[Invest in the next disruption to smartphones and earn up to 100% bonus shares.](https://substack.com/redirect/d86f3bdc-14b9-4941-be32-b2b9a648df42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/d86f3bdc-14b9-4941-be32-b2b9a648df42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Trump says Canada is "considering" becoming the 51st U.S. state for "Golden Dome" protection**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/036a15b6-1bb6-4a6f-9dce-8f22b8457709?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
On Truth Social, the president said he **[offered Canada free access to his proposed "Golden Dome"](https://substack.com/redirect/7a85db08-61cb-4ce3-ad68-75e40921124d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** missile defense system if they give up their independence, versus charging them $61 billion if they remain a separate nation.
"I told Canada, which very much wants to be part of our fabulous Golden Dome System, that it will cost $61 Billion Dollars if they remain a separate, but unequal, Nation, but will cost ZERO DOLLARS if they become our cherished 51st State," Trump wrote. "They are considering the offer!"
* **Canadian officials have repeatedly rejected any such idea** \- Prime Minister Mark Carney, who won election partly by opposing Trump's annexation talk, has stated Canada "won't be for sale, ever," and King Charles III told the Canadian Parliament that Canadians can achieve more by staying true to their own values.
* **Trump has been pushing this idea for months despite strong opposition** \- The president has repeatedly offered to annex Canada, a proposal that has been consistently rebuked by both Canadian officials and citizens, yet Trump has not given up on the dream of a U.S./Canada merger.

* * *
# Seattle mayor blames Christian group attacked by Antifa militants, FBI to investigate
FBI Deputy Director Dan Bongino launched an investigation Tuesday into "targeted violence" against Christians after **[Antifa militants clashed with a worshipping evangelical group](https://substack.com/redirect/7b79047f-6e95-4ec5-90a6-97c78cca50ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** outside Seattle City Hall.
"We have asked our team to fully investigate allegations of targeted violence against religious groups at the Seattle concert. Freedom of religion isn't a suggestion," Bongino wrote on X.
* **A second "Rattle in Seattle" rally was held Tuesday at City Hall** \- The evangelical conservative group organized this demonstration in response to weekend violence, with eight people arrested for assault during dueling protests between the Christian group and counter-protesters.
* **The mayor blamed Christians for sparking weekend violence** \- Democrat Mayor Bruce Harrell criticized Saturday's Christian rally at Cal Anderson Park, saying the "far-right rally" was designed to provoke reactions in Seattle's prominent LGBTQ+ neighborhood, though he also blamed "anarchists" who infiltrated counter-protesters.
"Seattle is proud of our reputation as a welcoming, inclusive city for LGBTQ+ communities, and we stand with our trans neighbors when they face bigotry and injustice," the mayor said in a statement. "Today's far-right rally was held here for this very reason - to provoke a reaction by promoting beliefs that are inherently opposed to our city's values, in the heart of Seattle's most prominent LGBTQ+ neighborhood."
"Anarchists infiltrated the counter-protestors group and inspired violence, prompting SPD to make arrests and ask organizers to shut down the event early, which they did," he continued.
* **Christians push back** \- The evangelical event organizers said the mayor's statement constituted religious bigotry in a counter statement.
"Following the MayDay USA worship event at Cal Anderson Park on Saturday, Mayor Harrell had the audacity to issue a press release blaming Christians for the premeditated violence of Antifa which resulted in the hospitalization of Seattle Police Department personnel and the arrest of 23 Antifa agitators,... Under Mayor Harrell's leadership, the city of Seattle has continued its spiral into lawlessness and dysfunction while the First Amendment rights of citizens to peacefully assemble has been disregarded."

body:
Click here to unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4xBla9HqS06_watf7h3QaQ2?source=header_rfe]
Can we have just two minutes of your attention?

Barack Obama just called on all of us to STAND UP and FIX our Democracy.

Donald Trump’s corruption knows no bounds, Peter. It’s no coincidence that while the Qatari royal family is bribing Trump with a new luxury jet, he announces plans to rename the Persian Gulf. Enough is enough. **That’s why I introduced the _Persian Gulf Act_ to prevent Trump from renaming this body of water that has cultural significance to the region, and make sure this historic name is respected in all government documents.** This isn’t just about a name — it’s about Donald Trump wading into international culture wars all to please foreign leaders who are giving him a plane. **_**[Chip in $10 now to help us fight back against Trump’s political stunts and get the word out about his corrupt administration →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108496730/548130870/1386253589?amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250528_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTk3ZWVkZS1jZDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QYv_b_46OUEa5gLF-VhtvqwoXjq5kmttA_a4rM2DAz0=)**_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108496739/548130872/1386253589?express=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250528_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTk3ZWVkZS1jZDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QYv_b_46OUEa5gLF-VhtvqwoXjq5kmttA_a4rM2DAz0=)

spent years challenging the hollow narratives pushed by the media and political insiders.
[Now, I'm bringing that fight home to Ohio.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/tsbkC_KfRAVsAPW9BWGuM_nm3vASnFmfsoP-Mvoz9k08joNmF_a96iyl-2Hk3W6WD2bBvEgi5rCGA91pymnZIdrTTlbxHd1HJn94OE84aw7RVjMPamuY9jpd8sgmlNP-cF6XTaSb5vgrTnHt7vUU59l0r3cPYt36O3oxdmSlFNPAbu6SiW56bhWohRQsKjxg_u2ztrqZSCPKGyDjlc9q2ClrbCc24DQoBVnyXSC1NR75DSvKS2GphJSIN4qH2NwgIYKAId6CARwfQI4w4s3HMn4LZmXr7lzP5MfyPQ5U3rj2g4HmsC7ipPtFQjfFdaNcDxN-eOMadIEaQDBCt16kHk7qlGLFw2X8YYTC_oyd-J2v1D4C6CL7UUV6jiXZYyoYPaJkzV_whjKX72zFboe6qANPzAnCMt1QsKcFnkb8hHBIIJtkxXQwUJxj2Ee8KtPxNxCkpNDU9WA5-ALFUzCWq_vqEuDS16pIlRFCEFQQUmKp9QHmdYzVJ9FU5cQS01pzDQAN9qs/AKuTVAd9vG50AiLtiNhtU0CDF5qRnsrZ/9)_Take a peek at my plan: _
* Eliminate the state income tax
* Secure our elections
* Cut wasteful spending
* Fix our education system
* And support President Trump in making America GREAT again

Like President Trump, I won't waste a second.
We'll move swiftly to dismantle the bureaucracy and deliver real results.

name: Mark Warner
subject: Chaos ensues.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,
I don’t know about you, but I’m sick and tired of another day of chaos in a Trump administration that’s jerking around lives and livelihoods with absolutely no plan to deliver for the Americans who voted for them.
Americans elected Trump because he said he would bring down costs. It’s as simple as that. Instead, he’s taken corruption to a whole new level.
If that’s all you need to hear and you want to join our fight to hold this reckless administration accountable, split a contribution between Tim Kaine and my reelection campaign now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
Trump caused prices to skyrocket with his reckless tariffs and left working families to foot the bill. He’s paraded around the Middle East and made shady deals, accepting gifts from foreign governments. He accepted a $400 million private jet from Qatar while his latest big bill in Congress proposes kicking millions of folks off of their health care to keep funding big tax giveaways for billionaires like Elon Musk.
Don’t even get me started on the fact that he still refuses to hold Pete Hegseth accountable for his sloppy handling of classified information that put the lives of our service members at risk and has made our country less safe. Or that Elon is using his access to the White House to cut big deals for his companies.
My point is, next year’s election will have consequences, to say the least. We need to protect my seat and take back the Senate for Democrats so we can keep up the fight to hold the Trump administration accountable.
But we can’t win this fight alone, especially considering Elon Musk spent $288 MILLION to help his allies in the last election, and he’s already dropping the big bucks again.
If you’re able, I hope you’ll consider splitting a donation to support my reelection campaign and Tim Kaine. You can donate here at this secure link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
The fight continues,
Mark Warner
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

Peter,
Donald Trump and his MAGA allies like to pretend they’re standing with working class and middle class Americans, but the truth is they’re selling us out.

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=edf781a29cd7475facbd0716a3bfaf3f&_e=A45Ev0xEkSzJXo0QXtRn2J4MRemvQqOLGwqXmvDhh9qzZv3kGauwUJr6ZYg3Rm5-b0D0N3uB2IHIcY_54jZElHlCWrh_Xc11ks9RM_cXgOX1OegN6QKoQez-f_I5v_W7kA8pW5ESPjU9PsbTYuUKDUUHE_BeSyU4XEY5f9fx3tnWnAW_HQOBV4GIsvpEmjZoi74vDuxqeSyrX9Cvk-AIWu1QU_5dCyNHfywdWo4AS428AWvzmeaMUDLz6hS8aXmxv4Jb5ePfbTpIhfuB_h4TOtAqxi6EkE4Y0DupzZt-oIJEZHkqQjBCbPbMhU1d1EM_GcU_MifcWRXtmBp3CsUyRD_Wkye05sF0DqiABQxonjCpeimH79xHf5vUrurierPzKwNa_2yA3X3i5nYOEqpbByMyRvonYLWvS73tVGoWrXe_9FdHeKj4V7F6nrulnb0F)

**I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing** , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways:
* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=edf781a29cd7475facbd0716a3bfaf3f&_e=A45Ev0xEkSzJXo0QXtRn2J4MRemvQqOLGwqXmvDhh9qzZv3kGauwUJr6ZYg3Rm5-b0D0N3uB2IHIcY_54jZElHlCWrh_Xc11ks9RM_cXgOX1OegN6QKoQez-f_I5v_W7kA8pW5ESPjU9PsbTYuUKDUUHE_BeSyU4XEY5f9fx3tnWnAW_HQOBV4GIsvpEmjZoi74vDuxqeSyrX9Cvk-AIWu1QU_5dCyNHfywdWo4AS428AWvzmeaMUDLz6hS8aXmxv4Jb5ePfbTpIhfuB_h4TOsX91bVw20Rtdabg5q_hxhbOawbG8dbFlpsQWm4g3lJYwxofcXkWKw6zxxF5rCGvNqMi5M-z62aPaZPSYQlIjw6BwH-_zYQBeAa6RWbkqkYwPvXfQA7-vZ-3rVcCVeRZmr5wBuq1-Ik5gjkDWHgW3Ku2_IXb7GPrDeo2kZP3VILf)**.
* 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=edf781a29cd7475facbd0716a3bfaf3f&_e=A45Ev0xEkSzJXo0QXtRn2J4MRemvQqOLGwqXmvDhh9qzZv3kGauwUJr6ZYg3Rm5-b0D0N3uB2IHIcY_54jZElHlCWrh_Xc11ks9RM_cXgOX1OegN6QKoQez-f_I5v_W7kA8pW5ESPjU9PsbTYuUKDUUHE_BeSyU4XEY5f9fx3tnWnAW_HQOBV4GIsvpEmjZoi74vDuxqeSyrX9Cvk-AIWu1QU_5dCyNHfywdWo4AS428AWvzmeaMUDLz6hS8aXmxv4Jb5ePfbTpIhfuB_h4TOmcclw7wiTZjFz7fU9EKB--NUnosB402EhBOFOXYchg8PH__xC_oFl63KKcr-CZ7bDJzbqX10QgLn3vhsFoROt5QRlLgXU_4X_EUeOceerqz7aUa6yop2-7Gqc-ZAhWoNjeDJG_8DIr7ImvffC5BZ6IcLwo6pCeruqkH_ep3ytlX)
**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=edf781a29cd7475facbd0716a3bfaf3f&_e=A45Ev0xEkSzJXo0QXtRn2J4MRemvQqOLGwqXmvDhh9qzZv3kGauwUJr6ZYg3Rm5-b0D0N3uB2IHIcY_54jZElHlCWrh_Xc11ks9RM_cXgOX1OegN6QKoQez-f_I5v_W7kA8pW5ESPjU9PsbTYuUKDUUHE_BeSyU4XEY5f9fx3tnWnAW_HQOBV4GIsvpEmjZoi74vDuxqeSyrX9Cvk-AIWu1QU_5dCyNHfywdWo4AS428AWvzmeaMUDLz6hS8aXmxv4Jb5ePfbTpIhfuB_h4TOsphMy_YLyN1l31YQZDNC5To9H_C4IemSDMEka7aH2dYbqnVZZMOeF7QFqyfc9lzkpXUq97nVSUyuE7vhWxbeoJg90bMmgNVxLgWYU2ydq_hBg5FcEqJaGp0RIx-zXfWxf39gtNtY_3ZMTJDaOYGLaN-aYy26UEE-5Y9hWB82GQd)
