**If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity.**

_**That’s not who my opponent is. **_

We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But **as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington.**

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=edf781a29cd7475facbd0716a3bfaf3f&_e=A45Ev0xEkSzJXo0QXtRn2J4MRemvQqOLGwqXmvDhh9qzZv3kGauwUJr6ZYg3Rm5-b0D0N3uB2IHIcY_54jZElHlCWrh_Xc11ks9RM_cXgOX1OegN6QKoQez-f_I5v_W7kA8pW5ESPjU9PsbTYuUKDUUHE_BeSyU4XEY5f9fx3tnWnAW_HQOBV4GIsvpEmjZoi74vDuxqeSyrX9Cvk-AIWu1QU_5dCyNHfywdWo4AS428AWvzmeaMUDLz6hS8aXmxv4Jb5ePfbTpIhfuB_h4TOmr6nX5bM39cvUKc58qrnL1h5W65DKfzofwecCyMeOgMQt9uX3YR5K66uzvtgOml58hNewsdDzJlubl2tdER5WLU8-nG5R5bfk5v_JWkEhqrLHOJlmPSOSZ5ewyRHlbMi36F5xSBO56g5JWgPbLxFdqg6RVVIoThiIpzkFYaOOFP)

Here’s what I stand for:
* Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime.
* Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses.
* Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty.
* Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values.
* Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love.

You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, **[I’m asking you to take a chance on me and support my campaign today, in its infancy, to help me get it off the ground and give us a shot at reclaiming a Senate seat we haven’t held in a generation](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=edf781a29cd7475facbd0716a3bfaf3f&_e=A45Ev0xEkSzJXo0QXtRn2J4MRemvQqOLGwqXmvDhh9qzZv3kGauwUJr6ZYg3Rm5-b0D0N3uB2IHIcY_54jZElHlCWrh_Xc11ks9RM_cXgOX1OegN6QKoQez-f_I5v_W7kA8pW5ESPjU9PsbTYuUKDUUHE_BeSyU4XEY5f9fx3tnWnAW_HQOBV4GIsvpEmjZoi74vDuxqeSyrX9Cvk-AIWu1QU_5dCyNHfywdWo4AS428AWvzmeaMUDLz6hS8aXmxv4Jb5ePfbTpIhfuB_h4TOlcIKqZaYl_HRWLGzMD4b4WLwE5xgGv5lISWVt17rD7fl5jqJvhCSoKArQM9kwt2c4J_q6JWyAVfr4mfd2Lzx6_j58q8ueP60kaivr6jUSGwv5mGT0iYdNTsXVT2dxkCT_C2rA5ay8_aNl_YSYPvyt4OBAGn4unoWkqvYeOZ1tQb)**.

This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. **I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive.**

**[Your gift today will give our nascent campaign a fighting shot.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=edf781a29cd7475facbd0716a3bfaf3f&_e=A45Ev0xEkSzJXo0QXtRn2J4MRemvQqOLGwqXmvDhh9qzZv3kGauwUJr6ZYg3Rm5-b0D0N3uB2IHIcY_54jZElHlCWrh_Xc11ks9RM_cXgOX1OegN6QKoQez-f_I5v_W7kA8pW5ESPjU9PsbTYuUKDUUHE_BeSyU4XEY5f9fx3tnWnAW_HQOBV4GIsvpEmjZoi74vDuxqeSyrX9Cvk-AIWu1QU_5dCyNHfywdWo4AS428AWvzmeaMUDLz6hS8aXmxv4Jb5ePfbTpIhfuB_h4TOnxwD2dHE5JI6uSF6UTbmRDoARdIPkxJVF7JmZnhGhUJbaylA_1z_g8aTwqYNGqiKgRKKXTDPRhil9PAfvgrKhxhVR1jnMkjMciKQq3sCfp4mPwpJhPGJhLFNed4I2bXxmGiartWRbfdHEEdJTYgZIinSfrstiw6HsxmET-_3TbJ)**

I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help.

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, defunded our police , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe. This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves. If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity. That’s not who my opponent is. We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington. Here’s what I stand for: Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime. Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

name: James O'Keefe
subject: See the Truth for Yourself: New Video Reveals All
body:
I want you to see for yourself what happened inside Project Veritas—the struggles over greed, power, and envy that took over.

| [****](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3vnh9m1iqo2ccp20u660ssl8h67vkm9v6rsvvi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs)
Dear Patriot,

**I want you to see for yourself what happened inside Project Veritas --the struggles over greed, power, and envy that took over.**

[**I 'm sharing a brand new video**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm621halj39d7na91jsf68sm6un71d37pqali4k8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs), part of my docuseries _The Truth Behind Veritas_ , that tells more than ever before.

[****](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhlk97edrebmriq516c3l6s99acob65jcef4cvsg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs)
It includes scenes from depositions, hidden camera footage, and all the evidence you need to understand this fight. **[**Watch it now**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgf21n4puvt42tdundr81616leo06f6j58jru1d8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs)**[**, and then join me in defeating this lawsuit designed to silence me.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0ve2qgq7fn2js4781kkse1orvcddp4okq37q548_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs)

****Project Veritas, the organization I founded, has turned against me, filing a lawsuit to stop me from doing my job as a journalist and starting O 'Keefe Media Group (OMG). But I'm not backing down, and [**I need your help**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7ddppevb95l6qc8rdisj0ic5h5vnfiiaedhpqoo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs).

**Recently, we made a huge breakthrough:** a judge allowed us to serve Matt Tyrmand, over X. Tyrmand is a key player in the coup against me, and we've been unable to serve him months. He'll have to sit in a deposition with my attorneys to answer, explain, and defend his actions and words that continue to this day.

**That 's right, we're dragging them into the light, one deposition at a time.
**
Before you go any further, **[**watch the video**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbv71q9qvvk1lfl7nrcae0at1nlgouhq81s1d2k0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs)**[**I 've posted**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6ok8qlhbg7pasrr6lh660e2i38fmggvvt61f728_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs). It's part of my docuseries, _The Truth Behind Veritas_ , and it lays out exactly what's happening. You'll see the deposition footage, the interviews, and the documents that prove this isn't just about me--**it 's about protecting journalism**. **[**Click here to watch the video and donate to my defense fund.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2t0otuveo6a8itdeq04nqbe579uar29hcqnu7ag_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs)**

This fight isn't cheap. We need to depose Tyrmand and other board members to keep unraveling the truth. Each deposition costs **$12,000** , and we're looking at needing **$68,000** to cover all the legal fees. [**Time is running out, and the bills are piling up. But every dollar you donate goes directly to Liberty Guard 's legal defense fund, fighting for my right to speak out.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuualj6svp5d0c8ahu4d89aac2q405b7f100fb9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs)

This isn't just my fight--it's yours too. **If they can silence me, they can silence anyone who dares to question the powerful**. I've spent years exposing corruption, and **now they 're trying to use the courts to stop me**. [**But with your support, we can defeat this lawsuit and keep the truth alive.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zee0vhp102h8h4et07ccvbt4mp4j5pqohao5s41g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs)

[**Please,**watch the video** , see the evidence, and then **donate** to my defense fund.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztph13bprheu91rp8cphhsllfqng3sjcnsb2e868_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs) Every contribution, no matter how small, helps us fight back against those who want to silence us. We're close to our goal, [**but we need you now more than ever**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt04da2lg7h9bpam88qm9o8a090k5p71t0qlit8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs).

**[**Click here to watch the video and donate to my defense fund.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhgh9muebkfcq8m5vu1vd6dk779pjvmotrghn7fo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs)**

Thank you for standing with me. **Together, we can win this.**

In Truth,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

**P.S.** Don't miss this--**[**watch the video**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z64kbvogjunrdci20hqcr84sn07gi8rikgbgh11o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs)**[**now and**donate** to my defense fund.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6iib5qt19n3su2lrah00mp8vb3vc8j6g0lg974g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs) We need **$68,000** to keep fighting, and time is running out. **[**Click here to watch the video and donate to my defense fund.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zss2ker99grj4d7gkm1s4pjg8b45th9kd20v603g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5imeo32cdh2bs)**

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Shocker…NJ State Health premiums spike
body:
Peter, First, this is your weekly reminder. 14 days until the New Jersey Primary. (Take the PLEDGE to vote here). But are you ready for the latest example of the grotesquely failing Murphy Administration? These
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, First, this is your weekly reminder. **14 days until the New Jersey Primary.** (Take the PLEDGE to vote [here](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/96fd6fa2529eecd7c8b4f582f0b34e18/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnMXPMvIWIiKah6hziA60pLvLOmYm_vfWCk8FXWee9xneGYGQF5ySCgK408N1PTBAYckkQ06h4FSUr627XjmeY0DN-DVWopMQjF_DCzCP_a1tG0CDRI0cD7swTfL4nCV5qklZKH3jP4-z8RdPtN8lGUzTTzE2jKKbdrcQkOpwblQx3YpOqtb8hUi2gWX1fW8KjjW2bY2N4GYpGkv3tbSjkBJ59XlAisPbND0BQtNjxg==)). But are you ready for the _latest_ example of the grotesquely failing Murphy Administration? These lunatics can literally not manage a single thing without it falling apart, breaking, skyrocketing in cost, bankrupting taxpayers...and the list goes on. Makes sense why so few of them have experience running businesses. Much easier to run the blank check that has become the New Jersey state government. Little accountability. Reporting by [Politico](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/08162f411d1f68a77440cb73845ffba1/eJyNkEFPwzAMhf-Lz82SpuuA3qZpmqqOHRCcUdZakC1LosSjlKn_nRTQTiBxs-zPz-_5AoRWWao7qOCdPqQsIIOArfYaLa2cJdV-TWU5z4s8A6PtcRPc2UN1-XX5CkztxZ2QGdDgMSGPD8tVU-82z9t61yTSq5Bu_E8nv1lcddb3y3oL4_inMJ40rd-SdoSKwhmnRJ1OqegpmMS_EvlYcd73_cw7o0m3bta6E7fYR4NEGOJUs0MqcGDeqGHv3JFLIUsuSi5zvkdrNUambMcCvgSkyIQoktHyNllQ3qPtfv7X4PBtZPwEcG54uw==) (which is so biased that you _know_ it’s bad when you get coverage like this from them) has highlighted [a report](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/6de1b6fe612e96f26e97ce86c7b035f4/eJyNkMFOwzAMht8l57ah3Riit1GNUrVMiLEzilKzBbIkStyVMvXdcQHtBBK3yP78-XdODMEIg1XLcvaOH1k2YxHzIJVTYLCwBoX86maX83SWRkwr81Z62zmWn34dPgNTeXF9MY8YDg4IeXpcFnW1Lp-bal0T6YSnHf_zpFeLs2d1v6waNo5_iuGgcHUkd2A5-g6mi1pFV-HWa-L3iC7knPd9n5jXZGePHD2I0PmBOzBBWRN4a2V3mBzctS98Qx6JnRc6vlUUVip6FXuhNZgdhHhzd_MQN2VCLAUQjjTtz-_VMHzHGD8B-O96eg==) from the NJ Treasury Department on the “structural and Financial Challenges” at the New Jersey State Health Benefits Program. Translation? Premiums are skyrocketing so high that many local governments are opting for private plans (shocker), leaving the least healthy and most expensive to insure on the state plan, further driving up premiums. Smart business, Murphy. And these are the same folks that want to run _all_ our insurance through universal socialist health care, a’la Canada. Just ask those folks how its going. Truly, the incompetence in Trenton never fails to shock, even though at this point we should be yawning. It’s just another day. We have the opportunity to kick these lemons out of office starting in the June primary, and finishing off any that remain in November. But the Common Sense Club is more critical than ever as a voice for the burgeoning Common Sense Majority. We’re building a platform where we can collectively hold their feet to the fire and call out the BS. Every single day, if needed. So we’re asking you to fund our critical work in one of two ways:
1. Fund Common Sense Club directly so we can grow the Common Sense Majority.
2. Fund the One Less Lemon project to activate voters immediately for June and November.

---
[ **I want to fund the Common Sense Majority** ](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/c2c93ed64ba0e05577dbd361234a208b/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l62If1ld3IiKl2oUPUDcyTKMOrdNhmopa-u9OVXSj4DY594SbCgglkxQmEMCFbp7XBgs0cqEEShrlkhh_bL2O77ZdCzIh04nOSwVB9TX8Bppxd-B0LaCrQoMs58NRFMaT3TSMI0Mqps2N_zxu7-MZz4bhFOr6pxhPgsZn4y4gIF1i0ygRphWtdGb4I5EqAttOcskIWwVpobDF85O93yKu-3yx4X7PP8wcJzU6phTK5PWLCK9PaX0HfrtmqA==)
---
[ **I’ll donate to One Less Lemon** ](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/1a876c479b7b777550dca5a4ea829930/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnCU_KitvIiVieZCCbrG4Qy3quqxjVOJ_b_ugU0HXmed9hnd6IJRMUsIhgAvdPG8MFmgshBIoKWokseK59aYTd-xaUAlZxrrpFAT91_AHeIz9hTO3gK4KDbLNwyhNsviwTrLUkIppc-M_jzvzP57lJkzWMAw_xVgLWp6Nu4WAdIePRlyYVrTTleFPRKoNbJs3khGOWtJC4ahoapvnPu7nfO8dS1lkgq0co2NKoeTvX6R4fUmHO4k4ZwA=)
---
THANK YOU in advance. Let’s go! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
| [ ]()
---
President
Common Sense Club
---
|

Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.
---
[Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/27755964/1fee18c7e45ca461) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

That's why we're asking you personally: Will you please become a part of this history-making grassroots team by ACTIVATING your DSCC membership before the end-of-month deadline?

name: Caught in the act
subject: GOP snuck in this devastating provision in their budget bill
body:
Hidden in the thousand page bill is a single sentence that would destroy our judicial system in America. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-6-EnOjFVnhr9eWFgDOmM6XX3bAMyYvGpeX8MU4GqZLmEq0sI8HEIupA7GKGvkhzy4LQg0Em2SicxGSS8g8oV_nzvg5b9EZ-9QKmGbiSbO13XilCkposBmPQb2fHBVSA2vwN76MG16hJVUtmkhtdVMiNoL-DQpRaD6pHAWrcp2KxV52y6F296stMG8OQRX_EaWoSgm2L2Si0L_nXeYftH2Tg1EtsfaAtaQ9SP1f67jqeTR2GHHwjOV35ttOvrl77l_jHzpOleixcJTF3ybbSiBxlL419edhPzRm3NA9G9B9ZAg5vy5HDoUaGMCKiCpcAW1qVwC-sGeZQHHe3r229v2ogwZ79MOlvHCuxriupnjg5/4gv/P22X6pS8Qu6TIvQCuEAS8g/h0/h001.E1_5O8TEebLF7w8N0b6gUdOsobX0ODrxeT1jmDao5oU)
---
Peter, Last week, House Republicans passed what they are calling the "One Big Beautiful Bill" \- a sweeping budget proposal that includes massive cuts to Medicare & Medicaid while giving trillions in tax breaks to billionaires.
**But hidden in the thousand page bill is a**** _single sentence_**** __****that would destroy our judicial system in America:**
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-6-EnOjFVnhr9eWFgDOmM6WHvEd4wacEy1nWVSOCa3PqaGE-k540KFqlM-OCuy0PTTbTRO0s0PWxZ_U2SU37Dg6kHWLtYu0d4Sitw8P2GqA0_Xd5qRHINgKKmfOu5HYGoSWijoDOe8ZU87R6Efvk_263mQcgkdzg4lyIYGtOZIYrOInmo8FUgzyEZ-AxCKX9nPC3SgcOEm6dRte7Jd_WgvSZUWKgVnzmct-nXxs1b2RGf6vG7e4b-cven8ebRPTo7yNsLuMKZEv24_qtjQk4uwIbiNUZlImVZb_3J5c2uLSANKATaaRM8GdC7qDB4XxjUKCR5bzAvnbsRj8RwpOl10RaeYycrG-sQupARp2tIPq0/4gv/P22X6pS8Qu6TIvQCuEAS8g/h1/h001.wYfPk6s2zoGfF75ysruZeVlsFUuFSBw59uIN7XI-uCc)
---
If the provision would become law, it would restrict how federal judges can hold government officials or other litigants in contempt if they defy court-issued injunctions and restraining orders. Contempt is a critical mechanism that courts use to enforce their rulings.**_If our courts can 't enforce their rulings, Trump can then do whatever he wants without consequence._** The Trump administration is currently facing the threat of being held in contempt for defying court orders in several cases - the illegal deportation of migrants without due process to Venezuela & South Sudan & the administration's refusal to bring home wrongfully deported and imprisoned Maryland father, Kilmar Abrego Garcia, from an El Salvador torture prison. _Trump has contempt for our constitution._ He views separation of powers and check & balances as obstacles to his fascist ambitions - not as essential principles that hold our Democracy together. **If unopposed, Trump will destroy our Democracy.** _That 's why we are fighting back_, starting in Pennsylvania where Trump and his MAGA allies aim to take down three democratic state Supreme Court judges in their 2025 retention election. The outcome of this battle determines whether or not swing state PA will ever have fair elections again. [**PA law limits the ability of the democratic state Supreme Court justices to campaign - so we are stepping up in their stead. Can you chip in whatever you can spare to help Defend Our Courts & protect Pennsylvania's Supreme Court majority?**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-6-EnOjFVnhr9eWFgDOmM6V42OUqgfy6oiYWfacJZpHGsgcshy-UvFPDgG3Q7HR8Soljz29UVHaIDjn5-Ul5EwlDpFJuUYSgwRR299kxHXw9Idu0kAlXMWcunQkxIJOtq8SdLyjITkGG2KLYrkWg5jgcv9bpSacdJiBarW5SLT4x8RusxWSIdHjM4K9pqUj8XIsNtlv1PS1b0nhBrDB9kht0tNzKBpbE6iD0zaTAGpsI_yNmCEHB9PPfXMPNUSA2h6xgLoSe4jRhnz3S_ybLdvWH5_PtW4aD8vAJ-Y0OarXLoyoFcdqYxpEdrhK1Mwxvtcp3-x27fjF7Nmq7T-QvHlotT182ZE4cxsDhC0ZbjAkg/4gv/P22X6pS8Qu6TIvQCuEAS8g/h2/h001.arUyIN02l-ous_Cobp0cFubM-pcufXrjpQPHgdPcTSE)

clean_body: Hidden in the thousand page bill is a single sentence that would destroy our judicial system in America. | | Peter, Last week, House Republicans passed what they are calling the "One Big Beautiful Bill" \- a sweeping budget proposal that includes massive cuts to Medicare & Medicaid while giving trillions in tax breaks to billionaires. But hidden in the thousand page bill is a single sentence that would destroy our judicial system in America: | If the provision would become law, it would restrict how federal judges can hold government officials or other litigants in contempt if they defy court-issued injunctions and restraining orders. Contempt is a critical mechanism that courts use to enforce their rulings.If our courts can 't enforce their rulings, Trump can then do whatever he wants without consequence. The Trump administration is currently facing the threat of being held in contempt for defying court orders in several cases - the illegal deportation of migrants without due process to Venezuela & South Sudan & the administration's refusal to bring home wrongfully deported and imprisoned Maryland father, Kilmar Abrego Garcia, from an El Salvador torture prison. Trump has contempt for our constitution. He views separation of powers and check & balances as obstacles to his fascist ambitions - not as essential principles that hold our Democracy together. If unopposed, Trump will destroy our Democracy. That 's why we are fighting back, starting in Pennsylvania where Trump and his MAGA allies aim to take down three democratic state Supreme Court judges in their 2025 retention election. The outcome of this battle determines whether or not swing state PA will ever have fair elections again. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We must hold Trump in contempt for his blatant attempts to dismantle our democracy. Team Defend our Courts | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | | Sent via . name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I’m respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
Hi there, it’s Jon Ossoff. I’m writing to ask, directly, if you’ll make a $10 donation to my re-election campaign before our May fundraising deadline.

I’m the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Donald Trump won in 2024. That makes me the GOP’s top target.

To win, and win big, we’re building the most ambitious statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen. That means more organizers, more rallies, and more direct outreach to voters in every corner of the state.

If everyone reading this chipped in just $10, we’d hit our goal tonight. But the reality is: not everyone gives. That’s why your early support matters so much.

[****So I’m asking: Will you make a contribution before our May fundraising drive ends?****](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may25.ZUBy2n&refcode=em250528&t=1&akid=385%2E5691347%2E-ck5CS)

Thank you for everything. Jon Ossoff |
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may25.ZUBy2n&refcode=em250528&t=2&akid=385%2E5691347%2E-ck5CS)**

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=385%2E5691347%2E-ck5CS) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108503106/548143008/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWMzNTFkYy1kNDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwI-MeKIKzSgAuBBHixb1JIIb7ctJeJY6dWFFFS9rik=&emci=adc351dc-d43b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b9c351dc-d43b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15759664)

Hey Derek, Right now, Virginia is the only Southern state that does not have an abortion ban or extreme restrictions. We didn’t just get lucky – _it happened because Democrats showed up, organized, and won._ **But here’s the truth: people from across the South are depending on us. When abortion is banned at home, Southerners are coming to Virginia for reproductive healthcare. If we lose that access here? Our neighbors won’t have _anywhere else_ to go.** [_**With our primary election around the corner on June 17, we have to prove that grassroots Democratic momentum isn’t dead in 2025. That’s why I’m asking you, Derek: will you rush a donation before our end-of-month deadline to help us protect abortion access?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108503107/548143009/1864879255?&refcode=E13449-20250528-Natl-EOM1-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWMzNTFkYy1kNDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwI-MeKIKzSgAuBBHixb1JIIb7ctJeJY6dWFFFS9rik=) | **************[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108503108/548143010/1864879255?&refcode=E13449-20250528-Natl-EOM1-SB-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWMzNTFkYy1kNDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwI-MeKIKzSgAuBBHixb1JIIb7ctJeJY6dWFFFS9rik=)**************

Republican gubernatorial candidate, **Winsome Earle-Sears,** knows that we’re the last line of defense for the South. As Lieutenant Governor, she has been _proudly anti-choice_. If she wins the Governor’s Mansion in November, she fully intends to restrict our rights and finish the job her predecessor started.
**We have the chance to stop her,_but only if we act now._**
[_**_This fight is bigger than one state, Derek._ It’s about building a Democratic firewall – and starting a new blue wave – that will run through 2025 and beyond. Will you chip in to help protect abortion access, not just in Virginia, but across the South?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108503109/548143011/1864879255?&refcode=E13449-20250528-Natl-EOM1-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWMzNTFkYy1kNDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwI-MeKIKzSgAuBBHixb1JIIb7ctJeJY6dWFFFS9rik=)

clean_body: Reproductive freedom doesn’t stop at state lines | Hey Derek, Right now, Virginia is the only Southern state that does not have an abortion ban or extreme restrictions. We didn’t just get lucky – it happened because Democrats showed up, organized, and won. But here’s the truth: people from across the South are depending on us. When abortion is banned at home, Southerners are coming to Virginia for reproductive healthcare. If we lose that access here? Our neighbors won’t have anywhere else to go. = | ************=********** Republican gubernatorial candidate, Winsome Earle-Sears, knows that we’re the last line of defense for the South. As Lieutenant Governor, she has been proudly anti-choice. If she wins the Governor’s Mansion in November, she fully intends to restrict our rights and finish the job her predecessor started. We have the chance to stop her,but only if we act now. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = We can’t let Virginia fall. Too many people are counting on us. Thank you, Kelsey Carolan** Communications Director Democratic Party of Virginia [content goes here] Forwarded this email? name: Team Keith
subject: Going toe-to-toe with Trump
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

Keith has never backed down from a fight—especially when our rights, our health, and our pocketbooks are on the line.

Over the past three months, Keith has taken on the Trump administration head-on—and won major victories for Minnesotans. In May alone, he used the full power of the Attorney General’s office to:

- Stop Robert F. Kennedy Jr. from making $11 billion of devastating public health cuts

- Restore more than $1 billion in education funding

- Prevent the dismantling of four federal agencies

And that’s just the start.

Whether it’s fighting to protect students, defending clean energy, or resisting Trump’s efforts to turn local law enforcement into immigration agents, Keith is stepping up—and delivering.

Now, we need to step up for him. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is days away, and we still need to raise $18,000 to stay on track.

Our records show that you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can donate up to $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and get a full refund from the state.

Will you make your refundable $75 donation right now to help Keith keep Trump and his MAGA allies in check?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250528ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]

Thank you,

Team Keith

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Together
body:
---
| [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-kh?amount=3&refcode=em_20250528_3575_fr&refcode2=3575_22930333_ETmPTb&akid=3575%2E22930333%2EETmPTb)
---
Good morning, Derek.
While I've tried not to personally send a ton of fundraising emails since the last election, I want to take a few minutes to tell you about how I've decided to approach this moment in time and why your support is so important in this struggle.
Here is the truth:
Some people are describing what’s been happening in recent months as absolute chaos. And of course, I understand why.
It’s certainly true with those tariffs. Tariffs that — as I predicted — are clearly inviting a recession. But please, let us not be duped into thinking everything is chaos.
What we are witnessing is a swift implementation of an agenda that has been decades in the making.
An agenda to slash public education, to privatize government services, all while giving tax breaks to the wealthiest among us.
It’s an agenda... a narrow, self-serving vision of America... where they punish truth tellers, favor loyalists, profit from their power, and leave everyone else to fend for themselves.
I know a lot of folks are wondering what’s going to guide us through this moment. How are we all going to chart the course?
There is only one answer — and that is together. Everyone doing whatever it is they can: volunteering, organizing in your community, running for office, and more...
But donations are critical too. Especially to the Democratic National Committee. They are leading so much of the good work being done to fight back against this administration's agenda and to elect a Democratic House and Senate. So please:
**[Make a contribution to the Democratic Party today, ahead of their end-of-month fundraising deadline. Lots of donations will add up fast when we're in this together.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-kh?refcode=em_20250528_3575_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3575_22930333_ETmPTb&akid=3575%2E22930333%2EETmPTb)**

_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

body:
Hi Friend, Since Republicans took total control of Washington and embarked on their hyper-partisan budget plans, I’ve said this next phase of our work will be about values. In the dead of night last week, Republicans made their core values crystal clear.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108506134/548152627/-1283252511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQzYzcxOGMtZGEzYi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dhubBGTBffyp077R21pcXmVonuTS5SmIiE9gUiVcInw=&emci=043729a0-d23b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4d3c718c-da3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=12466492)
---
| | Hi Friend,
---
Since Republicans took total control of Washington and embarked on their hyper-partisan budget plans, I’ve said this next phase of our work will be about values. In the dead of night last week, Republicans made their core values crystal clear.
---
From overnight committee meetings to forcing votes in the middle of the night coupled with backroom dealing and being summoned and scolded at the Trump White House, House Republicans did everything possible to ram through a big, bad bill for billionaires at the expense of everyone else. And at every turn, I worked to communicate our values of fairness and opportunity.
---
I was on the front lines of an over 12-hour committee hearing fighting against this callous bill at the beginning of this process in February. I offered amendments and motions to stop the Republicans' cruel plan and offer a defense for core programs like Medicare, Medicaid, SNAP. And last week, whether at a hastily assembled 10:00 pm committee vote on a Sunday night or on the House floor at 3:00 am, I shared our values that we cannot concentrate economic prosperity to the very top.
---
Because of House action from the Republicans, ending health care coverage for nearly 14 million people, eliminating school meals for 18 million children, cutting mental health services, crippling nursing home care, and robbing the chance at higher education for millions of Americans is now on the doorstep of the American people. And this is happening while giving substantial tax giveaways to millionaires and billionaires and adding trillions to the deficit. This is not an exaggeration — it’s real life.
---
No matter what, I will continue to stand up and speak out for Rhode Island values.
---
**[**I need your help as we go into the next phase of this fight. Will you consider chipping in today so I can ensure our values are heard loud and clear?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108506135/548152628/-1968233973?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQzYzcxOGMtZGEzYi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dhubBGTBffyp077R21pcXmVonuTS5SmIiE9gUiVcInw=)**
---
**It’s essential that we keep pushing and your contributions help me continue to focus on this most essential work.**
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108506136/548152629/-1968233973?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQzYzcxOGMtZGEzYi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dhubBGTBffyp077R21pcXmVonuTS5SmIiE9gUiVcInw=)
---
I remain grateful for the opportunity to work for you and this country that will always be worth fighting for — your support makes all the difference.
---
Thank you,Gabe
---

name: Andy Kim
subject: Trump is betraying our veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Under Trump’s plan, the VA is set to lose 83,000 employees.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108506299/548153233/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTVlYjRiOS1kYTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s0Rhzpi2ohW8nQ71frhP6Rgc6VXvWrDoqzz5FCF1Qtg=&emci=13052be9-d73b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=de5eb4b9-da3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Donald Trump is pushing devastating cuts to the Department of Veterans Affairs, and it's a betrayal of our veterans. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108506300/548153234/-1197072038?refcode=2025-05-28-va&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=de5eb4b9-da3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTVlYjRiOS1kYTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s0Rhzpi2ohW8nQ71frhP6Rgc6VXvWrDoqzz5FCF1Qtg=) Under Trump's plan, the VA is set to lose 83,000 employees. **That's not just a number – that's fewer doctors, nurses, caseworkers, and mental health professionals for over 9 million veterans who rely on the VA for care.** These sweeping cuts to the VA are dangerous and wrong. Over 9 million veterans rely on the VA for health care and other services, including mental health and suicide prevention, housing, and LGBTQ+ programs. It's shameful that this is how the Trump administration is treating those who bravely served our country. Trump talks a big game about "supporting the troops," but these cuts are a slap in the face to every veteran and military family in America. This isn't about cutting red tape – it's about cutting care for those who need it most. **We owe our veterans more than words. We owe them action.** In Congress, I've brought a new veterans clinic to New Jersey and worked across the aisle to expand veterans' access to mental health support, protect housing assistance, and improve care for underserved communities. Now, I'll keep fighting to protect the VA from these reckless attacks and ensure every veteran gets the respect and support they've earned. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

In Congress, I've brought a new veterans clinic to New Jersey and worked across the aisle to expand veterans' access to mental health support, protect housing assistance, and improve care for underserved communities. Now, I'll keep fighting to protect the VA from these reckless attacks and ensure every veteran gets the respect and support they've earned. name: Ted Cruz for NumbersUSA
subject: Take the Birthright Citizenship Survey
body:
Turn America into a socialist “Open Society.”| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=79dace3c73574e21b8d9b2357831d788&_e=BQvDHP7fZiIWj39AAMWe8WKvROUGX_Xm77Oa2NzgtIvwlt9EN4wu_e43Wz_Rv4ukvTeo0lCP-EpSr5Ey2a3ITyOuwKyw9QBZWNArAkaucSB6z3T9o7SirIBK42yZrccM_RBGFB-oCBYBiSkWMPq8e14IvnRFUqL_rlaAyyNi8B2qyiHbiPwpD9rGJmJNfoQ6dgYD00XgjXXKm8IIRAkbWNblagHvsx1jvezR7Dxs7opjx9OotHRuaBJ0BO32xVXigqb283GGIj6YTEPy0uTXX08XQmJyodRsPnd2ic_EeVaSL8jgEMemNeMNQlARo3ufc2ZK5ATDfhljQbIBow9BbkHL4rWGkvIhE8hQB8pyfnQ%3D)
---
| | Peter,Communities across America remain overwhelmed by millions of illegal aliens President Biden waved across the border. The biased media keeps flooding our airwaves with open borders propaganda.And billionaires like George Soros are propping up Leftist NGOS, radical activists, and political puppets to advance the globalist, anti-American agenda of the oligarchs.They want to keep all of Biden’s illegal aliens in this country and turn America into a socialist “Open Society.” For the past fifty years, they’ve undermined American workers, American culture, and the American Dream...But I’m not writing today just to tell you about how open borders have hurt hard-working Americans.You already know that. I’m writing to tell you about the organization that is poised to put the screws to these open borders politicians and reshape the entire public discussion around immigration.That organization is **[**NumbersUSA.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=79dace3c73574e21b8d9b2357831d788&_e=BQvDHP7fZiIWj39AAMWe8WKvROUGX_Xm77Oa2NzgtIvwlt9EN4wu_e43Wz_Rv4ukvTeo0lCP-EpSr5Ey2a3ITyOuwKyw9QBZWNArAkaucSB6z3T9o7SirIBK42yZrccM_RBGFB-oCBYBiSkWMPq8e14IvnRFUqL_rlaAyyNi8B2qyiHbiPwpD9rGJmJNfoQ6dgYD00XgjXXKm8IIRAkbWC8-fL6jwU74H1B5_IelX4i-xilG5q3o4PTLae5QUbpJJuefENdALKsfvCTN_bx_zmepJO1XeRoevwuTFZesbsLNm6t02CabLcR1AKNftBXpG1xhnCNXLTlxJ4N45sHNOjAtiwY1ENHv39R9LE049W8%3D)** You may not have heard of them before, but since I took office in 2013, I’ve seen time after time how powerful they are in exerting public pressure on wishy-washy politicians.**NumbersUSA** harnesses the power of over 8 million grassroots members all focused on one issue: immigration.They are the voice on Capitol Hill for an America-first immigration agenda.And they grade every member of Congress to show who truly puts America first on immigration and who just talks a big game on the campaign trail. I’m honored that, after twelve years of service, **NumbersUSA** calculates I’ve earned an “A” on my career immigration report card. This sort of pressure and public accountability are vital if we want to execute President Trump’s immigration agenda. You see, many of my colleagues don’t have deeply held convictions like you, me, and President Trump.They just go whichever way the political winds blow.That’s why the Radical Left has dominated this issue from as far back as I can remember. They’ve outraised us...They’ve outspent us...And then they’ve strong-armed spineless officials into selling out the American people.Frankly, if we want to take our country back, we need **NumbersUSA** to rally American patriots from across our great land. That’s why I wanted to drop in this little note today to accompany the letter from Roy Beck, the founder of **NumbersUSA**.He’ll tell you all about the wonderful work they’re doing, and I’d ask you to consider supporting them however you see fit. We have a narrow window to make a difference, and we need your help now more than ever. God Bless you and God Bless America!
---
**Senator Ted Cruz** for **NumbersUSA**
---
P.S. **Roy’s email to you is included below.** It will help explain how we can fix our national embarrassment of an immigration system. This couldn’t be coming at a more critical moment, so please read it and [get back to him and the folks at **NumbersUSA** as soon as you can!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=79dace3c73574e21b8d9b2357831d788&_e=BQvDHP7fZiIWj39AAMWe8WKvROUGX_Xm77Oa2NzgtIvwlt9EN4wu_e43Wz_Rv4ukvTeo0lCP-EpSr5Ey2a3ITyOuwKyw9QBZWNArAkaucSB6z3T9o7SirIBK42yZrccM_RBGFB-oCBYBiSkWMPq8e14IvnRFUqL_rlaAyyNi8B2qyiHbiPwpD9rGJmJNfoQ6dgYD00XgjXXKm8IIRAkbWEkdo-Hf_WHPEC_RK65JQsMRGgxGLqh_Dlqij1NSsm5PZ9LHTmc8gjGUFLehywsLmNkxa1PyQPSTlWjqRCClU6jRVlyCSp_PKCrz-EkWzty-z2Zm4CkYSUny5x9_6TsrOlrj-7q6laTdPJvMhwY69t8%3D)
---
| | |
---
Begin Forwarded Message:**From** : Roy Beck, NumbersUSA
---
My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.** ****And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_.** **[Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=79dace3c73574e21b8d9b2357831d788&_e=BQvDHP7fZiIWj39AAMWe8WKvROUGX_Xm77Oa2NzgtIvwlt9EN4wu_e43Wz_Rv4ukvTeo0lCP-EpSr5Ey2a3ITyOuwKyw9QBZWNArAkaucSB6z3T9o7SirIBK42yZrccM_RBGFB-oCBYBiSkWMPq8e14IvnRFUqL_rlaAyyNi8B2qyiHbiPwpD9rGJmJNfoQ6dgYD00XgjXXKm8IIRAkbWJ69GW49Pgc3b3PwCWqadI4Q_DM40VmGEkoZIxrs87r5hDDPMaSxJS50SirOWqVYHo78qrK24cTc-trYuk7-YFiav5xpy26RTWGSmApzu-s2_5wqqmbxBqLqjQhypqjQXQWtSxUvmfg8FfKL8DM9nnA%3D "https://numbersusa.revv.co/rcl8f50335bb65ae?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_RCL-RCL&utm_term=SUPERLIST")** We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship......and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.As Ted Cruz says, "politicians go wherever the wind blows." **So if you want action on immigration in this session of Congress, Senator Cruz needs your help to rally the troops and put pressure on his colleagues.** **[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=79dace3c73574e21b8d9b2357831d788&_e=BQvDHP7fZiIWj39AAMWe8WKvROUGX_Xm77Oa2NzgtIvwlt9EN4wu_e43Wz_Rv4ukvTeo0lCP-EpSr5Ey2a3ITyOuwKyw9QBZWNArAkaucSB6z3T9o7SirIBK42yZrccM_RBGFB-oCBYBiSkWMPq8e14IvnRFUqL_rlaAyyNi8B2qyiHbiPwpD9rGJmJNfoQ6dgYD00XgjXXKm8IIRAkbWLVaj446Ck63s8lKLa_mhslDa8448DqsnAv9iLHwcoHyZSD6lr8bJIE40HBeOG68SqUcVrKOEwz6UIQQmsAt_Sg8N19fWy16X8lejHW4_visuOIWdFzEAG65jRktFZbFfoR0i_5ik01C1sQd8VCDjt0%3D "https://numbersusa.revv.co/rcl8f50335bb65ae?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_RCL-RCL&utm_term=SUPERLIST")** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=79dace3c73574e21b8d9b2357831d788&_e=BQvDHP7fZiIWj39AAMWe8WKvROUGX_Xm77Oa2NzgtIvwlt9EN4wu_e43Wz_Rv4ukvTeo0lCP-EpSr5Ey2a3ITyOuwKyw9QBZWNArAkaucSB6z3T9o7SirIBK42yZrccM_RBGFB-oCBYBiSkWMPq8e14IvnRFUqL_rlaAyyNi8B2qyiHbiPwpD9rGJmJNfoQ6dgYD00XgjXXKm8IIRAkbWNL79kJEfDzyEK8T7H4gady3vsoVumv3hkpbU4jtSXomWmabmfremPIHm2GeFztJZeZzBuW7SrJzDA6qhwVNE-k0k5HLI91G7qaF7yvFxbbRK1JkH1LYOXjexaAaMf3mhi8-9Q3OjKpDRfIxUop3rDE%3D)
---
**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard.The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country.To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it.We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me, or the great folks at NumbersUSA, or even Senator Ted Cruz—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND _of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage. Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=79dace3c73574e21b8d9b2357831d788&_e=BQvDHP7fZiIWj39AAMWe8WKvROUGX_Xm77Oa2NzgtIvwlt9EN4wu_e43Wz_Rv4ukvTeo0lCP-EpSr5Ey2a3ITyOuwKyw9QBZWNArAkaucSB6z3T9o7SirIBK42yZrccM_RBGFB-oCBYBiSkWMPq8e14IvnRFUqL_rlaAyyNi8B2qyiHbiPwpD9rGJmJNfoQ6dgYD00XgjXXKm8IIRAkbWBZPZR9YISg6nuh0d8UeoitbVBsK02Ii7BEjjWIvCYTYY6J4B-z_w38qywKYAg7daS1cW-PSPap2ZnDfl3LzfUyDkLvlQS-qGigqDi5K4dWnaytxBdkAN3OKxFrOpWi5_7dmK87aSMlgrJTgX5_4iKo%3D "https://numbersusa.revv.co/rcl8f50335bb65ae?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_RCL-RCL&utm_term=SUPERLIST")** **If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91.** We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=79dace3c73574e21b8d9b2357831d788&_e=BQvDHP7fZiIWj39AAMWe8WKvROUGX_Xm77Oa2NzgtIvwlt9EN4wu_e43Wz_Rv4ukvTeo0lCP-EpSr5Ey2a3ITyOuwKyw9QBZWNArAkaucSB6z3T9o7SirIBK42yZrccM_RBGFB-oCBYBiSkWMPq8e14IvnRFUqL_rlaAyyNi8B2qyiHbiPwpD9rGJmJNfoQ6dgYD00XgjXXKm8IIRAkbWB2FreN4rJ5kTNoVtAlhr9Ji2PNFdzfv7tKC8AiyvBQOH2EXCZgTyqBtUWg1Ov9S79KtSW6uifIpd2iFvWbvzQ-Z7G-u5RtYfioLIAJblI3Das2RSk9JvAtLbi57PaeeCMRNsNq8umaBvumL5OlgRjU%3D "https://numbersusa.revv.co/rcl8f50335bb65ae?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_RCL-RCL&utm_term=SUPERLIST")[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=79dace3c73574e21b8d9b2357831d788&_e=BQvDHP7fZiIWj39AAMWe8WKvROUGX_Xm77Oa2NzgtIvwlt9EN4wu_e43Wz_Rv4ukvTeo0lCP-EpSr5Ey2a3ITyOuwKyw9QBZWNArAkaucSB6z3T9o7SirIBK42yZrccM_RBGFB-oCBYBiSkWMPq8e14IvnRFUqL_rlaAyyNi8B2qyiHbiPwpD9rGJmJNfoQ6dgYD00XgjXXKm8IIRAkbWDeEZw7MfU0tZ-d0ZdRda_t3_nIHL0FpODrIgzjZdumGUQbgMPISWlbQ8w91kYEX--eWHuJQ5LhAGXLjUjz44O6VOJYHN8tvMBtWrDIj4ydLa1hh2C-iY5hWYSu3nHBwHaYzZwylvlgpvrO098nSXRc%3D)[**Your completed survey and your donation will be an indisputable sign that the time for change has come.** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=79dace3c73574e21b8d9b2357831d788&_e=BQvDHP7fZiIWj39AAMWe8WKvROUGX_Xm77Oa2NzgtIvwlt9EN4wu_e43Wz_Rv4ukvTeo0lCP-EpSr5Ey2a3ITyOuwKyw9QBZWNArAkaucSB6z3T9o7SirIBK42yZrccM_RBGFB-oCBYBiSkWMPq8e14IvnRFUqL_rlaAyyNi8B2qyiHbiPwpD9rGJmJNfoQ6dgYD00XgjXXKm8IIRAkbWG0js-73VPGXDkJXEru7HIrVdyj75JcAr_vxBcMsCZ4zrHhPCaX8Ro6clezx7lPdjUjr2orvPyoVUxMZ88ole4NhgsFhvVg1yb1BuF9ugfhDpBv_jnzEJiL8TDB89vbD6CHiHnUAPEJP45v6yhKLDNo%3D)
---
Thank you and God bless you today!
---
| | **Roy Beck**
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=79dace3c73574e21b8d9b2357831d788&_e=BQvDHP7fZiIWj39AAMWe8WKvROUGX_Xm77Oa2NzgtIvwlt9EN4wu_e43Wz_Rv4ukvTeo0lCP-EpSr5Ey2a3ITyOuwKyw9QBZWNArAkaucSB6z3T9o7SirIBK42yZrccM_RBGFB-oCBYBiSkWMPq8e14IvnRFUqL_rlaAyyNi8B2qyiHbiPwpD9rGJmJNfoQ6dgYD00XgjXXKm8IIRAkbWH061XXU9Dovkm7Ezp2qPFToZ-blfSbVZmDEg5vN9dOd6omGLjIGFS4S99hjiunsUMn5J3Iv24aqpn-b8X2cf5yQzGnTMlxUoRA2HKNNnx56rvB9WlX21mfkzD0GwBkOiO-t2mMaGfIk66iCg6ItRAU%3D)

clean_body: Turn America into a socialist “Open Society.”| | | | | | | | Peter,Communities across America remain overwhelmed by millions of illegal aliens President Biden waved across the border. The biased media keeps flooding our airwaves with open borders propaganda.And billionaires like George Soros are propping up Leftist NGOS, radical activists, and political puppets to advance the globalist, anti-American agenda of the oligarchs.They want to keep all of Biden’s illegal aliens in this country and turn America into a socialist “Open Society.” For the past fifty years, they’ve undermined American workers, American culture, and the American Dream...But I’m not writing today just to tell you about how open borders have hurt hard-working Americans.You already know that. I’m writing to tell you about the organization that is poised to put the screws to these open borders politicians and reshape the entire public discussion around immigration.That organization is You may not have heard of them before, but since I took office in 2013, I’ve seen time after time how powerful they are in exerting public pressure on wishy-washy politicians.NumbersUSA harnesses the power of over 8 million grassroots members all focused on one issue: immigration.They are the voice on Capitol Hill for an America-first immigration agenda.And they grade every member of Congress to show who truly puts America first on immigration and who just talks a big game on the campaign trail. I’m honored that, after twelve years of service, NumbersUSA calculates I’ve earned an “A” on my career immigration report card. This sort of pressure and public accountability are vital if we want to execute President Trump’s immigration agenda. You see, many of my colleagues don’t have deeply held convictions like you, me, and President Trump.They just go whichever way the political winds blow.That’s why the Radical Left has dominated this issue from as far back as I can remember. They’ve outraised us...They’ve outspent us...And then they’ve strong-armed spineless officials into selling out the American people.Frankly, if we want to take our country back, we need NumbersUSA to rally American patriots from across our great land. That’s why I wanted to drop in this little note today to accompany the letter from Roy Beck, the founder of NumbersUSA.He’ll tell you all about the wonderful work they’re doing, and I’d ask you to consider supporting them however you see fit. We have a narrow window to make a difference, and we need your help now more than ever. God Bless you and God Bless America! Senator Ted Cruz for NumbersUSA P.S. Roy’s email to you is included below. It will help explain how we can fix our national embarrassment of an immigration system. This couldn’t be coming at a more critical moment, so please read it and | | | Begin Forwarded Message:From : Roy Beck, NumbersUSA My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness. And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my Birthright Citizenship Survey. "" We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship......and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.As Ted Cruz says, "politicians go wherever the wind blows." So if you want action on immigration in this session of Congress, Senator Cruz needs your help to rally the troops and put pressure on his colleagues. "" Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...And it was definitely not for illegal aliens.In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, AND subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000. These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.But Trump can’t do it alone. Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best. Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard.The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country.To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it.We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you. And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me, or the great folks at NumbersUSA, or even Senator Ted Cruz—no, it’s the unmistakable DEMAND of the American people.And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage. Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. "" If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91. We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. "" Thank you and God bless you today! | | Roy Beck Founder and PresidentNumbersUSA | | | P.S. I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. name: Jimmy Kimmel
subject: Will you support my friends at GIFFORDS PAC today?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We must stand up and use our collective voice to make a change.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250528-1-b&t=1&akid=10484%2E3935704%2ErRtWG9)
---
Hi there, Jimmy Kimmel here.
I know you’re used to seeing me on your TV screen, but today I’m reaching out to you about an important topic close to my heart: _ending America’s gun violence crisis._
Gun violence isn’t always in the headlines, and it can be far too easy for us to go about our daily lives and forget that it’s happening each and every day. But for the families who now have empty seats at their dinner table -- like the families who lost a child in Newtown, Parkland, or Uvalde -- they can never, ever forget.
[**GIFFORDS is doing lifesaving work at the forefront of the gun safety movement, and I'm proud to be an ambassador for this incredible organization. Will you join me today in supporting GIFFORDS PAC by making a contribution to support their crucial work?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250528-1-b&t=2&akid=10484%2E3935704%2ErRtWG9)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250528-1-b&t=3&akid=10484%2E3935704%2ErRtWG9)**
Gun violence is a uniquely American epidemic. The leading cause of death for children in our nation is gun violence.
This is the only developed country in the world where this happens. We have to do something to change this.
Laws such as universal background checks, safe storage laws, and extreme risk protection orders would help ensure that guns can’t fall into the hands of people who shouldn’t have access to them. We call these laws common sense because that’s just what they are -- common sense.
It is long past time for our representatives to do their job and truly represent the American people. The majority of Americans support commonsense gun safety legislation._**But instead, the Trump administration is focused on making guns *even easier* to buy and lining the pockets of his gun lobby allies.**_
[**This is not a moment where we can sit back. We must be loud and use our collective voice to make a change. So please, will you make a commitment to ending our nation’s gun violence crisis by donating $3 to my friends at GIFFORDS PAC today? Your support at this moment is crucial:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250528-1-b&t=4&akid=10484%2E3935704%2ErRtWG9)

body:

Friend, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been abusing her office to target innocent police officers. And now, **starting this Monday** , she’s trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. **[Before I ask for your urgent help, let me start at the beginning...](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE9vozAQxT-NuYHs8R_gwKEsIYdNWildtepekMHjxiscqIFk--0rIpSLD8-_N2_eaD_2zn4XJC0JwNmZiQAQ_kQAvj5uPiz__O993L68_I2_1LOX6y_82tArPOBLp_1Yvmo9zu-T-D_WH9fn45U98Pl7xAe8hSbotetXNa0iU3BrqIiwYKnIhMg5y6Nz0eXUcGWU7YyQWWqtolxlIk-tlgY1Rq4ACpJKyJgCJvNEtkYowNxmVGiElgh6z0m0x-A6zab5pkMYBp90g4_64jzP43RfrCZQT9gtARN9QTPMK0Gg7rE3lkBthDYtb0VsGBexgLSNc9XamCnFuJSUouHrFF4vs2-mYQkdEl6V1T4-7d4IqFX2aNziCa92x01ZT6fd54XwauuSNmW1bw67Q1U35fvhcGxOu7fm9c_TKV6fzTdj8HePVLK5BRaFwow31_duUikR9PNeey15LeAnAAD__yjpkn0) ** My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. With only a split second to act, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!** You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/sytWruXcbdvV_AuoyD5tka8FdSuqxQaKqFTuaVF0v195WiW015aWTCxnYIAwfRJexQYpD5UVb07CHTW6TXHFHj3LroPAGcWTxJMtjtiIwSNO1ZjPeP3wBv7rozGNyRbwJoe0qcl5GGQmvGe-4TPoKYQVaIbnUAlNuz8t2AYUZaRc6K2aR25nNJfEHI0K4Fng0hGA5npLlqeMxXB8nWh7lyrY8NfYwT70pBFSZbFwmmonWm75WFB22eYRyRiJ1dxIrz1voCxfxEmo9wyYTEm7R8Aik__wUZTqfg8p298n1YLIRkFlnZUfuN9iWp3QCU3oOK_qijhQ6W5Qf8d3E2TyjZV4PDIyHvijcRK3GIgFc0eyTUNyWiJ7foWyJ-cZ5QRK_IS-PaCaX6LqyM75-hn0SDGd7F2JFVwL51A8976UE1pSCC6Age7jthD4UNy0nwKacA/Nbm6ifCF5sw89co6hoBHyHzI5LwWpqzt/9) [NO](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/2QLicBR2uFWOqsPlGUnr8Kk8TuVzBTeWVB57idETu_PtJZHB8qppBITAdjeGDTCGXayI1WNzCPMJ9WR2xcK5tOjz8pLQxgly3thWCpRAUv07o4hQZ45TcwknZq-3RFeMYtiIcGqGOG-XGM_gBIFjP9RgkUJm6rFH7vsVbrvhDWaH1pBIvHH545LwqHe5IyHU2Kn1wR7ShZqBpjxEgcIFV6fUurVvcDRRNKrVHiTCHFIulA9h35-f_-MkFfTxE3V896heeiApKTn9MI4YdL9UUAAWzctLI1jh2vysZuPh5HzYdk9t0AdQX1DZefjIokHg3U6oSH9eEr6JmrOL1L0j8W-jeariqBeqzaNJ_qSZimvrWyoPmBXHR8sf6u3MckkEa9BF2BPk2AytAoNujG0ktuCj-uZs2QLbrqNas3GUmvGk2_aNI1jlHIyx2INCY2c4_Q/YfuOCAVSoZQ1rdlNN_VQG4tA283teL4n/9) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/jrjIW0z--Rtwgqzg6gVF7cLFhhMv3GW-K3W_iMeQCsGGIUQqJKkTnft34Gags0SR7JgDu5phVR-OXLrFDQFePkf_zmV4lFuaEUUrAgk5vj4bAaSKIdnY-x77PEwFF5XWXdwPNVx3l4uz0QCyzL7KN3QlARy4JxEWhUdyP57Hz14OCht4sIo9BgGYtSLl-5VnC__o-GPtD2eNFOZ1lnDgNgO-_MQEBC_eoyNGGn44-yZ3L5e-DU9Fe48R4tvqVGmAhTRtVqzSpfVh9eXCXwDJPRukzrYyo_O-6rh9Cl_XlYSk_aHAEGPmCg77oaJfz7atn9NFBwdUrru3FKjdfltlm3mBvzDKsh4g2MRbfV9_aGuaIGPWa8S9AOPz5OOttaXnRu2KSn8A90eCzv0Ckz-mOTiJaKa2e1Z1hitRDhnfQQ0tr2GJ7YuYQNkYw11T2WoKJg/narF1-L23S56naaU8lnzb9IHMP1G1EuG/9)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution. But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats." That is why I'm reaching out to you today... What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Rachel
subject: Trauma, Redemption, & "God Surprises"
body:
A story of one man's tragedy, triumph, & God's amazing gifts! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/rachelhamm/trauma-redemption-god-surprises?e=5fa0631807)
---
| |
---
| Today on The Rachel Hamm Show, I interviewed Rory Longley.
Rory Longley's life is a jaw-dropping testament to resilience, faith, and God's incredible provision. From running away from a toxic home at 15 to discovering he was a father at 20, Rory's journey is packed with twists that will leave you inspired. How did a dance instructor and a pastor shape his path? What divine "coincidence" erased his financial burdens overnight? And how did God mend a broken bond with his mother after years of pain? Watch Rory’s gripping interview to uncover how he turned trauma into triumph and broke generational curses to become the father he never had. This is a story of hope you won’t want to miss! Click on the link below to watch the interview NOW.

God Bless you and know that you are loved!

| Peter,

This Jewish American Heritage Month, we’re proud to celebrate the history, leadership, and resilience of Jewish Americans—and **honor the trailblazing Emerge alums who are shaping a more just and inclusive democracy.**

**Leaders like:**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108510285/548166981/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-05-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhODY3NzI2LWUxM2ItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9yLIKyZEkG4awO7PJuCrVkoXnWzq0WGF6p0rpZ-SUTw=)
* **Maine State Senate President Matthea Daughtry** , championing working families and reproductive freedom

* **Frederick County Executive Jessica Fitzwater** , leading with transparency and equity in Maryland

* **San Francisco Supervisor Myrna Melgar** , a voice for housing justice and women’s rights

* **Colorado State Senator Dafna Michaelson-Jenet** , fighting for mental health access and inclusive policies

These women stand strong against extremism, protecting our communities and delivering real progress. But they can’t do it alone, and we need more leaders like them in every corner of the country.
