body:
Hear us out.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108510402/548167497/1328794144?refcode=ea.0c3f7407-e13b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.0c3f7407-e13b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjM2Y3NDA3LWUxM2ItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pBeHrL5BsULaM0wg_GN3HbjKeDbwK12wwItfLjqcwEE=&emci=8d83627a-2b3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0c3f7407-e13b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
Is there anything we can say to convince you to **[power JanePAC’s critical work with a donation before our fundraising deadline on Saturday?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108510404/548167499/2105508926?refcode=ea.0c3f7407-e13b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.0c3f7407-e13b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjM2Y3NDA3LWUxM2ItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pBeHrL5BsULaM0wg_GN3HbjKeDbwK12wwItfLjqcwEE=)** **What if we told you that your donation helps us fight back against Donald Trump’s _“Big Beautiful Bill”_** — a sweeping attack on climate progress that would claw back billions in clean energy investments and supercharge oil and gas drilling on public lands? **Or that time is running out to act on climate** , with scientists warning we have just a few years left to drastically cut emissions and avoid the worst impacts of the crisis? **Or that your donation helps build the grassroots infrastructure we need to take on the fossil fuel lobby** — not only in Congress, but on school boards, in city councils, and in state legislatures across the country, where we’re working to build an unbreakable firewall of climate leaders? All of this takes resources, and plenty of them. That’s why we’ve set an ambitious online goal of **$60,000** this month, and we need the support of our most committed supporters to help meet it. **[That’s why we’re reaching out to you directly. Can we count on you to chip in any amount you can afford today to help us close the gap and power this movement forward?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108510406/548167501/2105508926?refcode=ea.0c3f7407-e13b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.0c3f7407-e13b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjM2Y3NDA3LWUxM2ItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pBeHrL5BsULaM0wg_GN3HbjKeDbwK12wwItfLjqcwEE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108510409/548167504/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.0c3f7407-e13b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.0c3f7407-e13b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjM2Y3NDA3LWUxM2ItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pBeHrL5BsULaM0wg_GN3HbjKeDbwK12wwItfLjqcwEE=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108510410/548167505/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.0c3f7407-e13b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.0c3f7407-e13b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjM2Y3NDA3LWUxM2ItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pBeHrL5BsULaM0wg_GN3HbjKeDbwK12wwItfLjqcwEE=)

clean_body: Hear us out. | Is there anything we can say to convince you to = What if we told you that your donation helps us fight back against Donald Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” — a sweeping attack on climate progress that would claw back billions in clean energy investments and supercharge oil and gas drilling on public lands? Or that time is running out to act on climate , with scientists warning we have just a few years left to drastically cut emissions and avoid the worst impacts of the crisis? Or that your donation helps build the grassroots infrastructure we need to take on the fossil fuel lobby — not only in Congress, but on school boards, in city councils, and in state legislatures across the country, where we’re working to build an unbreakable firewall of climate leaders? All of this takes resources, and plenty of them. That’s why we’ve set an ambitious online goal of $60,000 this month, and we need the support of our most committed supporters to help meet it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Your support is truly essential and greatly appreciated. Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Dear Peter,

I've always believed that **[God places us exactly where we need to be](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/7nKHh-zSy-1eGehL9TP8TbCwj2Y7krm-S6C7fNwBI8OEoH7yah7AERpAqx_rKVvdRPvKy0A2hYP7WutvCqZJA8BfjdXyUvFBphUO6JXVWtxf2ut2skHqKbtx1uFswwdK6iEl_ceJxZpUNHNKFs-Odn14ZwVLNRF-JTQf1zOohRjNjeiVAv8ro91NQCr7IlO8f3NWoqsG0IaviEZrJKdH1chtz70PHvtB4ptFkdJWqs3916ry19vrXe_h30IlpTA7nyh8zcK0bW7FDmYhpEWOGZGtb-cRMrJanp1gzQb7gjk7E838ewdceoV28SaCq4VAOyc3M4INz2SJsbh_bSgiOfL3Rqqf_wxRxcrkLrZop8bhnznPArGXJE5-ep30NP7HD-yWBSoPSmc9lwa38YqOYKWCB75dRb4_wzVee032SepE4GGEtmWmTAudoH_PPSRJmTcNuSyAvRhxwFndkEKm7d4XxZzf3EtL4zZ6AGTbzPkL9vsBgaLq6NbvSQnq4VfVpIrYnzRQrKJ9YxSrjHmfcNoWqa2iWmn2VPEDHy_tZnuciQTBADPDB4micaMiCwDuprUCI2jg4_aq32N5I6hsZVFgxFjagfvjMPUzROr5L05RH9q6Jiw6VaMtXeTCi1mXs9C0cQ/9CKxYJUSYsCh7bjxgmGtJx8XeKs2TYgP/9)** --especially in moments that test our resolve.

Right now, our country is fighting forces that reject truth, faith, and freedom.

The radical Left mocks our faith.
They tear down our values.
And they want to erase God from public life.

**[But we can't retreat when things get hard.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/QSzd9Nue49-dHeSl9pK3CukDx8VP2QQKVM0Kg_x0pQFuHI1SNjJtHDD_CNMIk1FNOfYV6kpCJwshbi4_cDVb2OmtZwG-pPmfKBd1bhdYcB5tVUFyx2sM6yfSJMArD7goOvFBDqcbQzmqXTZ1-s7zlwhbbVB4F39s0mTceGPYS0J9TLf6zujVtmXIXqZlKPQ681IjKOlnOquPLC73AsOdpqcitGFafXIfMGtL1CjE2cEeRYTkLwOycaIsfB8AQxaT5bzBmGxah9vCpvvS2-yHISPvyPy-1ar-YY0Z3pEjl0K_fEc1CAR72RCvGHrLasCmxfwdFoZ8CfMZRWv5FDHsmX_VLbIKOiXCqKRPFzEv-nNyRnGBdqS__dSt4DSfDV1xCVSePxBRH81z8olOOdbWFxVKZz2smK_sHwYTr1aLShpKvOSnwgBJqvQl_YIxKgDMWwD2z8bwvq2rcLCMxTr7dMmlT9WhDhrbAZVMj-FB2886tI8LARXVMVokOsMAsyl6v9_u6863xuIPo35xM1uD2U91W5HuMUqLvhl4smMNi_P1f74_1jHjUOhy8LwR1jXrjwm1d-GLy1vsfoEe8a1O_juLo1Mhllg2PUncoYbqv-dDIA1Mog-H3FgLgS9UZvA3effCKg/ZxKJiy54p4Mc0iIlCmMxtnoI11tmPwwn/9)**
We need to stand firm. We need to speak truth.
And we need to fight back--with faith and conviction.

So, Peter, can I ask you to verify your GOP voter record **[BEFORE MIDNIGHT?](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/luKMz1NQUO2GckhWfkboxOnjwKj8XmoFQJRy-85Y_Fv4XyzWt5ytPz1dx9Zkqw3OOn-1PX0Q4nVQfaa8MGTaFhAB6lqrcJex0U1_IVhXyISpnnVq_Yiq3QUTtgyHLQofTlDXfqFsQHbdgr5ucFDN-SXincLXKLR_VC43WvrSZeHVqBycYfr7MC2A3VXGBroYhQGSyqcEEUFYnzOkMKQOzGYIorRNFJR8ICRe2SQdZeUTM6EShcxUuEV0pomNLFYVFtHmiin8TWlO-Nux84SmJQhzwLEQlnIqy_w7JRay740sVuMAZjqC8I_rRvFwKBkyt9NNPCXg10cmz4lOT-4ao7ZqQpcT0Fr1u4ueMAtP0dGGJmwhDz3NVznJfOhbeeEm3Th6SY8Kb51NPxwFxKcNKf_pNg9Hc_cjQd6Aba-EcaXfQ6N8360IAotYOngzr01LHGwhZcSm3FuAdYpef3CEcJcmvT7oZrJOReKaYLa5Hb_qChkblDJT8S158wrlK7EDskVV9wCqVJ5u5psqK1HIBRm8w0jph4-6fdGoG23qZ2ARpubmR-8E316qwnCbUnJ_9wIIrPvoQ08Ji9_XYSdP7aIim5c_YdXvEZ8qnDwV4vgNCbLjYWsQwRIQbF6IBVHnGCIAXQ/B3fyyZXKH4Zc8lRFjqrEmrDDn1-Ijc8j/9)**

We're running out of time.

**[And your silence could cost us everything.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/6mExGK6gzaL2sYEmHHCo_V0F8jH34UIVPk8QxfvI3PfzQ-kW1RMR1PIaeAgU3vgQNLMbUVoftSmEf6ctpcw9b51eESta6dvZ48kjnkGFsoyYCY10FTKQSyEHDWGB4oFPuJDiGmetcaTEXS7T-vuIj36-B6ZqCD06RpwICBII0qyDwta1yBWPE1zWm4ZFEbISeoN_n2S7EgKYr_j8jhPKYpIsnhpvBZ_1loX0y2zfoVvBcUFYqxL5bPr7NCAPu7Qfhptb3dZn52jMBtSywMtZfnBCjiF3hBpH2AwA6KLmm2AT26FFbcHkTojaOQckg04XzLoSdoB2Si0FbP479qqmfUg1WpFoYWIgaL4AV5AvX16dHIzLQmY9TxanyQOdYfFCnYD89CtqNL9o3_ATpFFcFsmyO8iz6Ib-2AWQ93zHwd2sMnphkbw9bzzRup4V50-ZnbsFTGJcqaqvD4JPvf-Y0OhLNxvGSBzPKjqeIeQ54Te4EnssiOnacDKGbU8z3W4W8NrUPH_xrNkIX525QPf3SN7YD1o5eY2u5Yx-_IVb4sNeXlbxfQ1c_UEXhuvTGxAi5uKIyaaocJs1UYcTnsltSJLIyXQNhkLJR02CQQ3-moN2RkLoTF7VI-fP2Ygv7gmeJO1SxA/0v0vGLZ4ZdF_4VFfHen9BByUiC9TZF80/9)**

If we remain faithful-if we act boldly-we will overcome.

NRSC Chairman Tim Scot

clean_body: Dear Peter, I've always believed that --especially in moments that test our resolve. Right now, our country is fighting forces that reject truth, faith, and freedom. The radical Left mocks our faith. They tear down our values. And they want to erase God from public life. We need to stand firm. We need to speak truth. And we need to fight back--with faith and conviction. So, Peter, can I ask you to verify your GOP voter record We're running out of time. The stakes couldn't be higher. If we remain faithful-if we act boldly-we will overcome. Let's win this together, NRSC Chairman Tim Scot | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Mark Jennings
subject: Tragedy turns into nightmare
body:
He lost his wife, now this radical prosecutor wants to send him to prison| | |
---
Patriot ,Radical Soros-backed prosecutor Aisha Braveboy has launched a political witch-hunt against my police officer son-in-law.That’s a photo of him -- Sgt. Robert Warrington of Bowie, MD -- with his dog, Rooster.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f8e3ffb61d9c4071ac21648368b0ef90&_e=jxBovIVXpep5ymscf2ZdvzU1cCXvjy9VYJDJRI7Xyz_V5Z7dEI0vsZpPfDVfskn6Q0cBmRJnfW0wIUePok2U6P6BVrR_puEleainX0Ow8LokcJnmrFew0y4GxsN7pG_G_i3uZiKO8TXt-jnO-ex0TFGmXBGo3veolvK_xMmqtDn3zsXlO8rkUf9Bg4oezy9d4HzbT3LHqQruLoR0ZxqqLlsx3rBD3jYyW9B5yDvPt4vmTF897HHNh_xiwbTgC1eTeBINx1EJNBWnOEs35wKOnB207X08En302eKjbioaEtrSMRs-uMePeQDzKQPDq474fh-q4LFcrDUnUjg5nFVZzCPAzrQYEQXOfjVoRxtJlHevHqsirPHWZ_cvF64HpTpPbxGBoZDL96mYJEwIt0gI0g%3D%3D)
---
The day Robert asked for my daughter’s hand in marriage was one of the proudest days of my life. I couldn’t have chosen a better man for my baby girl if I tried. Even though we lost my daughter in 2020 after a long battle with breast cancer, Robert and I have remained close. He’s like a son to me and there’s nothing I won’t do for him.**[That’s why I’m swallowing my pride and asking you, a perfect stranger, for help.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f8e3ffb61d9c4071ac21648368b0ef90&_e=jxBovIVXpep5ymscf2ZdvzU1cCXvjy9VYJDJRI7Xyz_V5Z7dEI0vsZpPfDVfskn6Q0cBmRJnfW0wIUePok2U6P6BVrR_puEleainX0Ow8LokcJnmrFew0y4GxsN7pG_G_i3uZiKO8TXt-jnO-ex0TFGmXBGo3veolvK_xMmqtDn3zsXlO8rkUf9Bg4oezy9d4HzbT3LHqQruLoR0ZxqqLlsx3rBD3jYyW9B5yDvPt4sIPl5AuPxKClt5M1vr-Y0pwi5hud3MpZjDctFG2XGQndUp0XuDOVoZg5JF7g3ujeLRzESqWwfnmAn0mPX4yD1P0GVVe3iRygwNp0-W2cO2UA-YRhmzl77Fh77mXeLZoIrLjEHmBC2QMmnXW8H2tAuJA_F_YnK-eOZroavDCylOZw%3D%3D)** Let me tell you what happened so you can decide if you’ll join me in fighting for an innocent man...Last September, Robert stopped to assist a vehicle that appeared to be broken down.As he stepped out of his police car, a man walked right in front of Robert. But when Robert asked if he was with the disabled car, the man did not stop or even acknowledge him.**Then suddenly, the man pivoted to face Robert and stretched his right hand away from his body with a black object in his hand.** If you’ve spent any time around law enforcement officers, then you know they are trained to quickly assess a situation and take necessary action to defend themselves. Robert didn’t know why this car was pulled to the side of the road -- nor did he know who was in it.But he knew that traffic stops are one of the most dangerous situations for a cop to respond to -- so when this man appeared to pull a gun on him, Robert didn’t hesitate.He fired one shot. The bullet did not strike the man. Thank goodness, as Robert later discovered he was unarmed!Why the man pulled out his cell phone and pointed it at my son-in-law, we may never know...But the bottom line is _no one was hurt._ **Unfortunately, that didn’t stop the local prosecutor from swooping in and charging Robert with** **_Attempted Murder_.**It didn’t make any sense until we learned the prosecutor was backed by George Soros and she was campaigning for higher office on an anti-cop platform. Surely prosecuting a decorated police officer would win over the radical base here in left-leaning Prince George’s County, Maryland.Like I said at the beginning of my letter, it’s a political witch-hunt.Robert’s trial is scheduled for September 2025. **He faces up to 30 years in prison.** My son-in-law has already lost so much. I can’t sit idly by and watch a radical prosecutor steal his career away from him, too.**[That’s why I’m humbly asking you to make a donation to help pay for Robert’s legal defense.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f8e3ffb61d9c4071ac21648368b0ef90&_e=jxBovIVXpep5ymscf2ZdvzU1cCXvjy9VYJDJRI7Xyz_V5Z7dEI0vsZpPfDVfskn6Q0cBmRJnfW0wIUePok2U6P6BVrR_puEleainX0Ow8LokcJnmrFew0y4GxsN7pG_G_i3uZiKO8TXt-jnO-ex0TFGmXBGo3veolvK_xMmqtDn3zsXlO8rkUf9Bg4oezy9d4HzbT3LHqQruLoR0ZxqqLlsx3rBD3jYyW9B5yDvPt4vsiJdV8-asjUD2Ioks7NgBwULHEbNfQBHpmqw1V3FL1IQzekjJSY4LjQZPs2_N0kbHzjo-muiI5_THoOMIZLxmkhizIh92TAoestn4sH0LFN63rpn2Gjv3kjrn7t5Cx_oUXK8L23UWSEqctXVazM7tGB--PdgLJxdjWAEp8Cw_Lw%3D%3D) **I’m going to be blunt. The attorneys anticipate it’ll cost over $150,000 to get through the trial. Robert just doesn’t have that kind of money.It was difficult enough to pay the medical bills following my daughter’s four-year battle with cancer on a police officer’s salary. I’ve helped as much as I can, and I was starting to worry when we got a call from a local man named Jason Johnson.It turns out Jason is a retired Prince George’s County Police Officer. And now he runs the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).It was truly an answer to a prayer. For over thirty years, the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has provided legal defenses to wrongly accused police officers like Robert.They pay for attorneys’ fees, expert witnesses, investigators, other court costs, and more.LELDF has successfully helped hundreds of officers clear their names and win back their freedom. And now they’re helping Robert mount the defense he deserves.But they can’t do it alone. **[That’s why I’m praying you’ll find it in your heart to help LELDF fight for Robert.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f8e3ffb61d9c4071ac21648368b0ef90&_e=jxBovIVXpep5ymscf2ZdvzU1cCXvjy9VYJDJRI7Xyz_V5Z7dEI0vsZpPfDVfskn6Q0cBmRJnfW0wIUePok2U6P6BVrR_puEleainX0Ow8LokcJnmrFew0y4GxsN7pG_G_i3uZiKO8TXt-jnO-ex0TFGmXBGo3veolvK_xMmqtDn3zsXlO8rkUf9Bg4oezy9d4HzbT3LHqQruLoR0ZxqqLlsx3rBD3jYyW9B5yDvPt4uodctG-Ou-icPPxb5IIVEhd2S9DRSF-BTNravpf93eRJbf9JE9H3BTOQFO5p7-79iMVv3bpwK_2i_DZR7v3zjYElcx3a95LMvI8MkfdTeyzBbk6-QYg8YYedL4Npds6k4vjl-1NoJjEZv7AClriMKrPSeRzOVJ6O09bU47pEq9Hw%3D%3D)** It may not seem like your gift of $35, $50, or even $100 will make a difference with that huge of a sum.But when combined with donations from thousands of other folks who are moved by our story, LELDF will be able to raise the resources to pay for Robert’s case. [**Will you please help fight for Robert by donating $35, $50, $100, or more to LELDF today?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f8e3ffb61d9c4071ac21648368b0ef90&_e=jxBovIVXpep5ymscf2ZdvzU1cCXvjy9VYJDJRI7Xyz_V5Z7dEI0vsZpPfDVfskn6Q0cBmRJnfW0wIUePok2U6P6BVrR_puEleainX0Ow8LokcJnmrFew0y4GxsN7pG_G_i3uZiKO8TXt-jnO-ex0TFGmXBGo3veolvK_xMmqtDn3zsXlO8rkUf9Bg4oezy9d4HzbT3LHqQruLoR0ZxqqLlsx3rBD3jYyW9B5yDvPt4sZSHUqJPPJRLTV6SbJwCO5TAS_jYpMggZskEE42zIFc0MxPtsPkZAGWmCV6asQ6v662qXF-rpXPqFxoQL2v64MHrMXwY1iZ5uRyGvoVgbIWQPMf38cMhVZbUQSMH3Rvt7xQQww4t_05348kHrVCYmk8F0uRPkrNuIxf9H0WtQU1w%3D%3D) LELDF is a non-profit organization which means your gift today is tax-deductible. And you can rest assured your gift will be put to immediate use helping Robert and other wrongly accused officers win in court and move on with their lives as free men.Frankly, I was shocked to learn LELDF is supporting several officers who are also being railroaded by Soros-backed anti-cop prosecutors. It’s unconscionable! As a father, I wish more than anything that I could snap my fingers and make this all go away for Robert. But since I can’t, I’m doing what any father would do – I’m fighting for my son with all I’ve got.So no matter what you’re able to give to LELDF today, please pray for Robert and our family. We really need some good news right now.Thank you in advance for your generous support.
---
Gratefully,
---
Mark Jennings
---
P.S. I saw Robert’s true character while my daughter -- his wife -- battled breast cancer. He is a good man who would lay down is life for another without hesitation. Five years after my daughter’s death, I still consider Robert my son and there’s nothing I won’t do for him. Our family has already lost so much. Robert’s freedom and good name -- not to mention his career -- are on the line. Please don’t let a desperate Soros-backed prosecutor steal all he has left. **[Help us fight back by donating $35, $50, $100, or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f8e3ffb61d9c4071ac21648368b0ef90&_e=jxBovIVXpep5ymscf2ZdvzU1cCXvjy9VYJDJRI7Xyz_V5Z7dEI0vsZpPfDVfskn6Q0cBmRJnfW0wIUePok2U6P6BVrR_puEleainX0Ow8LokcJnmrFew0y4GxsN7pG_G_i3uZiKO8TXt-jnO-ex0TFGmXBGo3veolvK_xMmqtDn3zsXlO8rkUf9Bg4oezy9d4HzbT3LHqQruLoR0ZxqqLlsx3rBD3jYyW9B5yDvPt4s6g_-GPhr6d577WE1zJ1Wj32uSjt8I-fDerxL9lM_7-kFCNtG--4Tdx49iw2Yz1Pjuw2vzyw6HBQ8cL5rvCXw5pJS4YRqUzslqMbCGFwhVSog02u-OqmcUkgte2XZ9KG_Q1rKTrOdM1HbTQy9dsw5-hadmUZTLgRHgY1fVHp0gPQ%3D%3D).** Thank you!
---

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: our next deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
---
| | Team,

Our next end-of-month fundraising goal is Saturday at midnight — and it’s our last one before the primary! If we can raise $5,000 by this deadline, we’ll be in a great position for Election Day!

subject: Here’s where we stand:

body:
A new poll shows Jocelyn winning against all candidates in this race.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=346%2E181023%2EIgbwS9)
Folks, here’s what you need to know about the Michigan governor’s race and how Jocelyn is going to win this race.
**First:** The _Cook Political Report_ labeled the Michigan governor’s race a **_TOSS-UP_**. That means we need every dollar, every volunteer, and every vote we can get to elect Jocelyn.
**Then:** The DeVos family handed $5 million to a super PAC backing John James, making it clear that Republicans are willing to do, say, or spend **ANYTHING** to flip Michigan **red** and undo all the progress we’ve secured.
**Now:** A new poll shows Jocelyn winning against all candidates in this race. Her message is resonating with voters. But we need to make sure we’ve got the grassroots power and resources to respond to Republican attacks and win this race.
Because this isn’t just any election — it’s about making sure Michigan remains a place where families can afford a home, access quality health care, and live in safe communities. Where it’s the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home.
That’s why we need your help — because we’re building a campaign that’s powered by people, not billionaires. Your support fuels **_everything_** : from door knocking to phone banking and spreading Jocelyn’s message across the state.
[**Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is in just a few days, and we need to make sure Jocelyn has the resources to win and protect Michigan’s future. Can you chip in today?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250528_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=346%2E181023%2EIgbwS9)

_**Clarence Thomas just said the quiet part out loud.**__****__****__****__****_
_****_
_****_For _**MONTHS**_ , President Trump has been asking the Supreme Court to rule against the _**DOZENS**_ of illegal, and unconstitutional injunctions filed by countless Radical Left activist judges.
_**__**_
_**_And today, Clarence Thomas just stood on business._**_
_**__**_
_**__**_During the recent hearing regarding the _**END**_ of birthright citizenship, Clarence Thomas just dropped a _**TRUTH BOMB.**_
_****_
_****_**_"So, we survived until the 1960s without universal [activist judge nationwide] injunctions."_**
**__**
**__**And he couldn’t be any closer to the truth. What we are seeing now is a disgusting perversion of the law with one single objective:
_****_
_**DESTROY**_ President Trump’s agenda.
And for standing up for President Trump and calling out _**EVERY**_ single Activist Judge, Clarence Thomas has become the Radical Left’s #1 target.

Already, petitions to _**IMPEACH**_ and _**REMOVE**_ him from the Supreme Court have surpassed __**1,000,000 signatures.**__
__****____****____****____****__
__****____****__And they’re growing by the hour.

We need every single MAGA patriot to deck to defend him _**ASAP!**_
_****_

body:
Beer, burgers, and our Made in America HAT!

|
---
| | | __**Picture this:**__

You're strolling down Main Street, the smell of sizzling burgers and hot dogs wafting through the air, the sound of laughter and lawn games filling your ears. The sun is shining bright, casting a warm glow over the entire scene. American flags wave proudly in the breeze, a reminder of the freedom and sacrifice that makes days like this possible.

**[And you're soaking it all in, wearing the ultimate symbol of patriotism: our Made in America hat.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2l8pm11jjfehac9jkb618u5bost8lvc4gq0u0tg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5hmap32cph2bs "And you're soaking it all in, wearing the ultimate symbol of patriotism: our Made in America hat.")** The envy of all your friends and family, this hat is more than just a stylish accessory - it's a badge of honor, a declaration of your love for the land of the free and the home of the brave.

---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zftdfnskq7862oehlis78nmubd9906ar29fp64do_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5hmap32cph2bs)

_So what are you waiting for?_ Get ready to make some unforgettable memories in the most American way possible. Treat yourself to our Made in America hat today and get ready to take on the summer in star-spangled style!

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204j1wi5pw1ugjxnmcs89h4v4k9ey09kp8b46slez9oad956i9pmndng0uar4pbjyj4moqx8pa8p1aynrjy&__stmp=swze1q&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
| |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swze1q&__onlt=h)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swze1q&__onlt=h) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swze1q&__onlt=h)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swze1q&__onlt=h)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swze1q&__onlt=h)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swze1q&__onlt=h), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swze1q&__onlt=h)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swze1q&__onlt=h)
---
| | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swze1q&__onlt=h)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swze1q&__onlt=h) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swze1q&__onlt=h)

_****_
_****_For _**MONTHS**_ , President Trump has been asking the Supreme Court to rule against the _**DOZENS**_ of illegal, and unconstitutional injunctions filed by countless Radical Left activist judges.
_**__**_
_**_And today, Clarence Thomas just stood on business._**_
_**__**_
_**__**_During the recent hearing regarding the _**END**_ of birthright citizenship, Clarence Thomas just dropped a _**TRUTH BOMB.**_
_****_
_****_**_"So, we survived until the 1960s without universal [activist judge nationwide] injunctions."_**
**__**
**__**And he couldn’t be any closer to the truth. What we are seeing now is a disgusting perversion of the law with one single objective:
_****_
_**DESTROY**_ President Trump’s agenda.
And for standing up for President Trump and calling out _**EVERY**_ single Activist Judge, Clarence Thomas has become the Radical Left’s #1 target.

Already, petitions to _**IMPEACH**_ and _**REMOVE**_ him from the Supreme Court have surpassed __**1,000,000 signatures.**__
__****____****____****____****__
__****____****__And they’re growing by the hour.

We need every single MAGA patriot to deck to defend him _**ASAP!**_
_****_
_****_**[We’re calling on every Patriot reading this text to go on the record TODAY and say, “I STILL STAND WITH CLARENCE THOMAS!”](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt16439ahlnl5iojlras7pe7e9c6h3gkqorah788_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5hm6o36cjh2bs)** __****__

# [The Beginning of the End of Local Government in Connecticut](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=164661190&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0NjYxMTkwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDg0NTIzNTQsImV4cCI6MTc1MTA0NDM1NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.TCBoFrhtcCaelbycjfqzLnS6_7GJ0bMk8QbaYbbsgJs)
### Elections Have Consequences
| | [Dr. Michael Goldstein](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct) and [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81)
---
| May 28
---
| [](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct)| | [](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81)

---

Connecticut's Democrat-controlled State Legislature is poised to pass HB 5002, a bill that threatens the long-standing tradition of local control over housing in Connecticut and throughout this nation**. It passed the House and is off to the Democrat controlled Senate.**
[ Pledge your support](https://substack..bE4IV4SSvBfKi-dTwryYxk2bgFoshxgElE15vk1yMRw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164661190)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7a41c1d6-87c0-4894-88f9-653a17c4380c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This bill would impose state-set affordable housing quotas based on population, not available land, and allow commercial properties to be converted to residential units "by right" with no community input or buy-in. Developers who sue under 8-30g could be reimbursed for their attorney's fees.
It eliminates parking requirements for apartment complexes and enables multi-family developments in single-family zones near transit hubs (defines as one half-mile of a train station or bus route). This Bill risks neighborhood character and threatens home values.
Eliminating "adequate onsite parking spaces" is ludicrous. This is a bonus to developers who no longer have to build parking.
_**The bill also includes problematic rent regulations and provisions related to "hostile architecture"** on public property to prevent homeless from sleeping or lying down in public._
HB 5002 will burden towns with increased infrastructure costs (sewers, taxes) and exacerbate parking problems. **It does not require the developers to pay for those infrastructure upgrades.** Not to mention that rent control has historically devastated neighborhoods (as seen in NYC). This bill requires 32 towns to have fair rent commissions and allows towns to establish regionalized commissions through their local government.
Another impact is mixing multi-family housing in single-family zones will devalue homes, a major asset for many residents, and that requiring "live-work-ride" for affordable housing is hypocritical when many market-rate residents commute to work.
Instead of this destructive approach, there are better alternatives:
* _**Towns should retain zoning control**_ - They know what is best for their residents
* _**Affordable owned housing is superior to rental**_**;** it has been successfully built through developer-town cooperation (e.g., post-WWII with builders willing to accept lower profits for increased volume of sales using streamlined housing building). Owned housing is superior to rental housing because the homeowner is a stronger stakeholder in the community and they build generational wealth
* _**Solutions include towns providing land, streamlining building permits for repeated plans, and utilizing cost-effective construction methods (slabs, modular townhouses).**_

**The Real Solution**
**Ultimately, the most important solution is to rebuild Connecticut's economy through reduced regulation, lower energy costs, and lower taxes, making the state competitive and attractive for growth, rather than eroding local control and subsidizing housing without a population able to sustain their housing costs.**
It is time for Connecticut to become competitive rather than a marketing tool for Florida and Texas.
Destroying local government and taking control over zoning and housing combined with unfunded mandates the wrong approach.

name: Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8624%2E5257348%2EuxlDPv)
Hi Derek, did you see my message last week?
**[I’m participating in the AIDS/LifeCycle ride from San Francisco to Los Angeles — and I’m hoping you’ll support my fundraising efforts for the two LGBTQ+ organizations sponsoring this event.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=4&akid=8624%2E5257348%2EuxlDPv)**
[DONATE 🚴♂️](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=5&akid=8624%2E5257348%2EuxlDPv)
---
I’m training hard, getting ready for the long ride. And I’m excited to be the first U.S. Senator to participate.
I’m also working hard to protect LGBTQ+ Americans — because no one should be treated as less than because of who they love or how they identify.
Thanks for supporting me — and say hi if you see me along the ride!
— Adam
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Adam Schiff
Date: May 23, 2025
Subject: Why I'm riding_
Derek,
In just a few weeks, I’m participating in the AIDS/LifeCycle ride, and I’m hoping you’ll consider pitching in to support the San Francisco AIDS Foundation and the Los Angeles LGBT Center today.
**[You can chip in through my link here — 100% of the proceeds go toward these important organizations.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=6&akid=8624%2E5257348%2EuxlDPv)**
[DONATE 🚴♂️](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=7&akid=8624%2E5257348%2EuxlDPv)
---
Derek, I’ve done this ride before.
You may not know this, but I was the first member of Congress to participate in the ride back in 2014, and now, I’m going to be the first U.S. Senator to do the ride in early June. In 2014, I did the whole 540 mile ride, but with votes during the week of the ride, this year I will only be able to participate in the first 80 mile leg.
From San Francisco to Los Angeles, bikers from around the world ride through the beautiful California countryside for a worthwhile cause: supporting the LGBTQ+ community, helping young people experiencing homelessness, and taking a stand against the stigma of HIV.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=8&akid=8624%2E5257348%2EuxlDPv)
I’ve long championed the LGBTQ+ community — from participating in this bike ride to passing legislation to expand access to lifesaving HIV medications — I’m doing all I can to lift people up.
This cause is dear to me, as I’m following in the footsteps of my predecessor, the late Senator Dianne Feinstein, who was also a champion for LGBTQ+ Americans.
The first time I did this ride, it was deeply meaningful – and fun.
From so many of the other riders, I heard their stories, of loss, and of hope. Those they were riding in remembrance of, and those they were still fighting for.
It was one of the most moving weeks I’ve had as a public servant (in more ways than one). And I’m excited to do it again.
That’s why I’m asking:
**[Will you chip in to support the LGBTQ+ organizations sponsoring this ride and help me raise funds and awareness for the LGBTQ+ community?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=9&akid=8624%2E5257348%2EuxlDPv)**
[DONATE 🚴♂️](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=10&akid=8624%2E5257348%2EuxlDPv)
---
Thank you — I’ll keep you posted on my ride!
— Adam
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=8624%2E5257348%2EuxlDPv) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=8624%2E5257348%2EuxlDPv)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
---
Sign up to receive [fewer emails](https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/em-fewer-emails/?t=11&akid=8624%2E5257348%2EuxlDPv) or [visit our store](https://store.adamschiff.com/). Text **JOIN** to **724433**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=8624%2E5257348%2EuxlDPv)

name: Becca Balint
subject: I’m fighting their billionaire-first agenda with everything I've got.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108516467/548178312/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250528_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDVjZjA0ZC1lNzNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rh9f71pje4jAACvxjzop4pQ0zuym4tahvOEQBqR7eiM=)
---
Peter, I got into politics to alleviate suffering. This GOP budget bill will only make working Americans suffer, and the rich even richer. _I'm going to fight it with everything I've got. _ House Republicans voted to pass a budget bill that makes steep cuts to food assistance and Medicaid, and puts Medicare at risk — showing the nation just how dangerously out-of-touch their party is. These cuts would put rural hospitals at risk of immediate closure, including many of Vermont’s hospitals. For me, this bill crosses a moral line. Working families across the country are struggling to make ends meet. Now, millions of people are at risk of losing their health care and food assistance so Republicans can deliver tax relief for the wealthiest among us. They’re not even _pretending_ to care about working people anymore. This bill is cruel, which is why House Democrats stopped it from moving forward. I’ll always fight for what matters most in Congress — protecting our shared values and making life easier for working families. **Your grassroots support helps show that there’s a movement of people who are sick of Republicans’ cruelty.** **[Please help us send that message loud and clear by chipping in toward our May fundraising goal before Saturday’s deadline:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108516468/548178313/-999049517?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250528_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDVjZjA0ZC1lNzNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rh9f71pje4jAACvxjzop4pQ0zuym4tahvOEQBqR7eiM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108516469/548178314/-186789909?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250528_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDVjZjA0ZC1lNzNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rh9f71pje4jAACvxjzop4pQ0zuym4tahvOEQBqR7eiM=)

clean_body: | = Peter, I got into politics to alleviate suffering. This GOP budget bill will only make working Americans suffer, and the rich even richer. I'm going to fight it with everything I've got. House Republicans voted to pass a budget bill that makes steep cuts to food assistance and Medicaid, and puts Medicare at risk — showing the nation just how dangerously out-of-touch their party is. These cuts would put rural hospitals at risk of immediate closure, including many of Vermont’s hospitals. For me, this bill crosses a moral line. Working families across the country are struggling to make ends meet. Now, millions of people are at risk of losing their health care and food assistance so Republicans can deliver tax relief for the wealthiest among us. They’re not even pretending to care about working people anymore. This bill is cruel, which is why House Democrats stopped it from moving forward. I’ll always fight for what matters most in Congress — protecting our shared values and making life easier for working families. Friend, Last week the House GOP passed its 2025 budget bill. The bill's sweeping cuts to medicaid will strip coverage from over 8.7 million people and lead to 7.6 million more uninsured people over 10 years. The cuts are so unpopular that even some Senate Republicans are lining up to oppose them. _But will they be enough? _
---

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Lower taxes, secure borders and less government waste
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
The contrast in leadership in the two Washingtons is stark

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | Friends,The headlines could not be clearer: In Washington, D.C., where Republicans are in charge, the House passed one of t _he largest tax decreases_ in history. The American people are getting what they voted for. House Republicans have unified and passed the One Big Beautiful Bill (215 Yes and 214 No – EVERY DEMOCRAT VOTED NO!)
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| House Republicans have unified and passed the One Big Beautiful Bill (215 Yes vs 214 No)
---
| Elections have consequences and the contrast between leadership in Washington DC and Washington state is stark. In Olympia, far-left progressives passed the largest tax increase in the state’s history and the Governor signed it into law._**What a difference! Everyone is saying Joe Biden was too old to maneuver changing policy but WHAT EXCUSE DO THE OTHER DEMOCRATS HAVE?! How can they hope to win elections promoting higher taxes, open borders, homeless encampments and lawlessness?**_ The Big Beautiful Bill I voted for delivered the improved BORDER SECURITY that was the deciding factor in the national election that returned Donald Trump to the White House. It will reduce taxes for families with a larger child tax credit, cut taxes for small businesses and eliminate taxes on tips. In a hundred other ways, it will make it easier for our economy to grow without crushing taxes and regulations.Mainstream media says it’s cutting Medicaid and will make people starve.That’s just not true. It strengthens Medicaid with valid reforms: requiring able-bodied people to work and taking illegal immigrants off the rolls. And, even with these reforms there will be more money spent on Medicaid next year than this year. There are people in need but taxpayers shouldn’t have to pay for those folks that are sitting on the couch eating Cheetos, playing video games.The Democrats will never learn. There’s already a candidate filed to run against me with the same tired rhetoric and upside-down world view that we’ve seen time and again.But what they lack in smarts they try to make up for with activity. After shouting nonstop at my townhall, they shifted gears to bombard the letters to the editor pages with Washington, DC talking points.And it’s not going to end until Election Day 2026. [I need your help today. You can see the stark choice our nation faces: high taxes, open borders, and crime – or lower taxes, secure borders and respect for law enforcement.](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=7f8e52242c&e=5a45b9550e)[Please donate today](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=a93cc82388&e=5a45b9550e) if you agree with me that it’s no choice at all. We need to unite for a better America.I would have preferred a bill that did more to cut the deficit - but this was an important first step to reducing spending, and it is going to help Eastern Washington and all Americans. Plus, IT’S A THOUSAND TIMES BETTER THAN THE DEMOCRAT ALTERNATIVE.[Can I count on you to stand by me and donate today?](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=609d3e04bf&e=5a45b9550e)
---
|
---
| [DONATE](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=4f06607ae3&e=5a45b9550e)

When I was first sworn into office in the New Jersey General Assembly and State Senate, I made a promise to fight for the families of New Jersey--and I have been delivering on that promise ever since.

And now in Congress since 2023, I have continued to put the families of New Jersey at the forefront of my work in the nation's capital and made progress on the issues that matter most to our communities.

I have built a strong track record of delivering results and fighting to:

🇺🇸 **Secure our Borders** **🇺🇸 Lower the cost of living** **🇺🇸 Ensure the safety of our communities** **🇺🇸 Bring real solutions to New Jersey families

** But our work is not done--****_not by a long shot.

_****_This Congress, we have a unique opportunity to achieve historic wins for New Jersey. However, we are facing determined opposition from extreme radicals who are intent on pushing a dangerous agenda on us._****_

I am ready to fight for what 's right, but I can not do it alone. clean_body: Hi Derek, it’s Olivia, Chris Deluzio’s finance director. I wanted to take a moment to reach out before our fundraising deadline this Saturday. Chris is the ONLY Democrat defending a battleground district in Pennsylvania, one of the closest swing states in the country. So when we set our monthly fundraising goals, we need to make sure we meet them—because we need to have the resources to protect this seat. But I just ran the numbers and we’re coming up short on our goal. The good news? name: Mark Warner
subject: I’m sick and tired of the chaos, Derek.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Are you?

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108518520/548183024/-1393914824?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM1_250528_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTVkYjBiOS1lOTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmYdi5HGAUg0ukPne3yIHKRi11x5-r3zirIb9-CVKps=) I’m going to be honest with you, Derek.

I’m downright sick and tired of Trump’s reckless administration. I’m fed up with the chaos, the corruption, and a president who is only interested in enriching himself and his friends.

Look, Derek, I’m not saying this to yell into the void. Every day, I work with my Democratic – _and when they are willing to use their voices, my Republican_ – colleagues in the Senate to speak out against the chaos and the cruelty and demand answers from the Trump administration. Not to mention, we’ve introduced important legislation to stand up for our federal workers, put an end to Trump’s tariffs on our allies, protect our public lands, and so much more.

But, the reality is, the best way to contain Trump’s chaos, hold his administration accountable, and move our country forward is by taking back the Senate next year.

**And that starts with protecting every single seat Democrats hold, like mine.**

That’s why I’m reaching out to committed supporters like you, Derek. I’m expecting my next campaign to be my most expensive yet, and I need to be prepared for Donald Trump or one of his billionaire buddies to unleash a wave of dark money spending against me.

Hitting my critical May goal – and every single fundraising benchmark we set – is critical to our ability to fight back and win.

[_**So, if you can, will you chip in ahead of my campaign’s end-of-month fundraising deadline on Saturday? We need 1,000 donors to reach our goal for the month, and I’m hoping I can count on you to be one of them.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108518523/548183030/-1393914824?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM1_250528_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTVkYjBiOS1lOTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmYdi5HGAUg0ukPne3yIHKRi11x5-r3zirIb9-CVKps=) body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23093%2E4449941%2E0hUsij) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23093%2E4449941%2E0hUsij) [ **NEW FROM _THE GUARDIAN_ -- "Trump peppers Memorial Day speech with personal boasting and partisan attacks"**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61604?t=3&akid=23093%2E4449941%2E0hUsij)

[**We need to know, team, how would you grade Donald Trump as Commander-in-Chief?](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61604?t=4&akid=23093%2E4449941%2E0hUsij)** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61604?t=5&akid=23093%2E4449941%2E0hUsij)
| | [HORRIBLE >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61604?t=6&akid=23093%2E4449941%2E0hUsij)

---
| [AMAZING >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61604?t=10&akid=23093%2E4449941%2E0hUsij)
---
Look, you know Trump is unhinged, but look at what exactly he's done as Commander-in-Chief
1. Threatened to invade THREE different countries.

2. Threatened to annex Canada and make it the 51st state.

3. Slapped 25% tariffs on Canada and Mexico.

4. Worked to dismantle USAID's critical work across the world.

5. Attacked the State Department's work on human rights around the world.

6. Paused crucial military aid to Ukraine after Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy spoke up against Trump and Vance lies and bully tactics at the White House

_Trump 's careless antics are absolutely destroying America's reputation, which could have material and economic impacts that would be devastating for everyday Americans!_

We think that Donald Trump is the **WORST** Commander-in-Chief we've seen in modern history.

But, we have no clue what Democrats in your area think?!
[**Confirm: How would you grade Donald Trump as Commander-in-Chief?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61604?t=11&akid=23093%2E4449941%2E0hUsij)

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Why now matters:
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108518756/548183776/-1812448514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjg1NzAzNi1lYTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YOdRprhOos3QjhDwctnESBUgH2Eseqi2gpqVybBh22M=)
Peter, Today I'm reaching out to respectfully ask if you would make a $3 contribution to my campaign before midnight. Let me briefly explain why: The end of May means there’s just one month until we will have to submit our next quarterly fundraising report to the FEC. Lots of people – from the White House and NRCC to our self-funding opponent – will look closely through our report to see if we have what it takes to win in IL-17 once again. **We’re aiming to raise another $12,000 in online donations by the end of May to stay on pace. If we meet our goal, we’ll send a clear message about the strength behind our movement, and whether we’re on track to build the blue wave through the Midwest.** [**Please use this link to contribute to our re-election campaign before midnight tonight. name: Board President David Canepa
subject: May 2025 e-newsletter
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=c0babbc643&u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=31cc65be00)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
#### e-newsletter

## MAY '25
---
|
* County applauds emergency medical workers
* Mental Health Month highlights county’s commitment to wellness
* Progress Seminar shines light on county’s collaborative spirit
* Midway Village, the largest affordable housing project in San Mateo County’s history, completes Phase 1
* Ribbon cut at 500 County Center, hundreds celebrate 169th anniversary of San Mateo County

---
| | |
---
|
# “This is a transformative project that took a very old and outdated affordable housing complex with 150 units to what will be a modern complex that will have more than 500 units for individuals often on the brink of being homeless.”
# **\- President David Canepa**
---
| | | | **2025 May e-newsletter** **Ribbon cut at 500 County Center, hundreds celebrate 169 th anniversary of San Mateo County** Dear friends, Thank you to everyone who came out to celebrate the 169th birthday of San Mateo County and the ribbon cutting of 500 County Center, the greenest civic building in the United States. The evening started under the stained-glass rotunda at the Old County Courthouse in downtown Redwood City with a reenactment marking the county’s founding and was followed by a brief procession of hundreds of attendees to the new civic building accompanied by the Woodside High School Band. Barely a year old, 500 County Center is already the winner of numerous Best of the Best Sustainability awards, including from engineering News Record and the American Institute of Architects. It was a beautiful evening to celebrate the county’s storied past, the possibilities of the future and to toast the renaissance of San Mateo County. The event has hosted by the Board of Supervisors, County Executive’s Office and Historical Association to welcome the public to the new workplace for San Mateo County employees which is becoming a destination for large community gatherings with its immense lobby and vast courtyards that can accommodate hundreds of people. To me, 500 County Center represents the cultural, artistic, political and economic revival of what has become the healthiest and near wealthiest county in California. There are too many individuals to thank in this space but I want to take the time to recognize Vice President Noelia Corzo, Supervisor Lisa Gauthier, architect Javier Arizmendi, History Museum Director Mitch Postel, Chief of the Silicon Valley Office of Protocol Deanna Tryon and County Executive Mike Callagy your welcoming remarks and your warm reception to the nearly 700 attendees who joined the celebration. ** ** **Midway Village, the largest affordable housing project in San Mateo County’s history, completes Phase 1** Midway Village in Daly City’s Bayshore neighborhood marked the completion of 147 new affordable homes and broke ground on 113 more as part of the largest affordable housing redevelopment in San Mateo County’s history. The celebration at Midway Village included a ribbon-cutting for Midway Village I and the ceremonial launch of construction on 113 homes as part of Midway Village 2. This is a neighborhood near the Cow Palace that has really struggled for decades but is starting to show new signs of life as the first phase of Midway Village is complete. This is a transformative project that took a very old and outdated affordable housing complex with 150 units to what will be a modern complex that will have more than 500 units for individuals often on the brink of being homeless. Developed by the nonprofit MidPen Housing, the project also includes 27 units for local educators and 12 units for young adults transitioning out of foster care. One of the project’s first residents is a 22-year-old who aged out of the foster care system named Nathan Smith. Nathan (pictured above) said at the event that it was a surreal feeling to sign the lease and get the key to his new apartment. He is now enrolled in a pre-nursing program at the College of San Mateo. The project is part of a four-phase redevelopment effort that will transform 150 aging units into 555 modern apartments on the same site, owned by the San Mateo County Housing Authority. In addition to resident amenities similar to those in Midway Village I, this second phase will also feature a 15,000-square-foot child care center where Peninsula Family Service will serve 109 children, including children from low-income families in the broader community.

**Progress Seminar shines light on county’s collaborative spirit **

I was honored to share the stage with Nicole Taylor, President and CEO of the Silicon Valley Community Foundation, Julie Lind, Executive Officer of the San Mateo County Central Labor Council and Co-Chair Rosanne Foust on the opening keynote panel at the San Mateo County Progress Seminar 2025 in Santa Rosa May 3.

Together, we set the tone for an incredible weekend of collaboration.

Much of the discussion was centered around the uncertainty our county faces with the new White House Administration and how our cities, multiple agencies such as Caltrain, business community and nonprofits can work together to continue to serve the public with the safety net services we are mandated to provide.

For instance, the massive cuts to proposed for Medicaid could cut off access to health insurance to 43,000 San Mateo County residents that could have a dramatic ripple effect on the health and safety of the entire county. In total, the county is at risk of losing $672 million in federal funds, mostly in the Health System, Housing Department and the Human Services Agency depending on actions the federal government takes in the coming months. The highest risk categories include losing funding for programs including Medicaid, SNAP food assistance, Temporary Assistance for Needy Families and Emergency Housing Vouchers. There are also some executive orders proposed that would set this county back including to mandate proof of citizenship in voter registration and to roll back how we accept mail-in ballots. This county was the first in California to conduct an all-mail election and we have proved here that it increases voter turnout, costs less money and is transparent. 19 states have filed a lawsuit against Trump and San Mateo County is poised to file an amicus brief in support of California’s clear authority to run its own elections. The new White House Administration has prompted the County to tailor our advocacy efforts to align with current federal priorities and highlight aspects of our projects that will appeal to decision makers in Washington, D.C. while adhering to the County’s values and commitment to serve our clients and community members, especially our most vulnerable neighbors. Again, there are uncertainties out there and cuts coming, but our Board, Chief Financial Officer and Legislative team are all firmly locked in to anticipate what cuts may be most impactful and to pivot our spending if necessary to address any shortfalls. We are a county of resilience and I remain optimistic that if we continue to foster collaboration like we did at the Progress Seminar, we will be prepared for any uncertainties that come our way.

**Mental Health Month highlights county’s commitment to wellness** Every year in May, the county highlights our commitment to wellness during Mental Health Month. Each day in the United States, millions of people struggle — often silently — with mental health and substance use challenges. They may feel alone, misunderstood, or afraid to reach out for help. And too often, stigma delays treatment, leaving people isolated and at risk. This is something we cannot ignore. It’s not just about statistics — it’s about our neighbors, our friends and families. Here in San Mateo County, we’re facing this reality head-on. Between 2021 and 2023, more than 12% of our adult residents likely experienced serious psychological distress. And our youth — many of whom are still learning how to navigate life—are showing signs of deep emotional strain. These numbers remind us that we must do more — and we can do more. Our Behavioral Health and Recovery Services team, along with a committed network of partners, is providing essential treatment, prevention, and support to thousands of residents. But care doesn’t look the same for everyone, and it shouldn’t. That’s why we are investing in programs that are culturally responsive, rooted in equity and centered in compassion. We are especially proud of efforts like the Office of Diversity and Equity’s Health Equity Initiatives, and the Lived Experience Academy, which empowers people to share their stories of recovery, hope and healing. These community voices help break down stigma and open doors to understanding. This year’s theme — Mental Health as a Continuum — reminds us that wellness is not a destination, but a journey. And everyone deserves support along the way. It was an honor to present this year’s proclamation to Dr. Jei Africa, Director, Behavioral Health & Recovery Services, Sylvia Tang, Community Health Planner, Terrell Fortune, Case Management /Assessment Specialist, Renee Harris, Peer Support Specialist, Charo Martinez, Community Program Specialist, and Cynthia Castro, Health Ambassador who also gave a presentation on the services the county provides for those dealing with behavioral and mental health issues. **County applauds emergency medical workers** On Tuesday May 20, the San Mateo County Board of supervisors unanimously approved a proclamation I sponsored recognizing May 18 to 24 as Emergency Medical Services Week. This year’s theme, “EMS: WE CARE. FOR EVERYONE,” captures the heart of what these professionals do. Every single day, paramedics, EMTs, dispatchers, firefighters, nurses, doctors, and volunteers show up during some of the hardest moments people will ever face. They bring skill, compassion, and calm when it matters most. Their work is demanding in every way. Long hours, high stress, and intense responsibility. And yet they keep showing up, not because it’s easy, but because they care about the people they serve. This week, we say thank you. Thank you for the lives you save, the comfort you offer and the strength you bring to our community. I was proud to present the proclamation to American Medical Response professionals, numerous other first responders from various city fire departments and San Mateo County’s Director of Emergency Services Travis Kusman, who is a paramedic himself.

**Interns wanted to join our team ** We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=1131c8087e&e=c0babbc643 "https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9?fbclid=IwAR3YFH0mH828rtAUru5EFOO9GsMCasQYe1N7AUrmwAwBf30JTtXOSeCzKjs"). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org "mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org"). In friendship,
**DAVID J. CANEPA**
President, San Mateo County Board of Supervisors

Barely a year old, 500 County Center is already the winner of numerous Best of the Best Sustainability awards, including from engineering News Record and the American Institute of Architects. It was a beautiful evening to celebrate the county’s storied past, the possibilities of the future and to toast the renaissance of San Mateo County. The event has hosted by the Board of Supervisors, County Executive’s Office and Historical Association to welcome the public to the new workplace for San Mateo County employees which is becoming a destination for large community gatherings with its immense lobby and vast courtyards that can accommodate hundreds of people. To me, 500 County Center represents the cultural, artistic, political and economic revival of what has become the healthiest and near wealthiest county in California. There are too many individuals to thank in this space but I want to take the time to recognize Vice President Noelia Corzo, Supervisor Lisa Gauthier, architect Javier Arizmendi, History Museum Director Mitch Postel, Chief of the Silicon Valley Office of Protocol Deanna Tryon and County Executive Mike Callagy your welcoming remarks and your warm reception to the nearly 700 attendees who joined the celebration. Midway Village, the largest affordable housing project in San Mateo County’s history, completes Phase 1 Midway Village in Daly City’s Bayshore neighborhood marked the completion of 147 new affordable homes and broke ground on 113 more as part of the largest affordable housing redevelopment in San Mateo County’s history. The celebration at Midway Village included a ribbon-cutting for Midway Village I and the ceremonial launch of construction on 113 homes as part of Midway Village 2. This is a neighborhood near the Cow Palace that has really struggled for decades but is starting to show new signs of life as the first phase of Midway Village is complete. This is a transformative project that took a very old and outdated affordable housing complex with 150 units to what will be a modern complex that will have more than 500 units for individuals often on the brink of being homeless. Developed by the nonprofit MidPen Housing, the project also includes 27 units for local educators and 12 units for young adults transitioning out of foster care. One of the project’s first residents is a 22-year-old who aged out of the foster care system named Nathan Smith. Nathan (pictured above) said at the event that it was a surreal feeling to sign the lease and get the key to his new apartment. He is now enrolled in a pre-nursing program at the College of San Mateo. The project is part of a four-phase redevelopment effort that will transform 150 aging units into 555 modern apartments on the same site, owned by the San Mateo County Housing Authority. In addition to resident amenities similar to those in Midway Village I, this second phase will also feature a 15,000-square-foot child care center where Peninsula Family Service will serve 109 children, including children from low-income families in the broader community. Progress Seminar shines light on county’s collaborative spirit I was honored to share the stage with Nicole Taylor, President and CEO of the Silicon Valley Community Foundation, Julie Lind, Executive Officer of the San Mateo County Central Labor Council and Co-Chair Rosanne Foust on the opening keynote panel at the San Mateo County Progress Seminar 2025 in Santa Rosa May 3. Together, we set the tone for an incredible weekend of collaboration. Much of the discussion was centered around the uncertainty our county faces with the new White House Administration and how our cities, multiple agencies such as Caltrain, business community and nonprofits can work together to continue to serve the public with the safety net services we are mandated to provide. For instance, the massive cuts to proposed for Medicaid could cut off access to health insurance to 43,000 San Mateo County residents that could have a dramatic ripple effect on the health and safety of the entire county. In total, the county is at risk of losing $672 million in federal funds, mostly in the Health System, Housing Department and the Human Services Agency depending on actions the federal government takes in the coming months. The highest risk categories include losing funding for programs including Medicaid, SNAP food assistance, Temporary Assistance for Needy Families and Emergency Housing Vouchers. There are also some executive orders proposed that would set this county back including to mandate proof of citizenship in voter registration and to roll back how we accept mail-in ballots. This county was the first in California to conduct an all-mail election and we have proved here that it increases voter turnout, costs less money and is transparent. 19 states have filed a lawsuit against Trump and San Mateo County is poised to file an amicus brief in support of California’s clear authority to run its own elections. The new White House Administration has prompted the County to tailor our advocacy efforts to align with current federal priorities and highlight aspects of our projects that will appeal to decision makers in Washington, D.C. while adhering to the County’s values and commitment to serve our clients and community members, especially our most vulnerable neighbors. Again, there are uncertainties out there and cuts coming, but our Board, Chief Financial Officer and Legislative team are all firmly locked in to anticipate what cuts may be most impactful and to pivot our spending if necessary to address any shortfalls. We are a county of resilience and I remain optimistic that if we continue to foster collaboration like we did at the Progress Seminar, we will be prepared for any uncertainties that come our way. Mental Health Month highlights county’s commitment to wellness Every year in May, the county highlights our commitment to wellness during Mental Health Month. Each day in the United States, millions of people struggle — often silently — with mental health and substance use challenges. They may feel alone, misunderstood, or afraid to reach out for help. And too often, stigma delays treatment, leaving people isolated and at risk. This is something we cannot ignore. It’s not just about statistics — it’s about our neighbors, our friends and families. Here in San Mateo County, we’re facing this reality head-on. Between 2021 and 2023, more than 12% of our adult residents likely experienced serious psychological distress. And our youth — many of whom are still learning how to navigate life—are showing signs of deep emotional strain. These numbers remind us that we must do more — and we can do more. Our Behavioral Health and Recovery Services team, along with a committed network of partners, is providing essential treatment, prevention, and support to thousands of residents. But care doesn’t look the same for everyone, and it shouldn’t. That’s why we are investing in programs that are culturally responsive, rooted in equity and centered in compassion. We are especially proud of efforts like the Office of Diversity and Equity’s Health Equity Initiatives, and the Lived Experience Academy, which empowers people to share their stories of recovery, hope and healing. These community voices help break down stigma and open doors to understanding. This year’s theme — Mental Health as a Continuum — reminds us that wellness is not a destination, but a journey. And everyone deserves support along the way. It was an honor to present this year’s proclamation to Dr. Jei Africa, Director, Behavioral Health & Recovery Services, Sylvia Tang, Community Health Planner, Terrell Fortune, Case Management /Assessment Specialist, Renee Harris, Peer Support Specialist, Charo Martinez, Community Program Specialist, and Cynthia Castro, Health Ambassador who also gave a presentation on the services the county provides for those dealing with behavioral and mental health issues. County applauds emergency medical workers On Tuesday May 20, the San Mateo County Board of supervisors unanimously approved a proclamation I sponsored recognizing May 18 to 24 as Emergency Medical Services Week. This year’s theme, “EMS: WE CARE. FOR EVERYONE,” captures the heart of what these professionals do. Every single day, paramedics, EMTs, dispatchers, firefighters, nurses, doctors, and volunteers show up during some of the hardest moments people will ever face. They bring skill, compassion, and calm when it matters most. Their work is demanding in every way. Long hours, high stress, and intense responsibility. And yet they keep showing up, not because it’s easy, but because they care about the people they serve. This week, we say thank you. Thank you for the lives you save, the comfort you offer and the strength you bring to our community. I was proud to present the proclamation to American Medical Response professionals, numerous other first responders from various city fire departments and San Mateo County’s Director of Emergency Services Travis Kusman, who is a paramedic himself. Interns wanted to join our team We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: "". You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org "mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org". In friendship, DAVID J. CANEPA President, San Mateo County Board of Supervisors | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved.

subject: URGENT: Georgia could be the next to fall >>>
body:
BREAKING OUT OF GEORGIA:
Gov. Brian Kemp is making quiet moves to hand the GOP a Senate seat on a silver platter.
According to new reports, he’s planning a secret visit to the White House to coordinate with Trump’s inner circle — and their goal is clear:
Flip Georgia red.
This isn’t just about one race. It’s about control of the Senate, and whether Trump and his allies can bulldoze their way back to unchecked power.
Georgia has been one of the only things standing between Trump and total dominance. It’s a crucial swing state — and Republicans know that if they flip it, their path to a permanent Senate majority becomes a whole lot easier.
We set a goal to raise $60,000 by the end of this month to power organizing in Georgia and defend other vulnerable Senate seats. But we’re still $13,638 behind, and the deadline is in just TWO DAYS. name: Seth Koslow
subject: Spring Gala is Next Week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koslow for Nassau
body:
| | Dear Friends,

**Seth Koslow’s Spring Gala is on MONDAY!**

On **Monday, June 2nd** , we’re gathering at **City Cellar in Westbury from 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM** to rally our supporters, lay out the path to victory, and build the momentum we need to win this race for Nassau County Executive. I’d be honored to have you join us.

➡️ **[Click here to RSVP and lock in your spot!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108520049/548188102/1756358193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTgzMmViZTktZWMzYi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2VxKZhu57UCTrFuti0PO86IpQEUMPbyybJ1DKzBsYIw=&emci=b6a32c36-df3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e832ebe9-ec3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17551891)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108520051/548188104/1756358193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTgzMmViZTktZWMzYi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2VxKZhu57UCTrFuti0PO86IpQEUMPbyybJ1DKzBsYIw=&emci=b6a32c36-df3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e832ebe9-ec3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17551891)
**Chairman Jay Jacobs** , **Congressman Tom Suozzi** , and **Former County Executive Laura Curran** are already behind this campaign. Now, with less than one week to go, it’s time to bring everyone together.

**[Your presence matters, and together, we can make this moment truly unforgettable. name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: DOGE Just Crossed a Dangerous Line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
After DOGE has gone after executive agency after executive agency, they are now attempting to access the Office of Congressional Workplace Rights and the Library of Congress.
Let me be clear: These institutions are extensions of Congress and independent of the executive branch. This isn’t about political parties or this President: Congress must reassert its Constitutional authority and hold the President accountable for overstepping the limits of executive power.
Representing the Third Congressional District, my job is to protect our institutions and the separate, but equal branches of power. Will you lend a hand? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-05-28]

name: Pineapple Total on Behalf of Your America News
subject: Korean Breakthrough Reduced Wrinkles By 48%
body:
That’s right - by almost HALF!

| Hey Friend, A new breakthrough from Korea can reduce crow’s feet, sagging, and crepey skin by 48%. That’s right - by almost HALF! In a groundbreaking study using high-definition 3D skin scans... Women saw their wrinkles literally disappear before their eyes. No expensive creams or painful injections. The reason it works so well is because it activates the key cells in your skin that produce ALL your collagen, elastin and hyaluronic acid. It turns out, while creams can give short-term, surface level results... They never truly fix the root cause of wrinkles, sagging, or crepey skin. No wonder 8 out of 10 women say they are left wanting more from their creams. Ivy League dermatologist, Dr. Mara Weinstein explains how this new Korean breakthrough works: **[Try this Korean “younger skin” method at home in just 30 seconds](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlctuhht7ie6crul663i7nr9el24i52i2ce5iseg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s5hm9or2cth2bs)** If you want skin that looks 10 to 15 years younger, try this today. Tracey Colone from Rainbow City, Alabama said: “Wow, I cannot believe what a difference this has made in reducing the visibility of my wrinkles and firming up the skin on my neck, too... the woman at the grocery store told me I look amazing. That really made my day!”
---
