name: Voter Action Project Petitions
subject: Add your name and fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We were promised a government for and by the people. But that's not what we're getting. This administration has made one thing clear: they don’t serve us. They serve themselves — and the billionaires who helped put them in power.
That's why we must build a better future together! Join us and add your name to show that we will not be governed by greed, chaos, or a handful of unelected billionaires >> [https://peoplespromise.us/add-your-name-2/?source=043025swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://peoplespromise.us/add-your-name-2/?source=043025swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=CJVM9xxpkuGVsYRehzLxe4dignCW6QH3z7tNGyGjG1rAMpIIEgzfiF2rXUL0XyLzBTFvaEobjhgjLEndLLNWLWL2Za9pOqMFasFXcRzTFBc=]
Folks,
President Trump and his allies have spent the past 100 days attacking our rights, undermining our democracy, and enriching the ultra-wealthy, while driving up the cost of living for working-class Americans. It’s a deliberate strategy to distract and divide us while they seize power and wealth.
We see through their games. It’s time to join together and demand something different — not just by resisting their agenda, but by offering our own that guarantees justice, equality, and opportunity for ALL.
That’s why we’re calling on every elected official—from Congress to city hall—to deliver on what we’re calling The People’s Promise .
Learn more and sign on to The People's Promise today >> [https://peoplespromise.us/add-your-name-2/?source=043025swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://peoplespromise.us/add-your-name-2/?source=043025swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
Here are the key points:
* An Economy That Works for Everyone: All workers earn a livable wage and have the right to unionize. Americans can afford essentials like quality healthcare, housing, and childcare.
* A Government for the People: The wealthiest among us pay their fair share in taxes. Every child can count on the quality education they deserve, and every person has access to a strong safety net they can count on when they need it.
* Equal Rights & Opportunity for All: Nobody’s freedom can be taken without due process. Our votes are protected and counted. And our neighborhoods are free from hate and discrimination.
These aren’t radical demands—they’re the bare minimum. It’s time for our elected leaders to deliver.
Add your name right now and demand a return of government for the people and by the people immediately >> [https://peoplespromise.us/add-your-name-2/?source=043025swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://peoplespromise.us/add-your-name-2/?source=043025swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=CJVM9xxpkuGVsYRehzLxe4dignCW6QH3z7tNGyGjG1rAMpIIEgzfiF2rXUL0XyLzBTFvaEobjhgjLEndLLNWLWL2Za9pOqMFasFXcRzTFBc= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=CJVM9xxpkuGVsYRehzLxe4dignCW6QH3z7tNGyGjG1rAMpIIEgzfiF2rXUL0XyLzBTFvaEobjhgjLEndLLNWLWL2Za9pOqMFasFXcRzTFBc=]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=CJVM9xxpkuGVsYRehzLxe4dignCW6QH3z7tNGyGjG1rAMpIIEgzfiF2rXUL0XyLzBTFvaEobjhgjLEndLLNWLWL2Za9pOqMFasFXcRzTFBc=]

name: The Flyover
subject: Zillow’s co-founder has a big new idea
body:
**But unlike Zillow, he’s opening this company up for investment while it’s still private.**

| | |
---
| | |
# Wednesday, MAY 28, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** Today, we're sharing another investment opportunity from our sponsor, [Pacaso](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0L2u2zAMBeCnkbcE-rFsefDQIsh2u3YUGIm2WciSIMkJ2qcvfAMU6H5X8gN5cH5-2A-gQHH9ATvObUnWoycHDb2N-KoBW8Ni_1AI6VVdWtIRPZYNKjxojWgll_rC9UUam8FBTfcjhBt6Kzo_L4gSVYezGHvTaz1q3m3z8Hg4rcQy9KPGEXwPIHt0vRBGSs9dR_N5lWtphOETn67jAw03woCbltG5gfUcPbVUrr8SxbbhEn6nJ5arS3sX5q21XJn6xuSdyTvFJ9Z2fac7xTlW96PttqajOGTqhjtQYHKAPTP1_Vzt6OnYmbplIH_JUFrEUjfK_ykHewZa46f7R4ThFzUZ-65F8FEbpbjhU1dmn18UAtVhZD1fz7efodsXd_-c5d8AAAD__zM9n_M), that I think you'll find interesting. What makes this interesting? It's from Spencer Rascoff, who co-founded Zillow and scaled it to $16B. He's openly said he wished everyday investors could have gotten in before Zillow's IPO, when the real wealth was created. Now he's doing exactly that with his new company, Pacaso—opening up pre-IPO investment to retail investors like us. I thought you'd want to know about it [before their deadline tomorrow night](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0L2u2zAMBeCnkbcE-rFsefDQIsh2u3YUGIm2WciSIMkJ2qcvfAMU6H5X8gN5cH5-2A-gQHH9ATvObUnWoycHDb2N-KoBW8Ni_1AI6VVdWtIRPZYNKjxojWgll_rC9UUam8FBTfcjhBt6Kzo_L4gSVYezGHvTaz1q3m3z8Hg4rcQy9KPGEXwPIHt0vRBGSs9dR_N5lWtphOETn67jAw03woCbltG5gfUcPbVUrr8SxbbhEn6nJ5arS3sX5q21XJn6xuSdyTvFJ9Z2fac7xTlW96PttqajOGTqhjtQYHKAPTP1_Vzt6OnYmbplIH_JUFrEUjfK_ykHewZa46f7R4ThFzUZ-65F8FEbpbjhU1dmn18UAtVhZD1fz7efodsXd_-c5d8AAAD__zM9n_M). — Cole, _CEO_
* * *

But everyday investors couldn’t invest until after the IPO, missing the early gains. "I wish we had done a round accessible to retail investors prior to Zillow's IPO," Spencer later said. **Now he’s doing just that. Spencer has teamed up with fellow Zillow exec Austin Allison to launch[Pacaso](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskM2u2yAQhZ_G3iXiJxi8YFEpyu522yWawGBPhcECnKh9-sr3Vn2Cbs85mvn0_fhwH0CJ8vIdNrQ9FhcwkIeOwWV8t4S9Y3W_KaXybr7EcuSAdYUGT1oyOsGEujB1Ecbt4KGVx5HSHYPjY7ARUaAc0XJ9MzeltGLjamNUoH1UAoTiT8MFTJFr85x0mPw8zSPZ8ypTwnDDZjZf9RMNM9yAn6P2fhpuDAP1Uq8_C-W-Yky_ygvr1ZdtTHbtfW-D_DaIxyAelF_Y-vWL7lycsXwcfXOtHNXjIO-4AaVBTGe4YaBjG-R9BwqXHWrPWNtK-9_ew7YDLflz8a_khl3kbNyXCs60MlIyw-ax2rC_KSVqkx5ubDlffYL2_-z7ZcWfAAAA__8KgZwz). name: Jena
subject: keeping it quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Friends –
We’ve had such a strong start to this campaign, and I couldn’t be more grateful for your support or excited for the future of this race.
As Attorney General, I’ll fight Trump’s extreme agenda, just like I’ve been doing since he tried to overturn the results of the 2020 election. My commitment to democracy and our values has not, and will never, waver.
We are approaching the last month of the campaign’s first quarter, and I need your support now more than ever. We have a new opponent in this race, and we can’t afford to slow down.
So, can you help us keep up the momentum to end May in the strongest way possible by donating today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg-eom?refcode=250528-email]
Thank you,
Jena

The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.If you think that sounds too dramatic, just look at a few examples of what Alvin Bragg’s “weak-on-crime,” Trump-obsessed tenure has brought to the law-abiding citizens of New York:
---
* An innocent woman set on fire by a Guatemalan Illegal Alien who had already been deported at least once before...
* A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a “Migrant Shelter,” all **released without bail by Alvin Bragg!**

---
Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP.That’s what he ran on...Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors...And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air.New Yorkers deserve better...Americans deserve better.That’s why -- whether you live right here in Manhattan, a thousand miles away in Des Moines, Iowa, or anywhere else in our great country -- I hope you’ll help me defeat Alvin Bragg. **[Would you consider helping my campaign with a one-time $28 contribution today?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=165f68d0b50f41e2933d6b394652072e&_e=4N6Dh6-C0QDOyc3nZYf3PNuSM8JO_WjzEyuVes1rFxXWOCPdnlLuJtVX_2bGO2BHN7uzq79wj_AkTMmtLQ65AaNO9OEJCoFs3XK0zhVjvG2dsIH_EoGFrWKP9T2HB6lymaFYzCeW0oasHWl-CVT00w4XoBogFyKvvbnWL7ik1Yux7EI8QldInebkLMEtI8mFXtUbnQtCTtb480CGr9pTFE6XtaGVKpCkTi5i-7GxsBHqQtJhX6qP0e_QLi_VcLCKYK4xj9HNR1t-fx4NuNwZ-uqBt0EEi9IwoCnDtZHCgfj51eJIJduluqgLO3Yrz8alejKolXWS0WtWCASsuXdyoocv3eilc-L2kWSVznU2jDCwf_L2Gh3qFxM2AzEZOHd7nPMFPwQWpvUh181A05dvXg%3D%3D)** I could really use your help.Alvin Bragg has millions of dollars pouring into his campaign by the same Radicals who put him there the first time around...
---
* George Soros
* Hollywood Celebrities
* Elites right here in New York and Hollywood
* The deep pockets of the Democrat election machine

---
I don’t have any of that on my side -- but I hope I’ve got YOU on my side.To have any chance of beating the Democrat machine funding Alvin Bragg’s run for re-election, I need a nationwide army of Americans to rally by my side...A nationwide army of Americans who understand how toxic it is having a Radical like Alvin Bragg in charge of the criminal justice system of one of our largest cities...Who know how close Alvin Bragg came to knocking Donald Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election and what that would have done to our country... Who watched in disgust as Alvin Bragg conjured up a 34-count felony conviction against a man whose only real crime was trying to Make America Great Again!This is our chance to send a clear message not only to the people of New York -- but the nation -- that these Radicals put into place by George Soros to do his bidding are not invincible...That they CAN be defeated! Alvin Bragg is the perfect example of why I left the Democrat party.I think it all started when my 11-year-old got COVID... We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me.What were we doing?When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live?When I dared to suggest that it may not be the best idea for biological boys to participate in girls’ sports, I was all but run out of town on a rail... Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a “Right Wing Extremist” by the New York Times!The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat.The truth will set you free -- and it’s an honor to represent you on the “Freedom Side” of the wall.I’ve been in their camp.As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. And how bad it is for our children. **[That’s why I’m asking good folks like you to help me.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=165f68d0b50f41e2933d6b394652072e&_e=4N6Dh6-C0QDOyc3nZYf3PNuSM8JO_WjzEyuVes1rFxXWOCPdnlLuJtVX_2bGO2BHN7uzq79wj_AkTMmtLQ65AaNO9OEJCoFs3XK0zhVjvG2dsIH_EoGFrWKP9T2HB6lymaFYzCeW0oasHWl-CVT00w4XoBogFyKvvbnWL7ik1Yux7EI8QldInebkLMEtI8mFXtUbnQtCTtb480CGr9pTFE6XtaGVKpCkTi5i-7GxsBHqQtJhX6qP0e_QLi_VcLCK5FxJDorb4GMeH9nKVzJCaRrdb085Z6z48f8s5YqDZVWselpcv1eXlLbDCEJGuTHDvx_U6r9JC112Z8BO4VqD9M-JRJe1t6oLlixNx1p7bR_pJjpICeWyHr7qP3FD-CAfc9Out8S4DEV4Ex0VFJXvIg%3D%3D)** It’s going to take all of us to take down Alvin Bragg -- but this has been a season of political miracles!I humbly ask for your help today. I hope you’ll find it in your heart to send a one-time $28 contribution to help me pull off one more political miracle......and send Alvin Bragg back to obscurity where he belongs.He’s bad for New York...He’s bad for America...And he needs to go.One last favor...I know not everybody is going to be able to give that I write to today. **[So if you think you could spare a larger gift -- of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more, a few of those would really help right now.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=165f68d0b50f41e2933d6b394652072e&_e=4N6Dh6-C0QDOyc3nZYf3PNuSM8JO_WjzEyuVes1rFxXWOCPdnlLuJtVX_2bGO2BHN7uzq79wj_AkTMmtLQ65AaNO9OEJCoFs3XK0zhVjvG2dsIH_EoGFrWKP9T2HB6lymaFYzCeW0oasHWl-CVT00w4XoBogFyKvvbnWL7ik1Yux7EI8QldInebkLMEtI8mFXtUbnQtCTtb480CGr9pTFE6XtaGVKpCkTi5i-7GxsBHqQtJhX6qP0e_QLi_VcLCKfVz4dDD7LxMlx-5-YqjZWHyX2GKirvds0-Tby8akptGd4gtxv0roYDF1Oh6cDPvXVgY4V1lqGjfUqSWSTCc-dcow6AhauHVoX_OMrF5KiypZeBzj-gYcm5HT3q8UwG-2Ajrz3Oh-3RA5E6OC3WnMMQ%3D%3D)** We need a good, strong launch -- and without a few of those larger gifts, we’ll already be behind.Please just send what you can, My Friend.Just reading my email today is a tremendous favor, and I really appreciate it.Thank you, Wish Me Luck, and God Bless You!
---
---
**Maud Maron**

P.S. I guess Alvin Bragg has just been too darn busy to concentrate on the wave of crime and violence washing over New York...While he has spent the last 4 years prosecuting and persecuting President Trump, New York has become a third-world hellscape!New York deserves better...Our Country deserves better...

Will you help me take the place of Alvin Bragg by supporting my campaign to become the District Attorney of Manhattan?**[If so, please rush a one-time gift of $28, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more -- I could really use your help!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=165f68d0b50f41e2933d6b394652072e&_e=4N6Dh6-C0QDOyc3nZYf3PNuSM8JO_WjzEyuVes1rFxXWOCPdnlLuJtVX_2bGO2BHN7uzq79wj_AkTMmtLQ65AaNO9OEJCoFs3XK0zhVjvG2dsIH_EoGFrWKP9T2HB6lymaFYzCeW0oasHWl-CVT00w4XoBogFyKvvbnWL7ik1Yux7EI8QldInebkLMEtI8mFXtUbnQtCTtb480CGr9pTFE6XtaGVKpCkTi5i-7GxsBHqQtJhX6qP0e_QLi_VcLCKsMKMYFjT6MVkvijl7_TI8rtpWA9bUhXN0ZxhyD_wFjdksqE85GdzgqjBGeWSBLm_90Pj0eotL63d3L87lc6LtBS01X7mAgSHePuwhwv7U4JAr8nYZBaYcWpNPn48EM-h39RiSfk5VQRLP_aqwz62vg%3D%3D)**
---

body:
Chrissy voted against this dangerous bill. Now, we need to know where YOU stand.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108523647/548199673/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTU2MDQ3OS1mMjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0U9uBQ0z-v2aGzMltdOMKXLdyslKfaET6VafD0XqJOY=&emci=2f31dff5-7e37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ba560479-f23b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=21278485)

_President Trump and Congressional Republicans, who enable his reckless and dangerous agenda, are working to pass the SAVE Act – an extremely dangerous bill that**WILL** make it more difficult for all Americans, especially women and troops stationed overseas, to vote._

The Trump administration and Congressional Republicans are calling this voting reform, but **this is actually voter suppression**. We already have laws and systems to protect our elections - they just need to be followed.
If passed, this bill will impact millions across the U.S. and thousands in Berks and Chester counties alone. **That's why Chrissy voted AGAINST it.**

**With the GOP continuing to attack voting access, we’ve launched an urgent live poll to see where this team stands. But in order to reach statistical significance, we need 100 respondents to our poll by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT – including you! Tell us:**

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: This wasn’t supposed to work.
body:
You didn't just believe in us.

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HPWLSQEDMkrMpPQkmYdd0w~~/AARclBA~/FkV__MmfocdnDSBanSSXaabFiNopQQQi4sxnB5xf6_-QZQVIp4uUT1C16drHhZU_xjbjhomUFFiG-3Zz01Is5qpjpLLrP0cecbv_YBaMjCUORTY7Ufruh2OFQziLAmBjkDhM5qFL5IKjv56beh9kN2XcdcfF6YNxdaTVqWeFusqU4dNjGr3Bv5Rg9InvoGdD7LkBd-a50FJrTBAwL36FdA~~)
---
Friend, We recently wrapped up one of Turning Point USA's latest stops on the American Comeback Tour at UC San Diego... I wish you could have been there to see it. Another packed quad. Students eager to listen. Flags waving. Cheers for America. Energy you could feel in your bones. _Not in Texas... Not in Florida..._ **_California._** The "Deep Blue" stronghold the Left said we'd never touch. But we did. And we'll keep going. **Because of patriots like you.**
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HPWLSQEDMkrMpPQkmYdd0w~~/AARclBA~/FkV__MmfocdnDSBanSSXaabFiNopQQQi4sxnB5xf6_-QZQVIp4uUT1C16drHhZU_xjbjhomUFFiG-3Zz01Is5qpjpLLrP0cecbv_YBaMjCUORTY7Ufruh2OFQziLAmBjkDhM5qFL5IKjv56beh9kN2XcdcfF6YNxdaTVqWeFusqU4dNjGr3Bv5Rg9InvoGdD7LkBd-a50FJrTBAwL36FdA~~)
---
As I stood there looking out at the crowd -- hundreds of young patriots rising up in a place the Left said they owned -- I couldn't help but think... **Nearly 13 years ago, all of this felt...****_impossible._** Back then, Turning Point USA wasn't the cultural phenomenon it is today. It wasn't an office. It wasn't a team. _It was just me._ No money. No connections. Just a desk and an old computer in a dusty garage in the Chicago suburbs. _But what I did have was a vision..._ It was 2012. The Left controlled every classroom, every campus, and nearly every corner of our culture. Their narrative was everywhere: America was evil... Faith was "oppressive"... Freedom was outdated... The Conservative movement was dead... _And most of all, young people belonged to the Left._ **I didn 't believe that. I couldn't accept that. I couldn't just stand by and watch the Left win.** Back then, it was no wonder WHY we were losing young people to the Left... The Conservative movement felt stale... Conservative organizations felt like a snooze... And it felt like no one had an idea of how to reach America's youth... I believed if we were ever going to win young people back for America, we needed excitement. Energy. Passion. And ZEAL for our ideas. **My dream was to launch a conservative youth movement that would inspire young people to stand for truth -- and LOVE this country again.** I didn't know what I was going to call this dream... this feeling... this movement. So, I picked up the phone, called my dad, and said, "I think I'm supposed to start something, but I don't have a name for it..." **He replied...****_"How about Turning Point?"_** And just like that, a fire was lit. Turning Point USA was born. On the promise that we could TURN this country around, one young heart at a time. The early days were brutal. I remember driving across the Chicago suburbs to small Tea Party meetings talking about "generational theft"... I remember my first Turning Point USA speaking event in Peoria, Illinois during the summer of 2012, where just six people showed up... **And I remember the look in their eyes -- those early patriots --****when I told them the vision:** _" We're going to create a youth movement that LOVES America."_ _" We're going to go on campus and win hearts and minds."_ _" We're going to push back -- and we're going to WIN."_ They didn't laugh... They didn't walk out... **They believed. And Friend -- so did patriots like you.**
---
You see, this isn't my story. This is YOUR story. Because without patriots like you... _there is no Turning Point USA._ Without you... _there is no American Comeback story._ Without you... _there is no cultural shift happening right now in schools, churches, homes, and on every campus across our great nation._ You were there when the campus quads and halls were empty... stood by us when our signs got torn down. You had our backs when the mob showed up -- when they shouted, screamed, and tried to wipe us off the map. **You didn 't give up. And neither did we.** But we were never supposed to be winning... The Left thought they owned this generation. They thought their indoctrination had worked. _But they were wrong._ I remember standing at tables on hostile campuses with nothing but flyers and hope, praying to have a conversation that would light a spark. I went where I was told a young conservative didn't belong. And I kept going back.
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HPWLSQEDMkrMpPQkmYdd0w~~/AARclBA~/FkV__MmfocdnDSBanSSXaabFiNopQQQi4sxnB5xf6_-QZQVIp4uUT1C16drHhZU_xjbjhomUFFiG-3Zz01Is5qpjpLLrP0cecbv_YBaMjCUORTY7Ufruh2OFQziLAmBjkDhM5qFL5IKjv56beh9kN2XcdcfF6YNxdaTVqWeFusqU4dNjGr3Bv5Rg9InvoGdD7LkBd-a50FJrTBAwL36FdA~~)
---
**And then... something happened...** **_The students started listening._** They started to question everything, think for themselves, and no longer be afraid to stand up. Then, they started showing up. _In DROVES._ And now? We're not just watching history unfold... you and I are making it. **Friend, just LOOK at the movement we 've built:** 🔥 A network of 820,000+ conservative student activists
🔥 1,800+ college and high school chapters
🔥 All 50 states. No territory unclaimed. 🔥 16 BILLION+ total views across online platforms 🔥 5 MILLION+ daily viewers online
🔥 Over 10 million young people turned away from the Left
🔥 Students rising up -- even in DEEP blue states Friend, we're not just winning arguments and "owning the libs" anymore... We're winning hearts. We're changing minds. We're turning the tide. This generation wasn't "lost." _They were LIED to._ **But because of patriots like YOU -- they're hearing the truth. They're finding their voices. They're discovering their courage. They're falling in love with this country again!**
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HPWLSQEDMkrMpPQkmYdd0w~~/AARclBA~/FkV__MmfocdnDSBanSSXaabFiNopQQQi4sxnB5xf6_-QZQVIp4uUT1C16drHhZU_xjbjhomUFFiG-3Zz01Is5qpjpLLrP0cecbv_YBaMjCUORTY7Ufruh2OFQziLAmBjkDhM5qFL5IKjv56beh9kN2XcdcfF6YNxdaTVqWeFusqU4dNjGr3Bv5Rg9InvoGdD7LkBd-a50FJrTBAwL36FdA~~)
---
_Friend, praise God!_ And you know what? This generation is just getting started. **But let me say this clearly: The battle is far from over.** The Left is on the ropes -- but still dangerous. They're doubling down with new tactics. They're more aggressive than ever in our schools, our media, our digital spaces. They're coming after our students harder than ever before -- because they know we're winning. _We cannot give them back an inch._ So now, as we look back on how far we've come... It's time to fight even harder. We're going to press in. We're going to drive deeper into enemy territory. **We 're going to reach more students, train more leaders, and destroy more strongholds of Leftist control.** Not with violence. Not with hate. But with truth. With courage. And with patriots like YOU standing shoulder-to-shoulder with us.
---
Friend, I want you to feel proud as you read this today. Because this movement -- the energy, the fire, the growth, the headlines -- it belongs to patriots like you... The grassroots patriots who lit the match... fanned the flames... stood in the gap. **And now, we 're raising up the most Conservative, most Patriotic, most fired-up youth generation in 50 years.** That's not hype. That's reality. And it's only possible because of our proud supporters, people like you, who never gave up. **I can 't say thank you enough to the patriots who've fought alongside us... those who loved this country enough to invest in its future... those who believed this country was worth saving.** Let's keep our foot on the gas. Let's keep changing minds. Let's keep winning this culture war. Because we were never supposed to be winning... And yet here we are. For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HPWLSQEDMkrMpPQkmYdd0w~~/AARclBA~/FkV__MmfocdnDSBanSSXaabFiNopQQQi4sxnB5xf6_-QZQVIp4uUT1C16drHhZU_xjbjhomUFFiG-3Zz01Is5qpjpLLrP0cecbv_YBaMjCUORTY7Ufruh2OFQziLAmBjkDhM5qFL5IKjv56beh9kN2XcdcfF6YNxdaTVqWeFusqU4dNjGr3Bv5Rg9InvoGdD7LkBd-a50FJrTBAwL36FdA~~)
---
**P.S.** Friend, thank you for reading what was admittedly a long email. But I wanted you to know how far we've come and how thankful I am for patriots like you! And if this email stirred something in you... If you'd be proud to be a part of the movement that's going to save our GREAT nation... If you want to see even MORE students come alive for truth, for God, and for America... Then I have good news. **Right now, through the month of May, every single donation to Turning Point USA is being MATCHED, dollar-for-dollar, up to $2.5 MILLION.** Why? Because an extremely generous Turning Point USA supporter wanted to rally as many grassroots patriots as possible to DEFEAT the Left in our culture... for good. That means your impact gets DOUBLED. **That means two times the students you 'll reach. Two times the truth heard. Two times the hearts and minds you'll win over for AMERICA.** So, if you've been waiting for the right moment to take your stand -- this is it. This is your chance to pour fuel on the fire that patriots like you helped start. You just won't be supporting a cause anymore -- you'll be powering a cultural REVOLUTION. _**[Let's carry the momentum through to every campus, every platform, every cultural stronghold until we WIN. Double the impact of your gift to Turning Point USA today.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HPWLSQEDMkrMpPQkmYdd0w~~/AARclBA~/FkV__MmfocdnDSBanSSXaabFiNopQQQi4sxnB5xf6_-QZQVIp4uUT1C16drHhZU_xjbjhomUFFiG-3Zz01Is5qpjpLLrP0cecbv_YBaMjCUORTY7Ufruh2OFQziLAmBjkDhM5qFL5IKjv56beh9kN2XcdcfF6YNxdaTVqWeFusqU4dNjGr3Bv5Rg9InvoGdD7LkBd-a50FJrTBAwL36FdA~~)**_
---
[ **Join Turning Point USA &**
**DOUBLE Your Impact**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HPWLSQEDMkrMpPQkmYdd0w~~/AARclBA~/FkV__MmfocdnDSBanSSXaabFiNopQQQi4sxnB5xf6_-QZQVIp4uUT1C16drHhZU_xjbjhomUFFiG-3Zz01Is5qpjpLLrP0cecbv_YBaMjCUORTY7Ufruh2OFQziLAmBjkDhM5qFL5IKjv56beh9kN2XcdcfF6YNxdaTVqWeFusqU4dNjGr3Bv5Rg9InvoGdD7LkBd-a50FJrTBAwL36FdA~~)

clean_body: You didn't just believe in us. | | | ~~ Friend, We recently wrapped up one of Turning Point USA's latest stops on the American Comeback Tour at UC San Diego... I wish you could have been there to see it. Another packed quad. Students eager to listen. Flags waving. Cheers for America. Energy you could feel in your bones. Not in Texas... Not in Florida... California. The "Deep Blue" stronghold the Left said we'd never touch. But we did. And we'll keep going. Because of patriots like you. ~~ As I stood there looking out at the crowd -- hundreds of young patriots rising up in a place the Left said they owned -- I couldn't help but think... Nearly 13 years ago, all of this felt...impossible. Back then, Turning Point USA wasn't the cultural phenomenon it is today. It wasn't an office. It wasn't a team. It was just me. No money. No connections. Just a desk and an old computer in a dusty garage in the Chicago suburbs. But what I did have was a vision... It was 2012. The Left controlled every classroom, every campus, and nearly every corner of our culture. Their narrative was everywhere: America was evil... Faith was "oppressive"... Freedom was outdated... The Conservative movement was dead... And most of all, young people belonged to the Left. I didn 't believe that. I couldn't accept that. I couldn't just stand by and watch the Left win. Back then, it was no wonder WHY we were losing young people to the Left... The Conservative movement felt stale... Conservative organizations felt like a snooze... And it felt like no one had an idea of how to reach America's youth... I believed if we were ever going to win young people back for America, we needed excitement. Energy. Passion. And ZEAL for our ideas. My dream was to launch a conservative youth movement that would inspire young people to stand for truth -- and LOVE this country again. I didn't know what I was going to call this dream... this feeling... this movement. So, I picked up the phone, called my dad, and said, "I think I'm supposed to start something, but I don't have a name for it..." He replied..."How about Turning Point?" And just like that, a fire was lit. Turning Point USA was born. On the promise that we could TURN this country around, one young heart at a time. The early days were brutal. I remember driving across the Chicago suburbs to small Tea Party meetings talking about "generational theft"... I remember my first Turning Point USA speaking event in Peoria, Illinois during the summer of 2012, where just six people showed up... And I remember the look in their eyes -- those early patriots --when I told them the vision: " We're going to create a youth movement that LOVES America." " We're going to go on campus and win hearts and minds." " We're going to push back -- and we're going to WIN." They didn't laugh... They didn't walk out... They believed. And Friend -- so did patriots like you. You see, this isn't my story. This is YOUR story. Because without patriots like you... there is no Turning Point USA. Without you... there is no American Comeback story. Without you... there is no cultural shift happening right now in schools, churches, homes, and on every campus across our great nation. You were there when the campus quads and halls were empty... stood by us when our signs got torn down. You had our backs when the mob showed up -- when they shouted, screamed, and tried to wipe us off the map. You didn 't give up. And neither did we. But we were never supposed to be winning... The Left thought they owned this generation. They thought their indoctrination had worked. But they were wrong. I remember standing at tables on hostile campuses with nothing but flyers and hope, praying to have a conversation that would light a spark. I went where I was told a young conservative didn't belong. And I kept going back. ~~ And then... something happened... The students started listening. They started to question everything, think for themselves, and no longer be afraid to stand up. Then, they started showing up. In DROVES. And now? We're not just watching history unfold... you and I are making it. Friend, just LOOK at the movement we 've built: 🔥 A network of 820,000+ conservative student activists 🔥 1,800+ college and high school chapters 🔥 All 50 states. No territory unclaimed. 🔥 16 BILLION+ total views across online platforms 🔥 5 MILLION+ daily viewers online 🔥 Over 10 million young people turned away from the Left 🔥 Students rising up -- even in DEEP blue states Friend, we're not just winning arguments and "owning the libs" anymore... We're winning hearts. We're changing minds. We're turning the tide. This generation wasn't "lost." They were LIED to. But because of patriots like YOU -- they're hearing the truth. They're finding their voices. They're discovering their courage. They're falling in love with this country again! ~~ Friend, praise God! And you know what? This generation is just getting started. But let me say this clearly: The battle is far from over. The Left is on the ropes -- but still dangerous. They're doubling down with new tactics. They're more aggressive than ever in our schools, our media, our digital spaces. They're coming after our students harder than ever before -- because they know we're winning. We cannot give them back an inch. So now, as we look back on how far we've come... It's time to fight even harder. We're going to press in. We're going to drive deeper into enemy territory. We 're going to reach more students, train more leaders, and destroy more strongholds of Leftist control. Not with violence. Not with hate. But with truth. With courage. And with patriots like YOU standing shoulder-to-shoulder with us. Friend, I want you to feel proud as you read this today. Because this movement -- the energy, the fire, the growth, the headlines -- it belongs to patriots like you... The grassroots patriots who lit the match... fanned the flames... stood in the gap. And now, we 're raising up the most Conservative, most Patriotic, most fired-up youth generation in 50 years. That's not hype. That's reality. And it's only possible because of our proud supporters, people like you, who never gave up. I can 't say thank you enough to the patriots who've fought alongside us... those who loved this country enough to invest in its future... those who believed this country was worth saving. Let's keep our foot on the gas. Let's keep changing minds. Let's keep winning this culture war. Because we were never supposed to be winning... And yet here we are. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA ~~ P.S. Friend, thank you for reading what was admittedly a long email. But I wanted you to know how far we've come and how thankful I am for patriots like you! And if this email stirred something in you... If you'd be proud to be a part of the movement that's going to save our GREAT nation... If you want to see even MORE students come alive for truth, for God, and for America... Then I have good news. So, if you've been waiting for the right moment to take your stand -- this is it. This is your chance to pour fuel on the fire that patriots like you helped start. You just won't be supporting a cause anymore -- you'll be powering a cultural REVOLUTION. ~~ ~~ 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Pop Acta Media | Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

clean_body: Elizabeth Warren is sounding the alarm. We need $25,000 by midnight to fight back >> | 🔴 Senator Elizabeth Warren just sounded the alarm 🔴 Trump and Elon Musk are coming after your Social Security. They want to gut the very program that keeps millions of Americans afloat so they can hand out even more tax cuts to people who’ll never need a Social Security check in their lives. We’re fighting back, but we need grassroots support to do it. Our team set a $25,000 daily goal to ramp up organizing and protect Social Security from the billionaire agenda. = | = This is personal. For millions of seniors, Social Security isn’t just a program. It's the difference between groceries and hunger, between dignity and despair. Trump and Musk don’t care. They’re already plotting how to slash your benefits to bankroll tax breaks for billionaires. We cannot let them win. If we hit our goal by midnight, we’ll have the resources to fight back HARD: on the airwaves, online, and in every community across the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= = = In solidarity, Democracy on the Line | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. name: Gov. Ron DeSantis
subject: Floridians deserve REAL property tax relief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Freedom Fund
body:
Right now, Florida ranks #21 in terms of property taxes. We need to change that so Floridians aren’t continually paying the government for owning property. | | | [](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/Zr0mztOz7jsI7Xe4SSJ095rYNhEXJPR3yMMlVpBUpVgjdH8xVBJ0tuseYuKJQ_IOzNgFxjobQ_zt17pk88vW9KnkKvdD16hInjIikfUUZYsJA3KVTuYDifu0x5y0MlW2Fg9_IbpsSxR0hoofqKs9xPIBS-tConVXrr_udkGaCdsxUcF8u1IvXMP4zWYvAunJvYQ1vPDZQW_V3dwlrqyhTHxG18_zeI1Jz5zbHrT8hOmaisyg03mfm2Fw0cg1kgPgwsTMEgR0pzuDEyNT0e6BNFtsc5rQLnxvq82D7MeqvZMhK_96uM7zbJ3s4Zpd3mvWXZcAWdFOyEgzb1lhXnvq7yxI6TzZgGeej4h06pHK9nIufUcRwKXjOs1FSR47TakomGxcWO3NdU7cpI_HP7QRNA3n65OLhBshxMCc/h8xVBqkXDSza22NRIQYhVXJFcYiKVCOG/9)
---
Friend, Owning private property should not mean perpetually paying rent to the government. I’m committed to reducing—and ultimately eliminating—property taxes for homeowners in Florida.
---
[](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/w5zaBdW1xgBQTeWCufsHUotraA8g6kehocMeqfzNs7MW7qjSBxgLBMDtPkWUPapacICla2x8wuEk8n3HeH_IyGWEZKwiGtpdOP3HZ3kUcwFC6e5Dg0S9Wkav5vZVOwFcwVwGVnKpZChRUYfoPdER11xtyMfnqRABB3C-ADI5yMW2_rjcSjmAoMzMhFdvi5izazithrsSB-HeL16aAby_lsI46KolNQrBXaqdB8pXCblmgH22uPITMH1Ix0Uij_HQye3-i9JtRZrdsdLR3_tfWR7vuh-9K9dN5KM2glAOevXFfStzprQBhkf9vaQp2UHQ-pp32HREKxJ1BqtW8vLOdkqnOp1Uri_DytUFXBwUrixwJQlT1CE4K1B7aV5czUlEvtv7wRtJ5SXHV2_YMMcVzF5qNAFXv6uWTQXp/L3wWDEZfDKW2uLtlhmVNQhHY0I4Yf52V/9)
---
Because property taxes are local, not state, we would need a constitutional amendment (which requires 60% of voters to approve!) to eliminate or reform/lower them. **We should put the** _**BOLDEST**_**amendment on the ballot that has a chance of passing with that 60% threshold.** **I want your support in eliminating property taxes here in Florida.**[**Please, sign my petition today to help show the RINOs in the House of Representatives that it’s time to take action.**](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/FlObaNmdiNJS4znMhMRHOcWMEqcymQtaIvxpi73Gqg9g04-VEtL1X3vnCb4P9lRt4FYYSuxb5TCJbatqqXbI4McAqkAuQYHdo3cAHQEeKcvj53WUwYR0IFMJ4Cnm9e7UnyqBdYOQ6xZEPOZzdyzUyWErNuZMoL1HDuosVgsOYP8gLvNeaaKBqJC605gvJdJXNWtcprCpY0MnRxifcLT_7GHsJpKNeWpoZKbS1In-gtIU4q8-sOQyyIjnsGf_y-pZbb7yX5Em3vK_nyRURQnDT0O-AZtjYT4_sY6V_utdUBEspCYFujoOYBxIxj9tFrCesbS9dlmcngSP_UyFkhYLy7PbDvk_D69MbuQZnRx0-2uvmsvJGytO5wuF_2QXKha1ZZpipXKuOz7u1VXjk0s0r6WrrphVxuREhQIt/WQIE7XcxmfDFOPa268E13Tu8NiEW2Htp/9)

name: Breaking (via OhioDems.org)
subject: Ohio’s lone Democrat on the Supreme Court has a new GOP challenger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Republican Justice Pat Fischer just announced he’s running to defeat his colleague Justice Jennifer Brunner
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108525584/548205450/394932017?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_PatFischer_250528_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmI0NWRlZi1mNTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxHOxZek_QegnGMX6xJR8W8nd52rhtthE20YeWRHf1Q=) **Breaking news, team: Republican Ohio Supreme Court Justice Pat Fischer just announced he’s challenging his colleague, Justice Jennifer Brunner, the state’s lone remaining Democrat on the court.**

[_**If you want to stop Republicans from having complete and total control of the court, chip in right now to defend Justice Brunner’s seat >>>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108525586/548205452/394932017?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_PatFischer_250528_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmI0NWRlZi1mNTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxHOxZek_QegnGMX6xJR8W8nd52rhtthE20YeWRHf1Q=)

Fischer is playing musical chairs at the state’s highest court so he can bypass mandatory retirement rules. His term expires in 2028, but since he’ll be too old to run for reelection under Ohio’s constitutional age limits for judges, _he’s running to win Brunner’s seat. If he wins, he’ll be allowed to remain on the court for an extra four years._

**Fischer is vacating his seat on the court early so he can maintain power longer. A classic Republican out-of-touch power grab.**

If we want to show Justice Fischer that Ohioans don’t want him to skirt the rules so he can stay on the court, we need a massive turnout from grassroots supporters today.

[_**Will you rush a donation now to stop Justice Fischer and protect Justice Brunner’s seat?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108525587/548205455/394932017?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_PatFischer_250528_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmI0NWRlZi1mNTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxHOxZek_QegnGMX6xJR8W8nd52rhtthE20YeWRHf1Q=) clean_body: Republican Justice Pat Fischer just announced he’s running to defeat his colleague Justice Jennifer Brunner | = Breaking news, team: Republican Ohio Supreme Court Justice Pat Fischer just announced he’s challenging his colleague, Justice Jennifer Brunner, the state’s lone remaining Democrat on the court. = Fischer is playing musical chairs at the state’s highest court so he can bypass mandatory retirement rules. His term expires in 2028, but since he’ll be too old to run for reelection under Ohio’s constitutional age limits for judges, he’s running to win Brunner’s seat. If he wins, he’ll be allowed to remain on the court for an extra four years. Fischer is vacating his seat on the court early so he can maintain power longer. A classic Republican out-of-touch power grab. If we want to show Justice Fischer that Ohioans don’t want him to skirt the rules so he can stay on the court, we need a massive turnout from grassroots supporters today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Ohio Dems = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

name: Parade Update via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Stop Trump’s Ego Parade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Donald Trump just doubled down on plans to divert $45 million in taxpayer
dollars toward tanks rolling down streets to celebrate himself – boasting
that his massive birthday tank parade will eclipse the Olympics and World
Cup.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29977?source=email-20250528&t=1011&akid=8566%2E5885482%2E1_2jr0 ]Headline: Trump says his birthday military parade will top Olympics and
World Cup

This isn't patriotism – it's a dangerous combination of ego and wasteful
military spectacle at taxpayers' expense. But as Trump dreams of a parade
the world didn't ask for, the fact is CONGRESS still controls the purse
strings.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29978?source=email-20250528&t=1012&akid=8566%2E5885482%2E1_2jr0 ]That's why Our Revolution is launching a MASSIVE call on Congress to
reject Trump's vanity project immediately. Can you join thousands of
Americans telling Congress we won't waste millions on Trump's spectacle
parade?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29978?source=email-20250528&t=1013&akid=8566%2E5885482%2E1_2jr0 ]ADD YOUR NAME

At a time when our country faces critical challenges – a widening wealth
gap, decaying infrastructure, student debt crisis and the looming threat
of climate disaster – the LAST thing we need is tens of millions of
taxpayer dollars wasted to feed Trump's inflated ego.

As he pushes a budget to slash health care for millions, Trump is fixated
on rolling out tanks and missiles down Pennsylvania Avenue to boast about
U.S. firepower.

If we allow this kind of wasteful spectacle once, what's to stop Trump or
the next billionaire politician from commandeering taxpayer money for
self-glorification? We need to set a clear precedent: No vanity parades
funded on our dime. Period.

Congress is forced to listen when thousands of constituents speak out
forcefully and together. So let's be loud and clear: we refuse to approve
Trump's birthday extravaganza. Then, our Citizen Action Team will deliver
our voices at our MASSIVE “No Kings Day” resistance June 14 to show that
America is a democracy, not an authoritarian regime fueled by ego.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29978?source=email-20250528&t=1014&akid=8566%2E5885482%2E1_2jr0 ]ADD YOUR NAME NOW and tell Congress to say "NO" to Trump's wasteful
ego-driven parade.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=8566%2E5885482%2E1_2jr0 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=8566%2E5885482%2E1_2jr0 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=8566%2E5885482%2E1_2jr0 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=8566%2E5885482%2E1_2jr0 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=8566%2E5885482%2E1_2jr0 ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=8566%2E5885482%2E1_2jr0 ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20250528.bZoxzM&t=1007&akid=8566%2E5885482%2E1_2jr0 ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20250528.HnJjOO&t=1008&akid=8566%2E5885482%2E1_2jr0 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20250528.p4bVZX&t=1009&akid=8566%2E5885482%2E1_2jr0 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20250528.eTZNs6&t=1010&akid=8566%2E5885482%2E1_2jr0 ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=8566%2E5885482%2E1_2jr0

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a

name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: You're Invited – San Bruno Mountain Day Use Improvement Project Kickoff | May 30 at 1:00 PM
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5ef752ac6831/youre-invited-san-bruno-mountain-day-use-improvement-project-kickoff-may-30-at-100-pm?e=c0babbc643)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends and Neighbors,

We are excited to invite you to a special event celebrating the upcoming San Bruno Mountain Day Use Improvement Project, taking place on:

**Friday, May 30 at 1:00 PM
San Bruno Mountain State & County Park
(Main Day Use Area)**

This important project, funded by Measure K and championed by Supervisor David Canepa, will bring significant upgrades to the park—most notably, new ADA-accessible picnic sites, a modern all-gender restroom, and an interpretive gathering area designed with community input in mind.
[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=b5b208f98f&e=c0babbc643)
Construction is expected to begin in June 2025, with completion anticipated this summer. While some areas will be temporarily closed during construction, the improvements will ensure that the park is more inclusive, welcoming, and enjoyable for all.

We hope you'll join us as we mark this exciting milestone for San Bruno Mountain and our community. If you plan to join us, please send an email or text to Mike on my staff: [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org?subject=Friday%20event%20at%20San%20Bruno%20Mountain) or 415-845-1368. Thanks!

Warm regards,

David J. Canepa
---
|
---
|
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=44b3b1b96c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&t=b&e=c0babbc643&c=44b3b1b96c).

---

1️⃣ Our California Democratic Party Convention will start this Friday, with Governor Tim Walz and Senator Cory Booker coming to help us flip the U.S. House!
2️⃣ We’re facing a critical End-of-Month deadline at 11:59pm on May 31st .

[**Before we explain why it’s so critical that we end May on a high note, can you send in a donation of $3 today? With our deadline looming, your support – right now – will go a long way towards electing Rebecca to Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108526299/548207562/-2087246159?refcode=em-5.28.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjFjNWZmNi1mNjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fcrfcRgu_HW03Cdgky9zPUHb_mf_BwSxZ0TVFKHpIrQ=) | ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108526300/548207563/-2087246159?refcode=em-5.28.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjFjNWZmNi1mNjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fcrfcRgu_HW03Cdgky9zPUHb_mf_BwSxZ0TVFKHpIrQ=)****

Peter, there are a few reasons why your support is essential right now:

Now, we have to follow it with strength to show that it wasn't a one-off. We HAVE to keep up the pace to send a clear signal that we’re in this race to win it.

* **But momentum is on our side, and we need to keep it that way!** Every pundit has moved this race in our favor since we announced, volunteers are lining up, and crowds are growing everywhere we go. Voters are fed up that their representative would rather beg for Elon’s love than work for WI-03.

The stakes are sky-high in this election, Peter. That’s why we set a goal of raising _$15,000_ in grassroots donations before May ends.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I’m just as fed up as you are
body:
The Establishment never fails to disappoint
| | | | Friend,
I know you’re probably just as fed up with the Republican Establishment as I am...
---
## **I hear you loud and clear.**
But please hear me out, I’m reaching out as we approach our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline.
You want the GOP majority in Congress to do MORE -- **pass the DOGE cuts, codify President Trump’s executive orders, and truly put America First.** I’m with you, and I’m fighting every day to make that happen!
Here’s the truth: some in our GOP majority are dragging their feet and cozying up to the Uniparty Establishment instead of fighting for YOU.
That’s why I’m in the trenches, calling out the RINOs and holding Washington accountable. But I can’t do it alone. Your support fuels this fight—every dollar helps me stand up to the Uniparty, fight their Deep State allies, and keep the pressure on Congress to deliver for the American people.
**_[Before our end-of-month deadline on Saturday, will you chip in $25, $50, or $100](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxcks2O0zAUhZ_G2blK7Pw4iywYQgcWLaMREsNsIse-SY38E2ynpTw9ShoKzM669_icT8fmZtJquDaoekCEnJQMiBBE3yFCHtm3aznIH48POPv6GUN7TH8tS_J-U57JXWsFly-H_eEqaDj02cef5fH1nN3V8TrBXbtF7sBwpZdp1SayYdXA5ZBAk1U5y4uaMZqcmr6q-xxKJmVds6Eva0GLoudA07JI-ZAmqiEpKdKCsKzOqqLcETrUjPCK9kVPGeMoT9eg3egBLOTC2dFDCDvhTKKbU4xTWLn2iOwDiNnD7qKsB7koENkb7r87rwBHftXO45sPDngCN2nA7gweT06rqITiNmCxXIpjJ53tDL8I19lZdOAMBmc6MN0fYkT3fgn0yo6IttHPgEg5R9MZkGo2iLZbR-swuNkLQLS1QndbidtKcDNxNVpE25s13gB4VP9SaJhDB1a6wTgbT_8dl6S_aJuvsxFsvGXiC8Dz08sx_1IgUnZWK4lo-2a4_iDaPn2Qn7Ln82viGzldlNYqlBXK03F9iqX6c0N-BwAA__9WLM47)_?** Every small donation -- 98% of my support comes from grassroots patriots giving less than $200 -- sends a message that we won’t back down.
[DONATE NOW](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxckkuP2yAUhX8N3hEZ8IMsvJjUzbSLpFVVqZ1sLALXDlMeLuCk6a-vnLjpY4fuPZzz6YCwo9H9tUH1BlF60ioiShF7QpQ-85dr1avvzxtMvnzA0O7zn_OSvlmUZ_rQOinU1912d5Us7o7k3Y9qfziThzpdR3hol8gVWKHNPK3bTDW87oXqM2hIXfCiXHPOslPDa1LzUhIlZV_3dC2rvKqA5LwXOSFVn-mG5rTMS8rJmtRltaKsX3MqanYsj4xzgYr8FrQaAoCDQno3BIhxJb3NTHNKaYw3ri2i2whyCrC6aBdAzQpEt1aEVx804CSuxgd898ERj-BHA9ifIeDRG5201MJFLOdLaeiUd50VF-k7N8kOvMXgbQe2-02M2DbMgUG7AbE2hQkQraZkOwtKTxaxdunoNox-ChIQa5003VLispLCjkIPDrH2bo0XAJH03xQGptiBU7633qXTP8c56Q_a4utdApfumfjp8-H1pfgWN3tEq84ZrRBr_xvefhBrP75V78mn8yELjRov2hgdqxoV-XB7irn6c0N_BQAA__-Y7s3u)
**We’ve got a slim majority and a ticking clock until the midterms... and we can’t afford to waste it.**
Your gift today will help me push for investigations into Biden’s corrupt administration, pass President Trump’s agenda, and protect our children from woke indoctrination.
Together, we’ll make the GOP majority deliver the bold action you deserve.

clean_body: | | | The arsonists are destroying our fire hoses! Under Trump’s FDA healthy adults and kids can no longer receive COVID-19 boosters. This poses a grave threat to all communities, especially the disabled community, which is already disproportionately affected by the pandemic. As new COVID variants emerge, this reckless decision undermines public health efforts and leaves countless individuals vulnerable to severe illness and complications. We urgently need your help to support Able Dems in our mission to elect Democrats with disabilities and their allies who are committed to defending public health, our rights, and our lives. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Boosters are a critical tool in maintaining immunity and protecting against emerging variants. Widespread vaccination is necessary to protect those with compromised immunity. By suspending them, the administration is ignoring scientific evidence and endangering lives. We must stand up and demand that people who want boosters have access to them. Our health should not be a political pawn.** Together, we can champion policies that prioritize equity, inclusivity, and science-based decision-making. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. body:

That’s what Big Tech just did to YOU.

|

| | | **EXPOSED:[ Big Tech CENSORSHIP!!!!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6546226595bc4caba29659efc88896e9&_e=SrDgAwqNF5E5FmiNBQ5t15JBn2EX3oCytob-hGrRH5be58RQt4BKvcUjTo7BRL-BYzTakILv73tgokzQTxud7-jqAoMn6lWyA_vR-SSDvPybQtcCICSWeXBvFdWD1_NTEigV8cKs5omfiDP53WTH9xOxvM3reE4RwOu4-91Fz5GlHAx_OtsDiTIbr6BpMUJEspkjVyT6QtCgpDL4L5vd76Ttb1WgHNuvRxUz0QPZyjLIobC4fwkotlexjmcs1VPseOnMwqp4LDhyZ6lC98VNJaSJHMaHd1rtP1DSSuyUxfAeilTxyf6FbhzP4M58Q-7LDE_QJpnCqEO-yrrOfp5K5MQV5IpulbWo5rILqnb9jwnKmqx_p-jVk3daPVnXr3eeTUEswiVwdGXH_LhKY5HNEHCDudxtXSqzXsPz-AZv47I%3D " Big Tech CENSORSHIP!!!!")**

House GOP has officially demanded that the FTC investigate Google's censorship of our Party, preventing us from sharing critical updates and messages with our supporters.

**Because yes -- it's ALL TRUE.**

Google's email filters quietly bury Republican policy and fundraising messages while letting Democrats cash in -- **COSTING REPUBLICANS MILLIONS OF VOTES AND DOLLARS!**

**That 's how Big Tech and the Radical Left cheats [and they'll do it again unless we stop them.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6546226595bc4caba29659efc88896e9&_e=SrDgAwqNF5E5FmiNBQ5t15JBn2EX3oCytob-hGrRH5be58RQt4BKvcUjTo7BRL-BYzTakILv73tgokzQTxud7-jqAoMn6lWyA_vR-SSDvPybQtcCICSWeXBvFdWD1_NTEigV8cKs5omfiDP53WTH9xOxvM3reE4RwOu4-91Fz5GlHAx_OtsDiTIbr6BpMUJEspkjVyT6QtCgpDL4L5vd76Ttb1WgHNuvRxUz0QPZyjLIobC4fwkotlexjmcs1VPsNRdcpkeztO_Td92GOzNkbbdQPlkfPPoAM4cJYCuDOmdQprcySO6LN0xxH5CDkbkZ0Rb8qzWon2MpeL-Faim2RF3MctWIt8N5IFgVoEBdOg7c2qEoB4lV3294diJD2j26UuLqaJxisPJ0MdgIcr90dN7wI9DD4c3Jv7eabBHqyHc%3D "and they’ll do it again unless we stop them.")**

| | | [STOP BIG TECH CENSORSHIP](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6546226595bc4caba29659efc88896e9&_e=SrDgAwqNF5E5FmiNBQ5t15JBn2EX3oCytob-hGrRH5be58RQt4BKvcUjTo7BRL-BYzTakILv73tgokzQTxud7-jqAoMn6lWyA_vR-SSDvPybQtcCICSWeXBvFdWD1_NTEigV8cKs5omfiDP53WTH9xOxvM3reE4RwOu4-91Fz5GlHAx_OtsDiTIbr6BpMUJEspkjVyT6QtCgpDL4L5vd76Ttb1WgHNuvRxUz0QPZyjLIobC4fwkotlexjmcs1VPspgEC6Sv1LlsDyBNsw-_QNdVYqVFtqJeIzdLV43T90MTlb3OgGWj-xGPk_rVcFLxDr3lw8gWOJyP-lgoAIRHC49hpLs-v43XBSXUEPzy_AC0bV0fPo7i46S-ldJHOk6hw2GmKsHqogETsGf-Yl0hJDm4VmxxJ2pKAGd3jhegKGu0%3D "STOP BIG TECH CENSORSHIP")
---

House GOP has filed a formal complaint. We're fighting back. But Google has lawyers and lobbyists -- **we need the grassroots to stand strong!**

If Google isn't held accountable, our important emails updating you on polling locations, policy priorities, and opinion polling may go to your spam FOREVER.

House Republicans are demanding answers, but if we don't act fast,**they 'll do it again in 2026!**

---

name: Office of the Governor
subject: 🚨Despite D.C.’s chaos, Maryland leads
body:
Balanced budget. Tax cuts. Job Announcements—we delivered again this session
---
| | | | | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fhome.aspx/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/0yBJoy2AzA3Kfuu-SjuY27kIqiDS4Di290T0t5jc__0=407)
---
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Flive%2F04OD_7OVQ0w/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/mLxFJSY5JQTNOXX9OGwYeeJc5K3A-IHsuykGDXFpTcU=407)
---
My fellow Marylanders,
Last week, we hosted our final bill signing ceremony of the year. This year wasn’t just a legislative session of challenge – it was a session of change.
We endured the firing of thousands of government public servants through Elon Musk’s DOGE project, the launch of an unnecessary trade war with our allies, and the threats to critical projects like bringing the FBI building to Prince George’s County.
We endured a tumbling stock market and the contraction of the American economy for the first time in years, the start of a regional and national financial crisis, and the Trump Downgrades on the credit of D.C., Maryland, and the nation. The chaos of this new White House has exacted a daily toll on our people, our economy, and our future. And it has accelerated.
Together, we faced uncertainty and delivered a responsible, balanced budget that meets the moment:
* We turned a **$3 billion inherited deficit into a surplus** , while still preserving 8% in the Rainy Day Fund – above recommended levels.
* We’ve **made over $2 billion in targeted cuts** , the largest amount that has been cut from a Maryland budget in 16 years.
* And, as the Trump Administration raises prices, **our income tax reform plan will ensure that 94% of Marylanders either get a tax cut or see no change**.

This wasn’t easy or simple, but in Maryland, we care more about solving problems than scoring points – and our strategy is working:
* We’ve **created nearly 100,000 jobs** – more in two years than my predecessor created in two terms.
* We’ve brought **unemployment to national lows** and brought**job growth to national highs**.
* And even in the face of chaos from Washington, D.C., the rating agency **Fitch affirmed Maryland’s AAA Bond Rating**.

Our work to protect Marylanders from the ravages of Washington, D.C. is only just beginning. We refuse to slow our progress in growing Maryland’s economy and winning the decade.
Your Governor,
Wes Moore
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fhome.aspx/2/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/lMYl-RGEY8PIXpJ31cfhyWiT3mOBJ-X-EqgKM4_vl0c=407)
---
| [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-signs-fy-2026-budget-and-legislation-to-modernize-state-government-during-final-2025-bill-signing-ceremony.aspx/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/OJK9fTC2mfhAuypHQo6lkkHKMIV50z4uIuQY-aCFe3k=407)
### [Our Final Bill Signing of 2025](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-signs-fy-2026-budget-and-legislation-to-modernize-state-government-during-final-2025-bill-signing-ceremony.aspx/2/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/NDW7ZScrqCCPHa0Upymw0jUxWioDYK5d2Pu2Urxa0nM=407)

Last week, I signed into law legislation that continues our work of supporting workers and middle-class families, turning a $3 billion deficit into a surplus, expanding access to state contracts for small businesses, lowering income taxes for most Marylanders, and addressing the rising utility costs burdening Maryland families.
---
[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fshorts%2FBBvNqRHQiqE/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/ozL2yUQPWAXumkUZ6TeyzR_aIKvHf-DQI-WgxBx4R2c=407)
### [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-celebrates-the-formation-of-the-enough-alliance-and-100-million-dollar-philanthropic-investment-to-end-child.aspx/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/Va2c0r5mCgbYj0rOQa9e_VMg2Rizu8g2JQB4JYIJD2w=407)[Keeping Western Maryland in Mind](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Freel%2FDJsjg1IocWC%2F/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/uiMhNtlV0w5azrcBA3DfmBoEW0ca7r1EtCI_hNyX-o8=407)

I declared a State of Emergency following the [historic flooding in Western Maryland](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fshorts%2FBBvNqRHQiqE/2/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/ogykQUwAy4gHTl6xHxCdh2HHnVRkcFcIWdctcSeRAbM=407) that has seriously impacted people’s lives. First responders, local public servants, and agencies throughout the state have worked tirelessly to respond to the damage. I’m grateful for their leadership in our ongoing recovery efforts.
---
| [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2FPages%2Fdefault.aspx%23:~:text=Go-,Press%2520Releases,-Governor%2520Moore%2520Announces/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/S8XcoajVPECaUSXYCS8w5lqMKXyxtbCDZGqp08QHCvU=407)
### [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-to-lead-international-trade-and-investment-mission-to-japan-and-south-korea.aspx/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/mYxYAaekd6r56bb03o875ZWp07NZ8qdJJxKZZ_NsnU4=407)****[Building Pathways to Work, Wages, and Wealth](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2FPages%2Fdefault.aspx%23:~:text=Go-,Press%2520Releases,-Governor%2520Moore%2520Announces/2/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/EJYVU-J2UZw1fSFyHF20Z4_ufEc3n9-SLuQniscqug8=407)****

We made major announcements last month to help bring more jobs to Maryland:
1. We partnered with McDonald's to **[bring nearly 4,000 new jobs to Maryland](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-applauds-mcdonald%25e2%2580%2599s-workforce-expansion-and-education-assistance-initiatives-in-maryland.aspx/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/Rv08R6A_SanxJ9OhNwhdr6RmaL1n_n2o5d-HdIpmE6M=407)** through a workforce expansion initiative this summer.
2. [**Bernstein Management Corporation plans on relocating their headquarters to Montgomery County**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2FPages%2Fgovernor-moore-announces-bernstein-management-corporation-to-move-headquarters-to-maryland.aspx/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/zej7PjTbPfW2KaLKmrWSXGArTqRGJO25yIb7l1iWlwM=407).
3. [**SJ Incorporation will begin construction on a new production facility in Washington County**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-announces-new-sj-incorporation-manufacturing-facility-in-washington-county.aspx/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/cxN6e5pfXVWbQZEVFxIrjYv9BLaDXnk67akLfNU9Bjo=407), with expectations of creating 300 full-time jobs over the next four years.

Collaborations like these are why Maryland’s seeing some of the lowest unemployment and fastest job growth in the nation. It’s why we’ve created more jobs in just our first two years than the previous administration did in eight years. | | |
## [**Maryland is leading the way on protecting health access**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.baltimoresun.com%2F2025%2F05%2F20%2Fmaryland-is-leading-the-way-on-protecting-health-access-guest-commentary%2F/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/5CZlT84iDb12hnmIfN1iCmiIEyynR7G2SGQXGuyxPRY=407)

“Maryland has brought some hope and some progress that reminds us — our communities are more than worthy of basic health care, and that human right includes access to abortion health care without targeted interference or economic barriers.”
---|---|---
| |
## [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fmocoshow.com%2F2024%2F10%2F16%2Fmaryland-secures-13-9-million-in-federal-funding-to-boost-workforce-development-for-individuals-with-disabilities%2F/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/J_NO4__kTNX3gB2OUfA9Sc0KdjIMtIughJ9mPgZxqDM=407)[**New Maryland law attempts to reduce racism in home appraisals**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fbaltimorefishbowl.com%2Fstories%2Fnew-maryland-law-attempts-to-reduce-racism-in-home-appraisals%2F/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/N9CVnbodS7RP7K2Jok2ipLaND5M_E5I__EXCGO9OKe4=407)

“One of the hundreds of bills Gov. Wes Moore has signed into law this month attempts to reduce discrimination in real estate appraisals by making a relatively small change: eliminating the bachelor’s degree requirement from certain types of appraiser licenses.”
---|---|---
| |
## [**New Maryland Law Will Benefit Diabetes Patients**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.mymcmedia.org%2Fnew-maryland-law-will-benefit-diabetes-patients%2F/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/-z2I0VyJ31kO84LxLHoXe94HbTQxO0jeJCwfU3NvFLg=407)

“Maryland Governor Wes Moore signed the bill into law on Tuesday. It will prohibit state-regulated insurance plans from imposing ‘step therapy’.”
---|---|---

---
| [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.maryland.gov%2Fpages%2Fsocial_media.aspx/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/5rA8qZJLPFISLUWmK62ZLPYtCpHbWnAs35h4zap7spg=407)[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fgovwesmoore/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/2ZX3Bq4O3e-X7M4L5QSjVcw62of5vq6JqmTP-hPloRc=407)[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fgovwesmoore/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/wllx88fO2nJ2p2YhERu5mPtRBtQN6GeAhYfG1EMG9M0=407)[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.threads.net%2F@govwesmoore/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/UcPwQw_XYb3snWAsMct_yalL5jytzRgCOvZ4wavb6y0=407)[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fgovwesmoore/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/3Y_NMsFc7cuc6_p1UIM-IErQDtfGLmnPkCC5G4M4TDU=407)[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2F@GovWesMoore/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/_QfQKuqMAaPYkAtmCG9ZYiMoSfYg-l-cCdVg4VGvVDM=407)[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2F/1/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/jTzQb8XWbYc4SJGBdSERKbtwOcbxQ3AC9KQE3RKKodY=407)[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2F/2/01000197186c231a-5064d38b-7f59-4b00-add4-638152b879ff-000000/E60GgZyA-5rwwr9dHJ9QlL6gqOft6zpQG7s7k56NjXk=407)

It will prohibit state-regulated insurance plans from imposing ‘step therapy’.” ---|---|--- | Update your subscriptions, modify your password or email address, or unsubscribe . *

body:
| | | **** When _Roe v. Wade_ fell, women in every Southern state faced new restrictions or bans on abortion rights - _except Virginia_.
**Virginia stayed a firewall for reproductive rights because of Democratic majorities in the General Assembly ... and our 51-49 majority in the House of Delegates _is at risk in November’s elections._**
MAGA Republican Del. Ian Lovejoy votes NO on protecting access to abortion and contraceptives.
Reproductive rights champion and former Delegate Elizabeth Guzman is running to defeat Lovejoy - and _she’s a nationally-watched “DLCC Spotlight” candidate._
**The battle to keep abortion legal is being waged state-by-state ... and our rights are protected where pro-choice Democrats win.**
******[Defend the pro-choice firewall in the South. Donate to help Elizabeth Guzman keep Virginia blue today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6E3r-8BahUSFbwOkWs5ux9uatLxuYt-ihaENtYfj9Tz5lL-jGE5KW7hqSHfDbsO86kyxH1kQJTVJNkAFoowSDtpMioh2jkSa1KRo2dd6L7cKTEoYTlLhXGNP4f7AHGUBJbQ_9hrKiJyfb44xhN7RMTcBDJ0qOfeNskXHzPtLvYuRtmaSvpErvtiWkTZlWGblDNhdt1gXPw5hKhlWpRsyXiDYCcH0bIvQZTR28TVfRnIN/4gv/ft_zBv1LSmCwr03XaCbO8A/h0/h001.DUx4BqKpsxCthUKvvCI8gwqAufewdfXfNzu8btZH-7c)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

Team — Feeding our kids. Supporting local farmers. That’s what the **Local Food** programs are all about — and it’s exactly the kind of investment we should be making in our communities. The Local Food Purchasing Assistance and Local Food for Schools Programs bring American-grown produce directly to our schools, supporting our farmers and producing healthier outcomes for our students. But Trump and Musk’s USDA just canceled **$660 million** in funding for Local Food programs nationwide. Martin has heard from New Mexico’s schools and producers about the uncertainty facing the future of these programs, which leaves farmers in the dark right as the growing season approaches. **As the GOP tries to slash funding, Martin is stepping up to defend these crucial programs. But the reality is, without a Democratic majority, the ability to prevent GOP attacks is limited.** **[Our end-of-month deadline is just three days away — and we’re hoping to raise enough to support Democratic candidates up and down the ballot. clean_body: Team — Feeding our kids. Supporting local farmers. That’s what the Local Food programs are all about — and it’s exactly the kind of investment we should be making in our communities. The Local Food Purchasing Assistance and Local Food for Schools Programs bring American-grown produce directly to our schools, supporting our farmers and producing healthier outcomes for our students. But Trump and Musk’s USDA just canceled $660 million in funding for Local Food programs nationwide. Martin has heard from New Mexico’s schools and producers about the uncertainty facing the future of these programs, which leaves farmers in the dark right as the growing season approaches. As the GOP tries to slash funding, Martin is stepping up to defend these crucial programs. But the reality is, without a Democratic majority, the ability to prevent GOP attacks is limited. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Heinrich HQ | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Katie Porter
subject: 4th largest economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
the work is far from done
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39760%2E3422442%2Ecgxfbb)
Dear Derek,
California recently surpassed Japan to become the world’s 4th largest economy.
I want to share how I’m thinking about this news, as a candidate to be our state’s next governor. **[But first, will you chip in $5 to help us win next year, so I can keep fighting to grow our economy in a way that shares prosperity for all Californians?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250528_1_ak?refcode=em20250528-39760&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39760_3422442_cgxfbb&akid=39760%2E3422442%2Ecgxfbb)**
I’m proud to celebrate California’s successes—but I want to make sure every Californian benefits from our large economy. That means making sure families can actually afford to live here, and that we protect the things that make our state so special, like our amazing coastline and natural resources.
Our state government needs to work with businesses, workers, and consumers, so that the innovations that have been happening in California _stay_ in California. Our leaders must stand up to federal threats to California’s dynamism, including attacks on our universities. **And we need to bring down the cost of living, especially the cost of housing and child care, so that our state can attract and retain the best and brightest.**
My focus as governor will be to foster a strong, stable, globally competitive economy—and to do so in a way that doesn’t leave any Californian behind.
**[We have less than a year to raise the resources we need to win in 2026. Ahead of our May fundraising deadline, will you donate $5 or whatever you can spare?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250528_1_ak?refcode=em20250528-39760&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39760_3422442_cgxfbb&akid=39760%2E3422442%2Ecgxfbb)**
More soon,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250528-39760&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39760_3422442_cgxfbb&akid=39760%2E3422442%2Ecgxfbb)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39760&t=4&akid=39760%2E3422442%2Ecgxfbb)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39760)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39760&t=5&akid=39760%2E3422442%2Ecgxfbb)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: Ashley Dunn
subject: Help me surprise Reagan!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
It’s Reagan’s Birthday! | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=53ee13198c&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e2c5149724bc/help-me-surprise-reagan?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=c8b9c7ef8c&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friend,

This is Reagan's wife, Ashley Dunn.

I'm writing to you because Reagan's birthday is today! Over the past few months of this campaign, I have seen firsthand Reagan work tirelessly to fight as King County's last line of defense against extremist downtown Seattle policies.

After talking with the team yesterday, I thought it would be a fun idea to gift Reagan a card filled with birthday wishes from his supporters. This card will also reveal his big birthday surprise: letting him know that we reached our May fundraising goal early!

Right now, we are just **$1,437** short of our May fundraising goal. **Would you be willing to **[**fast-track a donation to Reagan right now**](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=ba2688d9d7&e=77eef70c61)** to help us get across the finish line, **and reply to this email with a happy birthday message for Reagan? **\---------------
[DONATE HERE!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=d0031ee10c&e=77eef70c61)
\----------------**
Campaigns can be incredibly hard, and I have a front row seat to how much Reagan is constantly sacrificing on behalf of our community to protect us against higher taxes, extreme anti-police policies, and ever-growing costs of living.

**If you would be willing to reply to this email with a birthday message for Reagan, and[contribute $50, $40, or even $20](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=fdfcab620d&e=77eef70c61) to help us reach our May goal early**, I'll put together the card and give it to him after dinner this evening!

Thanks so much for your support of this campaign! I know Reagan will be thrilled to see all the birthday messages and, if you can help us reach our May goal early, that will be a wonderful surprise for him!

Ashley Dunn
---
| | [Follow on Twitter](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=80fda114d1&e=77eef70c61) | [ on Facebook](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=6b4fc25b48&e=77eef70c61) |
---

P.O. Box 40417
Bellevue, WA 98015

body:
Friend,

_ _

I know what it means to serve — first in uniform, then in Congress.
And I know leadership when I see it.

_ _

THAT’S WHY I’M PROUD TO SUPPORT MIKE ROGERS FOR U.S. SENATE.

_ _

Mike is a fellow Army veteran, a former FBI Special Agent, and a tough
conservative fighter. He’s spent his life protecting our nation —
from tracking down criminals to standing up to foreign threats in
Congress.

_ _

MICHIGAN AND AMERICA NEED THAT KIND OF TOUGHNESS RIGHT NOW.
[https://secure.winred.com/rogers/cottonendorsemike-leadership-wa/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20250520_e000422-mr_cottonendorsemike-leadership_wa-e&utm_content=wa-e&recurring=true&amtposition=2&amount=]

_ _

Mike will fight to:

_ _

✅ Secure the border

✅ Rebuild our economy

✅ Keep our families and communities safe

_ _

His campaign is gaining momentum—but he’s going to need your help
to win this fight.

_ _
