CRITICAL SEAT?
[https://secure.winred.com/rogers/cottonendorsemike-leadership-wa/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20250520_e000422-mr_cottonendorsemike-leadership_wa-e&utm_content=wa-e&recurring=true&amtposition=2&amount=]

America needs more leaders like Mike. Let’s help get him there.

In service,

name: In This Together PAC
subject: “People are starting to feel betrayed” — Gov. Beshear tells it like it is.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
We need to fight back, and we need to start now.
Peter,

Did you catch Governor Andy Beshear on _MSNBC_ last week? If you didn’t, you need to. Because he said what so many folks in rural America have been feeling for months now: _**“People are starting to feel betrayed.”**_
And they have every right to.

Trump promised to lower costs for working families.

He promised to bring jobs back.

He promised to put everyday Americans first.

But here we are — over 100 days into his administration — **and the reality on the ground couldn’t be more different from those promises.**

Costs are rising. Small businesses are shuttering or canceling planned expansions because they can’t get the materials they need thanks to reckless and unpredictable tariffs. Communities are facing layoffs, hospitals are cutting services, and families are being forced to do more with less.

And while rural America is being crushed under the weight of these decisions, Trump’s busy playing political games, cutting Medicaid, slashing vital programs, and handing out tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy. This is not leadership.

Real leadership means putting people before politics. It means fighting for the families you represent — not using them as bargaining chips. It means listening, showing up, and doing the hard work of service every single day. Andy gets that, and now more than ever before, we need more leaders like him in office.

[**If you’re with us — _if you believe it’s time to put service back in public service_ — chip in today. Help us uplift the next generation of common-sense leaders who will fight for all of us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108529624/548216617/739826862?refcode=em25_250528_msnbc_fndd_gq_act___ittpac_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250528_msnbc_fndd_gq_act___ittpac_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=40ce57e8-fe3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDBjZTU3ZTgtZmUzYi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9LAV0RVN_2bzbXm1gj2myfQKTDCc2XiwZtBZxC4D1O4=) name: Lee Johnson
subject: South Carolina Has Been Left Behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108529873/548217341/2109746102?refcode=250528_MFC_Johnson_SCHadBeenLeftBehind&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWUyNGFjMS1mZTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EkBcxIsZnynFVic16rz7CcAKjbpsdxfXfQe0F1nRi94=) Friend, I wasn’t born into politics. I was born into a welding helmet, to a family that built roads and bridges for a living. For years, I have been building companies, fixing broken systems, and working on energy projects across the world. I believe that we need more builders in Washington. And as your Senator, I promise to build an economy that works for everyone. Because right now, South Carolinians are being left behind by their leadership. I believe in creating more well paying jobs, expanding access to healthcare, and bringing civility back to our politics. We aren’t going to make progress on the important issues by continuing to send the same representatives back on our behalf year after year. For years, Lindsey Graham and his political allies have failed to deliver for our state on the issues that count.**[If you agree with me that it’s time South Carolina has a fresh voice, then chip in a split donation to our campaign and Seth Moulton today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108529874/548217342/2036686014?refcode=250528_MFC_Johnson_SCHadBeenLeftBehind&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWUyNGFjMS1mZTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EkBcxIsZnynFVic16rz7CcAKjbpsdxfXfQe0F1nRi94=)** **By becoming a Founding Donor to our campaign, you are making an investment in a grassroots operation that will reach people all across this state with our message. We’re counting on people like you to help us build this campaign.** Thanks,
Lee Johnson
Candidate for U.S. Senate

Times are tough, but our team is still full of energy — and that’s thanks to Yassamin, who works tirelessly to deliver for folks across AZ-03. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108529922/548217584/627810495?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250528_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjNmOTFmMy1mZjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0qvOncVEFqpOgkBMCsdURKdaMoxmR4ySt1-Bl8P2jx0=&emci=279b77ed-ff3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7b3f91f3-ff3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=45157234) When Yassamin got to Congress, it would’ve been easy for her to toe the line and fall into the standard, established agenda of the House. But that’s not how Yassamin and this team operate. She’s using her platform to **chart a new course for the future.** Yassamin is elevating the voice of a new generation. She’s the youngest woman currently serving in Congress, and she’s the Freshman Class President for House Democrats. She’s putting **our** concerns and **our** issues on the agenda. But it’s hard and often lonely work. So we’re asking you: will you sign on to our letter of gratitude? **_**[If you’re with Yassamin and her fight for our generation, will you add your name right now to support our team?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108529923/548217585/627810495?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250528_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjNmOTFmMy1mZjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0qvOncVEFqpOgkBMCsdURKdaMoxmR4ySt1-Bl8P2jx0=&emci=279b77ed-ff3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7b3f91f3-ff3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=45157234)**_** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108529924/548217586/627810495?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250528_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjNmOTFmMy1mZjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0qvOncVEFqpOgkBMCsdURKdaMoxmR4ySt1-Bl8P2jx0=&emci=279b77ed-ff3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7b3f91f3-ff3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=45157234)

As a member of the Phoenix City Council, Yassamin ran on and passed policies that delivered real, meaningful change in her constituents’ daily lives. That meant cutting the red tape to build more affordable housing units and securing more emergency shelter beds to get people off the streets and into safe housing.
That approach — making a difference that people can feel — is how we’re going to build power and defeat right-wing authoritarianism.
That’s the core of Yassamin’s work. **_**[But she can’t do it without you. Will you add your name to show you stand with her?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108529925/548217587/627810495?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250528_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjNmOTFmMy1mZjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0qvOncVEFqpOgkBMCsdURKdaMoxmR4ySt1-Bl8P2jx0=&emci=279b77ed-ff3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7b3f91f3-ff3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=45157234)**_**

clean_body: | Times are tough, but our team is still full of energy — and that’s thanks to Yassamin, who works tirelessly to deliver for folks across AZ-03. When Yassamin got to Congress, it would’ve been easy for her to toe the line and fall into the standard, established agenda of the House. But that’s not how Yassamin and this team operate. She’s using her platform to chart a new course for the future. Yassamin is elevating the voice of a new generation. She’s the youngest woman currently serving in Congress, and she’s the Freshman Class President for House Democrats. She’s putting our concerns and our issues on the agenda. But it’s hard and often lonely work. So we’re asking you: will you sign on to our letter of gratitude? | As a member of the Phoenix City Council, Yassamin ran on and passed policies that delivered real, meaningful change in her constituents’ daily lives. That meant cutting the red tape to build more affordable housing units and securing more emergency shelter beds to get people off the streets and into safe housing. That approach — making a difference that people can feel — is how we’re going to build power and defeat right-wing authoritarianism. That’s the core of Yassamin’s work. Thanks for stepping up, Team Yass Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

subject: IT IS FINISHED!
body:
I am excited to share that the verse-by-verse video teaching I have been doing through the Book of Revelation is FINSIHED! Revelation 21 + 22 is NOW
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21735541.11671.1.4b8866dd9dada7ff93d7095ca22c3dd2) |

I am excited to share that the _verse-by-verse_ video teaching I have been doing through the [Book of Revelation](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21735541.11672.1.a5c8d2d56fd3b126470d93f7cfcc58a8) is **FINSIHED**! **Revelation 21 + 22** is NOW AVAILABLE! Watch it here: [https://youtu.be/UJD3_adIaLA](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21735541.11673.1.33c23c32ba94a44120c6999ef1d076c8) You can watch all **22 episodes** here: [https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZ0-pMl6zciRZYzjxtk8GlkblE-cH9R1d&si=RS8O81krN55ZXwBj](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21735541.11674.1.2d53b1639f1bf43fc817b4c4f43566f3) **UPCOMING EVENTS AT SHERDIAN.CHURCH** -Thursday, June 5 @6pm: **Night Of Blessing w/Tim Tebow** | RSVP: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1665203](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21735541.11675.1.5cb06b66551e4159d84426f16731b3ec) -Tuesday, June 24 @6:30pm: **Theology At The Pub** | Kilkenny's Irish Pub Please consider partnering w/the mission of [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21735541.11676.1.9f39f9fcc3106e021a4c325f16d4053e) by visiting: [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21735541.11677.1.804bbcf3060ab376db978e162a8b9023)

## The Reviews Are In!
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21735541.11679.1.c5e10b618e2b721b08ec377337526a2c)

My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21735541.11680.1.abacc2dff989f5557e0a94dce81f5fda) is out! **I have been blown away by the response!** If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** plus the **downloadable eBook** for tablets and phones as well as **theme song** as a bundled package here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21735541.11681.1.edc062d5f49cf5d9d6cf03ee3c832692)_ I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21735541.11682.1.638edfe1c0ac9dbf0aa3e6e4493adb13) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

Peter, this is Valerie Foushee. _Let America Be America Again_ by Langston Hughes is one of my favorite poems, and I find myself frequently returning to its words in these increasingly hyperpartisan times: _O, let my land be a land where Liberty
Is crowned with no false patriotic wreath,
But opportunity is real, and life is free,
Equality is in the air we breathe._ These words still echo today. **Patriotism isn’t about symbols — it’s about taking action to make sure our country lives up to its promised ideals.** It’s why I fight everyday in Congress to defend our freedoms and democracy. It’s why I’ve devoted my life to public service. And it’s why I’m respectfully asking for your help today. [Please chip in ANY amount to help me raise $10,000 before our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline. Every dollar powers my grassroots campaign and the work that I’m doing to fight for working families and build a better America.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108530095/548218144/-1734282297?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_052825_EOM_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWFlZTQ4Ni0wMDNjLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3dGNtrnXFmLprLcFGDY0ATE311y_Kzn2sTXTYwvxoso=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, this is Valerie Foushee. Let America Be America Again by Langston Hughes is one of my favorite poems, and I find myself frequently returning to its words in these increasingly hyperpartisan times: O, let my land be a land where Liberty Is crowned with no false patriotic wreath, But opportunity is real, and life is free, Equality is in the air we breathe. These words still echo today. Patriotism isn’t about symbols — it’s about taking action to make sure our country lives up to its promised ideals. It’s why I fight everyday in Congress to defend our freedoms and democracy. It’s why I’ve devoted my life to public service. And it’s why I’m respectfully asking for your help today. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. name: Sydney Gallego
subject: Update on Baby Gallego
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
It could happen any day now
#

Peter —
I am proud of Ruben.
I am proud of the man he has become, and most of all, I am proud of his fierce and unwavering commitment to making life better for everyone, regardless of their background.
During his campaign for Senate, back in 2023, we were blessed with our first child together — baby Isla. Now, during Ruben’s first year in the Senate, we’re expecting our second child. It could happen any day now. I can't wait for all of the adventures our growing family has in store.
But right now, Ruben not only has one eye on me and the pending birth of our baby, but the other eye on his fundraising. He’s still working hard for us and for working families, and he’s still got to fundraise to fight back against Trump and the extremists in the White House.
He’s got a monthly deadline coming up on May 31st, and it’s an important one. And because Ruben is going to be taking some time off to spend with our growing family, it means a lot less time making fundraising phone calls.
So I am writing to ask for your help. Especially before this deadline. If you could contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford today, it'd help Ruben reach his fundraising goals and give him some peace of mind as he gets ready to transition to time with family for a few weeks.
Just use this link:
[**Can I count on you to contribute $5 or $10 to Ruben's campaign for Senate in Arizona before his fundraising deadline comes to a close in a few days?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may25.XT1Xme&refcode=em250528-1-160&t=1&akid=3877%2E734936%2EfLOSkB)

name: Sharice Davids
subject: I hope you’ll read this message through
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
I wanted to tell you about who I am, where I come from, and why I’m in this fight

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108530562/548219192/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTEyODVkNy0wMTNjLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eC4nDjgiUZQXtQVianRfmq7W7GSsRlUammRtVp_y_8k=) [_**This email is a bit on the longer side, and I hope you’ll take a moment to read it through. But if you’re in a hurry, and you already know about the future I’m fighting for, I’d be grateful to have your support ahead of our big end-of-month fundraising deadline →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108530563/548219193/-945052836?refcode=email_052825_EOM1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTEyODVkNy0wMTNjLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eC4nDjgiUZQXtQVianRfmq7W7GSsRlUammRtVp_y_8k=)
* * *
I wanted to tell you about who I am, where I come from, and why I’m in this fight. Growing up, I was raised by a single mom who spent 20 years serving in the Army. She taught me the value of hard work, and the importance of giving back to your community and your country — values I carried with me as I worked multiple jobs to pay my way through school and become the first in my family to graduate from college. Since then, I have dedicated my life to public service. After I graduated, I got to work helping Native American reservations build communities and economically thrive. This work inspired me to apply to be a White House Fellow, where I worked under President Obama in the Department of Transportation. I ran for Congress in 2018 because Kansans weren’t receiving the representation they deserved. And when I won, I flipped a long-held Republican seat and became one of the first Native American women ever elected to the House of Representatives. **And every day since then, I think of the values my mom taught me: Hard work, empathy, determination. I’m proud to bring those values to everything I do in Congress.** There aren’t many members of Congress with a background and a voice like mine. But what really matters is how I use that voice. That’s why I’m using mine to hold National Republicans accountable, push back against their billionaire-backed agenda, and protect the people of Kansas from Donald Trump’s disregard for the rule of law. **But the cold, hard truth is that I’m up against a lot.** For years, National Republicans have tried to replace me with a rubber stamp for their disturbingly extreme agenda. And now, they think next year is the year they can finally get it done. So I’m humbly asking: [_**Will you pitch in $5, $25, or whatever you can before our fundraising deadline to help me defend KS-03 and keep giving Kansans the committed, tenacious leadership they deserve?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108530564/548219194/-945052836?refcode=email_052825_EOM1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTEyODVkNy0wMTNjLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eC4nDjgiUZQXtQVianRfmq7W7GSsRlUammRtVp_y_8k=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108530565/548219195/-945052836?refcode=email_052825_EOM1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTEyODVkNy0wMTNjLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eC4nDjgiUZQXtQVianRfmq7W7GSsRlUammRtVp_y_8k=)

clean_body: I wanted to tell you about who I am, where I come from, and why I’m in this fight = = I wanted to tell you about who I am, where I come from, and why I’m in this fight. Growing up, I was raised by a single mom who spent 20 years serving in the Army. She taught me the value of hard work, and the importance of giving back to your community and your country — values I carried with me as I worked multiple jobs to pay my way through school and become the first in my family to graduate from college. Since then, I have dedicated my life to public service. After I graduated, I got to work helping Native American reservations build communities and economically thrive. This work inspired me to apply to be a White House Fellow, where I worked under President Obama in the Department of Transportation. I ran for Congress in 2018 because Kansans weren’t receiving the representation they deserved. And when I won, I flipped a long-held Republican seat and became one of the first Native American women ever elected to the House of Representatives. And every day since then, I think of the values my mom taught me: Hard work, empathy, determination. I’m proud to bring those values to everything I do in Congress. There aren’t many members of Congress with a background and a voice like mine. But what really matters is how I use that voice. That’s why I’m using mine to hold National Republicans accountable, push back against their billionaire-backed agenda, and protect the people of Kansas from Donald Trump’s disregard for the rule of law. But the cold, hard truth is that I’m up against a lot. For years, National Republicans have tried to replace me with a rubber stamp for their disturbingly extreme agenda. And now, they think next year is the year they can finally get it done. So I’m humbly asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With gratitude, -Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Prudent Politics
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
Please read the following message.
* * *

| | | | | [](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuepojIteknop5I6ITmb8n0yjs&s=FLIIENBCKFKOKCIA)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people—and you may be among them—I’m thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuepojIteknop5I7ITmb8n0yjs&s=FLIIENBCKFKOKCIA)_
---
| [](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuepojIteknop5I8ITmb8n0yjs&s=FLIIENBCKFKOKCIA)
---
| | “Tax cuts for the rich” is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuepojIteknop5I9ITmb8n0yjs&s=FLIIENBCKFKOKCIA) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ “Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich” _****now.**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuepojIteknop5IaITmb8n0yjs&s=FLIIENBCKFKOKCIA) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

name: Forward Party
subject: Fast Forward - National Debt Follow Up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It was a big week at Forward - here's what you missed.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_65&n=1)
---
Wednesday, May 28, 2025 | Peter -- With the House's passage of the _Big, Beautiful Bill_ driving a conversation on the national debt, this past week we focused on how you feel about that topic and the best ways to tackle it. Should we cut spending? Should we increase taxes? Should we cut taxes to spur growth? In this week's _**Controlling What You Can**_ __ series, we let you decide the relative focus between increasing revenue and decreasing expenditures. Your answers surprised us! Let's start by looking at the slider, which asked about the relative focus between raising revenue and decreasing expenditures to work on repaying the national debt. Coupled with the poll results, we have a few interesting takeaways! First, the vast majority of you believe that we should both raise more revenue and decrease expenditures to tackle our debt. It was a nearly even split between which "side" there was more of a focus on. For those who believe we should _only_ focus on one of these two areas, raising revenue won out. However, we think it's safe to say that the vast majority of Forwardists think that all options need to be considered and a mix of strategies will be needed to start paying down the debt. Second, about 1/6 people who responded to the poll believe that we should use tax cuts to spur growth as the primary means to tackle the debt. That paled in comparison to those of you who wanted to increase taxes or reduce spending in various areas. The single most selected option was raising income tax on high earners - and we'll dig more into that when we discuss the ideas that you all posted in our poll thread. Finally, between cutting Social Security for the wealthy or cutting defense spending, the majority of you thought defense spending was the better area to focus on for spending cuts. In fact, cutting defense spending was essentially tied with increasing income tax on high earners in the poll! Looking at the specific thoughts, ideas, and policies submitted via our website and on X, some key themes reflecting this split emerged: **Simplify The Tax Code**
* More comments were left on simplifying the tax code to eliminate loopholes than any other topic. The tax code is seen as a way to "game" paying taxes, and a cleaner code is seen as a way to ensure more equitable taxation across income brackets.

**Reduce Regulatory Complexity**
* You all called for the reduction in regulatory complexity to both allow business growth and to reduce government overhead. That's an idea to both increase revenue and decrease expenditures!

**Reduction of Spending & Increasing High-End Taxes**
* Whether its military budgets, entitlements, or overhead, many of you called for cuts.
* You also called for adding in more tax brackets on the high end to reflect the shifting reality of incomes in the current economy.

**[Andrew Yang Joins Reclaiming With Monica Lewinski](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfZ0WqyXB0AQQmYphFhozRHD&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_65&n=2)** | **Reclaiming With Monica Lewinski** Andrew Yang discusses "What's Broken in Politics & How We Fix It" with Monika Lewinski on her podcast _Reclaiming_. **[FWD CEO Lindsey Williams Drath Joins MSNBC To Discuss The Big Beautiful Bill](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_BNtuvNT9V_JqWn2w6nll6_YeTMvdJS76ff7V97d9S0&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_65&n=3)** | **MSNBC** Lindsey discusses the economic impact of the proposed Big Beautiful Bill along with the major issues with process and pressure that are coming with this bill - like pushing the 1,000 page bill through so quickly.
**May 28 | Ohio Forward Party
** Join the Ohio Forward Party for a community gathering to talk about the issues that matter most to us. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/ohioforward/lets_talk_about_the_issues?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_65&n=4)** **May 29 | Civic Engagement With The Young Forwardists
** Sit down with the Young Forwardists Committee to learn how to get involved in your local community and lead the charge into a new era. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/civic_engagement_20250529?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_65&n=5)** **June 2 |** **Black Voter's Comms Committee:** Join the Black Voter's Committee bi-weekly comms meeting to learn all things messaging, crafting, and enhancing our communications efforts . **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/bvc_comms_committee_meeting_20250602?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_65&n=6)** **June 6 | Young Forwardists Chapter Meeting
** Join the Young Forwardists for their monthly chapter information meeting. Chapters are the backbone of the Young Forwardists and it'll take one in every school in the country to help heal our political divide. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/chapter_information_meeting_20250606?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_65&n=7)**
****[Third Party Cofounder And Former New Jersey Governor Visits Corrales](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=Wux9YQZzatWFo-IQQm1HSmeMZAXB7QKqLFqskiG4HLNxTQww_HrIqRJpiisTO_-Vy5Dj5-YqkhkToK-3PkdIv3HvIz5djdjhB8fUtlqtNinzApV9xzw3lbRs6ewO6w0_&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_65&n=8)** | Albuquerque Journal**

name: Chairman Tim Scott
subject: I put my faith in God—and in you tonight

body:
We can’t fight evil with silence. Stand up now and verify before MIDNIGHT.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cb7007300e2744d18426241894581ab3&_e=ko2ZrHk3YQBNw0UQW9U4umOyO1cy3idklTpdjGDB0qP9yi4VH_yiIsRtUhmDZ2XBzBY7Qc8tnY31P-3lE3CiRL_cLFC8YFWv3ney8-2gazEww15srcLo4ZunKcu5ixHRtR6wFJQtwauZMd2U_1pPvPu_IC246Wb98EoexmIwgmh99G1PSEvpZEo2Ob0VxTe7UQqm2NbgC-x61goLvfSJP0fZpSrn6p3ePjFCuRNGcO6zbeQ3Z5B76FKRuWEgXhmOCdMV_HxY78EguMeuZf_oWdtOp3OHfaDVL5LeysZHkaJhfQiMt-hB3AvPCb8HmVpU5Qqore2TOy75eKJyvVYKwFcB9SZ9X22tQkdxOAXkWxeBh7Mr3eOLIe-aqgTBs8UeMcN-_xPNAjpmAhuYoCRhSBYZQDvzzqNvc-uXrKtUMFWYYfqY6wYcIEgdWm0h7SmUwAnC7HvR8_IP9Vow9RrxC4JjdYLdt90tl_Uny_3HN6dgulDcOgQebGhRpWZGcJS7ziz1aktdnF4AlTFsYEQFHQ%3D%3D)

Dear Fellow American,

I've always believed that **[God places us exactly where we need to be](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cb7007300e2744d18426241894581ab3&_e=ko2ZrHk3YQBNw0UQW9U4umOyO1cy3idklTpdjGDB0qP9yi4VH_yiIsRtUhmDZ2XBzBY7Qc8tnY31P-3lE3CiRL_cLFC8YFWv3ney8-2gazEww15srcLo4ZunKcu5ixHRtR6wFJQtwauZMd2U_1pPvPu_IC246Wb98EoexmIwgmh99G1PSEvpZEo2Ob0VxTe7UQqm2NbgC-x61goLvfSJP0fZpSrn6p3ePjFCuRNGcO6zbeQ3Z5B76FKRuWEgXhmOCdMV_HxY78EguMeuZf_oWdtOp3OHfaDVL5LeysZHkaJhfQiMt-hB3AvPCb8HmVpU5Qqore2TOy75eKJyvVYKwFcB9SZ9X22tQkdxOAXkWxeBh7Mr3eOLIe-aqgTBs8Ue8aA3s9MWhIt6NOSBhRruJqZrTnQPiz18yml3oCaqiEDyCBktqI2hEgvq20FTwNAPf0akmSbeqWWErHgctVXoE2y-qNR21ngZMUclfEqkza03n2cluziB-MXLIqdFY54LobsMoTf9UYxPMPwJXQ65mQ%3D%3D)** --especially in moments that test our resolve.

Right now, our country is fighting forces that reject truth, faith, and freedom.

The radical Left mocks our faith.
They tear down our values.
And they want to erase God from public life.

**[But we can't retreat when things get hard.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cb7007300e2744d18426241894581ab3&_e=ko2ZrHk3YQBNw0UQW9U4umOyO1cy3idklTpdjGDB0qP9yi4VH_yiIsRtUhmDZ2XBzBY7Qc8tnY31P-3lE3CiRL_cLFC8YFWv3ney8-2gazEww15srcLo4ZunKcu5ixHRtR6wFJQtwauZMd2U_1pPvPu_IC246Wb98EoexmIwgmh99G1PSEvpZEo2Ob0VxTe7UQqm2NbgC-x61goLvfSJP0fZpSrn6p3ePjFCuRNGcO6zbeQ3Z5B76FKRuWEgXhmOCdMV_HxY78EguMeuZf_oWdtOp3OHfaDVL5LeysZHkaJhfQiMt-hB3AvPCb8HmVpU5Qqore2TOy75eKJyvVYKwFcB9SZ9X22tQkdxOAXkWxeBh7Mr3eOLIe-aqgTBs8UeZRrQdnaVDT6E0cIDoWUjlEgkSC-eLavqdi_As0p0jaZXBGxXOMw63GArXacvJtpukbJCiRqsj4uOgLAlQxKdvLSoV7_Q_7Tl70cFs80AARgYJRiyRmv-7tVLzbUAVuX9QHbBmmwQ_q0DxylJaUxc8A%3D%3D)**
We need to stand firm. We need to speak truth.
And we need to fight back--with faith and conviction.

So, Fellow American, can I ask you to verify your GOP voter record **[BEFORE MIDNIGHT?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cb7007300e2744d18426241894581ab3&_e=ko2ZrHk3YQBNw0UQW9U4umOyO1cy3idklTpdjGDB0qP9yi4VH_yiIsRtUhmDZ2XBzBY7Qc8tnY31P-3lE3CiRL_cLFC8YFWv3ney8-2gazEww15srcLo4ZunKcu5ixHRtR6wFJQtwauZMd2U_1pPvPu_IC246Wb98EoexmIwgmh99G1PSEvpZEo2Ob0VxTe7UQqm2NbgC-x61goLvfSJP0fZpSrn6p3ePjFCuRNGcO6zbeQ3Z5B76FKRuWEgXhmOCdMV_HxY78EguMeuZf_oWdtOp3OHfaDVL5LeysZHkaJhfQiMt-hB3AvPCb8HmVpU5Qqore2TOy75eKJyvVYKwFcB9SZ9X22tQkdxOAXkWxeBh7Mr3eOLIe-aqgTBs8UecPfRiL14vEsS8mtVotveEKg_rKtU7xYvBz5cJnDTut9lLIqucRkCazxL0712H8kRFjUrOkcmm__7YjPw7tpWPMkV9IQGqk1KinXE2WEUl4YIIH5hLQncYeG4cS31CLJDCilbqp2cZbEswVyBaYB68w%3D%3D)**
[VERIFY NOW >>>](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cb7007300e2744d18426241894581ab3&_e=ko2ZrHk3YQBNw0UQW9U4umOyO1cy3idklTpdjGDB0qP9yi4VH_yiIsRtUhmDZ2XBzBY7Qc8tnY31P-3lE3CiRL_cLFC8YFWv3ney8-2gazEww15srcLo4ZunKcu5ixHRtR6wFJQtwauZMd2U_1pPvPu_IC246Wb98EoexmIwgmh99G1PSEvpZEo2Ob0VxTe7UQqm2NbgC-x61goLvfSJP0fZpSrn6p3ePjFCuRNGcO6zbeQ3Z5B76FKRuWEgXhmOCdMV_HxY78EguMeuZf_oWdtOp3OHfaDVL5LeysZHkaJhfQiMt-hB3AvPCb8HmVpU5Qqore2TOy75eKJyvVYKwFcB9SZ9X22tQkdxOAXkWxeBh7Mr3eOLIe-aqgTBs8UezrXhgB7m-Q_vh4WhY9BqAPrIxfLwGhkYWyVUfIn0m0x5QRyOrjRyPk7lfim2Oml2l6KY0ER1inmkzQdSkAuwxHlMiWYIE2rljgNZ_T3B8W_NyT1LU20t4wxHlBoW_RieQAS8CE4v4wsrGFq7HTBSOA%3D%3D)
We're running out of time.
The stakes couldn't be higher.
**[And your silence could cost us everything.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cb7007300e2744d18426241894581ab3&_e=ko2ZrHk3YQBNw0UQW9U4umOyO1cy3idklTpdjGDB0qP9yi4VH_yiIsRtUhmDZ2XBzBY7Qc8tnY31P-3lE3CiRL_cLFC8YFWv3ney8-2gazEww15srcLo4ZunKcu5ixHRtR6wFJQtwauZMd2U_1pPvPu_IC246Wb98EoexmIwgmh99G1PSEvpZEo2Ob0VxTe7UQqm2NbgC-x61goLvfSJP0fZpSrn6p3ePjFCuRNGcO6zbeQ3Z5B76FKRuWEgXhmOCdMV_HxY78EguMeuZf_oWdtOp3OHfaDVL5LeysZHkaJhfQiMt-hB3AvPCb8HmVpU5Qqore2TOy75eKJyvVYKwFcB9SZ9X22tQkdxOAXkWxeBh7Mr3eOLIe-aqgTBs8UegRsqfIOFSset17N0ik80czOItErd1dKgXvoCCqJx2xcjKOqC0EJlTkyHb4OoW5H3cbH21fkwdMtqUGJm0fSLmnN_LHebcExYqJQiACT7eEmM-a3CkjjNj46cDOnOqGaBimTWTIJ6-W8L8pc2u3TF8w%3D%3D)**

If we remain faithful-if we act boldly-we will overcome.

Let's win this together,
NRSC Chairman Tim Scot

name: Chairman Jim MacEachern - NHGOP
subject: Sen. Joni Ernst To Headline Amos Tuck!
body:
Get your tickets today!

| | | | | [|
---](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=27e103a9cb&e=f3aa6419cd)
| | | | | Friend,
Chairman Jim MacEachern here. Just last week, the NHGOP announced our Amos Tuck Celebration with Senator Joni Ernst and Governor Kelly Ayotte!
---
[|

name: Team McBride
subject: Not taking the bait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
We need your help to close the gap.
#
We’ve got just 3 days before our end-of-month deadline, and we need your help to close the gap on our $50,000 goal.
The good news is that thanks to this grassroots team, we’re only $9,000 short. [**If you’re able, can you pitch in now to help us cross the finish line?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250528-1?refcode=em20250528-2041&amount=5&refcode2=2041_21716_ifC0BJ&akid=2041%2E21716%2EifC0BJ)
While the far-right keeps trying to manufacture outrage and turn Sarah into a political pawn to distract from their chaos and betrayal of the American people, she’s not taking the bait.
**Instead, Sarah is rolling up her sleeves, getting to work, and meeting the moment. Since getting sworn in January, Sarah has:**
✅ Introduced bipartisan legislation to lower costs, protect consumers, and strengthen family and medical leave
✅ Co-sponsored bills to champion free and fair elections, strengthen workers’ rights and protect the dignity of labor, and close dangerous and deadly gun loopholes
✅ Stood up for veterans, farmers, families, students and educators, seniors, libraries, Social Security, and the Postal Service against Trump’s cruel budget cuts
**From day one, this campaign has been powered by grassroots supporters like you.** You helped Sarah make history — and now, your support is the reason she can focus on fighting for us and delivering results in Congress.
But we’re running out of time to raise the $50,000 we need to keep Sarah legislating, organizing, and speaking out inside and outside of Congress without worrying about fundraising.
[**So if you’re ready to show your support for Sarah, pitch in $5 to help us reach our May fundraising goal now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250528-1?refcode=em20250528-2041&amount=5&refcode2=2041_21716_ifC0BJ&akid=2041%2E21716%2EifC0BJ)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250528-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250528-2041&refcode2=2041_21716_ifC0BJ&akid=2041%2E21716%2EifC0BJ)**
Every grassroots donation keeps Sarah focused on fighting for working families, protecting our freedoms, and delivering results for Delaware.
Thank you!
— Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250528-1&t=1&refcode2=2041_21716_ifC0BJ&akid=2041%2E21716%2EifC0BJ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2041%2E21716%2EifC0BJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2041%2E21716%2EifC0BJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2041%2E21716%2EifC0BJ)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

subject: Can we count on you to defend CA-25?

body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=2sDDYgvS%2BJMctptO%2BlnJfLFhxyPJBVJtgNoF7q0ro1%2FlCAJOegnkUc%2BAWmhCf2B3ku2bNbmbBNT5SieCbZkUHzOutxeGt6wbGBZb9gi3CVQAx3dVVcSIAVGaxtxXSk5YWn2QqZga8WC5qX45ImPScMWlwhQjkd34II7DINZuh0gndNrM%2BhRxbgyrTkJ6vd0b98CcMGBmEebfC7brZ%2F8yFoQd891BylFqhK%2BYKLhqY6iO%2Fgfxzdg7mrdiPtW9koNdb95Q4J2v8rTAyDDSItkia54Ri0OqU0fKEWuIOdmUTT5c2KXhK0vEih4ubut%2F6eTbDIUV0I0p5EV5UqlOqOyYy2sjYNJgHJpugHpkF98ByxPCWXhEEW%2BiGhguyF%2BllT2%2F1i2xQbtJa44YiSxq5W7DqWXPY9%2BMrlGh%2F37xDgzK3pOi34LmUW49a9DOupeLq8Ie)

Did you see Dr. Ruiz’s email? National Republicans and right-wing donors are watching this district closely because they know it could decide control of the House next year. Just how crucial is this seat? Trump gained **_13 points_** here between 2020 and 2024. That’s a wake-up call — if we don’t start pushing back now, they could flip this district in 2026. And if they do, we lose our shot at flipping the House and stopping the attacks on Medicaid, Social Security, and everything else they’re trying to tear down. They have billionaires backing them, but we have our grassroots supporters — everyday people who believe in this fight. **We’ve proven before that we don’t need mega-donors like them to win — and we know we can do it again**. [We can't afford to fall behind before the end-of-month fundraising deadline. Let’s show them we’re ready to fight for CA-25 — and we won’t let this district go without a fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108531836/548223001/-1463534552?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_052925_EOM2_30DO30DNTL_D2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjYzNmRiNzYtMDUzYy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dkka0MfPr1r6zgZu4Bb86PREzsGIF5oUYdRl85-1_OU=) | | **[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108531837/548223003/-1463534552?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_052925_EOM2_30DO30DNTL_D2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjYzNmRiNzYtMDUzYy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dkka0MfPr1r6zgZu4Bb86PREzsGIF5oUYdRl85-1_OU=)**

— Team Ruiz
**\---------- Forwarded message from Dr. Raul Ruiz ----------**
Right now, Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress are pushing an agenda that would make deep cuts to Medicaid, Social Security, and other essential programs that millions of Americans count on — including families right here in CA-25.
They want to slash Medicaid, Social Security, and other critical services — putting the needs of everyday families behind the wealth of Donald Trump and his billionaire friends. And as a physician, **I take that personally**.
These programs are lifelines — helping people afford medications, see a doctor, care for aging parents, and put food on the table. Gutting them would have real, devastating consequences for our communities.
Trump promised to protect these programs. But now, he and his allies are putting the wealth of billionaires and corporate donors ahead of the basic needs of everyday Americans.
And we can’t let them get away with it. **_I won’t_** let them get away with it.
We have a critical opportunity to stop this agenda by flipping the House in 2026. And that work starts now — in critical districts like CA-25.
[My team is working to raise $5,000 before Saturday at midnight to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal, stay on track, and build the campaign we’ll need to win. If you can, please consider chipping in to support my work now. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108531838/548223005/-1463534552?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_052925_EOM2_30DO30DNTL_D2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjYzNmRiNzYtMDUzYy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dkka0MfPr1r6zgZu4Bb86PREzsGIF5oUYdRl85-1_OU=)

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Did you see Dr. Ruiz’s email? National Republicans and right-wing donors are watching this district closely because they know it could decide control of the House next year. Just how crucial is this seat? Trump gained 13 points here between 2020 and 2024. That’s a wake-up call — if we don’t start pushing back now, they could flip this district in 2026. And if they do, we lose our shot at flipping the House and stopping the attacks on Medicaid, Social Security, and everything else they’re trying to tear down. They have billionaires backing them, but we have our grassroots supporters — everyday people who believe in this fight. We’ve proven before that we don’t need mega-donors like them to win — and we know we can do it again. = | | = — Team Ruiz \---------- Forwarded message from Dr. Raul Ruiz ---------- Right now, Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress are pushing an agenda that would make deep cuts to Medicaid, Social Security, and other essential programs that millions of Americans count on — including families right here in CA-25. They want to slash Medicaid, Social Security, and other critical services — putting the needs of everyday families behind the wealth of Donald Trump and his billionaire friends. And as a physician, I take that personally. These programs are lifelines — helping people afford medications, see a doctor, care for aging parents, and put food on the table. Gutting them would have real, devastating consequences for our communities. Trump promised to protect these programs. But now, he and his allies are putting the wealth of billionaires and corporate donors ahead of the basic needs of everyday Americans. And we can’t let them get away with it. I won’t let them get away with it. We have a critical opportunity to stop this agenda by flipping the House in 2026. And that work starts now — in critical districts like CA-25. = | = Every dollar helps us push back against Trump’s extremist priorities and fight for the people who count on these programs to live with dignity and security. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Raul | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: How to fight off the fatigue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We can’t stop fighting for our democracy
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108532096/548223650/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxZDA0ZGJmLTA1M2MtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u23vqUUo0R5Ke26DO2zqCOzevQzP4LyXbDmZPtUYCLc=&emci=8a80dfb4-f23b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=51d04dbf-053c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, A couple weeks ago, at a discussion about democracy, someone asked me how to fight off the fatigue of the last election and keep pushing forward. **My answer? The stakes are just too damn high. To defend our democracy, you’ve got to swing at everything and hit it back.** Look, we’re in a bad place right now — but this is not a place we have to stay. Sure, our president and his backers don’t respect the Constitution. But there are far more of us who do. Every great movement in our country has had great leaders. But more importantly, they’ve also had the support of galvanized, focused American people. That’s you, and that’s the millions more who care about defending our democracy. **So how do you fight fatigue? You fight it with action.** At the NDRC, with your support, we will continue taking action — to make our government respond to the will of the people, to end gerrymandering, and to deliver fair maps that give Americans a fair chance to hold Republican extremists accountable. [**Right now, will you give a contribution of $30 or more to power more progress in this fight?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108532099/548223652/469381256?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGHolderEOM_email_20250528-NDRC-Tier1-AGHolderEOM_ctrl&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250528-NDRC-Tier1-AGHolderEOM_ctrl&utm_campaign=AGHolderEOM&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxZDA0ZGJmLTA1M2MtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u23vqUUo0R5Ke26DO2zqCOzevQzP4LyXbDmZPtUYCLc=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The thing that Trump and Republicans want most is for us to give up and hand them our country to do whatever they want.
But I know that you won’t give up, and neither will I.
We are still in control of our own destiny. We are the stewards of our democracy. And we have it in our power to shape our country’s future.
When the far right tries to contort electoral maps to sculpt an electorate that’s friendlier to their partisan pursuit of power, it’s on us to push back in the name of fairness. When they try to pass a bill — the SAVE Act — that could disenfranchise millions of Americans, it’s on us to call out their agenda and fight for voting rights with everything we’ve got. And when the voters head back to the polls, it’s on us to champion our endorsed Democracy Defenders who will help right the ship and minimize the damage.
[**I can promise you that the NDRC will not back down from these fights — so today, I am personally asking you to make a donation to help fund the hard work of protecting our democracy from those who want to break it.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108532109/548223664/469381256?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGHolderEOM_email_20250528-NDRC-Tier1-AGHolderEOM_ctrl&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250528-NDRC-Tier1-AGHolderEOM_ctrl&utm_campaign=AGHolderEOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxZDA0ZGJmLTA1M2MtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u23vqUUo0R5Ke26DO2zqCOzevQzP4LyXbDmZPtUYCLc=)
Thanks for being part of this fight with us,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

clean_body: We can’t stop fighting for our democracy | Peter, A couple weeks ago, at a discussion about democracy, someone asked me how to fight off the fatigue of the last election and keep pushing forward. My answer? The stakes are just too damn high. To defend our democracy, you’ve got to swing at everything and hit it back. Look, we’re in a bad place right now — but this is not a place we have to stay. Sure, our president and his backers don’t respect the Constitution. But there are far more of us who do. Every great movement in our country has had great leaders. But more importantly, they’ve also had the support of galvanized, focused American people. That’s you, and that’s the millions more who care about defending our democracy. So how do you fight fatigue? You fight it with action. At the NDRC, with your support, we will continue taking action — to make our government respond to the will of the people, to end gerrymandering, and to deliver fair maps that give Americans a fair chance to hold Republican extremists accountable. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The thing that Trump and Republicans want most is for us to give up and hand them our country to do whatever they want. But I know that you won’t give up, and neither will I. We are still in control of our own destiny. We are the stewards of our democracy. And we have it in our power to shape our country’s future. When the far right tries to contort electoral maps to sculpt an electorate that’s friendlier to their partisan pursuit of power, it’s on us to push back in the name of fairness. When they try to pass a bill — the SAVE Act — that could disenfranchise millions of Americans, it’s on us to call out their agenda and fight for voting rights with everything we’ve got. And when the voters head back to the polls, it’s on us to champion our endorsed Democracy Defenders who will help right the ship and minimize the damage. = Thanks for being part of this fight with us, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

clean_body: | NYT: NPR Sues Trump Over Order to Cut Funding The Trump administration has urged Congress to end nearly all federal funding for public media — including NPR and PBS This is censorship, plain and simple. Now, NPR is launching a major effort to stop these blatantly targeted attacks against free and fair media. | | | | | | | | | | FACT: The Trump administration has proposed slashing $1.1 billion in funding for the nonprofit that supports NPR and PBS. FACT: This is part of a major political push to defund what Trump refers to as “woke media.” WHAT’S AT STAKE: Accurate and trustworthy news reporting Educational programming for children Life-saving emergency alerts NPR is doing everything it can to protect the freedom of the press, but we need to know if defending NPR is important to our supporters. So let us know: | | | | | | | | | | Our team needs to hear from you. Thank you, Gillibrand HQ = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: General John King
subject: I have 3 days
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
Democrats are looking for any sign of weakness, because I’m the candidate they fear the most: a lawman and soldier who knows how to win tough battles. |
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9953f83ebb6d40cfb7c8270a2ec58c73&_e=nc1FW2pIhWm7ZIEPIOA8Ki738m62cHMOfSDpkq7BFej1bDLOOtiaaskjFfRjUPoyO6fMWZ1U_QJw8tHXDt1teeYDWUqB5p5FJZO4VIyn1PafsYY5AxPEfoEAxzXhyWaLan4MA-3cIfimGg1ctoRbi4URYe3IwkpTe-P-630FM4pwr8nMFvJ40NKDHrihv1IprmHjjaatq8gRVB5BcFx92zLyKzJ-pHyRzcVMGi5VwG-VhYbkKb7nvhGnJwsfwQYfYoVmBXtcydIsJqSkU5EY8WdkZD5DBVvJ5hv_iH9ewC3oy5_FxCefx1L4Mx3gk4zMGPu27ID-5QahUps966ACf3LhMZoyjHM8LrFd5r8QqQFYnX2cNcU7RDQ9DxoSpEIJHHwCxmcQIDLhO0uT_cBEhgng9HqvYzXc0aR-BeYtceA%3D)

---
Peter,

The end of May is just 3 DAYS away, and we have a goal of raising an additional $22,085 by MIDNIGHT on the 31st.

[**If we fall short, all the momentum we’ve built to flip Georgia’s Senate seat is at risk.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9953f83ebb6d40cfb7c8270a2ec58c73&_e=nc1FW2pIhWm7ZIEPIOA8Ki738m62cHMOfSDpkq7BFej1bDLOOtiaaskjFfRjUPoyO6fMWZ1U_QJw8tHXDt1teeYDWUqB5p5FJZO4VIyn1PafsYY5AxPEfoEAxzXhyWaLan4MA-3cIfimGg1ctoRbi4URYe3IwkpTe-P-630FM4pwr8nMFvJ40NKDHrihv1IprmHjjaatq8gRVB5BcFx92zLyKzJ-pHyRzcVMGi5VwG-VhYbkKb7nvhGnJwsfwQYfuFKp9rCXQ0oUCZhsK093nK1zbrxBjk--tDljVKyXjzKdYh0T1uMe2hijewB3N9Ofr4flp6BtFNfrcTsxmtD6EwNDrjPVZHN-gHO-2wXc0YjCUYGoU22dTZ_KBmHRueAalkANQqfJ7O-ivXcw2Psufq5fqyZXFEt0WaZNZXG9nQw%3D)
**First, I announced my Senate campaign.

Then, polling showed the race between Jon Ossoff and me _virtually tied_ inside the margin of error.

Now, we must stay on target with our fundraising.** [**Peter, can you pitch $25, $50, $100, or even more before May is over?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9953f83ebb6d40cfb7c8270a2ec58c73&_e=nc1FW2pIhWm7ZIEPIOA8Ki738m62cHMOfSDpkq7BFej1bDLOOtiaaskjFfRjUPoyO6fMWZ1U_QJw8tHXDt1teeYDWUqB5p5FJZO4VIyn1PafsYY5AxPEfoEAxzXhyWaLan4MA-3cIfimGg1ctoRbi4URYe3IwkpTe-P-630FM4pwr8nMFvJ40NKDHrihv1IprmHjjaatq8gRVB5BcFx92zLyKzJ-pHyRzcVMGi5VwG-VhYbkKb7nvhGnJwsfwQYfzinLpuQg_M5wemILMw5tAZAJDuDLLy7PQ5HYzTR8Bn1IaaanVJe8MwjNplVoB2AC4qZMvMSrOVG143vONOtDjpyt9gd54ldIarKj2_Jms5MgIxU-2d1s-AxyEujHLEAldu2rlCSM0w1PG-JFN90hRi66M1uli1fG8jjMcDuqiGk%3D)

This is going to be the toughest, closest, and most expensive Senate race in the country.

Democrats are looking for any sign of weakness, because I’m the candidate they fear the most: a lawman and soldier who knows how to win tough battles.

[**Your End-of-Month donation will send a clear message that we’re in this fight for the long haul. name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: The budget
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250528-1367-foote&t=1001&akid=1367%2E342411%2EMGBFWt ]Squad Victory Fund

Hey Peter, it’s
been another busy month in Congress for the Squad. Republicans have
unleashed relentless attacks on programs serving our most vulnerable
communities in their budget plan – but the Squad has been fighting back,
calling them out and making sure everyone knows exactly what’s at stake.

There are so many reasons why this budget plan is harmful, and the Squad
is holding them accountable on each and every one.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250528-movement.RIxNU4&refcode=em20250528-1367&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1367%2E342411%2EMGBFWt ]Screenshot of a post on X from Ayanna Pressley (@AyannaPressley) that
reads: 'Republicans claim to be “pro-family” but want to gut Medicaid and
rip away essential healthcare for babies and their mothers. The shame and
the sham of it all.'

Republicans claim to be “pro-family,” yet turn around and vote to strip
health insurance from millions of families. If they truly cared, we would
be expanding access to health care, not cutting it. What they’re doing is
simply wrong.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250528-movement.RIxNU4&refcode=em20250528-1367&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1367%2E342411%2EMGBFWt ]Screenshot of a post on X from Ilhan Omar (@IlhanMN) that reads: 'In
the GOP budget plan, 18.3 million kids could lose access to free school
meals to give tax cuts to billionaires. We don't suffer from scarcity. We
suffer from greed.'[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250528-movement.RIxNU4&refcode=em20250528-1367&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1367%2E342411%2EMGBFWt ]Screenshot of a post on X from Rashida Tlaib
(@RashidaTlaib) that reads: 'Republicans need to stop lying. They are
cutting Medicaid to give rich people more money.' Below the text is a
photo of the U.S. Capitol building at dusk with lights glowing inside. A
caption over the image reads: 'Budget office: Republicans’ megabill would
give to the rich and take from the poor.' Source noted as 'From
msnbc.com.'

It’s also important to remember why Republicans are pushing these massive
cuts: to give huge tax giveaways to their billionaire backers. Donald
Trump is bringing billionaires like Elon Musk into the governing process,
resulting in policies that make them even wealthier – while the
working-class pays the price.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250528-movement.RIxNU4&refcode=em20250528-1367&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=1367%2E342411%2EMGBFWt ]Screenshot of a post on X from Team AOC (@TeamAOC) that reads: 'While
you were sleeping, Republicans in Congress: - stripped 13.7 million
Americans of their health care - stole food assistance from millions of
children and seniors - defunded Planned Parenthood. All so a few
billionaires could get more tax breaks.'

Even though these times feel challenging, we must be ready to carry our
fight forward. Working-class Americans won’t just accept these massive
cuts to life-saving services without a fight. And we won’t forget this
betrayal at the ballot box in 2026.

Peter, we
can’t slow down in our fight for the working-class – especially in the
face of these Republican attacks. That’s why we’re setting a $85,000
end-of-month fundraising goal to make sure we have the resources we need
to continue fighting back. We’re close to hitting this goal, and
grassroots supporters like you can help us cross the finish line.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250528-movement.RIxNU4&refcode=em20250528-1367&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=1367%2E342411%2EMGBFWt ]Can you chip in any amount that makes sense to you today to help us hit
our $85,000 goal, keep the Squad in Congress, and hold the GOP
accountable?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250528-movement.RIxNU4&refcode=em20250528-1367&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=1367%2E342411%2EMGBFWt ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

Squad Victory HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1367%2E342411%2EMGBFWt

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Val Hoyle
subject: My 14th town hall this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108533637/548229006/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjEwOGRkMi0wODNjLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9PgJssUUnfk4-dQDHoxeQu77_Hnw7605-hPfDJlCeFo=&emci=f236a239-f83b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=bf108dd2-083c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter – I was proud to join Sen. Ron Wyden for two town hall meetings over Memorial Day weekend – and encouraged seeing so many folks come out to get involved at our stops in Coos and Curry counties. **Sunday's stop marked my****14th town hall so far this year –****and reminded me again how important it is to protect our first amendment rights to free speech and assembly.** These town halls are conversations, and they are always open to everyone. And this weekend, Sen. Wyden and I heard from seniors dealing with long lines at Social Security offices and soon-to-be-retired folks wondering if it's actually going to be there for them when they take the plunge. Fishers and farmers along the South Coast told us tariffs are eating into thin profit margins and new customer markets are drying up. Just as Oregonians have been rallying to save Medicaid from devastating cuts, the Congressional Budget Office revealed that House Republicans' and Donald Trump's "big, beautiful bill" adds so much to the deficit that it would trigger major cuts to Medicare as well – something every single older American relies on. Unlike many of my far-right colleagues, I'll keep going to towns and cities across my district to hear from you. And I'll keep an open, transparent dialogue going as we push forward on legislation that matters – strengthening Social Security and protecting Medicare and Medicaid. If we are going to fight back against the Trump Administration, we must show up to town hall meetings, marches, and D.C. offices to demand funding for our Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. **Never underestimate the power of free speech – and bad publicity – to force President Trump and Republican leadership to back down from their dangerous proposals.** I'll see you out there, _Val_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Val Hoyle instantly:

clean_body: | | | | Peter – I was proud to join Sen. Ron Wyden for two town hall meetings over Memorial Day weekend – and encouraged seeing so many folks come out to get involved at our stops in Coos and Curry counties. Sunday's stop marked my14th town hall so far this year –and reminded me again how important it is to protect our first amendment rights to free speech and assembly. These town halls are conversations, and they are always open to everyone. And this weekend, Sen. Wyden and I heard from seniors dealing with long lines at Social Security offices and soon-to-be-retired folks wondering if it's actually going to be there for them when they take the plunge. Fishers and farmers along the South Coast told us tariffs are eating into thin profit margins and new customer markets are drying up. Just as Oregonians have been rallying to save Medicaid from devastating cuts, the Congressional Budget Office revealed that House Republicans' and Donald Trump's "big, beautiful bill" adds so much to the deficit that it would trigger major cuts to Medicare as well – something every single older American relies on. Unlike many of my far-right colleagues, I'll keep going to towns and cities across my district to hear from you. And I'll keep an open, transparent dialogue going as we push forward on legislation that matters – strengthening Social Security and protecting Medicare and Medicaid. If we are going to fight back against the Trump Administration, we must show up to town hall meetings, marches, and D.C. offices to demand funding for our Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. Never underestimate the power of free speech – and bad publicity – to force President Trump and Republican leadership to back down from their dangerous proposals. I'll see you out there, Val | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Val Hoyle instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: NY Governor Kathy Hochul Joining the 2025 Roosevelt Awards Dinner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Peter,
We’re excited to announce a very special guest at our upcoming Roosevelt Awards Dinner: New York Governor Kathy Hochul will join us as a featured speaker. A trailblazer and fierce advocate for working families, Governor Hochul brings a powerful voice to our shared mission of defending democracy and advancing justice for all.
Get Your Ticket Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/roo26fed]
This celebration is more than just a dinner — it’s a cherished tradition that honors those who embody the courage, vision and moral clarity that define our Democratic values.
At a time when fundamental rights and freedoms are under threat across the country, the Roosevelt Awards Dinner offers a vital reminder of what we can achieve when we come together — as organizers, activists, elected leaders and neighbors — to stand up for what’s right.
Whether you’re a longtime supporter or just beginning your journey in this movement, this evening is a chance to reconnect, recharge and recommit to the work ahead.
Event Details:
Thursday, June 5, 2025
6:00 – 8:00 PM
Fairmont Copley Plaza Hotel
138 St. James Avenue, Boston, MA
Get Tickets or Become a Sponsor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/roo26fed]
Join us for an unforgettable evening as we celebrate the people and principles that keep our party, and our democracy, moving forward.
In solidarity,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Death threats have never fazed me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
They’ll only get worse now that I’m running for AL Governor | [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=2c9c83aebf85401fb3e5a712c3bbc72b&_e=lAivSSYhXDO4OiNv4ccymoKr1aHJOuc7hgElbU1AxBrkcjzVQc9L0CDEmADr9j9md2T2GtTTY3roalrfV_JilkQjkz0qFsmwGLXNA_d5Ex6Pfj7BWNRqJGISQxX32j4v1NkOm1yWIHP-rnaE3tuIIjVlXEp9aIOgkq3C_y57pHD1ErBKEaFTRY4Yo-sx9H0pCrLqqoLPkQ4gLmBy9vpFF2A6ORgKmjblCe9xlGPY12FeItefGemEm9MLSGdsgDl9wff7D3ws-vDzhTq7vmZcJC6GRpMHkR_rl8dRbA1_ySeO4ix9rusuwAymWBuAwreaQx0YcfdMkY06VOnCGcaRORKX0cIt2ghRcGpYY3-7AWU%3D)
---

Peter,

_**I’m no stranger to passionate SEC fans hurling insults and threats my way. After all, when you dominate the SEC for just under a decade, those fans are going to start lashing out.**_

**It wasn’t until I became a United States Senator who supports President Trump and putting America First that those harmless insults escalated into death threats.**

Since last year, I’ve received well over a dozen threats on my life. I brushed them off at first, but once they tried to assassinate President Trump, I knew it was time to take them more seriously.

**Regardless, they don’t phase me. I’ll never stop fighting for our America-First Principles.**[**But I need your support to keep me going.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=2c9c83aebf85401fb3e5a712c3bbc72b&_e=lAivSSYhXDO4OiNv4ccymoKr1aHJOuc7hgElbU1AxBrkcjzVQc9L0CDEmADr9j9md2T2GtTTY3roalrfV_JilkQjkz0qFsmwGLXNA_d5Ex6Pfj7BWNRqJGISQxX32j4v1NkOm1yWIHP-rnaE3tuIIjVlXEp9aIOgkq3C_y57pHD1ErBKEaFTRY4Yo-sx9H0p12gROHPfb23_zYRwZk7areagVEDmIk8qPuz-Pra7yXUFIi_brYPwIgadOQvOnSv4B4JDRZ4W_Ani7k9t9dQRAl1-wnvE9b1GkKBxt5zeeZydzW9HiV5MnXc8QPFp-kZMCISnCWPw9u4O3hvDO39Hvuqie4dxIY490qxolyQ_U7I%3D)

Now that I’ve announced I’m running for Alabama’s next governor, I’m fully expecting the threats to continue.

The Radical Left Mob will never rest when it comes to doing anything they can to defeat President Trump and his MAGA Movement. They’ll target anyone who aligns with Trump.

_Well, I realized that if they’re threatening me, it probably means I’m doing something right._

**Now that I’ve announced I’m running to be Alabama’s next governor, I have no doubt the threats will continue. I’m going to need every resource available to me so I can push through and win. That’s why I’m emailing you.**

[**I’m humbly asking you to chip in just $15 before midnight.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=2c9c83aebf85401fb3e5a712c3bbc72b&_e=lAivSSYhXDO4OiNv4ccymoKr1aHJOuc7hgElbU1AxBrkcjzVQc9L0CDEmADr9j9md2T2GtTTY3roalrfV_JilkQjkz0qFsmwGLXNA_d5Ex6Pfj7BWNRqJGISQxX32j4v1NkOm1yWIHP-rnaE3tuIIjVlXEp9aIOgkq3C_y57pHD1ErBKEaFTRY4Yo-sx9H0pJPEyP9zBQfraLwcRA_P-wyAJDi8OaHv57SIQwIJY7k2WhWCe3vSnZMMFZPWXbbjUdb48bY2eKgP_9jBHmNAF_R9q8wrFgKidqoXsaDWgs7W0a5eCBK4EFDi4cQZ6_IoSkT9P1kzW7NZiv3QyACw8Zxc60OWNWiLuA45rmGmW__8%3D)

Campaigns nowadays are a lot like College Football’s recruitment. The schools with the most money often win and recruit the best players. In politics, the candidates with the most money often win, regardless of their politics. That’s exactly why the Democrats are able to keep winning, despite Republicans’ agenda, which better represents the vast majority of Alabamians’ and Americans’ needs.

**I need to get a head start now so I can keep pace with the Radical Left millionaire donors.** [**Would you be willing to donate just $15 or anything you can spare today?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=2c9c83aebf85401fb3e5a712c3bbc72b&_e=lAivSSYhXDO4OiNv4ccymoKr1aHJOuc7hgElbU1AxBrkcjzVQc9L0CDEmADr9j9md2T2GtTTY3roalrfV_JilkQjkz0qFsmwGLXNA_d5Ex6Pfj7BWNRqJGISQxX32j4v1NkOm1yWIHP-rnaE3tuIIjVlXEp9aIOgkq3C_y57pHD1ErBKEaFTRY4Yo-sx9H0p4G8vPJN_8FBBCYqKOKGE4g9ZPnAx_JYFAE4QMCJKuLf9msNznjEDSJuyx3s3adhFG4KuwiY1l8F2SmahdW7qzqm9J_dGhQi8VoqeIH-_hPaZbsldVmphxegZC7gKlYVUkITreMQ3ifRIwafAHiJ-qexldRrd2AT7Al20BNawuyQ%3D)

Thank you,
Coach Tuberville

| [](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=2c9c83aebf85401fb3e5a712c3bbc72b&_e=lAivSSYhXDO4OiNv4ccymoKr1aHJOuc7hgElbU1AxBrkcjzVQc9L0CDEmADr9j9md2T2GtTTY3roalrfV_JilkQjkz0qFsmwGLXNA_d5Ex6Pfj7BWNRqJGISQxX32j4v1NkOm1yWIHP-rnaE3tuIIjVlXEp9aIOgkq3C_y57pHD1ErBKEaFTRY4Yo-sx9H0p7V8I61Z-t13wlaDRBpa5zznNnQJdJQW99708S6bIrETnq4OuyIZokaBR-9nWOnwWQRsAvN7wWQgw34F5tuV8-pI6iJKy0Fc8T4nKX9ItBfRinSJFG77qE7YGfDElS2TbOv6lAIknGhve3w0Ecx4wPUzbmWf0pOWj8VszC8D6Cvk%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=2c9c83aebf85401fb3e5a712c3bbc72b&_e=lAivSSYhXDO4OiNv4ccymoKr1aHJOuc7hgElbU1AxBrkcjzVQc9L0CDEmADr9j9md2T2GtTTY3roalrfV_JilkQjkz0qFsmwGLXNA_d5Ex6Pfj7BWNRqJGISQxX32j4v1NkOm1yWIHP-rnaE3tuIIjVlXEp9aIOgkq3C_y57pHD1ErBKEaFTRY4Yo-sx9H0pWAE8K_3uPJlzojEkrLOZAZJkkdcSpkTlwo6J32O9Ht4WYuasduysT1oDeud1TZQkaqOCF_geYFxUMYjMlyoaYbUIk5pWmy3u7HFx5ZdtCADGrOa9kz_GFA3xnhkXmMfgrwXCbFBYnbDv-l4njaGdpOeIlFjWmYVMZ8bb1MXJrlE%3D)

---

PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243
