In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: I just made a difficult decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Last week we learned that AIPAC was running a poll in my district to test the waters of supporting a primary challenger against me.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1653%2E791427%2EQ1B12A)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250528-1-180&t=2&akid=1653%2E791427%2EQ1B12A)
Friend — Last week we learned that AIPAC was reportedly running a poll in my district to test the waters of supporting a primary challenger against me.
**This is a serious warning shot.**
After this news broke, I met with my team to discuss our strategy to counter AIPAC and win this campaign.
I know that the best way to fight back is to start investing in our outreach **right now** — not waiting until it’s too late. That means paying for online ads, hiring canvassers and organizers, sending out mailers, growing our contact lists, and more.
But the problem is that the money for additional investments just isn’t our budget right now. So I made a difficult decision, **and approved some new investments anyway,** because I made a bet that this team would step up and help us afford the campaign we need to run.
Now I need your help to back that up.
If you’re ready to take on AIPAC, chip in $5.
If you’re ready to fight for democracy, healthcare for all, climate action, and the safety and dignity of Palestinians, chip in $5.
_**If you’re ready to win, chip in $5._**
**[Please, use this link or the buttons below to chip in $5 or whatever you can afford today. We have to start laying the groundwork for victory today, before it’s too late to stop AIPAC and their billionaire allies.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250528-1-180&t=3&akid=1653%2E791427%2EQ1B12A)

clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, we're approaching our final end-of-month deadline before the quarter ends, so we've set an ambitious goal to raise $2,000 by Saturday at midnight. Meeting this goal will ensure I'm able to run the strongest race possible, but I can't do it without your help. = | | = Here's why we absolutely have to meet our deadline, Peter: I'm laser-focused on delivering real results in PA. From lowering the costs of living to making it easier to start and maintain a small business, we are on your side. But Governor Shapiro and I have attracted major attention from national Republicans for continuing to stand up to Trump's aggressive and radical agenda. Republican politicians and their mega-donors know that Pennsylvania will decide the fate of the 2026 election, just like always, and it's up to us to be ready for outside money to pour into the state. So, without your support now, my team and I run the risk of playing catch-up closer to Election Day. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Austin Davis * | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. US citizens with cancer. Of course the Left won't give him any credit
for that because they are heartless monsters.

by Hugh Hewitt
### **Cliff 's Note: 🚨 When Grifts Attack! Elon Musk vs. Trump's "Big Beautiful" Budget by Beelzebub 🚨**
Strangers in the night, exchanging glances, wondering in the night, what were the chances...
Well, well, well, it looks like the bumbling billionaires bromance may be heading for a failure to launch...just like SpaceX! Yes, Elon Musk, everyone's fave incellionaire, who's usually content playing Trump's tech pet and bro-breaking into The U.S. Department of the Treasury with his army of 14-yr olds, suddenly decided to call out Trump's barf-inducing self-nicknamed "Big Beautiful Bill."
Why? Because, according to Elon, it _adds to the deficit._ You don't say, Elon!? Wow, next thing ya know he'll tell us the Tesla Cybertruck is ugly as fuck, as over-priced as Trump-University degree and has shoddily-glued-on panels like the Millennium Falcon toy I constructed as a toddler.
* * *
_**Brief Interlude: Is Tech Bro *Stoopid* better, equal to, or worse than Christian Nationalist *Stoopid?* I dunno. But watch, decide, and then continue reading my column!**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/035d035b-8f02-4d88-86b3-43408aeca5fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Yes, it's the same Elon Musk--the guy who ran Twitter into a financial Wile E. Coyote crater and whose fake department, Doge--never created by a Senate Committee--has been the fiscal equivalent of the 2008 housing market. **Seriously, dude, are you making me take Donald Trump 's side on something??**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cac00ed9-2287-4022-aae2-9198572f4fe6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Of course, Trump's bill will frag our finances. But a) All Trump knows is destruction, from companies to lives to countries. Anyone could seen this, and you, Elonm still chose to throw in with him, you Dolt and Gabbana; b) You--you abhorrent apartheid offspring who failed at everything you did while not-really, but-sorta in the U.S. government--are far from the ideal messenger here!
No, Elon's tantrum isn't about macroeconomics. It more likely about that thing we got audio of him balling abouty to friend/foe Donald Trump in the Oval. **It 's about the fact that hitching his once-valuable brand to MAGA has... ...**

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: RE: the FBI
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But I’ve never gone with the safe option. I only follow the right option.
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f9b4076a9d4e4cbdbbd8673f27d61a03&_e=c61_oDIbqZHuDa1gLEJ3vuG1zh589fyT3kU8bXhhYMZTIwzycYGbGt49XR2rv6jAoJ38nmEpkyMIzHSfND33cApDWN_fYTUsibXUw_3S0o81Av3K8mjN1ZGRWjG5IeaRcF1hxCJoxPJGjKh8Tkck0fkhX6azhJuVXrIqRmUjsGC1FzIiTuaExtLik1ndd8aESLM67eJvz1VPrcj8IikoaWKM0IvmIZFJXwKsmDzLGsnU1zbRunqYVQ7jjZ9RsGphz0FbtKHxIjjKa6RgiybzRIzVCb1-ooDCzscCBPXf1109BXadz3PfjYaUZMWwjgeKvLDceAHZxkIcEaaYXSx3gPoTktwY7-LLBtIJXGtc77t7CBcMOWoF-yTSxFnd0wvO)
---
Peter,
---
My law licenses have been taken away and I can no longer defend myself in court. I may even face a 20-YEAR prison sentence in a case so severe that President Trump cannot even save me with a pardon.
---
_So, the “safe” thing to do right now would be to keep quiet and not say anything that would anger the powers-that-be._
---
_But that’s not who I am._
---
**Throughout my life, I’ve never gone with the “safe” option. I do what’s _RIGHT_.**
---
_And so, I’m speaking out and I’ve prepared a memo for you on something deeply troubling._
---

clean_body: But I’ve never gone with the safe option. I only follow the right option. | Peter, My law licenses have been taken away and I can no longer defend myself in court. I may even face a 20-YEAR prison sentence in a case so severe that President Trump cannot even save me with a pardon. So, the “safe” thing to do right now would be to keep quiet and not say anything that would anger the powers-that-be. But that’s not who I am. Throughout my life, I’ve never gone with the “safe” option. I do what’s RIGHT. And so, I’m speaking out and I’ve prepared a memo for you on something deeply troubling. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

body:

Peter,

I have an important announcement, and you're the first person I'm reaching out to with it.

**I 'm running for Senate in Minnesota again to take down the Radical Left! [**Can you chip in to give me the head start I need?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b1cd597dcc824487b287957854140afb&_e=VO-BFD__Gft19DSU-yGPnRcUHLdmOSOAq7atrvjcEjpFqBk_aaWG_aegdkZXd4JpqaneBPai1HIXWD_kOvvXjeRY1kTZEm751bWovWvj8OsBJvBPgfo0-GeYGcDXHQDYm2ee4pKOpdwT_-s52tSiFNM4Co1zFSwSjp0CohIZLIrXgzkHGKGWM0q1NniVHMgxxDdB13_Vvq56zf1eHLzlTTxpIZf39ASYPu2FxlWMw5YrCjfDPD2RJLWoe0QHtKxwb88xJ_6mh7ZrwU6nhgXkmDbJp31JexPQWmxvg9yhtArM-BgxcS7ejX8zmfPSf73MPNBLxmKWLZAjKeNa6xESuQ%3D%3D)**

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b1cd597dcc824487b287957854140afb&_e=VO-BFD__Gft19DSU-yGPnRcUHLdmOSOAq7atrvjcEjpFqBk_aaWG_aegdkZXd4JpqaneBPai1HIXWD_kOvvXjeRY1kTZEm751bWovWvj8OsBJvBPgfo0-GeYGcDXHQDYm2ee4pKOpdwT_-s52tSiFNM4Co1zFSwSjp0CohIZLIrXgzkHGKGWM0q1NniVHMgxZevwAguqg8XbYYBZTra8CKQ_UWctadmksAnHnu_aNULwnR5-evIil_v3El2t-qZeJv4pS_UpsOrwpKv2xPsxYRbLQuJEidWgruGA5JnOLuQ__Rrn1by8dciU34u9C-ulG-PoYC8TtelDDfjXPVoirw%3D%3D)
Now that I have two political campaigns under my belt, I understand what it takes to win. It's not easy for a Free-Thinking Black Republican to win in Minnesota. The Democrats control the media, schools, election integrity, and the areas with the most voter turnout.

_They want me to be a slave and servant to their politics. But I 'll never abandon my America-First principles._

For a Black Republican to win, it takes MULTIPLE runs at it, especially when you don't have help from the counter-MAGA RINO Republicans. First, you have to build a brand and get your name out there, then you have to endure the baseless attacks from the media and Left, and finally, you have to get your uncensored message out to voters.

**This takes time, but I 'm confident that in 2026, I'll defeat the crooked Left and become Minnesota's first Black Senator elected to represent Minnesotans.**

__The 2022 and 2024 elections were like pre-game warmups. If you don 't stretch and put up some shots before the game, you're going in cold, and you're bound to lose.

__[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b1cd597dcc824487b287957854140afb&_e=VO-BFD__Gft19DSU-yGPnRcUHLdmOSOAq7atrvjcEjpFqBk_aaWG_aegdkZXd4JpqaneBPai1HIXWD_kOvvXjeRY1kTZEm751bWovWvj8OsBJvBPgfo0-GeYGcDXHQDYm2ee4pKOpdwT_-s52tSiFNM4Co1zFSwSjp0CohIZLIrXgzkHGKGWM0q1NniVHMgxSXeLYsNYYLDbcGGtJqUwrkFxxWQOW__ERNfDDs3Zg1V5X-vDgwC8DzYecqjPQ9JBE_vv0_O_E4av1Fur_OzcKO1c70tC9ME9nLTxE6WYDP9xfBI7qD0rkJ-PQs0mdE60eIcVWfFGv0dnUeCxyFjcjA%3D%3D)_
But I 'm warmed up now, and I'm ready to DUNK on the Radical Left once and for all._

**In the 2024 election, we gained 8 points of the 24 that we needed. No one outside of our movement expected my campaign to be competitive, yet I got 1.3 MILLION VOTES with ZERO HELP!**

[**THIS IS WHY I NEED TO START NOW! I 'M RELYING ON YOU TO CHIP IN AND GIVE ME THE HEAD START THAT I NEED TO WIN!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b1cd597dcc824487b287957854140afb&_e=VO-BFD__Gft19DSU-yGPnRcUHLdmOSOAq7atrvjcEjpFqBk_aaWG_aegdkZXd4JpqaneBPai1HIXWD_kOvvXjeRY1kTZEm751bWovWvj8OsBJvBPgfo0-GeYGcDXHQDYm2ee4pKOpdwT_-s52tSiFNM4Co1zFSwSjp0CohIZLIrXgzkHGKGWM0q1NniVHMgxgTx5-exznLyH0RwYsRJzhI4kKfk74o50OE22ClllTvrgylwFVKyA_t79wAHlqGMhBRrlQ64UBOnOJwUkyXS9qdTL6Q-4NUfL9Ncfxhls9hykmOH1PeNE0NGhTKsbFP8kXHNdHCA3zyBgrSUPkCi6QQ%3D%3D)

I need your help by midnight to start amassing the resources to win.

[**Peter, I 'm humbly asking you to donate just $10 before midnight to defeat a Radical Leftist who's been anti-Trump since the beginning.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b1cd597dcc824487b287957854140afb&_e=VO-BFD__Gft19DSU-yGPnRcUHLdmOSOAq7atrvjcEjpFqBk_aaWG_aegdkZXd4JpqaneBPai1HIXWD_kOvvXjeRY1kTZEm751bWovWvj8OsBJvBPgfo0-GeYGcDXHQDYm2ee4pKOpdwT_-s52tSiFNM4Co1zFSwSjp0CohIZLIrXgzkHGKGWM0q1NniVHMgxn3M2wuQjtF-E9kStzWQfP7_1UNWqA-0Eg3z-3Hw-TTCyqSydL-53iJ2X2CidNLU6rlXX2JjGmqqL-6X9M4QLxx9gb_Dr_MUSrFHfsKbGqb6y83zhcGd77ZLzYWur5dkcTVaCV-YUkeJJXIVUuNPlrQ%3D%3D)

Here's to our Head Start,
Royce White for Senate

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b1cd597dcc824487b287957854140afb&_e=VO-BFD__Gft19DSU-yGPnRcUHLdmOSOAq7atrvjcEjpFqBk_aaWG_aegdkZXd4JpqaneBPai1HIXWD_kOvvXjeRY1kTZEm751bWovWvj8OsBJvBPgfo0-GeYGcDXHQDYm2ee4pKOpdwT_-s52tSiFNM4Co1zFSwSjp0CohIZLIrXgzkHGKGWM0q1NniVHMgxF2AlOcero1FjDenmwdMxOhy7yBfSX4sV2vodhOTTwyCwIdi5MNIVo68W2che08bu4yDHYqlKl8pavhikfy3SnUByisMtYDTKkSMJqTzhEZ05-rrqroK8Ss2sfT7fa-WjLuGX4pX1S6US3ntcv5oP6w%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is working tirelessly to FLIP Minnesota Red and give President Trump the MAGA reinforcements he needs. Can you help him by clicking the button below?

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b1cd597dcc824487b287957854140afb&_e=VO-BFD__Gft19DSU-yGPnRcUHLdmOSOAq7atrvjcEjpFqBk_aaWG_aegdkZXd4JpqaneBPai1HIXWD_kOvvXjeRY1kTZEm751bWovWvj8OsBJvBPgfo0-GeYGcDXHQDYm2ee4pKOpdwT_-s52tSiFNM4Co1zFSwSjp0CohIZLIrXgzkHGKGWM0q1NniVHMgxzBw6CEE3c1zwsePbS8rO_XXUCG69emWq9wDpy9BX95zNJsXGbv-6fajAdnsWMjHfOQkKH9BUYma_XcUe8RaH09BBvzala_WZVbAShVMzlrSFHiE8SfBZadPXkAhHRJv-P6IWVjwCJeOMYOK9SHs4Mg%3D%3D)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/hiding-in-hospitals-and-stealing?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

This week I published a [now viral piece](https://substack.com/redirect/e2ec2a5b-efb5-456b-ac3c-8e592093c364?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) demonstrating the horrifying reality that the Israeli government's assault on Gaza is no no longer 'just' a genocide--it is also a holocaust. In response I received overwhelming affirmation and support from pro-justice activists and readers--Muslim, Jewish, Christian, and atheist, American and European, Palestinian and Israeli.
I also received a minority of incessant voices claiming that Hamas is somehow _causing_ this holocaust by stealing and and hiding in hospitals. Even if these two allegations were true, they would do nothing to 'justify' a holocaust. But moreover, the facts show that these are demonstrably false claims being levied by the Israeli government and corporate media to whitewash a holocaust--and anyone committed to justice should reject them outright. Here are the receipts. **Let 's Address This.**
**We need all hands on deck in 2025 to stand against fascism and disinformation. I invite you to join our movement for justice as a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..j6ERuOspTfhe5kw7wBItXKLRbw_vxyTS_3NZBa3sMOs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=164532661)
## CLAIM: Gaza is starving because Hamas is stealing aid
**Fact Check:** In reality, all the evidence points to the Israeli government and illegal Israeli settlers blocking aid to Palestinians, so much so that Israeli civilians themselves are standing up to their own government to help ensure aid gets through.
International human rights law mandates that an occupying military ensures access to aid, food, and life's necessities for the people they are occupying. The Netanyahu regime is in grotesque violation of this international obligation. Notwithstanding the incessant bombing and burning of Palestinian civilians--Netanyahu is actively and perpetually blocking aid to starve Palestinians to death. Since this January, after breaking the ceasefire agreement _he_ agreed to, Netanyahu unilaterally reignited the bombing, and is cutting off food, medicine, and water to a population of people in Gaza he's already spent the past 20 months brutalizing.
But it's Hamas that's stealing the aid, right?
It's a claim we've heard throughout the past 20 months with no actual evidence. Instead and on the contrary, Cindy McCain, the widow of Senator John McCain and executive director of the World Food Programme, made it unequivocally clear just this week: the Israeli government--not Hamas--is blocking aid into Gaza. In her [words](https://substack.com/redirect/06c84cf6-da7e-4cf6-908c-97a21e6ad34e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "_We have had no instances of Hamas stealing food_." Her statement directly contradicts the propaganda being peddled by the Israeli government and parroted by its defenders.
This matters. Because under the Fourth Geneva Convention, it is a _war crime_ for an occupying power to block humanitarian aid. Specifically, Articles 49, 51, 55, 56, and 59 make clear the occupying power has a legal obligation to ensure that food, water, and medical aid reach civilians.
Instead, Netanyahu's government is doing the opposite. They are using starvation, dehydration, and now incineration as tools of warfare. In just the past five days, the number of hot meals served by community kitchens has dropped 70%--from 840,000 meals to just 260,000--all for a population of nearly 2 million people. And as mentioned, Israelis themselves are sick of Israeli settlers blocking aid, and are [putting themselves in harms way to ensure aid gets through](https://substack.com/redirect/93c9d50c-1e8a-4f02-9add-db05fec944d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e849412f-6cef-4685-83e6-063153860009?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Meanwhile, the media allowed to report on the blockade repeatedly affirm that it is not Hamas, but [the Israeli government and Israeli settlers blocking aid](https://substack.com/redirect/a786d590-bc7d-43c8-bfc2-b87c37a703af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). A US envoy further confirmed that while Israel repeatedly claims Hamas is blocking aid, the [Israeli government has yet to show any evidence confirming this allegation](https://substack.com/redirect/cb34368e-0c9b-40db-859e-958cf97a60bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Israel has not presented specific evidence for its claim that Hamas is diverting U.N. aid, and its recent targeted killings of Gaza police commanders safeguarding truck convoys have made it "virtually impossible" to distribute the goods safely, a top U.S. envoy said in rare public criticism of Israel.
In short, those who perpetuate this myth succeed only in whitewashing a holocaust and genocide--a horribly shameful act as innocent Palestinians continue to suffer and die. Such people should stop pretending Hamas is blocking aid, and start working with the rest of us working for justice to demand the Israeli government stops blocking aid.
**Support** _**Let 's Address This**_**as a paid subscriber and let 's continue to build this movement for justice together.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..j6ERuOspTfhe5kw7wBItXKLRbw_vxyTS_3NZBa3sMOs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=164532661)
## CLAIM: Hamas Is Hiding in Hospitals
**Fact Check:** The old refrain remains, "_Israel is acting in self-defense. Hamas is hiding in hospitals. What do you expect Israel to do?_ " As with the claim of stealing aid, the Israeli government has presented no evidence confirming this allegation. It is false. These so-called justifications collapse under even the lightest scrutiny.
First, I expect the Israeli government to not bomb hospitals as they are protected under international human rights law. No sane person would justify bombing a hospital in Tel Aviv, London, or New York, even if it were discovered with absolute certainty that Hamas generals were hiding inside. The 'justification' to bomb hospitals in Gaza on the mere accusation that Hamas is 'hiding inside' is in reality a declaration that the Israeli government does not deem Palestinians as human beings. This is not hyperbole, given that Israeli leadership has already referred to Palestinians as "[human animals](https://substack.com/redirect/a8f8f0f9-0865-4949-aa95-565705501789?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" and is demonstrably [committing a holocaust](https://substack.com/redirect/e2ec2a5b-efb5-456b-ac3c-8e592093c364?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Second, the evidence shows that Hamas was never 'hiding in hospitals.' A thorough UN investigation tackled this important question. International Human Rights Law [makes it explicitly clear that hospitals and medical institutions are protected from attack](https://substack.com/redirect/fa03e265-cd5b-4503-88b9-580748e28a13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The _exception_ that IHL recognizes is when a hospital or medical facility is used:
> Outside their humanitarian functions [and] "act harmful to the enemy". In case of doubt as to whether medical units of establishments are used to commit an "act harmful to the enemy", they should be presumed not to be so used.
Of immense significance, IHL clarifies that _when in doubt_ --hospitals and medical institutions must remain protected. At the time of the aforementioned UN report, the Israeli military had bombed 110 hospitals and medical centers in Gaza, claiming Hamas was 'hiding inside.' This means that in bombing 110 healthcare facilities, the Israeli military should have had explicitly clear knowledge that Hamas was using these facilities as "command-and-control" centers in violation of IHL. And if the Israeli government had explicitly clear knowledge, then they should have zero trouble providing ample evidence, example after example, that Hamas is using hospitals in violation of IHL.
But what does the reality show us? It shows that on the contrary, the detailed UN Commission concluded no such evidence of Hamas hiding in hospitals:
> **Israeli security forces asserted that over 85% of major medical facilities in Gaza were used by Hamas for terror operations, but did not provide evidence to substantiate that claim**. Israeli security forces alleged that there were tunnels underneath or connected to hospitals, and that Hamas stored weapons, hid personnel and operated headquarters from within and underneath hospitals. The Commission interviewed senior medical personnel at hospitals and they denied that there was any military activity, emphasizing that the hospitals' only role was to treat patients.
Let's unpack this. The Israeli military first claims that 85% of the 110 medical facilities it targeted were used for "Hamas terror operations." That means that it admits 15% of the medical facilities it targeted had no Hamas terror operations, but the Israeli military targeted them anyway. That in and of itself is a clear admission of war crimes. And that is all that should be necessary for the US Government, indeed the global West, to stop arming Netanyahu.
But adding to these war crimes is that even in the "85% (allegedly) legitimate targets," the Israeli government could provide no evidence to substantiate its claims. None. Not one single example. The UN Commission found zero evidence from the Israeli government, or from a single senior medical personnel at the hospitals that any military activity occurred at the hospitals that the Israeli military bombed. Yet, the bombings continue, in complete violation of IHL. And given that these bombings are deliberate and intentional, this satisfies the "intent" element of proving genocide.
Indeed, beyond war crimes, the Israeli military bombing 110 hospitals and medical centers in Gaza, while knowing full well they are _not_ Hamas military command centers, proves they are intentionally killing Palestinian civilians. That is genocide. And that this mass killing has become systematic, intentional, and fire-based to burn civilians alive makes this by definition a holocaust.
## Conclusion
I am hopeful the receipts presented above help you debunk those who might be misinformed in your circles. The fact is that it is not Hamas stealing aid and hiding in hospitals, but the Israeli government who is blocking aid and bombing hospitals. As a result, we are witnessing a holocaust that the Israeli government is attempting to shroud in a mass campaign of disinformation. That mass disinformation enables a mass-scale, intentional, systematic campaign of death--by bombing, by starvation, by dehydration, by denial of medical care, and by fire. Children are being burned alive in their sleep. Civilians are being denied food and medicine while the perpetrators openly admit their intentions and dare the world to stop them. And the world--our own government included--continues to send weapons, money, and silence.
We must demand an end to these atrocities.
As a human rights lawyer, I write this not for shock value, but because language matters, justice matters, and truth matters. I am grateful to each of you for allowing me to continue this work without paywalls, and without fear. You are the reason over 25 million people have read this human rights newsletter, and why this platform continues to grow. You are the reason we are able to hold power to account when corporate media stays quiet. And you are the reason I know we are not alone in this fight for justice.
Please, continue to read, share, subscribe, and speak out. Justice demands it.

Hey Peter – I just wrapped up a check-in with my team, and with just 3 days left until our deadline, **I’m getting worried.**

We aren’t on track to hit our $25,000 end-of-month goal - so I had no other option but to come to you personally, Peter. name: Justice Democrats
subject: Guess who AIPAC is targeting now?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we just got
word that AIPAC may be gearing up to spend millions to unseat progressive
champion and Squad member Rep. Ilhan Omar next year.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250528-io?refcode=em20250528-36716&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36716_1203867_4hojdh&akid=36716%2E1203867%2E4hojdh ]Screenshot of a headline and subheading from The Intercept. The
headline reads: 'IS AIPAC COMING AFTER ILHAN OMAR?' The subheading below
says: 'A poll sent to Omar’s district tested the waters on a Democratic
candidate backed by “a right-wing, pro-Israel group that is funded by
Trump-supporting billionaires.”'

If you’re ready to fight back and protect our Squad, [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250528-io?refcode=em20250528-36716&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36716_1203867_4hojdh&akid=36716%2E1203867%2E4hojdh ]split a donation
between Ilhan’s campaign and Justice Democrats right now.

A recent poll sent to voters in Ilhan’s district had AIPAC’s fingerprints
all over it. The survey asked multiple questions about the sitting
Congresswoman as well as former Minnesota state representative Ryan
Winkler.

It went on to call Ilhan “one of the most anti-Israel members of Congress”
simply because she supports a permanent ceasefire in Gaza and opposes the
Israeli military’s ongoing genocide against Palestinians.

Meanwhile, the poll asked voters how they feel about Winkler being backed
by “a right-wing, pro-Israel group that is funded by Trump-supporting
billionaires and has endorsed dozens of Republican members of Congress who
support Trump and his MAGA agenda” — obviously, they’re talking about
AIPAC.

As our communications director, Usamah Andrabi, told The Intercept, this
is AIPAC’s playbook: smear progressives, run conservative Democrats, and
spend millions from their MAGA megadonors to win.

We already lost working-class leaders Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman to
AIPAC-backed challengers last year — we need to start organizing NOW if we
want to keep Ilhan in Congress fighting for peace and justice for all.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250528-io?refcode=em20250528-36716&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36716_1203867_4hojdh&akid=36716%2E1203867%2E4hojdh ]So Peter,
can you split a grassroots donation of $5 between Ilhan’s
campaign and Justice Democrats to make sure we have the resources needed
to keep her in office and defeat AIPAC?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250528-io?refcode=em20250528-36716&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36716_1203867_4hojdh&akid=36716%2E1203867%2E4hojdh ]Contribute $5

We can’t let AIPAC get an edge in the race this early on. Thanks for
powering our work to re-elect Ilhan and the rest of our working-class,
progressive bloc.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250528-36716-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36716_1203867_4hojdh&akid=36716%2E1203867%2E4hojdh

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36716%2E1203867%2E4hojdh

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Josh Harder
subject: Trump’s corruption
body:
He’s not even hiding it.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108535059/548233683/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmRjZmZkYzQtMGQzYy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jAd7r9S4R2ccvU1OFOPZW9353YvzbeZgWyTOxLrOV5I=) | Peter, This past few weeks Donald Trump’s corruption has been on full display. Let’s do a quick summary. Recently, Trump has:
* Accepted a private jet from the Qatari government
* Charged $5 million for one-on-one meetings with donors
* Hosted 200 investors in his $TRUMP meme coin at a private crypto dinner at his golf club. Attendees paid millions of dollars that went directly into Trump’s pockets

Peter, just because Trump is doing this in plain sight doesn’t mean it isn’t corruption. He doesn’t care if he gets caught because he knows Republicans in Congress won’t stop him. **Trump is charging people for access and influence. He has already stockpiled _$600 million_ to attack Democrats like me in the 2026 midterms.** This corruption should enrage every single one of us. So how do we counter the massive $5 million donors? We do it the only way we know how, through grassroots support. Our next end-of-month deadline is this Saturday. I need your help to raise $25,000 to combat all the corrupt money Trump is going to throw at our district. [_**Will you please chip in now to help us reach our goal and show Donald Trump and his billionaire donors that our democracy isn’t for sale?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108535060/548233684/-1759382976?&refcode=E13482-20250528-TrumpCorruption-SL-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmRjZmZkYzQtMGQzYy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jAd7r9S4R2ccvU1OFOPZW9353YvzbeZgWyTOxLrOV5I=) \- Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. [**Josh doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money, so please chip in now to our campaign!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108535061/548233685/1618730853?refcode=E13482-20250528-TrumpCorruption-footer-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmRjZmZkYzQtMGQzYy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jAd7r9S4R2ccvU1OFOPZW9353YvzbeZgWyTOxLrOV5I=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108535062/548233686/-1860252395?refcode=E13482-20250528-TrumpCorruption-footer-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmRjZmZkYzQtMGQzYy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jAd7r9S4R2ccvU1OFOPZW9353YvzbeZgWyTOxLrOV5I=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108535063/548233687/1618730853?refcode=E13482-20250528-TrumpCorruption-footer-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmRjZmZkYzQtMGQzYy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jAd7r9S4R2ccvU1OFOPZW9353YvzbeZgWyTOxLrOV5I=) If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. clean_body: He’s not even hiding it. | = | Peter, This past few weeks Donald Trump’s corruption has been on full display. Let’s do a quick summary. Recently, Trump has: Accepted a private jet from the Qatari government Charged $5 million for one-on-one meetings with donors Hosted 200 investors in his $TRUMP meme coin at a private crypto dinner at his golf club. Attendees paid millions of dollars that went directly into Trump’s pockets Peter, just because Trump is doing this in plain sight doesn’t mean it isn’t corruption. He doesn’t care if he gets caught because he knows Republicans in Congress won’t stop him. Trump is charging people for access and influence. He has already stockpiled $600 million to attack Democrats like me in the 2026 midterms. This corruption should enrage every single one of us. So how do we counter the massive $5 million donors? We do it the only way we know how, through grassroots support. Our next end-of-month deadline is this Saturday. I need your help to raise $25,000 to combat all the corrupt money Trump is going to throw at our district. = \- Josh

name: Tobias Read
subject: May Updates from the Oregon Secretary of State’s Office 📸
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250528em-nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250528em-nl]
Hi folks, it’s Secretary of State Tobias Read, reporting back with some updates about our work since the people of Oregon elected me last November.
Earlier this month, I joined the Locked on Blazers podcast to talk basketball, NBA arena funding in Portland, the origins of my Trail Blazers fandom, and how Greg Oden made it to the State House in 2007. You can watch the full interview with Locked on Blazers here [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FG2rKk4imVE] .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250528em-nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250528em-nl]
I am also pleased to announce that I was honored by the athletic department of my alma mater, Willamette University, as “Alumnus of the Year.” It meant a lot to be honored by Willamette, and I am grateful for the recognition of my dedication to the school’s athletic programs.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250528em-nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250528em-nl]
You may not know, but I was a competitive rower during my time as a Bearcat. Don’t believe me? Here’s my boat out on the Willamette River!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250528em-nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250528em-nl]
On Saturday, May 10th, I joined candidates for Salem-Keizer School Board in a get-out-the-vote canvassing effort for our local elections for school board, bond measures, and some local government positions, which were held on May 20th. I’m excited to report that three of the great candidates in the image below—Lisa Harnisch, Karina Guzmán Ortiz, and Mel Fuller—won their races! And leave no doubt: Angelo Arredondo, the fourth candidate, has a bright future ahead of him.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250528em-nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250528em-nl]
Throughout this month, I’ve been honored by your engagement in my fight for a better education system here in Oregon. That starts with improving performance monitoring, increasing transparency, scrutinizing spending, and creating enforceable standards. Dozens of you added your name to my petition to support our state’s education system.
You also joined me in the fight to protect Vote By Mail and stood shoulder to shoulder with me as we fought back against President Trump when he said he “didn’t know” if he had to ‘uphold the Constitution’ in an interview with NBC News.
I am committed to continuing the push back against the Trump Administration’s attacks on voting and our democracy. But I need you with me.
If you’d like to support my campaign and the work we do to strengthen and defend democracy, please donate here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250528em-nl]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250315em-nl]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250528em-nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250528em-nl]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250315em-nl]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=tOYVvdP7ruFNzoCzY37SEO1ZNF1bKC1QQ0F4LD2Xues8waB7iQJ8259jTTpwzwXiQSQXYQv2wnrYkue9pdkAanYsIei8x8FSmpoTD25iyeEi1IfZJSGXbVepzJ%2Fgglx0B3G3PAwOXckpkk3VFi9pPVT5yhcXUc4aLQmhKCEO9DpMaN%2B9t5d0ZZRPxbX5nrE7rJjBCTWGUarW0semYAkrJqkz9%2FLFfE%2FOYX76u9SnDNlKJwQcH5W4AjrfEzLUDF819xO9LujEcdqV3i%2ByeTNGQQAHwd%2BNyFNPtMLQl5n5BrFDpYtstMNGqAUUIjaV1aOI2QTyJQ807%2FpnkpsQasKQGP7OE4OCu3NbBbfc6YTdhr1Q0xsXj0LPODmv%2BGf8bJSAUKClLsxoIIBqAgmhAc%2FAoK75DaTLaAwWFl%2B5fdk5t6y87u6DxhSKMXA9%2FvIUaTPF .

name: Team WFP
subject: What to do if you encounter ICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Since Trump took office in January, he has embarked on a multi-front campaign to intimidate political opponents. That has included unleashing federal law enforcement agents like ICE to try and send fear throughout our communities. Often dressed in plain clothes, with masks covering their faces, ICE agents are kidnapping people off the street for no reason other than their political views.1 They are ripping mothers away from their children.2 And federal officials are even arresting and charging elected officials from New Jersey to Wisconsin.3 **Let’s be clear about what’s happening here, Peter.** Donald Trump is leading the most corrupt administration in our country’s history, accepting bribes like a $400 million luxury plane from the Qatari royal family, and pocketing hundreds of millions from crypto scams. At the same time, he has been largely stymied — at least so far — in his attempt to fulfill his campaign promise of “the largest deportation” in American history.4 Instead, they are hoping to placate their own hardcore base, and send fear through the majority of this country, through a series of high-profile raids and arrests. **They’re hoping the rest of us will cower in fear — which is exactly why it is on all of us to take a stand in this moment.** We wanted to use this email to share some resources to help you equip yourselves, your neighbors, and your loved ones to safely and legally navigate any potential interaction with ICE or other federal agents. But before we do: **[Can you add your name to urge your elected officials to stand strong and speak up in the face of these attacks? Trump and his people want to silence any of us who want to hold him accountable — let’s show them we won’t be silent.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIq_Rq3KohZ4y2Iu5_arjN96sW7Uui8LlHv1snq662WmNf-6wt_OpJ3q1euZ_q62tFpf2Yofi586yfl_R93M4kr_JeJyX-y-8DhToMIiLhsnWTl1uCJAJfYCuEo9M3ojt6dul6F1yDUjaNsfGijoKFqXuS66cN188lUEr8h3U_W9SJVG2_5XZMLseP6lBC8ARSf4UHz6OJQVX1Dma477PRX8VvgTi4S1UyBhRALjXrldjnUuGhYhxQYsoVvXqueIPgMX6m68JxE_qWvCLkAX5UcSqCRpcRQo-zGgQmUHgep04KZHFZUwafnlr8jygjKkW4/4gv/RDaC7YoiS0GDSetXgzSycg/h0/h001.LNs7728DsS3EBo75_rX_q-1UGW8q27KOrNxGNJ7LaPg)** **[Add your name](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIq_Rq3KohZ4y2Iu5_arjN96sW7Uui8LlHv1snq662WmNf-6wt_OpJ3q1euZ_q62tFpf2Yofi586yfl_R93M4kr_JeJyX-y-8DhToMIiLhsnWTl1uCJAJfYCuEo9M3ojt6dul6F1yDUjaNsfGijoKFqQ37bPESJGfsjYmq5KRYeEe9YqE7rdW2CpAnVGesUVBzHyxelY8kWai-yqxYmIXpx0ujf2-SDXx4kj74IThyqJ4vRbogYzPFs-ckcMeDfgldpeOKnt5wILVPgcj7PjDDjqOdaN1eYsmux1k-HDm48WL9Fy55D0izchmT-6G_S5gI/4gv/RDaC7YoiS0GDSetXgzSycg/h1/h001.UWFftpPE48G4XfSwqfsyuc6CO_ucqFRhr4cDNoNM06M)** ICE has been operating in many cases like Trump’s own secret police. That’s why it is VITAL that we equip ourselves, neighbors, and loved ones with the knowledge necessary to navigate a confrontation with them. Here are some important things to keep in mind if you witness or are subject to an interaction with ICE: **You do NOT have to speak to ICE without a valid warrant signed by a judge.** If they attempt to enter your home or your workplace, ask for a _warrant signed by a judge._ The National Immigrant Justice Center **[has some examples of what these warrants look like.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.T4f1s0H8aL8dqpmq959YtBN8kXhtcng0jX1V_lUg-G4z-qY-xRG3aW5TBcYFV1ikjGZTxxGe4bsKs9socyrwE4YVQ8VgVP2B8w4_F-EoxAg9dihJzHrEwEdAp-0ObEgWTt-K4WesOA5-lXrOrLOsJ6GBw-S19M4kFxsRdXB8Svy8yKA9QJY0u3re6SmEZAc48nY-NhMDVL0hoSslDhEHdIlBLMA4q4V5znPOiPhnLtykffxlOcDy0QhRhptSQYX_II8ALG4I4Z3_oiMnmLI7OkJm2ldcYxOsp5EYvQB_hnfJ9Qtximfd8iU_-Cq5hQk6/4gv/RDaC7YoiS0GDSetXgzSycg/h2/h001.R59gv1eq3wZbmoiNDCxDTr_ZamG1c5jqO1zaLfIGjLU)** **You have the right to remain silent.** This is also true for anyone else in your workplace or residence. You do not have to share personal information like your immigration status or place of birth, either. **You have the right to a lawyer.** Assert it, and ask for one. ICE does not provide attorneys, so try to consult one in advance. **They cannot force you to sign documents or hand over papers** without speaking to an attorney first. **You have the right to record your interaction,** as long as you do not interfere. **[The _ACLU_ has compiled a list of multi-lingual instructions,](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU9lQTkJe0cII8K2A6FM5vS49qh5N3ttWXRC96959TaIwfXEp4XGAC1WPIWBwgOSduVr1V4vnfmeJ9bEijVzXD-nbVG-fzIz1fjSLVmZrWQ9f7AH2flLJmY4_-gnbqQ7KoPVMzSooRFB2UfDmh3BYBJ1gpRlDTzKaPgkavZONVT20elY7lwMLro8WGogSZQiR_sMQolYAVB0ycZvRsJNuOP7V4oLQ450OAM-QuyatRtoIxpOzZPwsOic8q2GeQbGoSKwq5LEx8LVhHStyQ4VI1c/4gv/RDaC7YoiS0GDSetXgzSycg/h3/h001.CXYEhirVoIyibwzjXmjD1-kxaHUVM_hIuH4ug43KqWc)** and we urge you to familiarize yourself with them, and even print them out in case you’re confronted by ICE, or witness them confronting someone else in public. **[_United We Dream_ has shared a series of preparedness plans](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dB8drt9RndzOJEW5FX2fSYLfMpW-H8aW6WHDWZzpwE5mfNXGhKQg9wQT6L128JwqLVNAmCv9Bf6chCmrJrwgXLw0jgf3L4GGbfX9v2l9NJskvMjKzLyzG7CVgGUcOQYPk-xjtF8ryU-XbDq_rE9mEh4KQG8jr_1s2fmoss1nOai3rpw_ke5-P9e9zIivAGVRm51bsqvA3I6F7Gxo6halpaZJaOeAoJ4EbBE-nV4HWOlVWA8SSvEjtpSeaSaeRMfVls/4gv/RDaC7YoiS0GDSetXgzSycg/h4/h001.6ext-Own7m6_YAuA21FgokAH3Ym9YohA9rMKqlA2FqA)** specifically to assist immigrant families in navigating encounters with ICE or CBP. The Trump administration is counting on us to remain passive in the face of their authoritarianism. They are counting on us to look the other way when we see them harassing or abducting people in the streets. And they HATE the idea of a general population that knows their rights, and is willing to stand up for their friends, family, colleagues, and neighbors. That’s why we must continue to show up, speak out, and organize. So please, take a few minutes to **[sign this petition,](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIq_Rq3KohZ4y2Iu5_arjN96sW7Uui8LlHv1snq662WmNf-6wt_OpJ3q1euZ_q62tFpf2Yofi586yfl_R93M4kr_JeJyX-y-8DhToMIiLhsnWTl1uCJAJfYCuEo9M3ojt6dul6F1yDUjaNsfGijoKFqxFZVvP3ZR9156uKEOMfeV_-MFTnQVtySrE5WbGdNhaJAWP5w47FKdou4tWSIJD6m4z8voB9YY5qMq55gGtA6haVZxr9SEsGZ9VPZgzvdB0ad7erOL67oAWEk_ZZNEBIWONEnkNxmgv8lyM_5eRrsaXjv6ua4KsQdLQRL34qCZGE/4gv/RDaC7YoiS0GDSetXgzSycg/h5/h001.AzUH5KqcYTznoWBLCjIkVicf4oTcIlz2m8GMtAXqxjE)** read through the resources linked above, and make sure to share them often. In solidarity, Team WFP Source: 1\. [Tufts Student Arrested by ICE Is Released From Detention](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdUS12fSrk6MMZIR1Ut2K6fqBRfiRSOlI044JrPafCJW8dlvuKBRso1ACQsUZfv4CpjbcMN9BOAkixgacT4ZiAx-w0TTLY5lTJ5hn5-8kLzkNqiPL3wfYKIUgiD5NdZPXDzQnMGYJ9pzhp6yqgPlpT6XCYocC8yjkRSHTLDlQV6swchwJWfwbAUnE1aJiPivOxUR8UiD8_kiQw5dJB7nXfV22Sl8bYoT-sWP5E9KX6WAPz1xAUUvJM7fGe2vTEYIE5WFS8iNjgi9wgqYt7E9b81pHiD-P9ncYer0pFAF8zlbI_LL69D5e2xF4j-darmV0w/4gv/RDaC7YoiS0GDSetXgzSycg/h6/h001.iEqIuUwTBW3GZVMm_lyY33RvU1DEI1yYlu-sd2VLtIM), _The New York Times,_ May 9, 2025 2\. clean_body: | | | Peter, Since Trump took office in January, he has embarked on a multi-front campaign to intimidate political opponents. That has included unleashing federal law enforcement agents like ICE to try and send fear throughout our communities. Often dressed in plain clothes, with masks covering their faces, ICE agents are kidnapping people off the street for no reason other than their political views.1 They are ripping mothers away from their children.2 And federal officials are even arresting and charging elected officials from New Jersey to Wisconsin.3 Let’s be clear about what’s happening here, Peter. Donald Trump is leading the most corrupt administration in our country’s history, accepting bribes like a $400 million luxury plane from the Qatari royal family, and pocketing hundreds of millions from crypto scams. At the same time, he has been largely stymied — at least so far — in his attempt to fulfill his campaign promise of “the largest deportation” in American history.4 Instead, they are hoping to placate their own hardcore base, and send fear through the majority of this country, through a series of high-profile raids and arrests. They’re hoping the rest of us will cower in fear — which is exactly why it is on all of us to take a stand in this moment. We wanted to use this email to share some resources to help you equip yourselves, your neighbors, and your loved ones to safely and legally navigate any potential interaction with ICE or other federal agents. But before we do: ICE has been operating in many cases like Trump’s own secret police. That’s why it is VITAL that we equip ourselves, neighbors, and loved ones with the knowledge necessary to navigate a confrontation with them. Here are some important things to keep in mind if you witness or are subject to an interaction with ICE: You do NOT have to speak to ICE without a valid warrant signed by a judge. If they attempt to enter your home or your workplace, ask for a warrant signed by a judge. The National Immigrant Justice Center You have the right to remain silent. This is also true for anyone else in your workplace or residence. You do not have to share personal information like your immigration status or place of birth, either. You have the right to a lawyer. Assert it, and ask for one. ICE does not provide attorneys, so try to consult one in advance. They cannot force you to sign documents or hand over papers without speaking to an attorney first. You have the right to record your interaction, as long as you do not interfere. and we urge you to familiarize yourself with them, and even print them out in case you’re confronted by ICE, or witness them confronting someone else in public. specifically to assist immigrant families in navigating encounters with ICE or CBP. The Trump administration is counting on us to remain passive in the face of their authoritarianism. They are counting on us to look the other way when we see them harassing or abducting people in the streets. And they HATE the idea of a general population that knows their rights, and is willing to stand up for their friends, family, colleagues, and neighbors. That’s why we must continue to show up, speak out, and organize. So please, take a few minutes to read through the resources linked above, and make sure to share them often. In solidarity, Team WFP Source: 1\. , The New York Times, May 9, 2025 2\. , Rolling Stone, May 13, 2025 3\. , The New York Times, May 15, 2025 4\. , The Bulwark, April 25, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. subject: Join us for the next Resistance Lab 1.0 training on June 1st
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This session will cover our Resistance Lab 1.0 curriculum, so if you missed our first training, this is your chance to get caught up.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250528-5091-footer&t=1&akid=5091%2E420207%2ER25tKB)
Peter, with Donald Trump and MAGA billionaires waging an all-out assault on our democracy, we must do everything we can to build our power, sharpen our skills, and strengthen our resistance movement.
**So you won’t want to miss Pramila’s next virtual Resistance Lab training on Sunday, June 1st!**
[](https://www.mobilize.us/pramilaforcongress/event/775585?source=em20250528-5091)
**[RSVP Now](https://www.mobilize.us/pramilaforcongress/event/775585?source=em20250528-5091)**
**This session will cover our Resistance Lab 1.0 curriculum, so if you missed our first training, this is your chance to get caught up.**
It’s your moment to join the nearly 30,000 people from 45 states and over half a dozen countries who have signed up for a Resistance Lab training — and bring even more folks along with you!
You can attend virtually from anywhere, or even host a training session in your own home with friends and family. [**If you’d like to host a house party, simply fill out this form and a member of our team will reach out with all the tools and resources you need to succeed.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/49833?t=2&akid=5091%2E420207%2ER25tKB)
We will work to understand what we are facing, learn from others who have faced authoritarian takeovers of their countries, and shape our resistance to match the moment.
As Rachel Maddow noted on her show, the Resistance Lab dives deeper than your typical training. That’s why it’s catching the attention of so many people across the country — and the world.
If you’ve been looking for a way to fight back effectively against Trump’s cruelty, corruption and destruction of our democracy, look no further and sign up for Sunday’s session.
Whether you’re joining solo or hosting your own training, you are an essential part of this movement. [**So make sure to RSVP today, and let’s build real power together on June 1st!**](https://www.mobilize.us/pramilaforcongress/event/775585?source=em20250528-5091)
**[RSVP Now](https://www.mobilize.us/pramilaforcongress/event/775585?source=em20250528-5091)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250528-5091-footer&t=3&refcode2=5091_420207_R25tKB&akid=5091%2E420207%2ER25tKB)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

#

subject: You need to see what Hakeem Jeffries just said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
you're invited to sign the thank you card
| **_Rep. Hakeem Jeffries is our HERO!_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90434?t=6&akid=19972%2E878179%2EXMf-dE) Rep. Jeffries is exactly the kind of leader we need right now! [**We’re inviting ONLY the FIRST 200 Democrats reading this to sign our card THANKING Hakeem Jeffries for standing up for everyday Americans! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90434?t=7&akid=19972%2E878179%2EXMf-dE) | [**SECURE YOUR SPOT: DONATE $3 SIGN THE THANK YOU CARD! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90434?t=8&akid=19972%2E878179%2EXMf-dE)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

House Republicans have been nothing more than puppets for Donald Trump: GUTTING Medicaid, THREATENING Social Security, and making Trump a KING!!

I’m so grateful to have you leading the charge to defend our democracy, and for never backing down in the face of MAGA attacks.

**So today, I’m answering your call to action to make sure we flip the House, defeat the MAGA majority, and put a HUGE check on Trump!**

[**I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to join your critical fight and to help Democrats flip the seats we need to take back control! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90434?t=9&akid=19972%2E878179%2EXMf-dE) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90434?t=10&akid=19972%2E878179%2EXMf-dE) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90434?t=11&akid=19972%2E878179%2EXMf-dE)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19972%2E878179%2EXMf-dE). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19972%2E878179%2EXMf-dE).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19972%2E878179%2EXMf-dE) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=19972%2E878179%2EXMf-dE). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19972%2E878179%2EXMf-dE)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19972%2E878179%2EXMf-dE)

# Good evening PolitiBrawlers,
Trump blasted a reporter today for **[asking a very"nasty" question](https://substack.com/redirect/fe0f1982-b172-4ed9-8175-42f4870294c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. She instantly regretted it... And have you seen young GOP rising star Rep. Brandon Gill in action? He is taking the fight to the Democrats in congress everyday without mercy. Watch and enjoy the PolitiBrawls unfold!
**Thank you for your support and readership,**
The PolitiBrawl Team

# WATCH: Reporter has instant regret after asking Trump this...
A reporter asked President Trump a very bold question during an Oval Office press conference today, and Trump had a heck of a comeback.
"They say Trump always chickens out on your tariff threats and that's why the markets are higher this week. What's your response to that?" the reporter asked the president.
**[Watch to hear his savage response:](https://substack.com/redirect/fe0f1982-b172-4ed9-8175-42f4870294c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# **Apple 's Loss - Mode Mobile's Gain**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/750889df-1819-4391-8f19-6a3b7738b77e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Apple's 2024 iPhone shipments dipped as its AI push fell flat, with Mark Zuckerberg and Elon Musk criticizing the company for lacking innovation.
But while incumbents fail to impress, **[a new player is shaking up the smartphone industry](https://substack.com/redirect/750889df-1819-4391-8f19-6a3b7738b77e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** -- not with AI hype, but with real earnings for users.
Mode Mobile is completely changing smartphones, giving people the ability to earn income from the phones they already own. Their 45M+ users have already pocketed a staggering $325M+, and they were named **the fastest-growing software company in 2023 by Deloitte**.
With their Nasdaq ticker **$MODE** secured, you can still invest in their pre-IPO offering at $0.30/share.
**[Invest in the next disruption to smartphones and earn up to 100% bonus shares.](https://substack.com/redirect/750889df-1819-4391-8f19-6a3b7738b77e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

* * *
# Young MAGA star SHUTS DOWN Democrat with Elon Derangement Syndrome
Rep. Brandon Gill **[did a number on Democrat Rep. Melanie Stansbury](https://substack.com/redirect/86ef5017-9759-4867-8ca0-e90a204f32d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and her colleagues during yet another attempt to demonizing Elon Musk's audit of government spending .
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/86ef5017-9759-4867-8ca0-e90a204f32d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/86ef5017-9759-4867-8ca0-e90a204f32d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
During the hearing, Stansbury tumbled through her monologue, claiming Trump's work with Musk and DOGE operations were illegal.
"We do not work for an unelected billionaire like apparently this guy does. We work for the American people!" She said.
Gill, a Texas Representative, proceeded with what turned into a compelling call-out of liberal hypocrisy relating to their "unelected bureaucrat" outcries.
"Where were they whenever their god Anthony Fauci was f**[orcing vaccine and mask mandate](https://substack.com/redirect/86ef5017-9759-4867-8ca0-e90a204f32d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for four years during the COVID crisis? Where were they whenever unelected Alejandro Mayorkas was facilitating the invasion of our country by illegal aliens who were murdering and raping and pillaging our people?"
Gill continued, "They were nowhere to be seen because **[they don't care](https://substack.com/redirect/86ef5017-9759-4867-8ca0-e90a204f32d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Because all of those things benefitted their side of the aisle, at the expense of ours."
"Perhaps that's why they don't seem very interested in rooting out improper payments from our federal government. If you wonder why so many people are cynical about American politics, this is it.," the congressman added.
Gill further explained the shocking revelations from Musk's DOGE operations. "We're talking about **[2.7 trillion improper payments since 2003](https://substack.com/redirect/86ef5017-9759-4867-8ca0-e90a204f32d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. We're uncovering what could be **[the biggest money laundering scandal in American history](https://substack.com/redirect/86ef5017-9759-4867-8ca0-e90a204f32d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. And the other side of the aisle could care less."
Listen to Gill's brutal clap-back here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/86ef5017-9759-4867-8ca0-e90a204f32d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Harvard revokes tenure from professor paid $1 million salary amid fraud allegations
Harvard University **[revoked the tenure](https://substack.com/redirect/c6c143b5-6db9-4c51-82c0-1167cadc8b63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of business professor Francesca Gino after she was accused of data fraud. Gino had been one of Harvard's highest-paid employees, earning over $1 million annually in 2018 and 2019.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/858d4ab6-6e00-4a1c-9858-21c63b7164e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* The irony is striking - Gino was well-known for studying honesty and ethical behavior before being accused of manipulating research data to support her hypotheses. She had authored over 140 scholarly papers and won numerous awards before coming under scrutiny.
* The fraud allegations emerged in 2021 when researchers at Data Colada blog examined her studies and found evidence of fraudulent data spanning over a decade, including papers published as recently as 2020. They shared their concerns with Harvard Business School, leading to the investigation.
* Gino has been fighting the allegations for almost four years and filed lawsuits against both the blog authors and Harvard, with parts of the legal battle still ongoing. She maintains her innocence, stating on her website: "I did not commit academic fraud. I did not manipulate data to produce a particular result."

The revocation occurred as Harvard battles with the Trump administration to retain its federal grants.
* * *
# Judge Jeanine sworn in to new Trump admin role
Fox News host Jeanine Pirro was sworn in as interim U.S. attorney for Washington, D.C. during an Oval Office ceremony on Wednesday, with Attorney General Pam Bondi administering the oath alongside President Trump. She's taking over after Ed Martin, Trump's initial pick, resigned from the role.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ddb6c624-2e6b-4d51-badf-d79343bd39c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* Pirro promised to crack down on crime in D.C., saying "No more tolerance of hatred. No more mercy for criminals" and vowing that violence will be met with "appropriate punishment" to make the city safe again. She specifically referenced the recent murder of two Israeli embassy staffers and pledged justice for the "cold-blooded murderer."
* The longtime Fox News personality has left the network after 14 years to take this new role, stepping away from her co-host position on "The Five" while Fox rotates other personalities to fill her spot. Fox News praised her contributions over her tenure and wished her well in Washington.

We have an amazing show for you today to get you through hump day. Chicks On The Right are here and they bring it! Bobby Kennedy was accompanied by Dr. Bhattacharya and Dr. Makary to deliver on his promise to Make America Healthy Again. The CDC will no longer be recommending COVID vaccinations on the immunization schedule for healthy pregnant mothers and children. The wokies aren't taking it well, crying that their precious vaccine is being taken away from them, which is entirely untrue. Pete Buttigieg finally shed a light on an issue that he is leading the charge on for his 2028 presidential run, you won't believe what it is. Politico came up with the most ridiculous Democratic "shadow government" which includes Bill Nye the science guy and comedian Nikki Glaser. Democrats have finally pushed Jake Tapper over the edge when his son became a target. He also apologized to Lara Trump, not because he wanted to, because his book was coming out. President Trump pardons reality TV stars Todd and Julie Chrisley, breaking the news from the oval office to their children Savannah and Chase. The Chicks On The Right are on a tear today so sit back and enjoy!

**Chicks On The Right**

name: Michael Bennet
subject: What I told Jake Tapper...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_cnnjaketapper?refcode=X_250528_tapperinterview_mayeom2_act_B [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_cnnjaketapper?refcode=X_250528_tapperinterview_mayeom2_act_B]
Hi folks,
House Republicans recently passed Trump’s "big, beautiful" bill, which is now headed to the Senate to decide its fate.
I have no clue what is "beautiful" about a bill that will strip healthcare access from millions of American families and cut funding for SNAP, which 40 million Americans rely on to put food on their tables.
It is clear what is "big" about this bill—it will add trillions of dollars to our national debt that our children and grandchildren will have to pay.
All of this just to give another round of tax cuts to the ultra-wealthy. Absolutely crazy.
I recently spoke with Jake Tapper on CNN’s State of the Union to discuss this bill and what Democrats are doing to defeat it. Watch it here, then consider making a donation to my campaign. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_cnnjaketapper?refcode=X_250528_tapperinterview_mayeom2_act_B]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_cnnjaketapper?refcode=X_250528_tapperinterview_mayeom2_act_B [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_cnnjaketapper?refcode=X_250528_tapperinterview_mayeom2_act_B]
It will take three Republican Senators joining the Democrats to defeat Trump’s giveaway to the ultra-wealthy. I’m doing everything I can to get Republicans to do the right thing and vote NO on this bill.
If not, Coloradans will know precisely who owns this bill and its consequences: a bill that will put medical providers out of business, make it more difficult for rural Coloradans to access the healthcare they need, and set our economy on a damaging and unsustainable path.
Whether in Washington or Colorado, I will always fight hard for our state and our people. It’s exactly what I’m doing now, and what I will do as your next governor. Join our campaign today. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_cnnjaketapper?refcode=X_250528_tapperinterview_mayeom2_act_B]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_cnnjaketapper?refcode=X_250528_tapperinterview_mayeom2_act_B]
Thank you,
Michael

name: Maj. Gen. Paul Eaton, US Army, Ret.
subject: A fundamental request on behalf of VoteVets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We are combatting the Trump Administration on all fronts, each and every day. And we need your help to keep it up.
#
| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Peter, Paul Eaton here from VoteVets.

Here’s the situation: Donald Trump thinks he can destroy the VA, force thousands of Veterans out of their jobs, and gut health care and food assistance programs they depend on.

He thinks he can put Veterans through all that hardship and throw himself a birthday parade on the National Mall, with dozens of tanks and aircraft and thousands of Troops to puff up his ego.

He thinks he can do all that and get away with it.

Well, VoteVets does not intend to let that happen. We are combatting the Trump Administration on all fronts, each and every day. And we need your help to keep it up.

[****If you’ve got anything to spare, make a contribution to VoteVets as we head into our end-of-month fundraising drive. subject: Dem Rep. who Defends Wife Beating MS-13 Gangbanger Calls Ashli Babbitt Domestic Terrorist
body:
An attention-seeking Democratic congressman from central Florida
notorious for grandstanding to promote a far-left agenda has taken his
extremist rhetoric to a new level by referring to Ashli Babbitt, the
United States Air Force veteran shot and killed inside the U.S.
Capitol on January 6, 2021, as a domestic terrorist.

extremist rhetoric to a new level by referring to Ashli Babbitt, the
United States Air Force veteran shot and killed inside the U.S.
Capitol on January 6, 2021, as a domestic terrorist. The
lawmaker, Maxwell Frost who represents Florida’s 10th district, is
well known for self-absorbed antics to gain media attention, even when
it does not involve his constituents or the area he was elected to
serve in the U.S. House of Representatives.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: It’s something I NEVER wanted to have to say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
........................
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/hLavDp7EEyAVlS04zz0lAQUQHnaWVIujgFJ3gLtQ9gG56bPNyWxQGGVKjsaMDjdxkMgOqml1tVvnXacGSSm7bqfmiPVfUNu9CO_26FYDmjzcc5jt223SHXf58pmi5eb4gPtrxiM1cIfKGAOiFf8PBqp95TSK0Fyh9DEMyf8ym9aVWGUUEcCE8UbgtY-hbAuK5Az0gHl_f9R265p0rDLtU7F3hAqRwsaRluUQiuJWcdECMLU_dCRpB1dwMoWxRRg1JecFPLIfzp-TtgOJBsGjBjZAGK9xP5tf4hdtzSoS_kPQ9KEyvJ19xPEP-ZwN8NPNNbCAWfcNzzgSNXpMOa54Rmzghl6A1ZAGTX9-Nf-9hkjTHo_XkpTFC20dgqj3FS2LxIFgdeUXJX9-AZGiy2b6FD7JPmMCxN19OABpFZRbBIsW_4mbcXFbkdNKfmMvAR3wmT6DLZdH6D5S9_z78KzFe0EQiT0EnKOoDGseHk6Rn4nkh7Pc4YWgmyx5PgXfBg/zWCdbnSoBfG5u8wg3SKjKOZqgr-DFtBA/9)
---
Peter,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe...
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Peter...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---

clean_body: ........................ | Peter, All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a helper. I helped take down the mob in New York... I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th... I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable. Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like YOU. But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these: “Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...” [MSNBC] “Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection” [CNBC] “Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” [New York Times] And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ FINAL sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask you to help me. That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Peter... Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core. But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE. Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a state-level charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old! My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump. And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell! Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies. And the ONLY way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to NEVER,EVER SURRENDER to it. ...Just ask President Trump! The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under booking # 2313757. So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like YOU will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70 for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |
