[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108536360/548238345/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250528_f_MitchLandrieu_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTkzYTJkNy0xMTNjLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A5PC9ro9-Rkmzv5GkCB6fiZl99jofQn3OVlT2hOqCLQ=&emci=4286e8ef-093c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b193a2d7-113c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1037277)

| | Hi friend, it’s Mitch Landrieu — former mayor of New Orleans, former lieutenant governor of Louisiana, and proud supporter of Fair Fight’s pro-democracy work. Today, I want to talk to you about the stakes and the possibilities in Louisiana, the South, and our national fight against anti-voter extremism. You see, Donald Trump’s MAGA extremism is turning off so many Americans that it gives us new chances to fight back and win for democracy in more places, as long as we have the resources to seize those opportunities. Trump has empowered an unelected billionaire to break the federal government, abandoned allies to curry favor with enemies, broken down the rule of law, pushed tariffs that would be the largest working-class tax increase in modern American history, and planned massive tax cuts to the rich at the expense of working families. It’s also abundantly clear that he’s motivating Americans to fight back. Just look at the huge swings toward Democrats in red districts for special elections, or the millions of Americans from big cities to small towns across the country taking to the streets, or Louisiana — where resounding majorities rejected a recent attempted Republican power grab by defeating four proposed constitutional amendments. **But if we want to broaden those glimmers of hope, we’ve got to make smart, ongoing investments in pro-democracy grassroots organizing, and we must ensure equal access to the ballot box.** [**That’s why I’m proud to partner with Fair Fight to build pro-voter political power and tackle voter suppression. And every donation, no matter how big or small, makes a difference. Make a contribution of $30 or whatever you can to help elect voting rights champions and fight for free and fair elections in the South and across America >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108536361/548238346/1297451850?amount=30&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250528_f_MitchLandrieu_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTkzYTJkNy0xMTNjLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A5PC9ro9-Rkmzv5GkCB6fiZl99jofQn3OVlT2hOqCLQ=) Now, when you think about major swing states, your mind might not immediately go to Louisiana. But that’s what people were saying about Georgia a decade ago, before Stacey Abrams launched her historic campaign for governor. She had the foresight to play the long game with early investments in grassroots organizing. She showed that by inspiring and empowering new voters, you can change what’s possible. And **it paid off** when Georgia went blue in a presidential election for the first time in 28 years, and when Georgians flipped control of the U.S. Senate by electing the first Black and Jewish senators in the state’s history. Her leadership proved that we can make real strides in the South. And she founded Fair Fight to continue combatting voter suppression and keep on electing voting rights champions. I’m grateful for her vision, and I’m grateful for your support — you are helping to change the game. _Take it from someone who won two statewide elections here:_ Louisiana has the potential to be one of the next big battlegrounds — **if Fair Fight can continue working alongside activists like you who invest early, plan strategically, and continue the fight against anti-voter extremists.** [**Together, let’s ensure that the South is not ignored or disenfranchised — but empowered — and that we can defeat voter suppression across America. If you’re able, make a donation to Fair Fight and defend democracy with us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108536362/548238347/1297451850?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250528_f_MitchLandrieu_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTkzYTJkNy0xMTNjLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A5PC9ro9-Rkmzv5GkCB6fiZl99jofQn3OVlT2hOqCLQ=) In service, Mitch Landrieu

clean_body: We’re preparing for one of the next big battleground states, and it’s in the South. | | | Hi friend, it’s Mitch Landrieu — former mayor of New Orleans, former lieutenant governor of Louisiana, and proud supporter of Fair Fight’s pro-democracy work. Today, I want to talk to you about the stakes and the possibilities in Louisiana, the South, and our national fight against anti-voter extremism. You see, Donald Trump’s MAGA extremism is turning off so many Americans that it gives us new chances to fight back and win for democracy in more places, as long as we have the resources to seize those opportunities. Trump has empowered an unelected billionaire to break the federal government, abandoned allies to curry favor with enemies, broken down the rule of law, pushed tariffs that would be the largest working-class tax increase in modern American history, and planned massive tax cuts to the rich at the expense of working families. It’s also abundantly clear that he’s motivating Americans to fight back. Just look at the huge swings toward Democrats in red districts for special elections, or the millions of Americans from big cities to small towns across the country taking to the streets, or Louisiana — where resounding majorities rejected a recent attempted Republican power grab by defeating four proposed constitutional amendments. But if we want to broaden those glimmers of hope, we’ve got to make smart, ongoing investments in pro-democracy grassroots organizing, and we must ensure equal access to the ballot box. = Now, when you think about major swing states, your mind might not immediately go to Louisiana. But that’s what people were saying about Georgia a decade ago, before Stacey Abrams launched her historic campaign for governor. She had the foresight to play the long game with early investments in grassroots organizing. She showed that by inspiring and empowering new voters, you can change what’s possible. And it paid off when Georgia went blue in a presidential election for the first time in 28 years, and when Georgians flipped control of the U.S. Senate by electing the first Black and Jewish senators in the state’s history. Her leadership proved that we can make real strides in the South. And she founded Fair Fight to continue combatting voter suppression and keep on electing voting rights champions. I’m grateful for her vision, and I’m grateful for your support — you are helping to change the game. Take it from someone who won two statewide elections here: Louisiana has the potential to be one of the next big battlegrounds — if Fair Fight can continue working alongside activists like you who invest early, plan strategically, and continue the fight against anti-voter extremists. = In service, Mitch Landrieu Former Mayor and Lieutenant Governor of Louisiana | = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. | | My Fellow American, Communities across America remain overwhelmed by millions of illegal aliens President Biden waved across the border. The biased media keeps flooding our airwaves with open borders propaganda. And billionaires like George Soros are propping up Leftist NGOS, radical activists, and political puppets to advance the globalist, anti-American agenda of the oligarchs. They want to keep all of Biden’s illegal aliens in this country and turn America into a socialist “Open Society.” For the past fifty years, they’ve undermined American workers, American culture, and the American Dream... But I’m not writing today just to tell you about how open borders have hurt hard-working Americans. You already know that. I’m writing to tell you about the organization that is poised to put the screws to these open borders politicians and reshape the entire public discussion around immigration. That organization is **[**NumbersUSA.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0GPmzAUhH-NuQXZzzaGgw8hJFEVdQ9JumpPyDFm4xbHxAai_fcVCOXyDvO-0cwo13e2_ZZIlAjgbpuIABDdIoDnn5cL4193Om7yEH5vntmH4_MXdis6wRt-aHU6_bt4b65lbDz-8SjCcyJvfPjuzRteQ1PjlO1mVVRJI2nbYJYYSQTLmcB5gZO7LMjNCK4zrEmbZ7gFTW-U5IUSmrWam8RKwMAxhxwACLAUQ4MNMEZAYUpZixheclLlTLBakTi8VAjeu1R7l3TyPgx9XIodEBweo7uZEMeo0mCmKdUewSEOQbS6yCmhTHMubjNLD-Pg6ujHoA2iVVkdN-f9J4Jslp1p7OgQrfY_V0Ur1yv79UC0WhuLuqyO9cevy7Yuz7vLdVef95_15bo9b-az-gYT3OLhAupXIEmQTf-yXWdjJhDDX8u4ecok4X8AAAD__5i9izE)** You may not have heard of them before, but since I took office in 2013, I’ve seen time after time how powerful they are in exerting public pressure on wishy-washy politicians. **NumbersUSA** harnesses the power of over 8 million grassroots members all focused on one issue: immigration. They are the voice on Capitol Hill for an America-first immigration agenda. And they grade every member of Congress to show who truly puts America first on immigration and who just talks a big game on the campaign trail. I’m honored that, after twelve years of service, **NumbersUSA** calculates I’ve earned an “A” on my career immigration report card. This sort of pressure and public accountability are vital if we want to execute President Trump’s immigration agenda. You see, many of my colleagues don’t have deeply held convictions like you, me, and President Trump. They just go whichever way the political winds blow. That’s why the Radical Left has dominated this issue from as far back as I can remember. They’ve outraised us... They’ve outspent us... And then they’ve strong-armed spineless officials into selling out the American people. Frankly, if we want to take our country back, we need **NumbersUSA** to rally American patriots from across our great land. That’s why I wanted to drop in this little note today to accompany the letter from Roy Beck, the founder of **NumbersUSA**. He’ll tell you all about the wonderful work they’re doing, and I’d ask you to consider supporting them however you see fit. We have a narrow window to make a difference, and we need your help now more than ever. God Bless you and God Bless America!
---
**Senator Ted Cruz** for **NumbersUSA**
---
P.S. **Roy’s email to you is included below.** It will help explain how we can fix our national embarrassment of an immigration system. This couldn’t be coming at a more critical moment, so please read it and [get back to him and the folks at **NumbersUSA** as soon as you can!](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0GPmzAUhH-NuQXZzzaGgw8hJFEVdQ9JumpPyDFm4xbHxAai_fcVCOXyDvO-0cwo13e2_ZZIlAjgbpuIABDdIoDnn5cL4193Om7yEH5vntmH4_MXdis6wRt-aHU6_bt4b65lbDz-8SjCcyJvfPjuzRteQ1PjlO1mVVRJI2nbYJYYSQTLmcB5gZO7LMjNCK4zrEmbZ7gFTW-U5IUSmrWam8RKwMAxhxwACLAUQ4MNMEZAYUpZixheclLlTLBakTi8VAjeu1R7l3TyPgx9XIodEBweo7uZEMeo0mCmKdUewSEOQbS6yCmhTHMubjNLD-Pg6ujHoA2iVVkdN-f9J4Jslp1p7OgQrfY_V0Ur1yv79UC0WhuLuqyO9cevy7Yuz7vLdVef95_15bo9b-az-gYT3OLhAupXIEmQTf-yXWdjJhDDX8u4ecok4X8AAAD__5i9izE)

My Fellow American, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.**** **And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_.** **[Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0GPmzAUhH-NuQXZzzaGgw8hJFEVdQ9JumpPyDFm4xbHxAai_fcVCOXyDvO-0cwo13e2_ZZIlAjgbpuIABDdIoDnn5cL4193Om7yEH5vntmH4_MXdis6wRt-aHU6_bt4b65lbDz-8SjCcyJvfPjuzRteQ1PjlO1mVVRJI2nbYJYYSQTLmcB5gZO7LMjNCK4zrEmbZ7gFTW-U5IUSmrWam8RKwMAxhxwACLAUQ4MNMEZAYUpZixheclLlTLBakTi8VAjeu1R7l3TyPgx9XIodEBweo7uZEMeo0mCmKdUewSEOQbS6yCmhTHMubjNLD-Pg6ujHoA2iVVkdN-f9J4Jslp1p7OgQrfY_V0Ur1yv79UC0WhuLuqyO9cevy7Yuz7vLdVef95_15bo9b-az-gYT3OLhAupXIEmQTf-yXWdjJhDDX8u4ecok4X8AAAD__5i9izE "https://numbersusa.revv.co/str7fc983134c557b/?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_STAR-STAR&utm_term=20572_wr1")** We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens. As Ted Cruz says, "politicians go wherever the wind blows." **So if you want action on immigration in this session of Congress, Senator Cruz needs your help to rally the troops and put pressure on his colleagues.** **[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0GPmzAUhH-NuQXZzzaGgw8hJFEVdQ9JumpPyDFm4xbHxAai_fcVCOXyDvO-0cwo13e2_ZZIlAjgbpuIABDdIoDnn5cL4193Om7yEH5vntmH4_MXdis6wRt-aHU6_bt4b65lbDz-8SjCcyJvfPjuzRteQ1PjlO1mVVRJI2nbYJYYSQTLmcB5gZO7LMjNCK4zrEmbZ7gFTW-U5IUSmrWam8RKwMAxhxwACLAUQ4MNMEZAYUpZixheclLlTLBakTi8VAjeu1R7l3TyPgx9XIodEBweo7uZEMeo0mCmKdUewSEOQbS6yCmhTHMubjNLD-Pg6ujHoA2iVVkdN-f9J4Jslp1p7OgQrfY_V0Ur1yv79UC0WhuLuqyO9cevy7Yuz7vLdVef95_15bo9b-az-gYT3OLhAupXIEmQTf-yXWdjJhDDX8u4ecok4X8AAAD__5i9izE "https://numbersusa.revv.co/str7fc983134c557b/?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_STAR-STAR&utm_term=20572_wr1")** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution. Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors... **And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.** In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, ** _AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States. Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand... **In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America. Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars? This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015! Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts. **_But Trump can’t do it alone._**
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0GPmzAUhH-NuQXZzzaGgw8hJFEVdQ9JumpPyDFm4xbHxAai_fcVCOXyDvO-0cwo13e2_ZZIlAjgbpuIABDdIoDnn5cL4193Om7yEH5vntmH4_MXdis6wRt-aHU6_bt4b65lbDz-8SjCcyJvfPjuzRteQ1PjlO1mVVRJI2nbYJYYSQTLmcB5gZO7LMjNCK4zrEmbZ7gFTW-U5IUSmrWam8RKwMAxhxwACLAUQ4MNMEZAYUpZixheclLlTLBakTi8VAjeu1R7l3TyPgx9XIodEBweo7uZEMeo0mCmKdUewSEOQbS6yCmhTHMubjNLD-Pg6ujHoA2iVVkdN-f9J4Jslp1p7OgQrfY_V0Ur1yv79UC0WhuLuqyO9cevy7Yuz7vLdVef95_15bo9b-az-gYT3OLhAupXIEmQTf-yXWdjJhDDX8u4ecok4X8AAAD__5i9izE)
---
**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States. Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream. It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington. The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken... ...and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent. **In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country. It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me, or the great folks at NumbersUSA, or even Senator Ted Cruz—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND_ of the American people.** And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage. Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.” That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come. That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues. Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0GPmzAUhH-NuQXZzzaGgw8hJFEVdQ9JumpPyDFm4xbHxAai_fcVCOXyDvO-0cwo13e2_ZZIlAjgbpuIABDdIoDnn5cL4193Om7yEH5vntmH4_MXdis6wRt-aHU6_bt4b65lbDz-8SjCcyJvfPjuzRteQ1PjlO1mVVRJI2nbYJYYSQTLmcB5gZO7LMjNCK4zrEmbZ7gFTW-U5IUSmrWam8RKwMAxhxwACLAUQ4MNMEZAYUpZixheclLlTLBakTi8VAjeu1R7l3TyPgx9XIodEBweo7uZEMeo0mCmKdUewSEOQbS6yCmhTHMubjNLD-Pg6ujHoA2iVVkdN-f9J4Jslp1p7OgQrfY_V0Ur1yv79UC0WhuLuqyO9cevy7Yuz7vLdVef95_15bo9b-az-gYT3OLhAupXIEmQTf-yXWdjJhDDX8u4ecok4X8AAAD__5i9izE "https://numbersusa.revv.co/str7fc983134c557b/?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_STAR-STAR&utm_term=20572_wr1")** **If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91.** We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials. And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. clean_body: | | | | | | | | My Fellow American, Communities across America remain overwhelmed by millions of illegal aliens President Biden waved across the border. The biased media keeps flooding our airwaves with open borders propaganda. And billionaires like George Soros are propping up Leftist NGOS, radical activists, and political puppets to advance the globalist, anti-American agenda of the oligarchs. They want to keep all of Biden’s illegal aliens in this country and turn America into a socialist “Open Society.” For the past fifty years, they’ve undermined American workers, American culture, and the American Dream... But I’m not writing today just to tell you about how open borders have hurt hard-working Americans. You already know that. I’m writing to tell you about the organization that is poised to put the screws to these open borders politicians and reshape the entire public discussion around immigration. That organization is You may not have heard of them before, but since I took office in 2013, I’ve seen time after time how powerful they are in exerting public pressure on wishy-washy politicians. NumbersUSA harnesses the power of over 8 million grassroots members all focused on one issue: immigration. They are the voice on Capitol Hill for an America-first immigration agenda. And they grade every member of Congress to show who truly puts America first on immigration and who just talks a big game on the campaign trail. I’m honored that, after twelve years of service, NumbersUSA calculates I’ve earned an “A” on my career immigration report card. This sort of pressure and public accountability are vital if we want to execute President Trump’s immigration agenda. You see, many of my colleagues don’t have deeply held convictions like you, me, and President Trump. They just go whichever way the political winds blow. That’s why the Radical Left has dominated this issue from as far back as I can remember. They’ve outraised us... They’ve outspent us... And then they’ve strong-armed spineless officials into selling out the American people. Frankly, if we want to take our country back, we need NumbersUSA to rally American patriots from across our great land. That’s why I wanted to drop in this little note today to accompany the letter from Roy Beck, the founder of NumbersUSA. He’ll tell you all about the wonderful work they’re doing, and I’d ask you to consider supporting them however you see fit. We have a narrow window to make a difference, and we need your help now more than ever. God Bless you and God Bless America! Senator Ted Cruz for NumbersUSA P.S. Roy’s email to you is included below. It will help explain how we can fix our national embarrassment of an immigration system. This couldn’t be coming at a more critical moment, so please read it and | | | Begin Forwarded Message: From : Roy Beck, NumbersUSA My Fellow American, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.** And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my Birthright Citizenship Survey. "" We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens. As Ted Cruz says, "politicians go wherever the wind blows." So if you want action on immigration in this session of Congress, Senator Cruz needs your help to rally the troops and put pressure on his colleagues. "" Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution. Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors... And it was definitely not for illegal aliens. In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, AND subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States. Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand... In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000. These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America. Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars? This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015! Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts. But Trump can’t do it alone. Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best. Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States. Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream. It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington. The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken... ...and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent. In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you. And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country. It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me, or the great folks at NumbersUSA, or even Senator Ted Cruz—no, it’s the unmistakable DEMAND of the American people. And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage. Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.” That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come. That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues. Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. "" If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91. We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials. And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. "" Thank you and God bless you today! | | Roy Beck Founder and President NumbersUSA | | | P.S. I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. As America’s largest single-issue advocacy group, NumbersUSA is focused exclusively on immigration reform. Emerge Action Fund is launching the next series of Emerge Rising — a three-part series of 90-minute webinars designed to help attendees explore what matters to them, their connections, and how to grow their involvement in the causes they care most about.. Emerge will train on how to seek out an appointment to a board or commission, how to plug in and participate in city and statewide policy making, and how to take the first steps toward running for office – now or in the future.

| Peter,

Emerge Action Fund is launching the next series of Emerge Rising — a three-part series of 90-minute webinars designed to help attendees explore what matters to them, their connections, and how to grow their involvement in the causes they care most about. Emerge will train on how to seek out an appointment to a board or commission, how to plug in and participate in city and statewide policy making, and how to take the first steps toward running for office – now or in the future.

But here’s the thing: we can only offer this training to more women if supporters like you step up.

Emerge will train on how to seek out an appointment to a board or commission, how to plug in and participate in city and statewide policy making, and how to take the first steps toward running for office – now or in the future. | = | Peter, Emerge Action Fund is launching the next series of Emerge Rising — a three-part series of 90-minute webinars designed to help attendees explore what matters to them, their connections, and how to grow their involvement in the causes they care most about. name: Eliza Walton
subject: Tell Oregon lawmakers: We need a strong Climate Justice Budget in 2025!
body:
Federal rollbacks are threatening climate progress. Now more than ever, Oregon must lead.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108536459/548238652/-1148972352?contactdata=dbqgJGBvRB8v9NYkyyUqjNS2BcebVN3jazKPw8yxP2MuvZGSNMItOAj7Hlx+MG0oHtiQU5yGtHsJtKI6YaIX8Xdwu8Xjak0CF4JCzxZiHd1ZtfXG+z+DS39YWpkTQJ2N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlMjg1ZTE5LTEyM2MtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rfxe4_a3h9voTgOsVBpLr2Mivlr-G2nmCWm2gakw8wA=&emci=a2b46e1a-0a3c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5e285e19-123c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)
---
Hi Peter, Over the past few years, the Oregon Legislature has made smart investments in climate solutions: like helping renters stay cool during deadly heat waves, supporting rural clean energy projects, and creating good-paying jobs in the clean energy economy. These programs are working — but they need continued funding to deliver results for Oregonians across the state. Right now, Oregon lawmakers are making budget decisions that will shape the next two years. They need to hear from you. [**Will you join us in urging legislators to support a strong Climate Justice Budget?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108536460/548238653/-1148972352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlMjg1ZTE5LTEyM2MtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rfxe4_a3h9voTgOsVBpLr2Mivlr-G2nmCWm2gakw8wA=&emci=a2b46e1a-0a3c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5e285e19-123c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)
---
[ **Take Action** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108536461/548238654/-1148972352?contactdata=dbqgJGBvRB8v9NYkyyUqjNS2BcebVN3jazKPw8yxP2MuvZGSNMItOAj7Hlx+MG0oHtiQU5yGtHsJtKI6YaIX8Xdwu8Xjak0CF4JCzxZiHd1ZtfXG+z+DS39YWpkTQJ2N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlMjg1ZTE5LTEyM2MtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rfxe4_a3h9voTgOsVBpLr2Mivlr-G2nmCWm2gakw8wA=&emci=a2b46e1a-0a3c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5e285e19-123c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)
---
Key programs at risk without renewed investment include:
* Rental and community heat pump programs that lower bills and protect people from extreme weather
* Community-based renewable energy and resilience projects for Tribes and rural communities
* Climate-smart land management that supports farmers, ranchers, and working forests
* One-stop-shop resources to help families afford clean, efficient home upgrades

Oregon families are facing rising energy costs, worsening climate disasters, and now a wave of dangerous federal rollbacks that threaten to undermine decades of progress. But Oregon can lead — if lawmakers invest in the programs that lower energy bills, reduce climate pollution, and protect our communities from extreme heat, wildfires, and drought.
---
[ **Take Action** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108536462/548238655/-1148972352?contactdata=dbqgJGBvRB8v9NYkyyUqjNS2BcebVN3jazKPw8yxP2MuvZGSNMItOAj7Hlx+MG0oHtiQU5yGtHsJtKI6YaIX8Xdwu8Xjak0CF4JCzxZiHd1ZtfXG+z+DS39YWpkTQJ2N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlMjg1ZTE5LTEyM2MtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rfxe4_a3h9voTgOsVBpLr2Mivlr-G2nmCWm2gakw8wA=&emci=a2b46e1a-0a3c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5e285e19-123c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)

Eliza Walton _(she/they)_ OLCV Coalition Director

name: The von Trapp Family
subject: 🎶 The (Monte Rio) hills are alive… 🎶
body:
Climb every mountain with us at Monte Rio Redwoods

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108536522/548238858/-1299648888?contactdata=brqlFNKl3oxaHgfGVZ/Yct+4d6NCHrNdF+cvujy6wukHskb52YhNR++tkoim3uxP+WTe+9qKFEjAw4Vg0Iuzj+Le2VkIvRriIAKkxG22BpA0rryHJgnmC5g+vGmxMnDiePa73TGnMT8EF8gx2aYmquKO49L7kp9bc46axQEjAaQ=&sourceid=1166936&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljZmUwMDU0LTEyM2MtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Uqk5NDqjyHJ014UBzE6eUsKWnsJlrIHq3fzX48j2K2U=&emci=2b06604a-123b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9cfe0054-123c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)
---
Guten Tag, Peter!
Surprised to hear from us?
We recently learned about a breathtaking spot tucked away at [Monte Rio Redwoods](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108536523/548238859/-435492268?contactdata=brqlFNKl3oxaHgfGVZ/Yct+4d6NCHrNdF+cvujy6wukHskb52YhNR++tkoim3uxP+WTe+9qKFEjAw4Vg0Iuzj+Le2VkIvRriIAKkxG22BpA0rryHJgnmC5g+vGmxMnDiePa73TGnMT8EF8gx2aYmquKO49L7kp9bc46axQEjAaQ=&ms=MonteRio4_Link1&sourceid=1166936&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljZmUwMDU0LTEyM2MtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Uqk5NDqjyHJ014UBzE6eUsKWnsJlrIHq3fzX48j2K2U=&emci=2b06604a-123b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9cfe0054-123c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551), an overlook so stunning it’s been nicknamed “Sound of Music.” But it’s not the name that caught our attention — it’s the view.
Imagine standing in this beautiful vista with rolling green hills and a view straight out to the Pacific Ocean. We can imagine ourselves out here hiking and _Do Re Mi’ing!_
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108536524/548238860/2018652235?contactdata=brqlFNKl3oxaHgfGVZ/Yct+4d6NCHrNdF+cvujy6wukHskb52YhNR++tkoim3uxP+WTe+9qKFEjAw4Vg0Iuzj+Le2VkIvRriIAKkxG22BpA0rryHJgnmC5g+vGmxMnDiePa73TGnMT8EF8gx2aYmquKO49L7kp9bc46axQEjAaQ=&ms=MonteRio4_Image2&sourceid=1166936&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljZmUwMDU0LTEyM2MtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Uqk5NDqjyHJ014UBzE6eUsKWnsJlrIHq3fzX48j2K2U=&emci=2b06604a-123b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9cfe0054-123c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)
Photo by Max Forster
**These redwoods don’t need a soundtrack. Their beauty speaks for itself.** The flutter of wings, the rustle of ancient trees, and the babbling murmur of water running through the clear streams below... each sound is a unique piece of nature’s orchestra, [and it reminds us how important it is to preserve these natural lands.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108536525/548238861/2018652235?contactdata=brqlFNKl3oxaHgfGVZ/Yct+4d6NCHrNdF+cvujy6wukHskb52YhNR++tkoim3uxP+WTe+9qKFEjAw4Vg0Iuzj+Le2VkIvRriIAKkxG22BpA0rryHJgnmC5g+vGmxMnDiePa73TGnMT8EF8gx2aYmquKO49L7kp9bc46axQEjAaQ=&ms=MonteRio4_Link2&sourceid=1166936&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljZmUwMDU0LTEyM2MtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Uqk5NDqjyHJ014UBzE6eUsKWnsJlrIHq3fzX48j2K2U=&emci=2b06604a-123b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9cfe0054-123c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)
We’ve heard Save the Redwoods League is looking to purchase and conserve this magical place, and Monte Rio Redwoods is certainly one of our favorite things! **[With your help, we can ensure this symphony of nature continues](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108536526/548238862/2018652235?contactdata=brqlFNKl3oxaHgfGVZ/Yct+4d6NCHrNdF+cvujy6wukHskb52YhNR++tkoim3uxP+WTe+9qKFEjAw4Vg0Iuzj+Le2VkIvRriIAKkxG22BpA0rryHJgnmC5g+vGmxMnDiePa73TGnMT8EF8gx2aYmquKO49L7kp9bc46axQEjAaQ=&ms=MonteRio4_Link3&sourceid=1166936&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljZmUwMDU0LTEyM2MtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Uqk5NDqjyHJ014UBzE6eUsKWnsJlrIHq3fzX48j2K2U=&emci=2b06604a-123b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9cfe0054-123c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551) — for you, for future generations, and for all who seek recreation and joy in these forests.**
_So Long! Farewell! Auf Wiedersehen! Goodbye!_
We hope to see you soon in the beautiful hills and forests of Monte Rio Redwoods. 🎶
Sincerely,

clean_body: Climb every mountain with us at Monte Rio Redwoods Guten Tag, Peter! Surprised to hear from us? We recently learned about a breathtaking spot tucked away at , an overlook so stunning it’s been nicknamed “Sound of Music.” But it’s not the name that caught our attention — it’s the view. Imagine standing in this beautiful vista with rolling green hills and a view straight out to the Pacific Ocean. We can imagine ourselves out here hiking and Do Re Mi’ing! Photo by Max Forster These redwoods don’t need a soundtrack. Their beauty speaks for itself. The flutter of wings, the rustle of ancient trees, and the babbling murmur of water running through the clear streams below... each sound is a unique piece of nature’s orchestra, We’ve heard Save the Redwoods League is looking to purchase and conserve this magical place, and Monte Rio Redwoods is certainly one of our favorite things! — for you, for future generations, and for all who seek recreation and joy in these forests. So Long! Farewell! Auf Wiedersehen! Goodbye! We hope to see you soon in the beautiful hills and forests of Monte Rio Redwoods. 🎶 Sincerely, The von Trapp Family | ---|--- | | | | ---|---|---|--- Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States |

clean_body: These might be the last Trump-signed golf balls we’ll ever offer. | | | | President Trump has made clear what he wants: | | “SELL OUT every last signed golf ball BEFORE the end-of-month fundraising deadline!” We’re clearing out the warehouse for the boss, and these might be the last Trump-signed golf balls we’ll ever offer. Let me tell you:I’ve been around Trump merchandise for the past 3 years, and items like these don’t come around often. This isn’t just memorabilia—it’s a true collector’s item from the greatest President in American history. Respectfully, Caitlyn from Team Trump | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: My message to Jen Psaki on MSNBC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108536987/548240357/-1698202107?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5543-fr-seg1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmU1Njg0Yi0xMzNjLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pCPe22WTt35gA3KBE8rMvd_F7TClzJSx11EDIcaYea4=)
Friend, I recently sat down with Jen Psaki on _MSNBC_ to talk about how I'm fighting for you and your family in the Senate.
If you didn't catch our conversation, there's one important message I want to make sure you don't miss: **Don't give in to the despair.**
Donald Trump and his allies have a real problem — the things they're trying to do are _wildly_ unpopular. Going after Social Security and Medicaid? Sending everyday costs skyrocketing because of reckless tariffs? Nobody voted for this disastrous agenda.
So when Elon Musk's DOGE announced it was going to close five Social Security offices here in Georgia, I called them out, and a groundswell of outraged Georgians joined me. All of a sudden, DOGE pretended like it never said the offices would close. Well, that's fine with me – as long as Georgians can continue to access the services they need.
My point is this: We're proving that we can win these battles as long as we raise our voices together. So please, don't give in to the despair. Stay engaged. Stay loud. Your voice is needed more than ever.

I'm grateful to have you with me in this fight.
Thank you,

Rev. Raphael Warnock

clean_body: | | | | | | = Friend, I recently sat down with Jen Psaki on MSNBC to talk about how I'm fighting for you and your family in the Senate. If you didn't catch our conversation, there's one important message I want to make sure you don't miss: Don't give in to the despair. Donald Trump and his allies have a real problem — the things they're trying to do are wildly unpopular. Going after Social Security and Medicaid? Sending everyday costs skyrocketing because of reckless tariffs? Nobody voted for this disastrous agenda. So when Elon Musk's DOGE announced it was going to close five Social Security offices here in Georgia, I called them out, and a groundswell of outraged Georgians joined me. All of a sudden, DOGE pretended like it never said the offices would close. Well, that's fine with me – as long as Georgians can continue to access the services they need. My point is this: We're proving that we can win these battles as long as we raise our voices together. So please, don't give in to the despair. Stay engaged. Stay loud. Your voice is needed more than ever. I'm grateful to have you with me in this fight. Thank you, Rev. Raphael Warnock | | To put a stop to Trump's disastrous agenda, Democrats must take back the Senate. To do that, we’ll have to win races in tough battleground states – something we can only do if we make smart, early investments. = | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. If you have donated from another address or via another method, many thanks for supporting our historic campaign for Senate! If you’d like to receive fewer emails, please click here: . | | © 2025 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. Warnock for Georgia PO Box 52227 Atlanta, GA 30355 United States

He called Elon Musk's influence in Washington "wonderful." Schweikert voted twice for deceptive anti-choice legislation used to stigmatize abortion care and criminalize doctors. And he's said despicable things about women who get abortions, including that they "only care about themselves." What a loser, right? Together, we can rid AZ-01 of far-right extremist David Schweikert and bring in new pro-choice leadership by electing Marlene Galán-Woods. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. This bill **GUTS** SNAP and the Child Tax Credit and makes **DEEP CUTS** to Medicaid — potentially leaving up to 800,000 Georgians without health insurance. Who’s leading this attack? Georgia’s own self-proclaimed “MAGA warrior” and U.S. Senate candidate, Buddy Carter. Buddy Carter has **_doubled_** and even **_tripled_** down on these cuts, even though they will **DIRECTLY HURT** the people who elected him. And Georgia Republicans are _all in_ — backing Trump’s cruel agenda to rip away support from working families and hand out tax breaks to billionaires like Trump and Elon Musk. This isn’t “fiscal responsibility.” It’s a power grab. **And Georgia families will pay the price.** [We’re fighting back, but we’re falling short of our $25,000 end-of-month fundraising goal. name: Lateefah Simon
subject: We’ve got 4 days. Let’s do this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
As the Congresswoman for Oakland, Berkeley, Emeryville, Piedmont, Albany, Alameda, and San Leandro, I consider it both my privilege and duty to bring the voices and needs of working-class, diverse communities straight into the halls of power where people like us have historically been left behind.
I’ve been an organizer for over 30 years, so I know what it takes to bring communities together, hold the powerful accountable, and demand results.
That’s why I asked my team to create a quick form for you to fill out on what issues you’re most concerned about, how Congress can better serve you, and if you’ve been affected by the Trump administration. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/y_xac2qEAUuOlWCDgNCPdA2]
At every step — whether we’re fighting for affordable health care access, education programs, or accessible transit — I know that the people closest to the pain are also closest to the solutions, and we need to use every tool in the toolbox to create solutions. This survey will help us to hear directly from the folks who matter most: the organizers, caregivers, riders, and neighbors like you in our communities - so we can continue lifting up your voices in Congress.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_las_email-25q2?refcode=x_250411_recurring_act&recurring=1]
I know you’ve got wisdom that can’t be found in any policy memo or campaign talking point. So please, Friend, take a minute or two to fill out this form. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/y_xac2qEAUuOlWCDgNCPdA2]
SHARE YOUR RESPONSE → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/y_xac2qEAUuOlWCDgNCPdA2]
Thank you for always showing up for me, for your community, and for real change.
— Lateefah Simon
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_las_email-25q2?refcode=x_250411_recurring_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_las_email-25q2?refcode=x_250411_recurring_act] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion.
To learn more about Lateefah, visit
LateefahSimon.com [http://lateefahsimon.com/]

clean_body: Please Open to Read That’s what Big Tech just did to YOU. | | | | EXPOSED: " Big Tech CENSORSHIP!!!!" House GOP has officially demanded that the FTC investigate Google's censorship of our Party, preventing us from sharing critical updates and messages with our supporters. Because yes -- it's ALL TRUE. Google's email filters quietly bury Republican policy and fundraising messages while letting Democrats cash in -- COSTING REPUBLICANS MILLIONS OF VOTES AND DOLLARS! That 's how Big Tech and the Radical Left cheats "and they’ll do it again unless we stop them." | | | "STOP BIG TECH CENSORSHIP" House GOP has filed a formal complaint. We're fighting back. But Google has lawyers and lobbyists -- we need the grassroots to stand strong! If Google isn't held accountable, our important emails updating you on polling locations, policy priorities, and opinion polling may go to your spam FOREVER. House Republicans are demanding answers, but if we don't act fast,they 'll do it again in 2026! | | | "STOP BIG TECH CENSORSHIP" Chip in to keep the pressure on! This isn't the time to sit on the sidelines - we need a groundswell of support to ensure conservative speech isn't silenced by Big Tech. "Rush in a contribution of ANY AMOUNT to stand with House Republicans in their fight against Google & Big Tech’s censorship! >>" We hope we can count on you, Friend. Sincerely, House GOP Headquarters Washington DC | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Democrats.org
subject: Wednesday, May 28
body:
Please don’t scroll away.

🌙 To all Democrats: 🇺🇸 ️Please don’t scroll past this one-minute read. ️It’s Wednesday, May 28. We’re just a few months into Trump’s presidency — and a few days away from our most important FEC fundraising deadline since the last election.
When this deadline ends, we will be required to report how much money we’ve raised, along with the number of donations we’ve received. Here’s the truth: _Everyone_ will be watching to see what we’ve raised.
If everyone reading this email pitched in $3, we’d be able to send a powerful message: that there is serious opposition to Trump and his allies’ attempts to hand a giant tax cut to the wealthy at the expense of the rest of us. Unfortunately, not everyone gives. So we’re counting on all Democrats who know how serious this moment is to step up right now.
[**If fighting back against Trump and electing Democrats at all levels of government matters to you, then we’re asking you to pitch in $3 to support the DNC’s work today. If you’re undecided, please remember any contribution makes an impact right now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250528_3586_fr&refcode2=3586_22930333_hrC5RH&akid=3586%2E22930333%2EhrC5RH) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250528_3586_fr&refcode2=3586_22930333_hrC5RH&akid=3586%2E22930333%2EhrC5RH)**

Hi there, in a moment I’m going to ask you to chip in [**$3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108537594/548242374/1512477418?refcode=em-5.28.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGYxMjQ3NjItMTUzYy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fjhQVOlUh_0z31gdR2uJn73mAX2CGIQQ1FUZD41WMYI=), but first let me explain why your support is so important – especially right now.

As an educator and a school board trustee, I’m proud to stand alongside our students, teachers, and community as we fight for schools.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108537595/548242375/701031030?refcode=em-5.28.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGYxMjQ3NjItMTUzYy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fjhQVOlUh_0z31gdR2uJn73mAX2CGIQQ1FUZD41WMYI=)
_Rallying this month for our schools!_ This month and next, families across the Central Valley are celebrating their students – from kindergarten promotions to high school and college graduations. These are powerful moments. And they represent years of hard work, sacrifice, and hope for a better future. But while our kids were walking across graduation stages, my opponent was in Washington pushing legislation that would gut education funding – cutting resources from the very schools our students rely on. Just last week, he voted for the so-called “Big Beautiful Budget” – legislation that slashes billions from public education, including devastating cuts to low-income schools and special ed programs. **It’s a direct attack on our kids’ future, and frankly, it’s unacceptable.** I’ve spent my career as an educator, and I know what’s at stake when education budgets are slashed. I’ve seen the impact – overcrowded classrooms, rising college costs, and students from working families forced into crushing debt or pushed out of higher ed altogether. That’s why I’m in this fight – to protect our public schools, to invest in our students, and to make sure every young person in the Central Valley has a real shot at success. [**But I can’t do it alone. Can I count on you to chip in $3 right now to ensure we have the resources to flip this seat blue – and fight for the future our students deserve?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108537596/548242376/701031030?refcode=em-5.28.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGYxMjQ3NjItMTUzYy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fjhQVOlUh_0z31gdR2uJn73mAX2CGIQQ1FUZD41WMYI=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108537597/548242377/701031030?refcode=em-5.28.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGYxMjQ3NjItMTUzYy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fjhQVOlUh_0z31gdR2uJn73mAX2CGIQQ1FUZD41WMYI=)

clean_body: | Hi there, in a moment I’m going to ask you to chip in =, but first let me explain why your support is so important – especially right now. As an educator and a school board trustee, I’m proud to stand alongside our students, teachers, and community as we fight for schools. = Rallying this month for our schools! This month and next, families across the Central Valley are celebrating their students – from kindergarten promotions to high school and college graduations. These are powerful moments. And they represent years of hard work, sacrifice, and hope for a better future. But while our kids were walking across graduation stages, my opponent was in Washington pushing legislation that would gut education funding – cutting resources from the very schools our students rely on. Just last week, he voted for the so-called “Big Beautiful Budget” – legislation that slashes billions from public education, including devastating cuts to low-income schools and special ed programs. It’s a direct attack on our kids’ future, and frankly, it’s unacceptable. I’ve spent my career as an educator, and I know what’s at stake when education budgets are slashed. I’ve seen the impact – overcrowded classrooms, rising college costs, and students from working families forced into crushing debt or pushed out of higher ed altogether. That’s why I’m in this fight – to protect our public schools, to invest in our students, and to make sure every young person in the Central Valley has a real shot at success. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Randy | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

# Melton for Iowa 2026
---
---
| Hello Peter,

This is Ryan Melton, Democrat running for the U.S. House in Iowa's 4th Congressional District. During my 2026 campaign, I'll send you a weekly email to keep you in the loop while not overwhelming your inbox. Typically, the newsletter will be a review from the week prior: Where we went, what issues of note were on the minds of those I met with, where we'll be in the next week, etc.
Where I went on the campaign trail last week: Last week, I: -drove out to Le Mars to see my Plymouth County Dem friends at their monthly meeting, -did some candidate recruitment for State House in my hometown of Webster City, -was a guest on Arnie Arnesen's daily, nationally syndicated radio program (link below), -spoke for roughly 3 hours with my Cherokee County Dem friends in Cherokee
The pressing issue on the campaign trail last week: At every notable event where I had the chance to speak with folks, the hollowing out of rural Iowa, and especially our 4th Congressional District, came up. Frustration simmers among people of all political affiliations regarding the seeming lack of desire of our state and federal representatives to invest in our communities.
This is a notable issue in the 4th, where our current representative, Randy Feenstra, has rejected all community improvement earmark money for us out here every year he's been in the office, while the 3 other U.S. House Republicans bring millions back to their districts every year via that program.
I saw just today a map of 2024 average home affordability per state per realtor.com, and our state has the most affordable houses. On one hand, that may seem like a good thing, and in some contexts it is, but it is also a reflection of the lack of desire people have to stay here and move here. I posted that map on my socials, asking for thoughts from folks regarding this statistic. Here's a sampling of those replies:
-"When the local school and/or hospital close, home prices go down in those areas."
-"Too poor to buy anyway even if people with money think the prices are low. We don't have money here."
-I do property valuations for a large number of banks and credit unions in roughly 1/3 of the counties....they may be affordable but large numbers of them are in awfully poor shape."
-It reflects the fact that Iowa has grown by only 416,000 people since 1970 (55 YEARS). People don't want to move here, even when we DIDN'T have idiotic laws restricting rights & chasing educated professionals away to better states. Rural Iowa is dying."
-"Very few decent paying jobs in rural Iowa. Many rural Iowa homes are old and in poor condition. Low level of community services and amenities. Not appealing to sophisticated educated younger folk."
If I had the honor of representing you in Congress, I wouldn't leave your federal tax dollars on the table. I would bring them back to rejuvenate our district.
Our schedule for this week: Plans Pending
Recent press/social media posts of note: Arnie Arnesen episode I appeared on with other esteemed guests: https://www.podomatic.com/podcasts/staff74238/episodes/2025-05-27T09_46_22-07_00

We again are rejecting all Corporate PAC money, so we really rely on, and are extremely grateful for your support. We'll spend your donations on ways to expand our reach to as many voters as possible, including: -Post cards and other mailers and postage -Hand out cards for events -Text messaging campaigns -Transportation costs for events and door knocking -Campaign website costs -Radio ads, Social Media Ads, and (hopefully) TV ads -Our campaign staffers
Finally, if you have anyone else in mind that would like to be added to our email list or who would be interested in volunteering, let us know at melton4iowa@gmail.com!
Let's keep fighting the good fight together! Ryan Melton
[Donate to help our campaign!](https://fpglcyebb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00110eBvmjqK4OkyfNXroJceK-Eyo4HrhIVdICGpFn-UnMSsIFqNWx4c4GU-6jWg7STtUSSf83rHgBZOOVkGa6YCJrck0j9e2DzJLdk_0qFz3wo9IoM16LGi5v8cu3D1GwMP8ZxBNKxYOKWx1_dsCtJmUDa4EUvYBt9sDHqkRoofmU=&c=1knMkQ2Ipan_05CdvVk3vfKSO3lZgtbV4EzAsAS7CyY-Mtvi59njeA==&ch=ZJgmbIBqTJ0x_0rhxpojskKEDcNgX5GDiZ5sja_NdHqbtPf4bBtEhA==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | | == | Melton for Iowa 2026 | Hello Peter, This is Ryan Melton, Democrat running for the U.S. House in Iowa's 4th Congressional District. During my 2026 campaign, I'll send you a weekly email to keep you in the loop while not overwhelming your inbox. Typically, the newsletter will be a review from the week prior: Where we went, what issues of note were on the minds of those I met with, where we'll be in the next week, etc. Where I went on the campaign trail last week: Last week, I: -drove out to Le Mars to see my Plymouth County Dem friends at their monthly meeting, -did some candidate recruitment for State House in my hometown of Webster City, -was a guest on Arnie Arnesen's daily, nationally syndicated radio program (link below), -spoke for roughly 3 hours with my Cherokee County Dem friends in Cherokee The pressing issue on the campaign trail last week: At every notable event where I had the chance to speak with folks, the hollowing out of rural Iowa, and especially our 4th Congressional District, came up. Frustration simmers among people of all political affiliations regarding the seeming lack of desire of our state and federal representatives to invest in our communities. This is a notable issue in the 4th, where our current representative, Randy Feenstra, has rejected all community improvement earmark money for us out here every year he's been in the office, while the 3 other U.S. House Republicans bring millions back to their districts every year via that program. I saw just today a map of 2024 average home affordability per state per realtor.com, and our state has the most affordable houses. On one hand, that may seem like a good thing, and in some contexts it is, but it is also a reflection of the lack of desire people have to stay here and move here. I posted that map on my socials, asking for thoughts from folks regarding this statistic. Here's a sampling of those replies: -"When the local school and/or hospital close, home prices go down in those areas." -"Too poor to buy anyway even if people with money think the prices are low. We don't have money here." -I do property valuations for a large number of banks and credit unions in roughly 1/3 of the counties....they may be affordable but large numbers of them are in awfully poor shape." -It reflects the fact that Iowa has grown by only 416,000 people since 1970 (55 YEARS). People don't want to move here, even when we DIDN'T have idiotic laws restricting rights & chasing educated professionals away to better states. Rural Iowa is dying." -"Very few decent paying jobs in rural Iowa. Many rural Iowa homes are old and in poor condition. Low level of community services and amenities. Not appealing to sophisticated educated younger folk." If I had the honor of representing you in Congress, I wouldn't leave your federal tax dollars on the table. I would bring them back to rejuvenate our district. Our schedule for this week: Plans Pending Recent press/social media posts of note: Arnie Arnesen episode I appeared on with other esteemed guests: We again are rejecting all Corporate PAC money, so we really rely on, and are extremely grateful for your support. We'll spend your donations on ways to expand our reach to as many voters as possible, including: -Post cards and other mailers and postage -Hand out cards for events -Text messaging campaigns -Transportation costs for events and door knocking -Campaign website costs -Radio ads, Social Media Ads, and (hopefully) TV ads -Our campaign staffers Finally, if you have anyone else in mind that would like to be added to our email list or who would be interested in volunteering, let us know at melton4iowa@gmail.com! Let's keep fighting the good fight together! Ryan Melton == | | | | | | | | | == | == == == | == | P.O. Box 36 Webster City, IA 50595 melton4iowa@gmail.com | mailto:melton4iowa@gmail.com | | | | Political Campaign | PO BOX 36 | Webster City, IA 50595 US | | | | | | |

Peter,
Early voting has officially started in San Antonio, and the race for Mayor just got a lot tighter.
Here’s what we’re up against: A MAGA-allied candidate, Rolando Pablos, backed by the same GOP operatives who’ve gutted public education and attacked reproductive rights in Texas.
And on the other side? Gina Ortiz Jones: a decorated veteran, lifelong public servant, and the kind of leader who will actually stand up to the Trump–Abbott agenda and fight for everyday San Antonians.
The stakes are sky-high, so we cannot afford to fall short.
GOTV PAC has gone all in, using one of the most cost-effective voter outreach models in the country to reach undecided voters who could tip the scales.
We know Gina can win — but we need your help right now to keep up the momentum through Election Day on June 7. Will you donate $10 or more today to fuel the final stretch of GOTV efforts in San Antonio? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05282025&amount=25]

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.

Across the country, workers are rising up and demanding their rights. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWDFlqPLdtQYTJwzUWH5Piz_IfqNZPiPte2NfHAsALKuFezCkea_r8W0hF4AbEHVc4it2OGgfarKn3v_91NMpKJOJ10OBrSnMzRGgoJqY7v1puM58RxiZqg-VZ1G_9HrVIo4pVZk4f3BJz_SenZjvXpzEWV64hGCst5zPZPOKnk3mpMgKfKSa8-dMlzqLqRcEp0DHIK7CkoJd_B_DncPwX_A/4gv/aub5z08BT12ikXk9p0zWKQ/h0/h001.UYwYZ0IyhzeO8PshWAZRWL1NSImf2QsFkxmXHPhFDes)

Friend, As the proud daughter of a union family, I will always stand with workers in their fight for fair wages, benefits, and safe working conditions. This month, my team held an “organize your workplace” training and we were joined by workers from Amazon, Starbucks, and more. [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38BLOrUUWFwEJBqs0ScxfLYmZB_h3IVh22bYQu8AgKxyRRjJHVpw3_rx8vVQJTWSb3GX4mQ6a6Z8jGUzI17w4oYuESnIPgFkyxY8VsBH2KAfiynzxYiqw6ImMH1aTEYZrRehOsvKnB8D_dlzgkQS3m6ebx9fciUc5lhwD6-HIJXFWfejQ-Kq01154H_0x5Gs6MW5NnwQaVAfU-3vb8nQhftnXtIfBz_5_H9iMcfXvh_OtUWgOfPUXlWPvKKUKhCRcR6YEIqEN3DlRlY7qTjb2Ql4Q0dRKqPMNtDdJQgJTDIQn_NZHc97ZgpNvfWCowgAi1ZUAXbjojqYLx6HixEXSjDsZPZnxWfRZ9ZeDDIIFgKl5j3j8nQfX-MzBX3GzaqEt9BYiKnh5wmeMuitP_bTwF-ZSn1OmCVb-mHDFkjFMWJrDl2-k3V7B_14ahpiFbIJZQwHqiA7VE0WXhZAPeoxXrnYGO5rADlsyMYZbaW7UNDcLn_n675WPTvzMy6s36qF8nvraPcUdNoHEKWIb9s2UC9/4gv/aub5z08BT12ikXk9p0zWKQ/h1/h001.nrajVPheum10tsyproC-LQwanW79bKYShrEygPOc3oY) Across the country, workers are rising up and demanding their rights. And we need to have their backs. **Now, rank and file workers from Amazon Labor Union-International Brotherhood of Teamsters Local 1 (****the first and only unionized Amazon store in the nation)****have drafted a Safety Bill of Rights and they’re asking everyday people to sign on in support.** [**Click here to add your name to demand Amazon agree to the workers’ Safety Bill of Rights.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38BLOrUUWFwEJBqs0ScxfLYmZB_h3IVh22bYQu8AgKxyRRjJHVpw3_rx8vVQJTWSb3GX4mQ6a6Z8jGUzI17w4oYuESnIPgFkyxY8VsBH2KAfiynzxYiqw6ImMH1aTEYZrRehOsvKnB8D_dlzgkQS3m6ebx9fciUc5lhwD6-HIJXFWfejQ-Kq01154H_0x5Gs6MW5NnwQaVAfU-3vb8nQhftnXtIfBz_5_H9iMcfXvh_OtUWgOfPUXlWPvKKUKhCRcR6YEIqEN3DlRlY7qTjb2Qlk59Q4LpEA8_Tz1d4Plle6gUaiJCoTBVcBtkeHuSRL7EM2QYgfwgb1JcuvgCY0JweGtQWzAREE4wi9A0o-BBVLYaajTPK6oUW_ftfv43PYSobEHVJWpbLKlw7dcZg06m-3G7CvRBqOBcHfKhlz6gnMKGuLkFwUA640ugPU6zp94xBuB7kicTLKAwzPt9PrDvvnB-cTLpSjaYx6F_Psevm7sTBg-7rHMjpROXK2taPOiv9hk8tgPOF4PblUdmsOOal/4gv/aub5z08BT12ikXk9p0zWKQ/h2/h001.d7pOoZGnixIpXYGgszSj2COSVyOzASDFndI4k53WhO8) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38BLOrUUWFwEJBqs0ScxfLYmZB_h3IVh22bYQu8AgKxyRRjJHVpw3_rx8vVQJTWSb3GX4mQ6a6Z8jGUzI17w4oYuESnIPgFkyxY8VsBH2KAfiynzxYiqw6ImMH1aTEYZrRehOsvKnB8D_dlzgkQS3m6ebx9fciUc5lhwD6-HIJXFWfejQ-Kq01154H_0x5Gs6MW5NnwQaVAfU-3vb8nQhftnXtIfBz_5_H9iMcfXvh_OtUWgOfPUXlWPvKKUKhCRcR6YEIqEN3DlRlY7qTjb2QlTvyiijCix4n1zR1GsSn_XXL3etPRtY1RtXBJFiiuk8xyrdS-8i2WP8t0T4eIIHa55gQKR06mNHdKYkUyVdETmH5FGNhB6XPZmPSKlPAJibP9M-YIC3gKzN5de0KXnsLo2B6wNIYbhqWPgJOIYWYIgnSiYBYS72G_mZtVWWeuGQwqjiq5iw_T--4ess5l7xERKc0t9wf6UkO5p8PCKqPYqqHXgXOPmn08PJjBbgLfvCdZjkXB0z60hoIJ0opPEE7d/4gv/aub5z08BT12ikXk9p0zWKQ/h3/h001.a_R3KMTuYswKBv5AGv2R2bcbXJA-vM3QiZi392GHJPk)

At the heart of this campaign are five non-negotiable demands:
1. Right to Safe Staffing Levels
2. Right to Humane Accommodations
3. Right to Safe Equipment and Workspaces
4. Right to Safe Temperatures and Clean Air
5. Right to Safe Pace of Work and Real Breaks

An investigation by the U.S. Senate found that**injuries in Amazon warehouses are 30% higher than the warehouse average**. In our recent workplace training, Amazon workers shared a story of one of their colleagues dying on the job, and instead of stopping work, management had workers pile boxes around the body until an ambulance arrived.
Amazon made more than $36 BILLION in profits last year alone. Its founder, Jeff Bezos, is the second-richest person in the world. We cannot let Bezos and Amazon treat their workers as disposable. Worker safety is a human right!
**Amazon workers write:** _“We are demanding that Amazon act immediately to ensure our safety or expect an end to business as usual. These are non-negotiable demands born out of daily pain, injury, retaliation, and abuse on the shop floor.”_
[**Stand with Amazon workers and add your name today to demand Amazon respect the workers’ Safety Bill of Rights.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38BLOrUUWFwEJBqs0ScxfLYmZB_h3IVh22bYQu8AgKxyRRjJHVpw3_rx8vVQJTWSb3GX4mQ6a6Z8jGUzI17w4oYuESnIPgFkyxY8VsBH2KAfiynzxYiqw6ImMH1aTEYZrRehOsvKnB8D_dlzgkQS3m6ebx9fciUc5lhwD6-HIJXFWfejQ-Kq01154H_0x5Gs6MW5NnwQaVAfU-3vb8nQhftnXtIfBz_5_H9iMcfXvh_OtUWgOfPUXlWPvKKUKhCRcR6YEIqEN3DlRlY7qTjb2Qlnj0NtulaMqTj5fWGeRtu9NkfKvWoIGiSdFbN32QzFgoj-xVqI2Awl9ad0sN7FCSWqGzhtHx18TAGhPCJgcC3R31xPi8Ft9xYbsPX1ozMwMHGoZxapRMwYCpykUqAT1isVa5lMs0MhK92HLZe_NFj_M2tsN4anyG4YRWlJ--Lh2fjS-WrvyrU8T1qg6o1MKGZ0itSgF7bvUjc227dUqJtR-XQZIHr6SB43-hW_oKril6gsS-I-8mJLRzoCXAmfs30/4gv/aub5z08BT12ikXk9p0zWKQ/h4/h001.mrqNJw1bWwDdL7CSl5Zs0BPggRNnHI6OZ5-GDEBbzSA)
Thank you. I won’t stop advocating for Amazon workers’ right to a safe and fair working environment, including by pushing for OSHA investigations. I will continue fighting for working families, including pushing for nationwide paid leave and standing with workers striking for dignity. Together, we’re demanding corporations and the government put people first, not billionaires and corporate profits.
In solidarity,
Rashida

This month, my team held an “organize your workplace” training and we were joined by workers from Amazon, Starbucks, and more. Across the country, workers are rising up and demanding their rights. And we need to have their backs. Now, rank and file workers from Amazon Labor Union-International Brotherhood of Teamsters Local 1 (the first and only unionized Amazon store in the nation)have drafted a Safety Bill of Rights and they’re asking everyday people to sign on in support. | At the heart of this campaign are five non-negotiable demands: 1. Right to Safe Staffing Levels 2. Right to Humane Accommodations 3. Right to Safe Equipment and Workspaces 4. Right to Safe Temperatures and Clean Air 5. Right to Safe Pace of Work and Real Breaks An investigation by the U.S. Senate found thatinjuries in Amazon warehouses are 30% higher than the warehouse average. In our recent workplace training, Amazon workers shared a story of one of their colleagues dying on the job, and instead of stopping work, management had workers pile boxes around the body until an ambulance arrived. Amazon made more than $36 BILLION in profits last year alone. Its founder, Jeff Bezos, is the second-richest person in the world. We cannot let Bezos and Amazon treat their workers as disposable. Worker safety is a human right! Amazon workers write: “We are demanding that Amazon act immediately to ensure our safety or expect an end to business as usual. These are non-negotiable demands born out of daily pain, injury, retaliation, and abuse on the shop floor.” Thank you. I won’t stop advocating for Amazon workers’ right to a safe and fair working environment, including by pushing for OSHA investigations. I will continue fighting for working families, including pushing for nationwide paid leave and standing with workers striking for dignity. Together, we’re demanding corporations and the government put people first, not billionaires and corporate profits. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Team AOC
subject: Please support emergency relief in Gaza today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Donate to World Central Kitchen as they fight to provide meals in Gaza.
#
For the past 11 weeks, the Israeli government has blocked all humanitarian aid — including food, water, and medicine — from entering Gaza.1
According to the UN, at least 57 Palestinian children have starved to death since March 2.2 **This is a humanitarian crisis.**
But last week, after global pressure, the first few aid trucks were finally allowed back into Gaza.3
Today, we’re asking you to support **World Central Kitchen** , whose team has hundreds of trucks filled with aid ready to roll into Gaza to provide as many meals as they can to over 2 million Palestinians who have been living under the blockade.
[ World Central Kitchen is working against the odds to provide emergency relief in Gaza. Will you support their critical efforts today by making a donation of any amount that is meaningful to you? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250528-wck.qkCHoM&refcode=em20250528-8957-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8957%2E2526796%2EEnM8Ck)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250528-wck.qkCHoM&refcode=em20250528-8957-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8957%2E2526796%2EEnM8Ck)**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250528-wck.qkCHoM&refcode=em20250528-8957-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=8957%2E2526796%2EEnM8Ck)
Whether or not you can donate today, thank you for your solidarity.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

1 - [**BBC:** Israel lets aid into Gaza after 11-week blockade but UN calls it 'drop in ocean' ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/32540?t=22&akid=8957%2E2526796%2EEnM8Ck)
