We can’t fight evil with silence. Stand up now and verify before MIDNIGHT.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81e2cccab6444af8928290b7f5716bda&_e=5avG4HqSwj7bfzavxN4H2Bygg0ad1fqKvSRt_9-mX1wCg3fN56UftyRFPk8lXADK4DzZ_WY7BX3or8Bzlz-h5JD4EHOd6hCdkMqL2XDyqAy5oei-5lZwXp2YNX4V8sZGt8CuXK3hnKjBILGMTAQnvOuHblPnqETdI8ilhk_ssoba75p_29qU4WdknfbJ9E7PyuxQApPdmB2bI2av1Xgo6azO5oUtZUSRlO_HdyTPRQ1lud53vdm-jpQWPNIkip15D_Obirl7vOqa9QOhLWtfrjxfWRF0NNqUmw_95eLN_QfpO-gTJ8Newb2aRyWVbhhjAgxXp-UofYSEa0SdlsOK-2a-CKLMJXIHCD6LoelSf_xC0tLs4ZocV_bdYFVA0L9NaWcGz1lF9vK_O2WafVv_A1wY_4iGAlLdmzyeajIRfm4EnV3QDTURzjQgu-pix4RVeFDdlKCJO6Zct1UWoay9C-v8owIihag0NodPEOVeQ1rq7aSDK4RUlEVGGM21xjp-jUxDDd_XYe-7XLP1JABb8Q%3D%3D)

Dear Fellow American,

I've always believed that **[God places us exactly where we need to be](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81e2cccab6444af8928290b7f5716bda&_e=5avG4HqSwj7bfzavxN4H2Bygg0ad1fqKvSRt_9-mX1wCg3fN56UftyRFPk8lXADK4DzZ_WY7BX3or8Bzlz-h5JD4EHOd6hCdkMqL2XDyqAy5oei-5lZwXp2YNX4V8sZGt8CuXK3hnKjBILGMTAQnvOuHblPnqETdI8ilhk_ssoba75p_29qU4WdknfbJ9E7PyuxQApPdmB2bI2av1Xgo6azO5oUtZUSRlO_HdyTPRQ1lud53vdm-jpQWPNIkip15D_Obirl7vOqa9QOhLWtfrjxfWRF0NNqUmw_95eLN_QfpO-gTJ8Newb2aRyWVbhhjAgxXp-UofYSEa0SdlsOK-2a-CKLMJXIHCD6LoelSf_xC0tLs4ZocV_bdYFVA0L9NPSFZBVzSGfKOV5pLvoLAyYJMxipi3izgqcIz9JRoEiyVs8pBZqAEi3PexvPLJmlWUkY4z5NNLh-Yzf5nmDVyLFdMxzei8aOgXbn8fSgiceqLU0f0J-LVNxmythTPGS9c66MNE6UBdphNhypirhhZ_w%3D%3D)** --especially in moments that test our resolve.

Right now, our country is fighting forces that reject truth, faith, and freedom.

The radical Left mocks our faith.
They tear down our values.
And they want to erase God from public life.

**[But we can't retreat when things get hard.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81e2cccab6444af8928290b7f5716bda&_e=5avG4HqSwj7bfzavxN4H2Bygg0ad1fqKvSRt_9-mX1wCg3fN56UftyRFPk8lXADK4DzZ_WY7BX3or8Bzlz-h5JD4EHOd6hCdkMqL2XDyqAy5oei-5lZwXp2YNX4V8sZGt8CuXK3hnKjBILGMTAQnvOuHblPnqETdI8ilhk_ssoba75p_29qU4WdknfbJ9E7PyuxQApPdmB2bI2av1Xgo6azO5oUtZUSRlO_HdyTPRQ1lud53vdm-jpQWPNIkip15D_Obirl7vOqa9QOhLWtfrjxfWRF0NNqUmw_95eLN_QfpO-gTJ8Newb2aRyWVbhhjAgxXp-UofYSEa0SdlsOK-2a-CKLMJXIHCD6LoelSf_xC0tLs4ZocV_bdYFVA0L9Ns5ARNraCfoI-LnCtPhnE0MZY5j6CQqA0tgQDyNpTM140n9gkrWyI67DLkygMqcG2plx4Xwt-9qfv4lHuW1i3D6x7zYSavOV7Mi5_496r8xRWEg46hpOMMfC5-ovWTsth5t9OJlKzLbJ9SI_KBN-NJg%3D%3D)**
We need to stand firm. We need to speak truth.
And we need to fight back--with faith and conviction.

So, Fellow American, can I ask you to verify your GOP voter record **[BEFORE MIDNIGHT?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81e2cccab6444af8928290b7f5716bda&_e=5avG4HqSwj7bfzavxN4H2Bygg0ad1fqKvSRt_9-mX1wCg3fN56UftyRFPk8lXADK4DzZ_WY7BX3or8Bzlz-h5JD4EHOd6hCdkMqL2XDyqAy5oei-5lZwXp2YNX4V8sZGt8CuXK3hnKjBILGMTAQnvOuHblPnqETdI8ilhk_ssoba75p_29qU4WdknfbJ9E7PyuxQApPdmB2bI2av1Xgo6azO5oUtZUSRlO_HdyTPRQ1lud53vdm-jpQWPNIkip15D_Obirl7vOqa9QOhLWtfrjxfWRF0NNqUmw_95eLN_QfpO-gTJ8Newb2aRyWVbhhjAgxXp-UofYSEa0SdlsOK-2a-CKLMJXIHCD6LoelSf_xC0tLs4ZocV_bdYFVA0L9NgfWvaGY6Nnqz2lAcQUXs1tl7fETwyqCKXDccEVMkdpXqMtUB7SKQy9CBniTFK8g2caT9QwcmKdEtYAo6eQgxZR1db_O8-ME_p0JxS8A1gUDIOEcpZ0wlp2ioB2HFI88S8HpQbsAqlqU3Zh6ik8s2yQ%3D%3D)**
[VERIFY NOW >>>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81e2cccab6444af8928290b7f5716bda&_e=5avG4HqSwj7bfzavxN4H2Bygg0ad1fqKvSRt_9-mX1wCg3fN56UftyRFPk8lXADK4DzZ_WY7BX3or8Bzlz-h5JD4EHOd6hCdkMqL2XDyqAy5oei-5lZwXp2YNX4V8sZGt8CuXK3hnKjBILGMTAQnvOuHblPnqETdI8ilhk_ssoba75p_29qU4WdknfbJ9E7PyuxQApPdmB2bI2av1Xgo6azO5oUtZUSRlO_HdyTPRQ1lud53vdm-jpQWPNIkip15D_Obirl7vOqa9QOhLWtfrjxfWRF0NNqUmw_95eLN_QfpO-gTJ8Newb2aRyWVbhhjAgxXp-UofYSEa0SdlsOK-2a-CKLMJXIHCD6LoelSf_xC0tLs4ZocV_bdYFVA0L9NXM79_GkSmnu2YVnWCvhgAhewnzQaulfpW5oDtuz7tHCvkw7wEgu-rkk4DdMyp-mps-C-MXnYaRpCnXoGE40dxikk_r5_zzeKFLhEs79YXU6fT3M--JxTObZhwznVX7y0GekfT6Tj__-9k5amRtHLGQ%3D%3D)
We're running out of time.
The stakes couldn't be higher.
**[And your silence could cost us everything.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81e2cccab6444af8928290b7f5716bda&_e=5avG4HqSwj7bfzavxN4H2Bygg0ad1fqKvSRt_9-mX1wCg3fN56UftyRFPk8lXADK4DzZ_WY7BX3or8Bzlz-h5JD4EHOd6hCdkMqL2XDyqAy5oei-5lZwXp2YNX4V8sZGt8CuXK3hnKjBILGMTAQnvOuHblPnqETdI8ilhk_ssoba75p_29qU4WdknfbJ9E7PyuxQApPdmB2bI2av1Xgo6azO5oUtZUSRlO_HdyTPRQ1lud53vdm-jpQWPNIkip15D_Obirl7vOqa9QOhLWtfrjxfWRF0NNqUmw_95eLN_QfpO-gTJ8Newb2aRyWVbhhjAgxXp-UofYSEa0SdlsOK-2a-CKLMJXIHCD6LoelSf_xC0tLs4ZocV_bdYFVA0L9NcNLrzLGsNRop0XDZflRZk3Nu7ep4lbAgdBb-M9KWDwUYgJmOSK-L4cD_Ch2aZU5syh28qe3vrjol_-ecGnlYJ9z-R4-ExpccLgkVpDr3S9CHrNXNGXWS6e0dRQLNvJ1ivdzgDomDn-UpNe5B1pf-fw%3D%3D)**

If we remain faithful-if we act boldly-we will overcome.

Let's win this together,
NRSC Chairman Tim Scot

name: Austin [via GVFC]
subject: Trump’s cuts hurt our communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=%2FNv6yCEtG3i7jQJbJp2LgImT5Mxglc2ph3pEXxE2HdMWS4WhpmdQPtrzAsMLGxn9VDTXfvRfQ84WUzUo7h33iDg%2BVA68zvDKZfv9YObXDe3DgIdu27wvi7WKOepw8bG%2B%2F9lY%2FCS4P7yKW48fKSxR11U0BSqRlt%2BjeB2Uj6OUH9mqn6OPAi8dk1AjQHz3wVT9C%2BJcDh3S%2FWNSuoDKRGs6YbgtT%2FHNSPIlu3xM3FA6HZYk4ndzOEBA4VOGzD2cRCKRoe%2B9AU71V3HK1FR%2BLgA%2FvZUEUSuA9ZeaqtCGJtmMGNgnUY%2FNcIS2xUPQlbizXSWi38RlVN5X4NLFcHlnqHMVMMovcpYPzK55okq9B9e6XnsjDZDxfnHS5XnC20jkvvkrsK6L9RNmG8fWbW3g0EejCBG7rfrYtFwKZ9gUvoettTU%3D)
---
| |
---
Did you see Gabe’s message? He believes in the promise of this country — and he’s never been one to back down from a fight, especially when it comes to protecting the people of New Mexico. He sees exactly what Donald Trump and the Republicans are doing: pushing brutal cuts to programs that everyday families rely on, just to hand out one more tax break to billionaires who already have more than they’ll ever need. That’s not leadership. It’s greed — plain and simple. While prices keep rising and working families stretch every dollar, Republicans are busy rigging the system even further for the ultra-rich. And Gabe knows the damage that does — in our towns, our rural communities, our schools and our homes. He’s doing everything he can to stop it. But he can’t do it alone. NM-02 is key to flipping the House blue and stopping Trump’s agenda. We’re up against deep pockets — but if we all chip in what we can, we can hold the line and win. [Will you make a donation today and help us reach our $10,000 end-of-month fundraising goal before Saturday at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108539288/548248124/1777442079?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_052825_EOM2_60DO_D2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjI3YTY3OS0xYzNjLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UNOhlTBC2UE8YUAJOD6yUhMdgszBuxcN_pVuvSwsrSA=) | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108539289/548248125/1777442079?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_052825_EOM2_60DO_D2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjI3YTY3OS0xYzNjLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UNOhlTBC2UE8YUAJOD6yUhMdgszBuxcN_pVuvSwsrSA=)
---
Thanks,
Austin
**_\- - - Begin Forwarded Message from Gabe Vasquez \- - -_**
Let’s call Trump’s “big, beautiful bill” what it really is: a blatant money grab by Donald Trump and Republicans — all at the expense of the rest of us.
Republicans are pushing for cuts to critical programs that millions of Americans rely on just to survive — housing, food assistance, healthcare — all so they can hand out even more tax breaks to billionaires who already have everything.
Trump doesn’t need another break. Elon doesn’t need another loophole.
But working families? They need a break from rising prices, shrinking paychecks, and a government that keeps turning its back on them.
I’m tired of watching our most vulnerable communities get pushed aside so the ultra-rich can hoard even more. This isn’t sound policy — it’s cruelty dressed up as fiscal responsibility.
They think no one’s paying attention or cares. That we’ll just let it slide. But we won’t. **I won’t.**

clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Did you see Gabe’s message? He believes in the promise of this country — and he’s never been one to back down from a fight, especially when it comes to protecting the people of New Mexico. He sees exactly what Donald Trump and the Republicans are doing: pushing brutal cuts to programs that everyday families rely on, just to hand out one more tax break to billionaires who already have more than they’ll ever need. That’s not leadership. It’s greed — plain and simple. While prices keep rising and working families stretch every dollar, Republicans are busy rigging the system even further for the ultra-rich. And Gabe knows the damage that does — in our towns, our rural communities, our schools and our homes. He’s doing everything he can to stop it. But he can’t do it alone. NM-02 is key to flipping the House blue and stopping Trump’s agenda. We’re up against deep pockets — but if we all chip in what we can, we can hold the line and win. = | | = Thanks, Austin \- - - Begin Forwarded Message from Gabe Vasquez \- - - Let’s call Trump’s “big, beautiful bill” what it really is: a blatant money grab by Donald Trump and Republicans — all at the expense of the rest of us. Republicans are pushing for cuts to critical programs that millions of Americans rely on just to survive — housing, food assistance, healthcare — all so they can hand out even more tax breaks to billionaires who already have everything. Trump doesn’t need another break. Elon doesn’t need another loophole. But working families? They need a break from rising prices, shrinking paychecks, and a government that keeps turning its back on them. I’m tired of watching our most vulnerable communities get pushed aside so the ultra-rich can hoard even more. This isn’t sound policy — it’s cruelty dressed up as fiscal responsibility. They think no one’s paying attention or cares. That we’ll just let it slide. But we won’t. I won’t. Holding this seat is absolutely critical to stopping Trump’s agenda and protecting the programs that actually help people. Every single donation — no matter the amount — helps us stand our ground and build the campaign we need to win. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . name: David Hogg
subject: This is HUGE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Our fundraising team just shared some really cool news with me.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250528-1&t=1&akid=2189%2E587540%2ElhePGH)
Our fundraising team just shared some really cool news with me, Peter:
We’re about to hit a milestone: _nearly 200,000 grassroots donors._ We only need 1,000 new supporters to donate to reach it – **and we want you to be one of them.**
**[Peter, can you make a $5 contribution now before the May deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250528_1_eom?refcode=em20250528-2189&amount=5&refcode2=2189_587540_lhePGH&akid=2189%2E587540%2ElhePGH)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250528_1_eom?amount=5&refcode=em20250528-2189&refcode2=2189_587540_lhePGH&akid=2189%2E587540%2ElhePGH)**
It’s mind-blowing how much Leaders We Deserve has grown since we started in 2023. We never imagined we’d have a community of grassroots donors 200,000 strong less than two years later. This powerful grassroots team is fueling our fight.
We’ve accomplished some big things together, electing Nadarius Clark in 2023 and a slate of young progressives last November. **And we aren’t slowing down.**
We’ve got huge plans for the midterms, including a $20 million investment in young progressive primary challengers running against ineffective Democrats.
**If we want to turn our plans into action and elect the next generation of bold Democratic leaders, every single one of us on this team has to do their part.**
**[Peter, you still have a chance to be one of the first 200,000 donors to back Leaders We Deserve. Will you donate $5 now to help keep up the fight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250528_1_eom?refcode=em20250528-2189&amount=5&refcode2=2189_587540_lhePGH&akid=2189%2E587540%2ElhePGH)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250528-1&t=2&refcode2=2189_587540_lhePGH&akid=2189%2E587540%2ElhePGH)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2189%2E587540%2ElhePGH)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2189%2E587540%2ElhePGH)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
